name: Voter Registration Team [Voter Action Project]
subject: Just a few weeks left
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
We have a few weeks left to register voters in key states with elections this year, like New Jersey and Virginia, where governorships and control of the state legislatures hang in the balance.
It is crucial to make sure the voices of every eligible voter are heard not only in November but also in next year's critical elections. Our work will determine whether we can protect and expand voting rights or see further erosion of our democracy and suppression of ourselves, our friends, or our neighbors.
Team: Step up and make a difference today! RUSH $24 or more to help register new voters, defend voting rights, and so much more >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?refcode=091625_2&amount=24]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
It's National Voter Registration Day, Team. It's a day where organizations like ours and so many other partners around the country focus on registering as many voters as possible ahead of the 2025 elections and next year's crucial midterms.
Why is this so important?. There's a direct line from voter registrations to our elections to Congress and our courts , and we need to turn our hopes and frustrations into action to make sure every voice is heard in our elections, not just the privileged and powerful.
Voter registration is a critical part of grassroots efforts to protect voting rights. The more people who vote, the more our government looks like we, the people. But to get to the point where every vote counts we need your help .
Let's Do This: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?refcode=091625_2&amount=24]
Just $3 can help register a new voter. Will you chip in $24 or more today to help register 8 new voters? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?refcode=091625_2&amount=24]
GIVE $24 RIGHT NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?refcode=091625_2&amount=24]
Voter participation is increasing, and young people see the importance of voting now more than ever. Voting quickly becomes a habit -- a habit our democracy sorely needs to fulfill the promise of the American dream. Overwhelming key states with new voter registrations can help turn the tide against the voter suppression laws we've seen passed over the last few years.
This next election will determine whether our democracy continues in the darkness, lies, and conspiracy theories flying around or if we will reclaim our rights and march forward to a better future. New voter registration -- at just about $3 per new voter -- can make a huge difference.
Team: Our work depends on dedicated activists like you. Will you chip in $24 or whatever you can today to register new voters? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?refcode=091625_2&amount=24]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=091625_2&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=091625_2&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=091625_2&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=091625_2&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=091625_2&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?refcode=091625_2&amount=36]
Thank you,
Voter Action Project's Registration Team
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=091625_2&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=091625_2&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.
Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails are a crucial way to keep supporters up to date on the latest attacks on voting rights and our efforts to expand ballot access for all Americans. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=7Biz4oV7XuFlDAKlK%2BNNxsJvWjrN%2BbtspUCsUwEd%2FVMT3iSAMn55JFABRp%2Br47M3%2FCPA0WWmMZeK%2FcpOuv0%2FJspL8%2B%2FAJVOryOAZOu6HNLe8kP0xaC5kYTj0CVWok71R8nfF4eU2DdoY9yVPWUW%2BgQFL2ot5GQW9xlBRRvTf0WxWDZqFMFdntdQGpIQO%2FhtYZKmyKMU0nq0N9q7fODhoDAvx9WW1extR3TlX0z51hpQoqGWScFiObFKD8h1MVV56a4LlzNSJrCXGiRAE2bzuA%2Bx6z5E3CtMoyhZ%2BzkUb4EEetegqOhrpJlbP%2FQjC8CKpBOkFzgXcuC2HQVb%2BQt16QkERqAT625tfjNX3Yz74DJXtG76hWX%2FPjAJfEHGwUCsqgrREwmi%2BbwcgFe6Q5dhgl5n182UzEZ1x%2FLIMQMGWnU0%3D .

name: Team Katie Porter
subject: Katie’s opponents are already on TV—without us.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40158%2E3422442%2EWx9T3F)
Peter,
No BS—we can’t afford to fall behind in this campaign to elect Katie Porter as California’s next governor.
One of our opponents—who happens to be a billionaire—has already spent a whopping $1.4 million on TV ads.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250916_2_ak?refcode=em20250916-40158&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=40158_3422442_Wx9T3F&akid=40158%2E3422442%2EWx9T3F)
Another opponent just ran a TV ad attacking Katie Porter because she’s the clear Democratic frontrunner.
Our campaign has the momentum to win but we need **[your help](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250916_2_ak?refcode=em20250916-40158&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=40158_3422442_Wx9T3F&akid=40158%2E3422442%2EWx9T3F)** to get on TV so we can share Katie’s message of standing up _against_ Trump and fighting for Californians to millions of people at a time.
Running ads in California is incredibly expensive. Los Angeles is one of the most costly media markets in the entire nation. **This is the moment we either rise to meet their money and attacks—or risk falling behind.**
**[→ Please, share a contribution of $5 right now so we can get Katie’s message on the air and make sure Californians know they have a champion in this race.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250916_2_ak?refcode=em20250916-40158&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=40158_3422442_Wx9T3F&akid=40158%2E3422442%2EWx9T3F)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250916_2_ak?refcode=em20250916-40158&refcode2=40158_3422442_Wx9T3F&akid=40158%2E3422442%2EWx9T3F)
More soon,
Team Porter

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250916-40158&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=40158_3422442_Wx9T3F&akid=40158%2E3422442%2EWx9T3F)**

name: Team Maxine
subject: This is OUR democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maxine for Congress
body:
https://maxinefororegon.com/ [https://maxinefororegon.com/]
Dear Peter,
With so much blame, division, and hostility—whether in redistricting battles, legal fights, or trampled precedents—it can feel as though our country has lost sight of the golden rule we learned as children: treat others as you want to be treated.
But this is our democracy, created in our image. And despite the harsh words and finger-pointing flooding the internet and reverberating through the halls of Congress, we still have the power to shape our democracy, demand better for ourselves and our families, and make our voices heard.
Today, on Voter Registration Day, we honor the promise at the heart of our democracy that every American has a voice in choosing leaders who reflect their values. Leaders like Maxine Dexter, who see America as it truly is, a nation of people facing challenges with courage, community, and innovation.
The best way forward begins with making sure every voice is heard. If you haven’t already, register to vote today. [https://sos.oregon.gov/voting/Pages/registration.aspx?lang=en]
REGISTER TO VOTE [https://sos.oregon.gov/voting/Pages/registration.aspx?lang=en]
And if you have:
* Moved
* Recently married
* Changed your name
...you may need to update your voter registration. [https://sos.oregon.gov/voting/Pages/myvote.aspx?lang=en]
CHECK YOUR REGISTRATION [https://sos.oregon.gov/voting/Pages/myvote.aspx?lang=en]
If you are already registered or are not yet able to register, you can support candidates like Dr. Maxine Dexter by rushing what you can to help them take back the House and Senate >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q3?refcode=x_250916_voterregistrationday_act]
We still believe in the American experiment,
Team Maxine
DONATE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q3?refcode=x_250916_voterregistrationday_act]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q3?refcode=x_250916_voterregistrationday_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q3?refcode=x_250916_voterregistrationday_act] Maxine Dexter is a critical care physician with decades of experience using facts and following science to help her patients.
Now she's using those skills in Congress to ensure healthy communities by standing up to Big Pharma, fighting climate change, and expanding reproductive rights, as well as rebuilding a fair economy for all by protecting Social Security and Medicare.
To learn more about Maxine, visit MaxineForOregon.com [https://maxinefororegon.com/] .
DONATE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q3?refcode=x_250916_voterregistrationday_act]
DONATE MONTHLY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q3?refcode=x_250916_voterregistrationday_act&recurring=1]
https://www.facebook.com/maxinefororegon [https://www.facebook.com/maxinefororegon] https://x.com/doctormaxine [https://x.com/doctormaxine] https://www.instagram.com/maxinefororegon/ [https://www.instagram.com/maxinefororegon/] https://www.threads.net/@maxinefororegon [https://www.threads.net/@maxinefororegon]

Maxine Dexter for Oregon
PO Box 12209
Portland, OR 97212
United States
Paid for by Maxine for Congress
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/yk6Vk5bIekGRnCPvf1tywQ2?unsubscribedata=XziMbx%2BFLYhTPgEeZvrMfsAyyieAT%2Fi3z7y9nFOgWlIipdfiK32%2BU0eykv5FQugvf3ROBxcSNKiVYgr5M4iHmJpjsKIjwzTEuqh7uOorwb%2BSffREHDM6U%2FiDz5idwO2clAQG5DG54dzRAw%2Fekrhq5ATGYKLbFCP7uOQZudVL1nhus7Dxmsn3A4KuxuWFIbzCH4F8Dx2hk0kVV9TaQOoUhHeAuLsrd5Q4WVfcW%2BMuYdOo43GVhTbjD3%2FqunUJmBXqCzT9RgZendJK8Wc%2FtkkDHq90NluR3LpKhPFaZ9Wwbxk%2B2GyvRE8pe1IQkAjvro6ekj03iRh6ZACDiN%2BnFO9zkTzcDJeFz%2F%2FxNAYy3vfYxVeuFtOcVeYxaIS00RdSZrysglZcpFq8oTOJYC6Lp9h%2BW5Pj8LUs8vYyl54kQGqPE72crkGeqBAXsE6R1XMxBLTJ .

name: Coach Tuberville
subject: They’re not going to put a muzzle on me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TUBERVILLE FOR GOVERNOR, INC
body:
I need 2,000 Patriots who are unafraid to join me in standing up for our freedoms
| [ ](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=fa953249216e4257879bf6003b0d5f1d&_e=AD-Xu-V6qIEGyGj0Kj1eOok6rk5_pG45AgsQ-QYJiWfjESJircukgSOGGsctgcAIuHWRBhfX_X8lUszjtdF1OeLkQBQNh6H48VNoomSbMfmkp0nGFyVPgm7kxk5IOtqC9JudxwEqHOPT482MB_eeX1UglxmvokrQIHJn0wBn_z66-CDVGIN70xiXyZzC8pUwVzZbsyvbyV2WyXUjiA_-eRfA4zEMEbdI5iqWyTeN7S8JArUeubw0g8yXersKe0r5pixafoIopZlbbmZa4QeYOh0uPbsDzNz7R8geF3F53y2ZnyI-5Ypdls5sWQ5srUsoaq2DfHr1GIBcVkDzJFWekZmXP7lfGU2Ekdq6quuNUqhySIknev6_qeYSNczgG8zIVXI61bX57vq1Gfw5DenYAgr1D7DqEb5x-ANuXHbB1VBtNAcI_eCv_NXEeHwYaaVZQQT7Qb5txo6X-2-ubjyusCim75puzBZpzXDZ0OWSXSIroy2zK99dhcQPPwnSxy-TVua8xx-ArUh6zGqmNRxwYCxZntXAhDZz2FvaKoBM87FUi2DRngI0W4qkNSii7SWr)
---
Peter,

_I 've faced death threats. I've been swatted a couple of times. You're not going to stop these Radicals._

**They want to scare us into silence. They 're not going to put a muzzle on me.**

_Enough is enough. I 'm tired of reaching out to Radicals who think political violence is the answer to an open debate._

They're hypocrites. They might love this country, but they don't believe in this country in the way it's supposed to be.

They don't believe in free speech. They only believe in guns when they're killing people.

**If they really wanted to be a principled country under God 's values, they'd stand up and condemn these evil acts of political violence. But they're not.**

_This is not about feelings. This is about people 's lives._

**Folks, I 've built my campaign for Alabama's governor on one thing: advancing President Trump's America First Agenda to help all Alabamians and Americans.

** **But right now, our entire Constitution is under attack.** From our right to freely express ourselves to our right to bear arms, Conservatives are on the front lines defending our way of life.

**Like I said, I 'll NEVER let them put a muzzle on me.** [**And I’m looking for 2,000 Patriots who are unafraid to join me.**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=fa953249216e4257879bf6003b0d5f1d&_e=AD-Xu-V6qIEGyGj0Kj1eOok6rk5_pG45AgsQ-QYJiWfjESJircukgSOGGsctgcAIuHWRBhfX_X8lUszjtdF1OeLkQBQNh6H48VNoomSbMfmkp0nGFyVPgm7kxk5IOtqC9JudxwEqHOPT482MB_eeX1UglxmvokrQIHJn0wBn_z66-CDVGIN70xiXyZzC8pUwP62BYJyhhussETKx5a4z-8Xof0es88WLHgRsOPWwXceEUUuwU1_dwV4Sby5iSSMAu7gP5UcVoEwzApRTSxmkk_GAMYGu5jZXAdN6rBPK_gLFMG2F36z1zxYwOb9SkdN8keHX91rlOy79dub9sN3z3dmazQZ9jqQvOqY19_1S2CgNqWqjx3tdrjY0jpxk7PvtTPtDukZTIKRcSAXjKtWpBTFUUNbMgLrBtK5hzOk-0rwRFPkAlCoRmKMrGBZPbWw3P6Pt0CNQGOCEY_lbVcW0tXqazTre7bEjjWnvBfRMIYxEcx0fECMxYudf6KYuzaAMUcXNaDTif6RNxbm9XlII4_NlsVX7OZpkJzgfcXPWUjRjYqz1cqNCSRbElJtNjBAX)

| [ **JOIN ME** ](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=fa953249216e4257879bf6003b0d5f1d&_e=AD-Xu-V6qIEGyGj0Kj1eOok6rk5_pG45AgsQ-QYJiWfjESJircukgSOGGsctgcAIuHWRBhfX_X8lUszjtdF1OeLkQBQNh6H48VNoomSbMfmkp0nGFyVPgm7kxk5IOtqC9JudxwEqHOPT482MB_eeX1UglxmvokrQIHJn0wBn_z66-CDVGIN70xiXyZzC8pUwTHNy16YzuL9DEE2FXozRczdsc5LmRIeP4mC9_BRKkQwaV0bPSl2M6XnvDCV7Nd1jcTdwM9RLjZVueUGvS3cGldX13fwAI3D6CXPRFDo9VKonAEBgpgm1ETNybw0mXVAPIBOgOWfFfoPyj6afk70Bdh8zTlEnbwOh-GATw5l2vBLHnL2P223GD_JOuxw9rPD-9GbIdcwGR7siYpLXra8k31hm1fOiAgWgcQIKIfqfmBGqLG_NPSlrYwVrR0GbC2o_9NdODVtgxmwxpyqenIq0zhkrHdYYiu2d-pXN0humNljZsr-PNFHyHFywtWH-kFWvvinx2ZupA-wWWzURNC-qxow2kX2788XF8Z3r1AKBbOV_8CjLbpWdr6dr473oIUQO)
---

Conservatives are at a crossroads. Either we shut up and let the Far Left Radicals win, or we speak up and make it crystal clear: **you will not threaten us to hand over the keys to the freest country in the world.**

[**Will you be one of the 2,000 Patriots to join me?**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=fa953249216e4257879bf6003b0d5f1d&_e=AD-Xu-V6qIEGyGj0Kj1eOok6rk5_pG45AgsQ-QYJiWfjESJircukgSOGGsctgcAIuHWRBhfX_X8lUszjtdF1OeLkQBQNh6H48VNoomSbMfmkp0nGFyVPgm7kxk5IOtqC9JudxwEqHOPT482MB_eeX1UglxmvokrQIHJn0wBn_z66-CDVGIN70xiXyZzC8pUwgxDIJXFllzP8yNKyJ6GGpcf6JbG6mCIpUoEoSGrfzR6AJzrOWF4uSr_iOJ_0MpMEorlgmugVhzXSVY6m9uWiYYIGKcEVKq9Ngnbwo3_r-lWL5RQWOl1zdWXFG1rgZchGlppYmgpGHS4rxNLaFoewVqt36P81Bl8OdXYNVQK5HbDv96utNvRHY56SJH_f1VyER5rfmKqDN4f0An84-J6pVRIv-ijBiIAFj65Yjz6YV5eg40wG5jgq4ORO7gU2gfvKZD1mLVvBGkCMWKX9BEQSO1Sh9UKu2tfGY1Lro8ErpDCl-SqEd5d9YWCBA3DN4pcRIBz_Clcmgv4NGLHj5NUjcouB6HXN5v8sCHQhKX2UVXL1JNHow9ikq3eCR_DWoTyb)

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=fa953249216e4257879bf6003b0d5f1d&_e=AD-Xu-V6qIEGyGj0Kj1eOok6rk5_pG45AgsQ-QYJiWfjESJircukgSOGGsctgcAIuHWRBhfX_X8lUszjtdF1OeLkQBQNh6H48VNoomSbMfmkp0nGFyVPgm7kxk5IOtqC9JudxwEqHOPT482MB_eeX1UglxmvokrQIHJn0wBn_z66-CDVGIN70xiXyZzC8pUwlAE7kpzc1xCQqRuItisEae8gR2fREZ_VPi-ZhYVBblWvU89RymZN6AIm_0r7-RrSo8bV7W_0Skqhtv8wDZini5FDdm2jYJ-uoMJFaVurIKgK7ENlXuMc_3PbaXHbfgJDSTexgr7yxJLijz2bAjLEfRMkJF8w4mf1t7S9NrSGgBx3u-At-q6tOMNH_Ox8zXhEeHhqd_TgjwVQSkGXiAFnNfwcwDruR8ahG38s_D4NgS0JXPvCU2Y08mZ3cO7uqmY8n6OxgYKic8o8JmwR_II_zsEELr67gxk-I_xfnDtPZ00QU_Xw2xKgiNI7wfO1BriA94kSPHXD3Cvu9C5BQXQR7OyETZC1r-rUUyKfWFgIPGgm4zYBK5j3OrkfA9rho8Gh)

subject: big news from the weekend

body:
#
Did you see the big news?
[](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250916-2.KUBpc3&refcode=ema20250916-240358&t=2&akid=240358%2E444211%2EUqvaGU)
_Here’s what went down:_
First, we took Ken Paxton to court over his political witch hunt as he did everything he could to shut Powered by People down, stop us from speaking out, and keep us from registering and turning out voters.
Then, we won with state appeals court judges — who were all hand-picked by Republican Greg Abbott — unanimously ruling against Paxton and immediately removing his restraining order from our critical work.
Now, we need your help to capitalize on this momentum and get our organizing and fundraising back on track. Defeating Paxton in court wasn’t cheap; over the last month, we’ve spent nearly $400,000 in legal fees fighting him.
[**As we celebrate this big victory, will you contribute $3 to Powered by People to help ensure we have the resources necessary to organize in every part of Texas?**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250916-2.KUBpc3&refcode=ema20250916-240358&t=3&akid=240358%2E444211%2EUqvaGU)

name: Tim Walz
subject: This is why I’m running for reelection, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for By Heartland Patriots
body:
I’m officially running for reelection as Governor of Minnesota.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95305?refcode=em20250916-9427&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9427%2E614464%2ED6doue)
Peter, I wanted to reach out personally to share this news with you:
**I’m officially running for reelection as Governor of Minnesota, because our work to make our state the best place in America to live, work, and raise a family isn’t finished.**
**[If you’re with me, can I count on you to split a donation between my campaign and Heartland Patriots today? Knowing I have your early support in this race would mean the world to me.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95305?refcode=em20250916-9427&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9427%2E614464%2ED6doue)**
If you have stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Tim Walz and Heartland Patriots will process instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95306?refcode=em20250916-9427&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=3&akid=9427%2E614464%2ED6doue) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95306?refcode=em20250916-9427&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=4&akid=9427%2E614464%2ED6doue) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95306?refcode=em20250916-9427&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=5&akid=9427%2E614464%2ED6doue) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95306?refcode=em20250916-9427&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=6&akid=9427%2E614464%2ED6doue) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95306?refcode=em20250916-9427&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=7&akid=9427%2E614464%2ED6doue) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95306?refcode=em20250916-9427&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=8&akid=9427%2E614464%2ED6doue) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95305?refcode=em20250916-9427&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=9427%2E614464%2ED6doue)
---
I grew up in Butte, Nebraska – a town of 400 people. There were 24 kids in my high school class. Living in a small town, you learn early on what it means to look out for your neighbors and to serve others.
That call to service is what led me to enlist in the Army National Guard just two days after my 17th birthday. I was proud to wear the uniform of this country for the next 24 years.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95305?refcode=em20250916-9427&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=9427%2E614464%2ED6doue)
My drive to serve others eventually set me on a new path: teaching. My wife Gwen and I met while teaching high school. Kids carry their whole lives with them into the classroom and Gwen and I got to know our students and see the obstacles they faced. **It was my experience as a teacher and my passion for education that led me to run for governor.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95305?refcode=em20250916-9427&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=9427%2E614464%2ED6doue)
Serving as Governor of Minnesota has been the honor of my life, and I couldn’t be prouder of the progress we’ve won. From providing universal free school meals for students, to protecting reproductive freedom, and cutting taxes for the middle class, we’ve secured tangible results that Minnesotans can actually feel.
The values that inspired me to serve our country in uniform, become an educator, and run for governor are the same ones I still carry with me each day as I work for the people of Minnesota. I still believe in helping our neighbors, protecting our freedoms, and investing in the future for our next generation. And I believe that, despite Donald Trump and MAGA’s attempts to tear us apart, we are still all in this together.
**Right now, we have an opportunity to continue delivering progress for Minnesotans – but only if we hold onto this Governor seat.** That’s why I’m asking you to have my back today, Peter.
**[Would you split a donation between my campaign and Heartland Patriots? Thank you in advance for your support.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95305?refcode=em20250916-9427&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=12&akid=9427%2E614464%2ED6doue)**
**[DONATE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/95305?refcode=em20250916-9427&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=13&akid=9427%2E614464%2ED6doue)**
I’ll be in touch soon,
Tim Walz

Prepared and Paid for By Heartland Patriots
Prepared and Paid for By Tim Walz for Governor

| [](https://www.facebook.com/lucaskuncemo/) | [](https://twitter.com/lucaskuncemo) | [](https://www.instagram.com/lucaskuncemo/)

name: Ron Wyden
subject: Some thoughts on the events of this past week:
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
I denounce any and all political violence in the strongest of terms. I denounce anyone who would use the events of the last week as a pretense to stifle peaceful political debate.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115353924/570057624/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzIzMDMzNS02MTkzLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1eKNiuJS1eOGmYrVXDKTVdRoHwg0n7kn6cFoPaFOYJc=&emci=4f624eb8-3e93-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=fc230335-6193-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=9818364)
---

| | I'd like to take a minute to acknowledge the events of the last week. Like many of you, I am left gravely concerned about the state of politics in our country. Let me be very clear: political violence has no place in America. Whether you agree with someone's political views and beliefs or not, I think we can all agree that one of the things that makes our country great is the right to speak and express ourselves freely without the fear of violence. I denounce any and all political violence in the strongest of terms. I denounce anyone who would use the events of the last week as a pretense to stifle peaceful political debate, and I will always defend every American's right to free speech. And know that as Oregon's senior senator, I remain committed to any and all work that helps to unify our country and give everyone a fair chance, not divide us further. More soon, _Ron_ |
---|---|---

subject: the cost of ignoring public schools

body:
Take our new public education poll by midnight

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=777%2E49239%2EpYQCnf)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5937?t=2&akid=777%2E49239%2EpYQCnf)
---
It’s back-to-school season, but too many students and teachers in Michigan are already at a disadvantage.

**Why?** Because the Trump administration has pushed _devastating_ federal cuts to education – and the consequences? 👇
📉 Fewer resources for teachers and classrooms

🍎 Decreased support for students with disabilities

🧠 Reduced access to mental health care in schools

🧪 Lost investments in STEM fields

🏫 And a higher gap in the quality of education between schools – especially in working-class communities
At a time when we should be investing _more_ in our children, Trump’s chaos agenda is gutting public education.
**[But we want to know what YOU think, null. We need 75 responses from 18326 by midnight, so take our one-click poll ASAP:](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5938?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=3&akid=777%2E49239%2EpYQCnf)**
**Do you approve of the Trump administration's cuts to education?**
| | | [YES](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5938?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=4&akid=777%2E49239%2EpYQCnf)
---
| [NO](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5938?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=5&akid=777%2E49239%2EpYQCnf)
---
In solidarity,

Team Haley Stevens
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5939?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=6&akid=777%2E49239%2EpYQCnf) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5937?t=7&akid=777%2E49239%2EpYQCnf)

Thank you,
Haley

[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/6ab87ee2-56a3-483b-8563-3ad915a07ef7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Hey folks,
My buddy Stefan had to bail at the last minute because he was trapped in Utah, but the conversation we got into today is absolutely essential viewing.
I went deep on the right's disturbing response to Charlie Kirk's assassination--and why their rhetoric right now is so dangerous. We talked about Kash Patel's disastrous performance in front of Senate Judiciary and we also touched on the economic pain people are feeling and how it's being completely ignored by those in power.
Here's what we covered:
* **[00:01:52] The GOP's weaponization of Charlie Kirk 's death** -- I break down why their reaction has nothing to do with grief and everything to do with political escalation and weaponization.
* **[00:05:51] Online radicalization and mass violence** -- What we know (and don't know) about the shooter's motivations, and why both sides need to stop spreading disinfo.
* **[00:08:59] This country is a powder keg** -- I lay out the emotional toll of living in a country so divided and why I'm choosing love over hate--no matter how hard it gets.
* **[00:23:02] Kash Patel 's disaster week at the FBI** -- From a Senate hearing meltdown to embarrassing Fox & Friends moments, Patel is proving he's not built for this job.
* **[00:34:39] The economy is cracking --fast** -- Credit scores are falling off a cliff, people are defaulting at 2008 rates, and Trump's still bragging about economic strength.

**[If you believe in compassion, truth, and community--if you're angry, confused, or just trying to make sense of all this--you belong here. Become a paid subscriber today to help build the kind of media and movement we actually need right now.](https://substack.com/redirect/6ab87ee2-56a3-483b-8563-3ad915a07ef7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
With urgency,
--Mike

name: Atkins for Governor
subject: Welcome to Team Toni — Let’s Get to Work! 💪
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Toni Atkins for Governor 2026**
body:
Welcome to the FIRST Atkins for Governor Volunteer Newsletter

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/038faa753b29/welcome-to-team-toni-lets-get-to-work?e=199d0c411d)
---
|
---
| | | | | | Hi,
My name is Ryan Brummelen, and I am the San Diego Field Organizer for Team Toni. We want to thank you for being an early supporter of Toni Atkins! It’s going to take all of us working together to elect Toni Atkins as California’s next governor, so we welcome you to our growing team!
At our San Diego HQ opening, Assemblymember Chris Ward and Mayor Todd Gloria emphasized that **WE WIN** by starting early. That’s why we are kicking off the campaign with both virtual and in-person opportunities to reach voters across the state. 📣
We look forward to you taking action with us to cut through the noise early on in this race, build trust with voters, and make sure friends and families know exactly who we stand with and why. Now as Toni has said, **LET’S GET TO WORK!** 💪
In solidarity,Ryan
---
| | | | | | | | | | | |
# Campaign Updates
---
|
---
| | Toni just completed her statewide tour that made stops across the state beginning in Red Bluff and ending in Riverside. As she traveled across the state, she met with electeds, union leaders, and residents to discuss housing, health care, affordability, and more. Her tour evoked her roots in rural Virginia as she took to smaller communities and emphasized the importance of never leaving anyone behind as governor.
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| |
---
| |
# Help Elect Toni!
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| | We are hosting**Coffee and Calls ☕**📞 for Toni every **Sunday** at our SD HQ.
**What:** Enjoy fresh coffee, connect with fellow supporters, and help us reach voters for Toni!
**When:** Every Sunday from 10:00 AM - 12:00 PM
**Where:** RSVP for address
Click [here ](https://toniatkins.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3cbee461b78e563cc543d0752&id=4042479072&e=199d0c411d)to register for a Sunday that works best for you today!
---
| |
---
| | Join us at one of our recurring phonebanks for Toni! 📱
**What:** Phone voters in San Diego County to help us build our support and volunteer base!
**When:** [Thursday 9/18](https://toniatkins.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3cbee461b78e563cc543d0752&id=7388304f88&e=199d0c411d) and [Tuesday 9/23](https://toniatkins.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3cbee461b78e563cc543d0752&id=ea503c7ada&e=199d0c411d)
**Where:** Hosted on Zoom
If you would like to join one of these sessions in person at our SD HQ, please email ryan@toniatkins.org.
---
| | | | | | | | | | | |
# Volunteer Snapshot
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| |
---
| | **Several supporters joined us on Sunday at San Diego Headquarters for Coffee and Calls for Toni!**
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| |

**Stay in the loop on all volunteer events****by downloading**[**Outreach Circle!**](https://toniatkins.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3cbee461b78e563cc543d0752&id=df2174f9f2&e=199d0c411d)**Code: KLV849**

name: Oregon GOP
subject: United, We Cannot Be Broken
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE OREGON REPUBLICAN PARTY (COMMITTEE ID 379) 187 HIGH ST
body:
The Left’s hatred cannot and will not destroy our love for one another, our state, or our country.

| | | | [ ](https://secure.winred.com/oregon-republican-party/sept-midmonth-petition?utm_source=ac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20250916_ORGOP_SeptMidmonthPetition&utm_id=CE)
---
---
| | Friend, The radicals want to tear America apart – _pitting neighbor against neighbor, sowing hatred, and fueling division._ **But we will NOT let them succeed.** We know that our strength comes from standing together on the principles that matter most: **faith, family, freedom, and America First.** We are families, friends, and neighbors. We are Oregonians. We are Americans. _**And we are bound by something far greater than politics.**_ **The radical Left’s hatred cannot –** _**and will not**_**– destroy our love for one another, our state, or our country.** Now more than ever, we reject the Left’s hollow calls for “unity” that mean surrender – **_and instead embrace true unity rooted in our shared values._** When we stand together,_**_we are stronger._**_ When we speak together, _**_we are louder._**_ When we fight together, _**_we are unstoppable._**_ [**_Add your name TODAY to show that you stand shoulder-to-shoulder with your fellow Americans – and that you refuse to let the Left divide us. >>>_**](https://links.infooregongop.com/els/v2/~ye9Q78L~8Jy/Tjk2V0NDOTk2bzFqdEJvcndscUhUWHZybVNpYWZ2Ti9ndXZ4V2VCQmxyemV4K21ySlpYVXQzVVRVRy9WaUJkZ1VtWVpSakF5Mmt3bTVLWjlJSzRzZ3prZHJpcVNZbXJTNGRLbVZUUCtYNU09S0/)

name: David Hogg
subject: Something that sets us apart
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
We’re transforming movements into power.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250916-1&t=1&akid=2661%2E587540%2EzUTcIW)
Peter, I hear the same kind of frustrated reaction to Democratic fundraising a lot:
**_“Why are you asking me for $5 when Trump is destroying our country and Democrats aren’t doing anything about it?”_**
I can’t speak for every group, but I do know what sets Leaders We Deserve apart.
We represent a generation of people who walked out of their schools, marching with millions of their peers to demand action on gun violence and mass shootings.
Young people are at the forefront of progressive movements, fighting for solutions on issues like gun reform, climate change, student debt, and Gaza, to name a few.
Now, these same young leaders are old enough to actually run for political office, right at the time when we need a massive movement of young people in power.
**Leaders We Deserve exists to transform these movements into political power.** Running for office is more expensive than ever — and these young leaders need our support to help lead their movements into state legislatures and Congress. We know that the billionaire class isn’t showing up to bankroll these campaigns, so it’s not an exaggeration to say they can’t win these fights without grassroots support.
**[Peter, can you contribute $5 to power our transformational movement?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250916_1_transformational?refcode=em20250916-2661&amount=5&refcode2=2661_587540_zUTcIW&akid=2661%2E587540%2EzUTcIW)**
**The young candidates that Leaders We Deserve supports are gamechangers. They will revitalize the Democratic Party and revolutionize our government.**
Our candidates are leading the fight to rebuild our political system. And they aren’t rebuilding the same political system that brought us school shootings, climate change, and everything that younger generations have to deal with in America.
They’re building something better — a system that actually _works_ for the people.
I believe that a big part of the answer to Donald Trump is building a movement of young people who will take back the reins of our government from the far right.
**Young people are up to this challenge.** If history has taught us anything, it's that great generations aren’t born, they’re made in the crucible of awful circumstances.
So when you give a donation to Leaders We Deserve, you aren’t just throwing out money at the status quo. You are investing in a different vision for what’s possible.
**[Please — pitch in $5 now to join our movement and fight for our future.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250916_1_transformational?refcode=em20250916-2661&amount=5&refcode2=2661_587540_zUTcIW&akid=2661%2E587540%2EzUTcIW)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250916_1_transformational?amount=5&refcode=em20250916-2661&refcode2=2661_587540_zUTcIW&akid=2661%2E587540%2EzUTcIW)**
We can only do this work with your support. I deeply appreciate your generosity.
Thank you,
David Hogg
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250916-1&t=2&refcode2=2661_587540_zUTcIW&akid=2661%2E587540%2EzUTcIW)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=2661%2E587540%2EzUTcIW)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2661%2E587540%2EzUTcIW)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)
PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE.COM, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE

name: GOP Presidential
subject: Charlie Kirk's Final Words
body:
America is under attack as never before.

Dear Reader, Please find a special message from our paid sponsor, Newsmax. Sponsorships like this help to allow us to continue to send you our service free of charge. We appreciate your support.
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2za5ilr6lfcvvhur6gmpr3ptn2ge19hlue1lnpm7o_rp22sh2s8i6epb0shg6coj1c3h2bs)
---
America is under attack as never before. Our culture, our Judeo-Christian values, our traditions, our freedoms -- and our very country -- are all under attack. We saw this attack in the most vicious and bloody way with the **public assassination of Charlie Kirk**. Charlie Kirk was a conservative leader. But he was more. _He was a believing Christian._ In his own way he was an evangelist. Charlie Kirk's last published words -- his final words -- are the Foreword for the new book, **[Pagan Threat: Confronting America's Godless Uprising](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z61vopic0jnbs7qnk5uk43hss5dggcb7ate3rv2o_rp22sh2s8i6epb0shg6coj1c3h2bs)**. **[Pagan Threat](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z82qp4am43d6ubrvn0so70t00al15umun1ccqmng_rp22sh2s8i6epb0shg6coj1c3h2bs)** was written by Charlie's close friend Pastor Lucas Miles. Pastor Miles, the author of several bestselling books, served as a leader in Charlie's Turning Point Faith. Charlie told Pastor Miles he wanted to write this Foreword because **"America was in grave danger."** _**Charlie is right.**_ In his powerful Foreword, Charlie wrote: | "Because in today's America, the Christian faithful are faced with a _terrifying and broad array of dangers and threats_. "We are menaced not by new false gods, but _by the return of demons from long ago_. "In the Pagan world, **the individual human life was of no importance**."
---
These words are chilling, considering what happened in Utah.
**About the Author** **Lucas Miles** is a trusted voice on faith, politics, and culture. He hosts _The Lucas Miles Show_ on Faithwire, cohosts _The Church Boys_ podcast, and has interviewed guests like Sean Hannity and Jim Caviezel. A bestselling author (_Woke Jesus, Good God_), Lucas has appeared on Newsmax, Fox News, and CBN. An ordained pastor, he leads Nfluence Church and has served on global missions and at national events like the National Prayer Breakfast.
---
Now, in his boldest book yet -- **[Pagan Threat: Confronting America's Godless Uprising](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zg6nu7kjrdrlm48vepifm88m8ksa7jfjms4rke30_rp22sh2s8i6epb0shg6coj1c3h2bs)** -- Pastor Lucas Miles rips off the mask and reveals the shocking spiritual war happening right before our eyes.
The very same war in which Charlie was a soldier -- _he was also a victim_.
This is more than a book -- it's a wake-up call for all Americans and for faithful Christians who want to take a stand against the spiritual deception sweeping across America.
**[Pagan Threat](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1cqnd38p9nmgr428ht3fol6hcflo8j9l804l8i8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0shg6coj1c3h2bs) **serves as an insightful guide, a warning, and a call to action, urging readers to understand, confront, and ultimately defeat this enemy.
**[Pagan Threat](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztgqke7sit7ti5mmvlubpccrsp38dhbvr6d5th9o_rp22sh2s8i6epb0shg6coj1c3h2bs)** shows the connection between woke ideology and Paganism is not merely a coincidence but a natural progression.
Behind the emphasis on identity politics, intersectionality, wokeism, and radical inclusivity lie centuries-old ancient Pagan ideologies.
[Claim Your Free Copy Here »](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqgmc885n2ftrp1mefdp4f1u0n6j8dgs2uluetpo_rp22sh2s8i6epb0shg6coj1c3h2bs)
Pastor Lucas Miles does more than diagnose the threats we face; he aims to equip and inspire us to rise to the challenge and shows us how we can fight -- and win -- for our great cause.
He shows **how you can be like Charlie Kirk** -- how you can fight and win.
We must stand resolute against the encroaching darkness.
The future of our great nation depends on our collective strength, faith, and our unwavering commitment to the truth.
### Pagan Threat's Final Battle Plan to Win
| **Deepen our faith rooted in our values.**
---|---
| Develop a road map for engagement in the public square.
| **Leverage technology for America.**
| Redouble efforts to reach today's youth.
| **Implement a practical strategy for evangelism.**
| Directly combat woke doctrines and pagan ideologies.
| **Renew interest in biblical truths.**
**[Pagan Threat](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z811tc2i9tn9ienhfv312hrpepbp3aipj45v1prg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0shg6coj1c3h2bs)** shows we must focus on these essential steps needed to combat the rise of woke Paganism so we can fortify believers' faith and return our nation to its founding principles.
[Claim Your Free Copy Here »](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zi11041n66o9cd99kpdftui92el3fg39hr93j7pg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0shg6coj1c3h2bs)

name: Donald Trump, Jr.
subject: For Charlie For America
body:
His fire lit a movement. It's up to us to keep it burning.

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztns4vjs5a7e7k9ulg9sao58ug35ep5g7927hei8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0shg6coj1chh2bs)
---
Dear Friend, I don't even know how to begin to put into words the loss I am feeling... but this isn't about me. **Today, tomorrow, next week -- they're all about Charlie. ** Because Charlie was truly one of the best men I'll ever know. He changed the direction of this nation. He was a leader, a fighter, and a man whose character and conviction were rare. Too rare. He was an inspiration to millions around the world. **To me, Charlie was a little brother.** That honor I will carry with me forever.
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6ar3qbj5akj42fqd83erru0tnqj4a6fsdm119q0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0shg6coj1chh2bs)
---
I'm heartbroken knowing his death will leave a hole in the heart of our nation.... and an even larger one in my life. Charlie may no longer stand beside me -- to remind me to push on when things get tough._But his memory will.__And I 'll make sure it does for this country he loved so well._Charlie led a life of courage, strength, and conviction. **Now it 's time for me, for you, and for every patriot to stand up and fight for everything Charlie stood for. **He poured every ounce of energy he had into saving this nation -- and he did that through Turning Point USA.No one fought harder than Charlie. It was his mission in life to give people the courage to speak up -- and he did that. And none of us will ever be silenced again.He fought for you and all America. Now we must fight for him.**Friend, it 's on us to keep his life's work alive...** so it can continue to reach young people, change lives, and embolden the American people.**As his friend, I ask that you help me make certain that Charlie 's voice is never silenced, stopped, or forgotten.** That it's heard across the nation... in every church, in every school, and in every home for generations._Let 's make the world remember him._**[Friend, the only way to do that is to make Turning Point USA the biggest thing America has ever seen... because Charlie's legacy doesn't end here.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1aksbfj47pbvq2us62r0k99d7ukvbbkop3qi2hg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0shg6coj1chh2bs)**
---
[ **Give in Charlie's Honor**
**Support Turning Point USA**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zu1qhfba7hvb04vrdbocpigse7hs0so3fi4q3bs8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0shg6coj1chh2bs)
---
Charlie, we'll keep fighting the good fight. We'll carry forward the torch you lit... and we'll make sure it shines brighter than ever.**For you, we 'll save our great country.**Rest in peace, brother.**For Charlie,** Don Jr.
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zo2edle0eqgocj27cenjnaig9rc8vjsil2s9mu4g_rp22sh2s8i6epb0shg6coj1chh2bs)
---
[ **Give in Charlie's Honor**
**Support Turning Point USA**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zakt2ec378dnd9hcc43onll87p2cts7e2sutrl10_rp22sh2s8i6epb0shg6coj1chh2bs)

name: First Look News
subject: In his last work Charlie Kirk predicted
body:
America is under attack as never before.

Dear Reader, Please find a special message from our paid sponsor, Newsmax. Sponsorships like this help to allow us to continue to send you our service free of charge. We appreciate your support.
---
| [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zj0b763nai364p8ek2p26g49die23geao03h40no_rp22sh2s8i6epb0shg66o76chh2bs)
---
America is under attack as never before. Our culture, our Judeo-Christian values, our traditions, our freedoms -- and our very country -- are all under attack. We saw this attack in the most vicious and bloody way with the **public assassination of Charlie Kirk**. Charlie Kirk was a conservative leader. But he was more. _He was a believing Christian._ In his own way he was an evangelist. Charlie Kirk's last published words -- his final words -- are the Foreword for the new book, **[Pagan Threat: Confronting America's Godless Uprising](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z9iqnml7oaqsnkepsfuunnj1mpmvgop91jlu5egg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0shg66o76chh2bs)**. **[Pagan Threat](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zateifsnrs59rr2gi6948ars8s0j84bue072c7qo_rp22sh2s8i6epb0shg66o76chh2bs)** was written by Charlie's close friend Pastor Lucas Miles. Pastor Miles, the author of several bestselling books, served as a leader in Charlie's Turning Point Faith. Charlie told Pastor Miles he wanted to write this Foreword because **"America was in grave danger."** _**Charlie is right.**_ In his powerful Foreword, Charlie wrote: | "Because in today's America, the Christian faithful are faced with a _terrifying and broad array of dangers and threats_. "We are menaced not by new false gods, but _by the return of demons from long ago_. "In the Pagan world, **the individual human life was of no importance**."
---
These words are chilling, considering what happened in Utah.
**About the Author** **Lucas Miles** is a trusted voice on faith, politics, and culture. He hosts _The Lucas Miles Show_ on Faithwire, cohosts _The Church Boys_ podcast, and has interviewed guests like Sean Hannity and Jim Caviezel. A bestselling author (_Woke Jesus, Good God_), Lucas has appeared on Newsmax, Fox News, and CBN. An ordained pastor, he leads Nfluence Church and has served on global missions and at national events like the National Prayer Breakfast.
---
Now, in his boldest book yet -- **[Pagan Threat: Confronting America's Godless Uprising](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z61u5mohn48tkht20aj8llc9mtebq44kpaqsatv8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0shg66o76chh2bs)** -- Pastor Lucas Miles rips off the mask and reveals the shocking spiritual war happening right before our eyes.
The very same war in which Charlie was a soldier -- _he was also a victim_.
This is more than a book -- it's a wake-up call for all Americans and for faithful Christians who want to take a stand against the spiritual deception sweeping across America.
**[Pagan Threat](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zcru7rj743057bdg6ke0egsu6pfu90bmm0jdlf00_rp22sh2s8i6epb0shg66o76chh2bs) **serves as an insightful guide, a warning, and a call to action, urging readers to understand, confront, and ultimately defeat this enemy.
**[Pagan Threat](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z90uv49f42ojkg7sqn2hm2n8ja6otgmm81tu4kmg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0shg66o76chh2bs)** shows the connection between woke ideology and Paganism is not merely a coincidence but a natural progression.
Behind the emphasis on identity politics, intersectionality, wokeism, and radical inclusivity lie centuries-old ancient Pagan ideologies.
[Claim Your Free Copy Here »](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zit3t3d97su65vi7kao8ijieq891jp6tcq457018_rp22sh2s8i6epb0shg66o76chh2bs)
Pastor Lucas Miles does more than diagnose the threats we face; he aims to equip and inspire us to rise to the challenge and shows us how we can fight -- and win -- for our great cause.
He shows **how you can be like Charlie Kirk** -- how you can fight and win.
We must stand resolute against the encroaching darkness.
The future of our great nation depends on our collective strength, faith, and our unwavering commitment to the truth.
### Pagan Threat's Final Battle Plan to Win
| **Deepen our faith rooted in our values.**
---|---
| Develop a road map for engagement in the public square.
| **Leverage technology for America.**
| Redouble efforts to reach today's youth.
| **Implement a practical strategy for evangelism.**
| Directly combat woke doctrines and pagan ideologies.
| **Renew interest in biblical truths.**
**[Pagan Threat](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zdg6cdtntjcii4srcs924m0oc2d9kdqro23rkb3g_rp22sh2s8i6epb0shg66o76chh2bs)** shows we must focus on these essential steps needed to combat the rise of woke Paganism so we can fortify believers' faith and return our nation to its founding principles.
[Claim Your Free Copy Here »](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z1k90cidmhh9bacc37bajg6nad5oallqhkr67e4o_rp22sh2s8i6epb0shg66o76chh2bs)

subject: #1 Home Defense Gun BANNED??
body:
I’m talking about the short-barrel AR-15...
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21955/6374453/10679a1f6d05417db5c5d3dee06d86316ce194df/ec19b71870394c122cec81a0f0eb8f62b2f830d9)
---
| | |
---
_September 17th, 2025 at 12:12 PM UTC_
---
| | |
---
| | The US Gov has ** _practically BANNED_** what may be the best gun for home defense. **I’m talking about the short-barrel AR-15...** Ya know, the kind of gun SEAL Team 6 used to take down Bin Laden’s compound? Spec Ops love these guns because:

* They’re ** _perfect for close quarters_** ...

* Easy as a handgun to move in tight spaces - but with ** _SUPERIOR stopping power and terminal rifle ballistics_** compared to using a pistol...

* While still ** _retaining_** ** _everything great about the AR platform..._**

**But thanks to the National Firearms Act (NFA) of 1934...** Any rifle with a barrel shorter than 16′′ is regulated like a machine gun. ($200 tax stamp... 18 months of waiting... and your name and fingerprints plastered on every watchlist they’ve got) But here’s the little loophole that PTC Armory is using **to put one in your hands without ANY of that stuff:** When they manufacture your AR-15 as a “pistol” instead of a “rifle”... **_Suddenly it’s just another handgun._** And it can be shipped straight to your FFL (local gun shop) like any other firearm. That’s why customers have been ** _BEGGING_** PTC Armory to make a short-barrel AR Pistol**(since it bypasses all the regulatory barriers).** So now that’s exactly what they’re doing... [**Introducing The Patriot Short-Barrel AR-15 Pistol...**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21955/6374453/1e1a580a5b343c962d66ba11074fbe149b8ddf69/ec19b71870394c122cec81a0f0eb8f62b2f830d9)**all the benefits of a short-barrel rifle with zero NFA nonsense.**
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21955/6374453/10679a1f6d05417db5c5d3dee06d86316ce194df/ec19b71870394c122cec81a0f0eb8f62b2f830d9)
---
**Here’s what else makes this brand new gun so special:**
* **Guaranteed to shoot sub-MOA at 100yds the day you get it** (even with a 11.5” barrel, you get test targets as PROOF)

* **Stress tested under FULL AUTO before shipping** (ensures it’ll stand up to the harshest conditions)

* **Backed by two iron-clad guarantees**(love it in 30 days or get every penny back, plus lifetime warranty on all components)

[**Plus... you’ll also get $814 in FREE upgrades if you’re one of the first patriots to grab one.**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21955/6374453/1e1a580a5b343c962d66ba11074fbe149b8ddf69/ec19b71870394c122cec81a0f0eb8f62b2f830d9) **** One small catch though... **** This is a very limited-run to satisfy all the requests PTC Armory has been getting for this gun. **** So we can’t promise how long it will be available. **** Plus, this is truly the ** _ideal home defense gun_** – so I know their production calendar for it will fill up fast. **** [**> > See the ONLY short-barrel AR-15 that’s 100% legal for civilians here... **](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21955/6374453/1e1a580a5b343c962d66ba11074fbe149b8ddf69/ec19b71870394c122cec81a0f0eb8f62b2f830d9) **** **Thank You.**

name: Troy Downing
subject: You’re exactly who I want to talk to
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
I didn’t risk my life overseas just to watch a bunch of self-serving cowards run our country into the ground.

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)If you hate BS political emails, good. You’re exactly who I want to talk to, Peter.
This is Troy Downing.
I’m a combat vet, not a career politician. I didn’t risk my life overseas just to watch a bunch of self-serving cowards run our country into the ground.
I ran for Congress — and won — because I tell the truth and fight for __We the People__ , not party bosses, lobbyists, or woke elites.**
****And because I refuse to play their games, the Left is coming after my GOP House seat.**[ RUSH HELP
](https://trk.emails.troydowning._N-mZe2-Jt-gTog_Mwk6A)They want me out because I call out their radical agenda, support President Trump, and won’t back down on the issues that matter.
In other words, I’m “ _deplorable._ ”
“ _Garbage_.”
“ _MAGA Extremist_.”
They can label me whatever they want, but I guarantee you it won’t stop me from standing up to open-border policy and the mutilation of our kids in the name of “gender ideology.”
But here's the real problem: **Democrats are pummeling us with cash. **
They’ve stockpiled a **_$10 MILLION advantage over Republicans_** , aiming it straight at flipping the House Majority.
If I don’t flip the switch on fundraising soon, defending this seat will be nearly impossible.
And if we lose it, we don’t just lose my seat. We’ll lose our only chance at advancing President Trump’s America First agenda.
I’m not asking for a handout. I’m asking for an ally. [If you’re ready to join this fight, will you chip in $15.50 today?](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)[JOIN THE FIGHT
](https://trk.emails.troydowning._mE7LAVz8NLZSu0pYw)[DONATE TODAY
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)Thank you for your patriotic support,
-Troy Downing** _Combat Veteran in Congress_**| |

name: The Flyover
subject: Israel Invades Gaza City, Robert Redford Dies, and Howling Like Wolves
body:
The Israeli military launched a [large-scale ground operation](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DFv8yAQxvFPgzdbHNhABoZXemWpQ7p2tM7m4lxFIMLUUfrpK7db185_6XS_5-08nZEjp_UVb-TrJU-JHlukWqlMvBWkyGnHQNuKn7hwfZY806SkGlp5asFOATk-p74J_kKkSDfkwQ4OpDagmqsPaJSBQQc3a5DYWycHWpyZewrgwDXsj2vyBBakNAN0JK2y5E5WkqbQS9FLClxz6d4zp3qlS3zmnUq35FsT_bXW-yb0P6FGoUacl0PQrfnIQo0vqVJJWDknjEKNkXdqP-4BK21CjT_G9tC1v5LQIweh_4MaDOjBQVN8uD84Rt6MFb1cb8jx-4v6p-l2r74CAAD__5u1gYE) in Gaza City on Tuesday, advancing its nearly two-year campaign against Hamas.

| | |
---
| [](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkU_rnDAQhj9NvGWZTDTRg4eC9VK2UCjtUbJm1GmjLkl2Zfvpi_0DvfT0m-PwzPswvF-vw9Vx4G3-6FZq87QPGx0pUM4UB07RUeDt6Tyl2f1wI-dX3G80IGAloZHKDt5xeA1l4duJCEkX1Cpb1Qq0UVgsLVjlzXTDCZwvnTeTwdrUo_GucSOhLrg906BRVgGYSl0ILFqqGwukyZcgSiDPeY-XbztveaEpvPYnxcu4r0Vol5zvSeh3AnuB_XEcl3kPPnF4UvzOWdLqOJyswP4WHiShUQ2WJ677cRO6q6tKmqaSZYMg0IQkdAeg5PvzUn5eSPa_jQJNmkb2QncW1KcFzrl9wC8o0DzyOoxuvTuet_8CK3l-rEJ3v7L_LNP-iCMJ3f2jKmLr7weHwMlYUcL894siv6mmZ4s_AwAA___XRqFt) | |
# Wednesday, September 17, 2025

**Good Morning!** On this day in 1787, the Constitutional Convention held its last meeting, where 39 of the 41 men assembled [signed their names to the new Constitution](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OpDAQBp8GMiP_AMaBg0smm0svRA1uoE8eG9m9M2KffjUbbb7Rl3yqkurffb4DRUr7X3ig5y3PCV81IjOWmWoBjJSeELDu8Akr8VXygrOWehDSCWXnABSvuW-D3xA1mha9ssOkpBmVbg-PVk120LAt1q2TMSjdaJQzehknN8DQkn_TpFNWSTkOqkNptcXJWYkGQy-bXmIgzqX7nynxgVu88hNLt-ZHG_3BfNbG_Gn0rdG3NafKxB9MOa2YGEuXy97o2xLzezgHuAQfKH4-xQuqqLQnDIKSOA-KEDCeB0FbfDhfFCPV0Ta93B9A8VvNv-r19PorAAD__4QBgUw) and sent it to the states to begin the process of ratification. ## Israel Launches Gaza City Ground Invasion
The Israeli military launched a [large-scale ground operation](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DFv8yAQxvFPgzdbHNhABoZXemWpQ7p2tM7m4lxFIMLUUfrpK7db185_6XS_5-08nZEjp_UVb-TrJU-JHlukWqlMvBWkyGnHQNuKn7hwfZY806SkGlp5asFOATk-p74J_kKkSDfkwQ4OpDagmqsPaJSBQQc3a5DYWycHWpyZewrgwDXsj2vyBBakNAN0JK2y5E5WkqbQS9FLClxz6d4zp3qlS3zmnUq35FsT_bXW-yb0P6FGoUacl0PQrfnIQo0vqVJJWDknjEKNkXdqP-4BK21CjT_G9tC1v5LQIweh_4MaDOjBQVN8uD84Rt6MFb1cb8jx-4v6p-l2r74CAAD__5u1gYE) in Gaza City on Tuesday, advancing its nearly two-year campaign against Hamas. [Defense Minister Israel Katz](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1uxCAMwPGnIRuRIR8kA0OXbNe1Y0TASVwROAF30fXpq1wfobPlv_zz122-GfIUtk9zoC5rnAOe2WMpmGbKyaCn8DQO82Z-jKXySnHBWYLsOIxcqNkZ8q-5rZxeESU2FWqhukFA0wtZ7bodcVF9B-vSWmNsN6hG9FYO3TKoZligIn3VYBRKAPSdqBGUVDiMCrBB1wJrAR2VmOrvSKHsuPpXfGKqbTwqr_dS7pk1H0xOTE7nedY2LPYaMjldaSYnGJmcRM_kdDE4Zb48UqCw8T8j9-YR7I6Zbyk-guMXOlMMPK78vXLR670cvkra3U_ynnKvWAvbYci_Tyn_-t9Ty98AAAD__wkzhCo) declared _“Gaza is burning,”_ as two IDF divisions moved in under "Operation Gideon’s Chariots II." Israeli officials say the operation aims to dismantle Hamas’ infrastructure and secure the release of hostages taken in the October 2023 attacks. The offensive comes as a U.N. commission accuses Israel of [committing genocide](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2u3CAQBeCnwR0W4B_sgmKjlbtNihQpLWzG3llhsIBd5Dx9RO4j3PqMjuZ8fx7zQ6NFt__UB6i0-dlBjhZSgjBjDBosuo82EHf9V6-YruAXmAUTHWUj5XI2Gu01t5VRG4CApgLFZTdw1vRcVE81jF0_LC1fN6k7PTY9Y6znA8C4asE3qFCVNjZyyRnrO14Dk0LCMEoGDZiWkZaBweRD_fLo0hM2e_kPhHr1R2XVM6UzkuZGxETElHOuj-hKRsQEjr4jEVMZVUIfrCFiekGA46KLz-XA0R2cX9EADXD6kKimi327RNEZXNMBLlG_0S-OSPWa0LtI0dGCQsSkA73d-OM-5F-kmUoVae4_iirk-BvCWQVlzozWYuwladl-aLT__0_fQv8o8S8AAP__kdCYBw)—claims Israeli leaders deny—as international pressure mounts for a ceasefire and renewed negotiations.
## Kirk Suspect May Face Firing Squad
Tyler Robinson, 22, has been [charged Tuesday with aggravated murder](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGO6yAQheGngS7WMECIC4rbuMttt0TYjJNZEZPFyCj79KvsK2x9pE86_8c1XCNn3m7_44N8W0vYqO-ZWqMaeK-RMm9HTLTf4ndcuL1qmSkgoD3BeFIupMj5FYxMfiVC0pK8cvaiQJ8Vyruf3WhjNNZqm1a3aqDRollmY0BHZ5Rk_9ZgVE4BnK0aCBw6uowOSFMyIAxQ4lbq8Fl4a3da86scVIelPGT299aeu9D_BE4Cp977MM_LexM4vc8InDIfJHBawHzR1rvVzyarT8_OOfN-dsLA7RE5_4rtTxkOjz8BAAD__yZEcBg) and six other offenses in the fatal shooting of conservative Christian activist Charlie Kirk at Utah Valley University. Prosecutors revealed Robinson left a note for his transgender romantic partner confessing his plan and later texted that he acted out of anger toward Kirk’s rhetoric. Surveillance footage and forensic [evidence tied him to the rooftop](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2O4yAUhZ8Gd0SA8V9BsQ1dtt3SwnBj3w0GC24SeZ5-5HmFqY_Op3O-f_f57jBiWv-6HQw98pzgUyMQQZmxFgcR09sFqKv7ch7pLHmBWQnVcTFxOczBYTxn3QTzAFDQNmDk0I1StL1UzWa0g6UT0mu5-AUAeh-6EUah-2kUstcNmosmJjlIIfpO3kAMaoBxGgS0ELRgWkBAyuX2P2OiDR7xzG8oN5_3JpqN6Kis_cOUZcqm88iVrogpe4GZsmJiysqeKfuq_PrHlPWbKxGBP7E8K6-veoAnCNzV6mrFxOmMUHjJC6aaE6fMF-BXa4XAP0gb9-5AcpHvrxKgMGWbYsLxwRix9gPTYt0dxp-V9Cu1b6O-AwAA__8js46E) sniper attack, and DNA matched items found at the scene, including a rifle once owned by his grandfather. Utah officials, including Gov. Spencer Cox, have signaled they’ll pursue the death penalty, which in Utah could mean execution by firing squad if lethal injection is unavailable. Americans have [donated over $2.8 million](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2ynDAQhE8DmaiR-NEqUOCE7Dl1SM2iAcYrpC1JC8and-ErvLi7uvr7fn1NX8iew_oTd7JliVOgM3sqhdLEOSF5Dgc6yiv-xZnLleKTJgWqF2CE1JND9tfU1c4uRIramqzU_UNCO0hVb9Zo_TCzhqEzLUkFvTTDQKqTgKaFxdVs7zUwUkuAoZcNgVaaHkYDteQ6qDogxyWm5nfkUDZa_BUPSs0c99rbrZR3rtoflRorNZ7n2Szxz_OTOVDOd6dS406OsVIj7pR4xpBF3vBmFMsnuIScOawi0RyTywKXO5k3TJ5JvDi9sigJV56FIyyb-AQ-KGUul6CDQqmTde-Tvec86KqDdUf2_--Vbzk9rPoXAAD__2R4jrg) through platforms like GiveSendGo and GoFundMe to support his wife, children, and memorial efforts. Organizers and donors described the campaigns as acts of grief, solidarity, and faith, echoing Kirk’s Christian message.

## Hollywood Icon Robert Redford Dead at 89
Robert Redford, the [legendary actor and Oscar-winning](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DEP2yAQBeBfgzciONsQDwxdvKVrR-sSjuQqDBGcErm_vnL_QucnfXrv_bptN-TM5fkTdwqS6lbo2zOJUNu4N6TM5YOR-hP_4IPlaPVOGxiYtVm09VtEzsc2DTEkIqBxoGD9fLVmdBaGV_DkXYLxnu7OJnRxximhW9w0RpzA0sDh1MxivTXGzfZCxoOn6-INjRQnoyZDkaW2y-_KRV6U8lE_1C6Pug85vETeXY0_FKwK1nK8a5czUrCesILVLApW6xSsVISaIJediihYzzFNdKOYaos6EkZd-wOb_nIp1HRk6hpFX09iaCG-v5wzd-fVZJ47cv7XQv7ruk-AvwEAAP__wFyB3w) director, died Tuesday at age 89 at his home in Sundance, Utah. The two-time Oscar winner was known for [iconic films](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2K5DAUBODTyJmM_my1AwULi7PeZFk2NGrp2f0GWWqkhxvP6QfPFSYuKL6q__fl7jFh3v74HRytZcnwbgmIoC7YqoeE-fAR2uY_fUA6a3nAooQauJi4tEv0mM7FdNGtAAp0B07a4SaFHqXqns4Hoe0ojdUqgvY3GO1g1DDI9QGT8EOH7moTk7RSiHGQPQirLNwmK0BDNIIZARGp1P6jYKYnrOksB9Q-lL1L7kn0akz_YmpmavaPcC3ot3LFTM3__jI1X-hKvEJcS418xbRzDCXz0oKv_I05Y954xAqBSuU-EB7YiKm5Uakn0zNGpn9LoabRWDN21cXXG1PCNlpmxLZ7TN8g-tGLh1NfAQAA__-cm4Yu) including _Butch Cassidy and the Sundance Kid_ , _The Sting_ , _The Natural_ , and _The Way We Were_. Redford also founded the Sundance Institute and Film Festival. His representative said he died in his sleep, though no official cause of death was given. He is survived by his second wife Sibylle Szaggars and two daughters. Redford leaves behind a legacy that bridged Hollywood glamour and American grit, on and off the screen. Take a look at [Redford's photos through the years](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD1urDAURlcDnZH_wOPCxWvo5rUpkce-YEcejK5vBpHVR5MtpP6k7xydj_ty97nkffvvn-BorcsOZytABLjkhh5K3l8-Qtv8tw-ZLqwPWCSXI-OWCbNEn8u16D66FUCC6sEJM94EV5OQfXJq1Fop87DSjMEGC1PwygYDYQpKauize79xK4zgfBrFANxIAzdrOCiImneaQ8xUcfiseacEa7nqC3AI9dkXl4iO1ql_nZw7OZ_nOVCCE_3x3js5v4WRGEJcK0Z2pEq1MUpYv7bEKAG7wGNjWAu0Ts49unicuZTcJtNpvj19Lr8s-lOgl5M_AQAA__83VnuK).

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: Epstein Files
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
Remember when Donald Trump promised to release the Epstein files?
| | | | |
---
| | | Remember when Donald Trump promised to release the Epstein files? Did anyone really think the sexual predator president who used to party with Jeffrey Epstein was going to release the Epstein files? Instead, he’s been busy taking away your health care to cut taxes for the rich and threatening to strip Americans of their citizenship and send them to foreign prisons. We were told Donald Trump’s new GOP cared about working people. But you can’t claim to be for working men and women when you defund their hospitals and nursing homes. You can’t claim to be for working men and women when you defund school lunch programs that help feed little boys and girls whose hard-working parents are struggling to fill the fridge. Let me tell you what it’s been like in Washington these last seven months. The leaders of Georgia’s clinics and hospitals and nursing homes, caregivers for seniors and the disabled, nurses, teachers, food pantry directors — they all came to us and pleaded with Georgia's representatives in Congress: don’t do this. Don’t devastate health care. Don’t abandon seniors. Don’t starve kids. Sen. Warnock and I listened. We fought that bill, and we voted No. We put Georgia first. But every Republican member of Congress who is supposed to represent Georgia put loyalty to Trump over loyalty to our state. *** That brings me to the 2026 election. 2026 is our only hope to recover Congressional power and reverse this descent toward one-man rule. And here in Georgia, I am the only Democratic U.S. Senator nationwide up for reelection in a state Trump won. I am therefore MAGA’s #1 target for defeat. There is no path back without defending this seat — the seat that secured the Democratic majority four years ago. This is a moment of struggle for the very substance of our Republic. This descent into one-man rule must be stopped. [If you share my outrage at this unprecedented corruption and abuse of power — and if you are determined to WIN — please split a donation between my campaign and Blue Amp Action today. This is the most important Senate race in the country, and I can’t win without you.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tba500754-d0da-4ccf-8f8e-a75c8037579f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tea7a73bd-1dff-47b0-b19b-4c96bdb12192/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

**Good Morning!** On this day in 1962, the dams that form Lake Hawkins and Lake Winnsboro in Wood County [were completed](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFyqzAQheGnER2MVkbIFCpuQ-fbpmQWdgFNZOSRNsa8fcZ-hVR_db7ifN3GG4YY9vU_3tnLa0njzkeJLMJ5_A6UFtn4ZMyIa04_O5VHiGk02tha9zW4kTDEc2wr8pOmHir24OwVdHd1XbV5wG5Ga3tzIbxoo5lnsIt1bTfNk0Wsgn9jugcHoAHahmAiDYtmoIkdtarVTEFSbmRj4ReWJZ7pybmZ072KfhN5FHX5p8ygzHAcRyNlw7THsHOT8qrM8FnVhGc9ne8oM_Au-V3XXavs6XGEGEPpnGr1escQP7j87ZKnN78BAAD__2fRdpU). Both reservoirs are in the Sabine River basin. Forty [stray dogs](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLuuszAQhJ8GOkdewrVw8Tfp8renRIZdwyrGRvbmwtsfkVc45Wg0n0bfz328W_Yclv92IyMfF8dA7-xJhNL4YIxOVjrIJmuXFJ8B884-jpWuGqUHBd2Ilv0x1iWaSeMAJRnomh5023dtuRqawA5uuFZY4wRkYeiHxrUOsW3t3DQlmxOmB-gANEB9QZhQg9MEOFGHdVFrQpaYLrKS0Mdm54_4onSZ41Z6s4rsubj-K6pbUd12irunszqDnR9ZRafe7FFhXLIS--CwqHOvQkyyqi9SzXHbnoHlUNkeWSXKjBQkK4Ae9LWry2Rwf7P3nNuuqPWyWfbfC_I3cS9T_QYAAP__4sSFVQ) are terrorizing a Godley neighborhood in North Texas. ## New K-8 Social Studies Sequence Approved
The Texas State Board of Education (SBOE) voted 8-7 last week to [approve](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOpDAQRL8GMo9sL2AIHFxCtpdeiBp3A9YZGtnN7PD3p9ngfmDjKr0qvT-f0yfEFI_1N-zk5bXwdNBXSSRCefobkRfZ6CbIAGvm68ByxsST1bZVelDGTQgx3VNTo581DqYmb1zbG931rqs3_-GWecBgiTpoXa8X1wYNPdqgW2qsq6N_w_RgnDHamOaBZkZtFk0GZ3LYVI0mjML5IRsJvaAs6eYn5UfgvU5-EzlL9fGrsmNlR4SUoNDrzFTKu1HZkfAKIJGPyo5FQEjNDBkVL-p_pDI9YT-L-l5QWyzC-VaAfEpRYct8cOL1VjMUQhWunGO40vXm19nj-RVTiqVzVaPXHWL6fic_c_r09l8AAAD__yDlkNc) a new K-8 social studies sequence that emphasizes U.S. and Texas history over world history. It also favors a chronological approach rather than a topical one. The SBOE had narrowed the options for a new framework to one supported by the conservative Texas Public Policy Foundation and another backed by the progressive Texas Council for Social Studies. While the latter prevailed in a preliminary vote, members ultimately [approved the former](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGOpDAQBdDTmKyQ7QHcBA46IetNJ0QFLsAag1HZNMOefkVfYbOSSnr6_3-_-hf64Lf5D65k8-8U-43OFChn4v7HuzjlhS5CRpw5HptLuw-x11LXIFtQpnfow9VXhbODdK0qyCpTP5RsHqYpFvvVDgYnOQ5KT7puNRn3qGs0iEbLpjWFtzcmW2WUkkpVpVODk2qSpNxAxlWikuR8jlzmhTL9YprCFd_E5RjXItgl5z2Jr6fQndDdeZ7lmrb7J3RHGxxJ6O4uJXT3uf0GTG_ihAE-HKQhEgw4_iSYkIH9vGTYA26QIziidV8w-b8EZ-TgYPEpR75gPEI-mG4TGZ5P9WL-Pgq2bj99CD41RlRyXtGHT9T8fwO_rf4XAAD__7SGkxw). The new framework lays a foundation of "Stories of America and Texas" in kindergarten through second grade, followed by [increasingly in-depth instruction](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykUD2y2yAQPg3q8LAYgShUpFH30qbUrNiVxTxsPICs59tn5CIXSLv7_f_5mr8wpvi4_cY7j-1nzfODj5q4NS7zd6S8to3fjAXxVvL-oPqMKc9a6V4qL8HNhDG9Z9PRuCjy0PEIrh9A2cHZbhshOOvX3rlFe8De0ao9BBtWOwyIPHRxPMWUBwegAMyFYCEFq2KghR0ZYRRTbLlc2saNf7Cu6Z1fXC4h37s0bq09q7j-EnoSejqO4_L92vl8Cj1haTEkFno6ewk9Me0BW8wPoacatpzTea0NG8slYyH5DyE_ZrLmEDHJ2naKXOUz4cnV1kukHkxALT16Lc3VsFzs4GSPfTDqCsGS68pIzyOmFKt1wqjbHWP6JG__t_dr1H8DAAD__xKSlIM) on Western civilization, U.S. history, and Texas history in third through eighth grade. After the vote, the Texas Public Policy Foundation said the new framework "ensures that our kids will learn the true story of freedom: where it began, how it grew, and how Texas stands as its greatest embodiment."
## Stray Dogs Terrorize Neighborhood
A pack of stray dogs is prowling around a Godley subdivision in Johnson County, and officials say they [can’t do anything about it](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOpDAQRL_GZD1yez0DBASXkO2lFyLPuIHWGjeye2eG-_oT9wublVSqp6r68zl9Bk6cl99ho0Hfs0yZXjWRKpXpi6PMutJBoYSwFPnOse6cZHLWXcH2gO0UA6dj8k0c7jb22NCA7bVDe-vaW7MOM7m-8x_WBryGQEjoO2zb_obd7MhTw8MJsz22iBbRXyLeo8XZEsY7tdEbbymySrnoSkrvUOd0yJPK5SFbk4ZVda_m45dxo3FjPnapelrGjSfZuNH2xo3ojRu_K5z7jBuLhI3zAnt4fIHM8OIUIcpSQakUKfyXTvkOFR6sBzBEyQqvkBW2Ax4rp1gogwrcCXQNeqZhFonGjU0Z4v7ilLjeWuPtsgVO__vqz15-Du5fAAAA__-eZ5Jl). Alarmed residents have shared videos showing up to 40 dogs at a time roaming the neighborhood. ## Frisco Teen Named Kid of the Year
Tejasvi Manoj, a student at Frisco ISD's Lebanon Trail High School, has been named _TIME_ 's [Kid of the Year](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOszAQBOCnMR3RriE2FC7-hi5_eyWy43VYxcSR2UvC25-4V7h6pG8083WZL54zP27__UpOPqnMD3pvmUSozneOJclCO_nq_a2W70fcnpzLrEGfWxhbtHP0nPe5b6ILEEdsyKE9DwhmsKZZHGqPnUejhxBGA9pgB6ZL4WqSHWwYGnYHBiNaREDsTxFDBExAGAPZ2KseKLKUepKFhD5-S3kvL6qna1mb7BaR56a6f0pPSk_CKx2B0pPt8Ay6V3q6c2xLamWh9tjSHo1KT0118fnmnHkzVvVwWz3nX1X-9sXL6Z8AAAD__yhJcJk) for creating an app to help seniors identify phishing scams and other cybercrimes. After her grandfather [nearly fell victim](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkb2OpDAMx58GOqMkwGQoKK6h22uvRAEb8G4-RolvZuftT6B7g20s-eP_t372n4_5w7HnuP92gUb53tIc6VU8iVCevxjTJge9yWXn9pz-RiwP9mk2yvSgBtB2Rsf-PXc1jovCQdc0atvftbrd7a0-xq5V7dYh2gUHpda7s31_WwzZdR3Uhqrm8TRTg7ZaK627BvWCSm-KNC5ksas6RciSciMHCX27svl3elJu1hRqPx4ij1K1vyozVWYSDlTSxhHZNVe8Kufs2aX1iMmn_f0_gRO3MlMgEhD6dOXJEFxMnyAHgbZwwkPyCJdZhJR55whCFCG6QAjXArhO8sUIabukp64yk8vCq6dypFdlJm3au27bvmvWUOo84uPF3nO52apTe3DsLyj52Sueo_kXAAD__zFzoLs) to a $2,000 debt repayment scam last year, Manoj learned that similar scams cost nearly 860,000 victims over $16 billion in losses each year. Having participated in programs like Girls Who Code, she developed an app to address the problem. Currently in [prerelease](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykz7FugzAQgOGnsbcgnzEYBg9dsqVrR8vkjnCqwch2Q3j7Kn2F7r8-6f-6-VvgyNvjM6zk6mtOfqOjRKqVsv9mTHNd6KSQQ3jk9LNh2Tkmr5XuLmq8gPUYOJ7eSHSTwhEkObDdAKofbC8Xh8McTAdGWezQUDuBaUerh_auJ637INm9MTWCBVAApkGYUMGsCHAii0YYRcg15aYuVOkVyhzP9KTc3NMqo1tq3YtoP4S-Cn09jqMpC1PEQhunXN6V0FeZHe4Hx8ilt8Koxxo4_gn1f99Pp38DAAD__xmUbQ4), Shield Seniors identifies scams by [using AI](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGO4yAQxvGnwR0RYGLswsVJJ7q99kprgCGMlpgIT9abtz_lXmHrT_qk_-_vx_YBVGm__YE7rvyd27bjeVRkxr59UmqZC74QOsCtt-eejgfVthllrlItUrstAdXXZoe0BpUWPeCq3XXWaprdNJQ1qJC1CQ6yBpdhSdZAtArjglO8qnmg9X2mFu20VlrbS9IhKZ0V6hTQJSuswkTc-oULMn7DkeurfWG_xHYf6lqYH4cYfwnjhfHneV7ODPAehfHQmWJFYfy7SxhfW4QqjI-tVtplbM-dX8L43OmITRa6FXnE0lqVBz8T7iyZ7ig_KcmWJReUbw5hvJmdzBpH566TDMoqaS1EuaTZSLRjjvPsljAaMXoOHbMYf5fH0Nf0OKlWOiYnrLrdger_EP4Z_9dq_gUAAP__E-qZNw) to analyze suspicious emails and texts. It includes a chatbot, a tool to upload screenshots, and a guide for reporting fraud. Since developing her app, Manoj has also received an honorable mention in last year's Congressional App Challenge, [delivered a TEDx talk](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2OqzAQxfGnMV3QDB8xLlxcKYpuk5W22hKNmSFY68QRTCC8_Sr7CtueI_2K_9elv1BM8X79oJt4fY25v8u2JFGVuf-OnEedZBeaia5zft55ecSU-wqq9gDugLZnimnvm4J9AHZYiEfbdgjHzh6LybuhHYfBkSVG10FtWxdQQhskNJZQiujfGDi0iIDYlIyBAUcQ5CCWG9OAcNQ8lzqJyouWMe15lbkc8q1IflJ9LKb-Z6qzqc7btpV7fuozyPt_L6TDZOrzaurTWncAp_r1_zMXs-fHFlOKy9GaBq43iumX1L-FWH31EwAA___JnXKb) in Plano, and visited assisted living facilities to talk with residents about staying safe online.
