| [](https://substack.com/redirect/bf943a4b-5e77-40e5-89b8-b09646ff5f54?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
County Supervisors in Mississippi carry one of the most important responsibilities in local government. They're the ones elected by the people to make decisions that impact our daily lives--from the roads we drive on to how our tax dollars are spent. Unlike distant bureaucrats in Washington, supervisors live right here with us. They know the struggles of keeping up a family farm, the frustration of dodging potholes, and the importance of making every tax dollar count.
#### Infrastructure and Services
One of the main duties of a county supervisor is taking care of our infrastructure. Roads, bridges, and drainage systems may not sound exciting, but they're the backbone of our communities. If farmers can't get their crops to market or families can't safely get to church on Sunday morning, everything else falls apart. Supervisors are the ones who hear from residents, inspect the conditions, and make the decisions about how limited funds are spent to keep things moving. They also oversee basic services like garbage collection--things we all depend on but often take for granted until they stop working.
#### Budgets and Taxes
Supervisors also have a hand on the county's checkbook. They set the budget that funds schools, law enforcement, and other county services. This means they make choices that directly affect how much we pay in property taxes. A good supervisor remembers that every tax dollar comes out of a working family's pocket and treats it with respect. The challenge is always balancing the need for services with the need to keep government small and taxes low.
#### Safety and Law Enforcement
When it comes to protecting our families, supervisors work closely with the sheriff and emergency services. Whether it's making sure deputies have the equipment they need, or ensuring the county is ready when storms and tornadoes come through, supervisors play a vital role in keeping people safe.
#### Land Use and Growth
Supervisors also make decisions about how land is used in their county--whether it's for farming, business, or housing. These choices affect the way our communities grow and change. The key is finding a balance between encouraging growth and protecting the land and resources God has given us.
#### Serving the People
Most importantly, supervisors are there to represent the people of their district. They're the closest level of government we have, and their job is to listen, respond, and fight for the needs of their community. That may mean pushing back against unnecessary regulations, or it may mean working with the state to bring in funds for a new road or bridge.
In short, a county supervisor is the link between everyday citizens and the layers of government. Their job isn't about politics--it's about service. A good supervisor remembers who they work for: the people of their county.

name: Lacy Lunsford
subject: Soros-backed prosecutor is persecuting my husband
body:
| | [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1566812/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvbVFSZlZFVDhkcA/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MTc/LbmNsTWxyU0dXVw/qP2hpZHM9bmNHTGRTRDExSUJLeHZscw/gaMq1-w/s6u9cd4b5f4)
| That’s not the momentum we want heading into a busy spring in the courtroom.
---
| | Dear Friend, I’m so sad and angry right now. After over a decade of service to his country, my police officer husband is facing politically motivated prosecution while saving the life of an innocent person. We’ve been so strong and hopeful but tonight, this little device on my husband’s ankle broke me.
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.-w/sbh15210870)
---
I'm sorry for getting ahead of myself, but it’s been so hard, and I don’t know what else to do as a Soros-backed prosecutor is persecuting my husband for saving the life of a fellow officer. [**Friend, will you help my husband get his life back?**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.-w/sbh15210870) It all started when Brad and his partner, Officer Arbogast, responded to a shoplifting call. The suspect’s resistance quickly turned into a violent attack on the officers – putting Brad’s partner's life at risk. Brad did the only thing a good officer could do and shot the violent criminal. It's episodes like this that make me worried to death when Brad is late coming home. I cried myself sick when I heard what happened that day, but I was so thankful they were alive. And yet I know the danger our families and communities would be in if Brad and other good officers weren't willing to risk their lives. That’s why I was completely shocked when we heard Brad was being charged with murder! But then we found out the prosecutor was New Mexico’s radical Soros-backed Attorney General Raul Torrez, who used to work in the Obama administration. **This isn’t about justice – this is a political attack.** Friend, it only got worse from there. In February, Brad was wrongly convicted at a circus trial. Not only were two jurors removed and replaced without reason, but one of the jurors they kept was a radical BLM activist who hid their bias during jury selection! Honestly, I don’t know how we would’ve faced the attacks from the anti-cop mob if it wasn’t for Jason Johnson at the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). When LELDF heard about Brad’s fight for justice, they reached out and offered to help fund his legal defense. I thank God every day for bringing us hope in such a dark time. But Friend, LELDF is a non-profit organization so the only way they can help good officers under attack, like Brad, is through the support of patriots like you. [**Which is why I must ask...will you make an emergency gift to LELDF, so Brad has the necessary funds to win this fight?**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.-w/sbh15210870) Right now, Brad must wait, shackled to an ankle monitor, until the judge decides on **September 19th** if he gets a chance at a fair trial...which would be another hefty sum. Don’t get me wrong, I’m so grateful Brad is home and no longer sitting in prison, but dealing with his ankle monitor has been tough; the kids begging Dad to go swimming with them, the awkward stares in public, seeing him struggle with it to work out or do other activities... The other day, Brad walked to the back of our property to make sure one of the dog's bowls had water and to fill up the hummingbird feeders...then he gets a call from SCRAM, the people that monitor his ankle monitor, saying he is out of boundaries. OUR. OWN. PROPERTY?!? It really got to him and seeing him upset breaks my heart. All of the crap he has gone through, that our family has gone through, and will continue to deal with for who knows how long... All because one lowlife criminal chose to put two officers in danger. Because one corrupt politician decided he needed political gain. I can’t let them ruin our lives...but I know I can’t win this for him on my own. **[Please, if you are able, send your best possible donation to LELDF to help Brad win this battle before it’s too late.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.-w/sbh15210870)** Thank you from the bottom of our hearts for all of the love and support. You all have no idea how much it means to us. Thank you, thank you, thank you! Lacy Lunsford
---
P.S. My husband, Officer Brad Lunsford, is waiting for a judge to grant him a new trial after a BLM activist infiltrated the jury at his trial in February. This political prosecution from a Soros-backed Attorney General has been a heavy burden on our family. **[Please, if you are able, donate $35 or more to LELDF as they help fund Brad’s legal defense.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.-w/s6r729ab575)** Thank you for your prayers and financial support!
---
| | _More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit. And remember –Blue Lives Matter!_ © Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.-w/s1v71398a67)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303
---

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1566812/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MTc/LbmNsTWxyU0dXVw/qP2hpZHM9bmNHTGRTRDExSUJLeHZscw/gaMq1-w/s9mba8e6970)
---
|
---
---

In July 2025, it was announced that Stephen Colbert’s talk show will be **PULLED OFF THE AIR** because he spoke out against Donald Trump and told the TRUTH.

And now, Trump is BASELESSLY ATTACKING Colbert:
[](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/68886?t=8&akid=23405%2E4449941%2EwbjzHV)
First _NPR,_ then _PBS,_ and now this?! We’ve said it before and we’ll say it again, friend: **Donald Trump is a DICTATOR — and now,_he’s controlling our media._**
But we’re not going down without a fight.
That’s why we’re launching a MASSIVE petition to show that we STAND with Stephen Colbert against Trump’s oppressive and anti-democratic attacks.

CNN conservative commentator Scott Jennings **[took a stand to defend Charlie Kirk's legacy](https://substack.com/redirect/d87e8e5d-3485-435c-a823-60758b01a424?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** during a tense live interview with Kaitlan Collins.
"I can read some of them if you want! These people were not saying they disagree with charlie Kirk, they were saying 'the world is better off without him!'" Jennings erupted.
"And I'll tell you one more thing that's on my mind tonight and conservatives everywhere!"
[](https://substack.com/redirect/d87e8e5d-3485-435c-a823-60758b01a424?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/d87e8e5d-3485-435c-a823-60758b01a424?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# Charlie Kirk suspected assassin's mother says the warning signs were all there...
Charlie Kirk assassin suspect Tyler Robinson's mother told investigators he had **["become more political"](https://substack.com/redirect/4810b27c-95ec-46fe-a9b8-050b6e366775?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in the year before the shooting, leaning left and supporting "pro-gay and trans rights," while having heated arguments with his father over their opposing ideologies.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4810b27c-95ec-46fe-a9b8-050b6e366775?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Parents identified him from surveillance footage:** Robinson's father agreed the suspected shooter in news surveillance images looked like their son, and after confronting him, Robinson implied he was the shooter, stating "there is too much evil and the guy spreads too much hate" when asked why he did it.
* **Text messages reveal confession and cover-up attempts:** Prosecutors released text messages between Robinson and his romantic partner (described as a biological male transitioning to female) in which Robinson allegedly admitted "I had enough of [Kirk's] hatred" and detailed how he planned the attack "for a bit over a week," discarded evidence, and urged his partner to delete messages and stay silent.

* * *
**[Together with Next Thing Technologies](https://substack.com/redirect/81335b95-718a-4e26-acdb-43221c35db10?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **[The $1Trillion Mineral Push Just Made This Battery Company Unstoppable](https://substack.com/redirect/81335b95-718a-4e26-acdb-43221c35db10?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/81335b95-718a-4e26-acdb-43221c35db10?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Right now, almost every battery in America runs on **lithium**.
Your phone. Your laptop. Your car. Even the power grids storing clean energy. But here's the catch: **China controls over 80% of the world 's lithium**.9
That means America's future is tied to a supply chain we don't control. If China slows exports or raises prices...we're stuck.
Washington knows this can't continue. That's why the White House just launched a **$1 trillion push to bring mineral production back home.** 9 10
The goal: secure America's energy independence and cut China out of the equation.1
This shift opens the door for a new winner.
Because while everyone else fights over lithium, one overlooked solution is ready right now... **sodium-ion batteries**.1
Here's why they're a game changer:
* Sodium is**1,400x more abundant** **than lithium** , with significant reserves located in the U.S9
* Batteries can be made at a **fraction of the cost of lithium -- up to 90% less expensive in the first year of use.6**
* They last longer8, are safer7, and can be built at scale using domestic materials.1 9

And one company has already cracked the code:**Next Thing Technologies.**
Their batteries scale from**massive grid storage projects** to**affordable $100/month home backup systems.** 1 9
That means they can power everything from America's infrastructure to your neighborhood.1
The timing couldn't be better.
Billions in federal funding are flowing into U.S. mineral projects. Manufacturing is coming back home. And America is determined to break free from China's supply chains.1
Next Thing Technologies is positioned to be the **backbone of this new energy era**.1
Over **7,800 investors** have already backed them with **$7M+**.3

"I can read some of them if you want! These people were not saying they disagree with charlie Kirk, they were saying 'the world is better off without him!'" Jennings erupted. "And I'll tell you one more thing that's on my mind tonight and conservatives everywhere!" Charlie Kirk suspected assassin's mother says the warning signs were all there... Charlie Kirk assassin suspect Tyler Robinson's mother told investigators he had in the year before the shooting, leaning left and supporting "pro-gay and trans rights," while having heated arguments with his father over their opposing ideologies. | | ---|---|--- Parents identified him from surveillance footage: Robinson's father agreed the suspected shooter in news surveillance images looked like their son, and after confronting him, Robinson implied he was the shooter, stating "there is too much evil and the guy spreads too much hate" when asked why he did it. Text messages reveal confession and cover-up attempts: Prosecutors released text messages between Robinson and his romantic partner (described as a biological male transitioning to female) in which Robinson allegedly admitted "I had enough of [Kirk's] hatred" and detailed how he planned the attack "for a bit over a week," discarded evidence, and urged his partner to delete messages and stay silent. | | ---|---|--- Right now, almost every battery in America runs on lithium. Your phone. Your laptop. Your car. Even the power grids storing clean energy. But here's the catch: China controls over 80% of the world 's lithium.9 That means America's future is tied to a supply chain we don't control. If China slows exports or raises prices...we're stuck. Washington knows this can't continue. That's why the White House just launched a $1 trillion push to bring mineral production back home. 9 10 The goal: secure America's energy independence and cut China out of the equation.1 This shift opens the door for a new winner. Because while everyone else fights over lithium, one overlooked solution is ready right now... sodium-ion batteries.1 Here's why they're a game changer: Sodium is1,400x more abundant than lithium , with significant reserves located in the U.S9 Batteries can be made at a fraction of the cost of lithium -- up to 90% less expensive in the first year of use.6 They last longer8, are safer7, and can be built at scale using domestic materials.1 9 And one company has already cracked the code:Next Thing Technologies. Their batteries scale frommassive grid storage projects toaffordable $100/month home backup systems. 1 9 That means they can power everything from America's infrastructure to your neighborhood.1 The timing couldn't be better. Billions in federal funding are flowing into U.S. mineral projects. Manufacturing is coming back home. name: Tucker Carlson
subject: For Charlie we press on
body:
Right now, Charlie would say, "Don't you dare quit"

| | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z0go1646cpe2kvdqk18f8hicjlsgb9tkhr7fo6kg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0shj60oj1cph2bs)
---
Friend,
---
I don't write emails like this often. But right now? After what happened to Charlie... _I can 't stay quiet._**Charlie Kirk was my friend.** Not just someone I admired, but someone I loved and respected deeply. Losing him was devastating.
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z6mlombe5tckiv7arauc6g2qkfomab2fintahsgg_rp22sh2s8i6epb0shj60oj1cph2bs)
---
In many ways, all of us share in this loss. Charlie fought every day of his life for each one of us... fighting to keep America as great, free, and prosperous. No one I know ever fought for that harder than Charlie.America won't ever be the same. **No one can ever replace him -- but we can make sure his legacy continues on. **_We owe him that._ Because if you knew Charlie, you would know exactly what he would say to us right now: _**"Don 't you dare quit."**_Charlie poured his heart into building a movement to save America. He believed in young people. He believed in ordinary Americans. And he believed that even in our darkest hours, America was the beacon of goodness, freedom, and truth.That's what the Turning Point movement was all about -- and Charlie gave everything he had to that fight.**And our task now is not only to protect what he built -- it's to grow it bigger, stronger, and bolder than anyone ever thought possible. ** More students. More churches. More families. More courage from everyday Americans to stand up and fight for what is right.Turning Point USA was Charlie's vehicle to save America. **He didn 't just start a movement... _he started a revival. _**And now, Friend, we must carry that forward. If you share the same sense of responsibility that I do to honor Charlie's work and press on with his vision...** _Then please join me in keeping his fight alive by making a gift to Turning Point USA today. _** **[Let's make Turning Point USA the biggest thing that this nation has ever seen... bigger than Charlie ever thought possible. That's how we honor him best.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zv4rfkojd8vadm9e25p6ai0rkr762u2flcdogc1g_rp22sh2s8i6epb0shj60oj1cph2bs)**
---
[ **Give in Charlie's Honor**
**Support Turning Point USA**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zd0477iaijfiogfjnieu891qvrbtrpulugf6hv88_rp22sh2s8i6epb0shj60oj1cph2bs)
---
Rest in peace, Charlie. We'll carry the torch you lit from here.
---
**For Charlie,** Tucker Carlson
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zgp07j0egt21hjl2rmrpr1a2ljed47o88pjdbuv0_rp22sh2s8i6epb0shj60oj1cph2bs)
---
[ **Give in Charlie's Honor**
**Support Turning Point USA**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zbla1qdmapeat4b3nea2hop9giep9rc2oh6cda28_rp22sh2s8i6epb0shj60oj1cph2bs)
---

Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

name: Team Ilhan via Justice Democrats
subject: Nancy Mace
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Notorious right-winger Nancy Mace just introduced a resolution to strip
Ilhan of her committee assignments.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250917-io?refcode=em20250917-37029&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=37029_1203867_csyPfk&akid=37029%2E1203867%2EcsyPfk ]Tweet by Rep. Nancy Mace: BREAKING: We’re filing a resolution to strip
Ilhan of her committee assignments after her disgraceful remarks on
Charlie Kirk’s assassination.

Let’s be clear about what’s happening here: Rep. Mace is lying to gin up
right-wing anger against Ilhan. This political stunt is personal — the
result of years of xenophobic, islamophobic, and racist attacks that
started the moment Ilhan was elected.

Nancy Mace knows that Ilhan does not support political violence. But the
truth doesn’t matter to her because she knows that if she stirs up a fight
she can get on Fox News and maybe get Trump involved. And what do you
know...

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250917-io?refcode=em20250917-37029&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=37029_1203867_csyPfk&akid=37029%2E1203867%2EcsyPfk ]Tweet by Aaron Rupar: Trump on Ilhan Omar: “I think she’s a disgraceful
person. A loser. It’s amazing the way people vote. I know it’s people from
her area, maybe of the world. They got here and the vote her in. It’s hard
to believe. But I think she’s a disgusting person.”

It doesn’t matter that Nancy and the GOP are the party that pardoned the
January 6 attackers and treated them as heroes. It doesn’t matter that
they’re the party that celebrated and mocked Paul Pelosi after he was
attacked. They’re just looking for any excuse to come after Ilhan. It’s
pathetic, but it’s the truth.

Peter, Ilhan has never let the
right-wing attacks stop her, and she’s not going to start now. But she
can’t take them on alone. Nobody can. It’s going to take a movement. So we
need to know:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250917-io?refcode=em20250917-37029&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=37029_1203867_csyPfk&akid=37029%2E1203867%2EcsyPfk ]Can you make a split contribution — $5 or whatever feels
right — to stand with Ilhan and have her back against these right-wing
attacks? The amount you can contribute isn’t as important as the donation
itself.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250917-io?refcode=em20250917-37029&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=37029_1203867_csyPfk&akid=37029%2E1203867%2EcsyPfk ]Split $5

Peter,
nobody — not Nancy Mace, not Donald
Trump, not the Republican Party or the billionaires who fund them — will
stop our fight for a more equitable, just, and peaceful world.

Thank you as always for being a part of our movement.

In solidarity,

Team Ilhan

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250917-37029-footer&t=1002&refcode2=37029_1203867_csyPfk&akid=37029%2E1203867%2EcsyPfk

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=37029%2E1203867%2EcsyPfk

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster, PA 17603

subject: One week to stop the GOP in Arizona - no time to waste
body:
🚨 Arizona’s special election is less than one week away.
GOP super PACs are flooding Arizona with cash, desperate to notch a win. We can’t let them.
This is our chance to put Republicans on defense before 2026 even begins — but we need grassroots donors to step up right now. Rush a donation to defend AZ-07 and send a message straight to the GOP >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-winaz?refcode=091725_1]
ALERT: One week from today, voters head to the polls in Arizona for a CRUCIAL special House election.
If Democrats hold this seat, we send a powerful message: Republicans are on defense before 2026 even begins — and grassroots Democrats can overcome their MAGA millions.
The GOP is already pouring money into Arizona, desperate to show momentum. But if we win here, we prove their so-called majority is crumbling and their path to power is slipping away. We need to show overwhelming grassroots strength right now. Rush a donation now to defend AZ-07 and take the fight straight to the GOP >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-winaz?refcode=091725_1]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately:DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-winaz?express_lane=true&refcode=091725_1&amount=5]

Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-winaz?refcode=091725_1&amount=25]
This is about momentum. A win here will echo across the country, shaping the battlegrounds that decide control of Congress in 2026. Republicans are hoping for even the smallest crack in our foundation. We have to prove them wrong — and that starts with you.
Every single grassroots gift matters in this final week. The GOP has billionaire donors; we have people power. And when we stand together, we win. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-winaz?refcode=091725_1]
One week. One race. One shot to put Republicans on defense.
Let's get it done.

name: BREAKING New Jan. 6 Cmte. [VPP]
subject: Our jaws dropped at this Jan 6th news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Signature spot closing! SIGN ASAP >>
| **THE BAD NEWS:** Trump just launched a NEW January 6th Committee in a scheme to undo Democrats’ hard work exposing the truth...

** _But here’s the AMAZING news:_** Hakeem Jeffries just picked INCREDIBLE Dems Eric Swalwell, Jasmine Crockett, and Jared Moskowitz to join the panel! [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93986?t=6&akid=21253%2E878179%2EdGoMEL) [**We need EVERY Democrat reading this to join us and THANK Reps. Swalwell, Crockett, and Moskowitz for FIGHTING BACK »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93986?t=7&akid=21253%2E878179%2EdGoMEL) | [**DONATE $3 TO SIGN THE THANK YOU CARD »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93986?t=8&akid=21253%2E878179%2EdGoMEL)
---
**To:** Reps. Swalwell, Crockett, and Moskowitz
**From:** A proud Democrat
**Subject:** I stand with you! Dear Reps. Swalwell, Crockett, and Moskowitz,

**CONGRATULATIONS and THANK YOU for joining the new January 6th panel to defend our democracy!**

You’re some of the most outspoken Democrats in Congress, so I can truly think of no one better to take on this challenge.

Please know that I have your backs in this fight. We CAN’T let Trump and his minions ERASE the truth about the deadly January 6th insurrection.

**We know Republicans will _lie, break the law,_ and do _everything possible_ to rewrite history — but with you leading the charge, I know they won’t get away with it.**

[**So I'm signing this letter and donating $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show that I stand with you, and to THANK YOU for putting it all on the line to save our country! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93986?t=9&akid=21253%2E878179%2EdGoMEL) | [**RUSH $3 TO SIGN ON BEFORE WE CLOSE THIS CARD AT MIDNIGHT »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93986?t=10&akid=21253%2E878179%2EdGoMEL)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=21253%2E878179%2EdGoMEL). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=21253%2E878179%2EdGoMEL).**

subject: Ever heard of Adam Kincaid and the NRRT? They’re the map manipulators working to silence your voice

body:
Adam Kincaid and the NRRT want to undermine our democracy — we must do everything we can to stop them.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115381757/570128743/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjlmOGU2MWQ5LWNkOTMtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=uRRz7ypqz1En_L1B2boBQNI3XbCtlTm6D8Wbxze4Ef8=&emci=9718cf6e-3293-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=9f8e61d9-cd93-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=8431045)

Peter, Take a look at this Democracy Docket headline that caught our attention recently: **“Meet Adam Kincaid: The Hidden Hand Behind the Texas GOP’s Redistricting Power Grab”** Republicans have set up their own organization focused on redistricting — the National Republican Redistricting Trust, or NRRT. The problem? Its leader, Adam Kincaid, has a long history of manipulating maps to lock in electoral success for Republicans. He’s done it in states like Georgia, Ohio, North Carolina, Florida, and Texas — where the GOP just passed an extreme gerrymander to stack the deck in their favor. “As head of the NRRT and its affiliated dark money group, Fair Lines America,” Democracy Docket writes, “he has overseen the national strategy of structuring political lines to benefit one party alone." His plans for the NRRT are clear: Systemically help Republicans steal power at the expense of voters by proposing extreme gerrymanders. In his own words, “It’s a priority to keep the House, and Republicans should be looking for as many seats as we can get.” The contrast between the NRRT and the NDRC couldn’t be more stark. The NDRC is working to protect and defend fair maps to ensure a truly representative democracy for _all_ voters. [**Will you make a donation to help us take on the NRRT’s anti-democracy attacks and push back against their attempts to undermine the will of the people?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115381759/570128745/1110433579?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_KincaidNRRT_email_20250917-NDRC-Tier1-KincaidNRRT_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250917-NDRC-Tier1-KincaidNRRT_&utm_campaign=KincaidNRRT&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjlmOGU2MWQ5LWNkOTMtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=uRRz7ypqz1En_L1B2boBQNI3XbCtlTm6D8Wbxze4Ef8=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

The big difference between our two organizations is that the NDRC fights for fairness, first and foremost.
**As A.G. Eric Holder said:** **“I’ve believed consistently that wherever Democrats can fairly compete, they can win.”**
We fight for independent commissions and a fair redistricting process. They actively fight those things because they believe that reforms will hurt their chances of winning.
This is a big deal, Peter. We are approaching next year’s midterm elections, which will have big implications for some of our most fundamental rights. If Republicans and the NRRT pass their extreme gerrymanders, they will lock in control of the House of Representatives well before Election Day!
**They want to undermine our democracy and seize power, no matter the cost. We must do everything we can to stop them.** [**Rush a donation to power our movement for fair maps and fair representation in the fights ahead.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115381773/570128759/1110433579?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_KincaidNRRT_email_20250917-NDRC-Tier1-KincaidNRRT_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250917-NDRC-Tier1-KincaidNRRT_&utm_campaign=KincaidNRRT&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjlmOGU2MWQ5LWNkOTMtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=uRRz7ypqz1En_L1B2boBQNI3XbCtlTm6D8Wbxze4Ef8=)

clean_body: Adam Kincaid and the NRRT want to undermine our democracy — we must do everything we can to stop them. | Peter, Take a look at this Democracy Docket headline that caught our attention recently: “Meet Adam Kincaid: The Hidden Hand Behind the Texas GOP’s Redistricting Power Grab” Republicans have set up their own organization focused on redistricting — the National Republican Redistricting Trust, or NRRT. The problem? Its leader, Adam Kincaid, has a long history of manipulating maps to lock in electoral success for Republicans. He’s done it in states like Georgia, Ohio, North Carolina, Florida, and Texas — where the GOP just passed an extreme gerrymander to stack the deck in their favor. “As head of the NRRT and its affiliated dark money group, Fair Lines America,” Democracy Docket writes, “he has overseen the national strategy of structuring political lines to benefit one party alone." His plans for the NRRT are clear: Systemically help Republicans steal power at the expense of voters by proposing extreme gerrymanders. In his own words, “It’s a priority to keep the House, and Republicans should be looking for as many seats as we can get.” The contrast between the NRRT and the NDRC couldn’t be more stark. The NDRC is working to protect and defend fair maps to ensure a truly representative democracy for all voters. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = The big difference between our two organizations is that the NDRC fights for fairness, first and foremost. As A.G. Eric Holder said: “I’ve believed consistently that wherever Democrats can fairly compete, they can win.” We fight for independent commissions and a fair redistricting process. They actively fight those things because they believe that reforms will hurt their chances of winning. This is a big deal, Peter. We are approaching next year’s midterm elections, which will have big implications for some of our most fundamental rights. If Republicans and the NRRT pass their extreme gerrymanders, they will lock in control of the House of Representatives well before Election Day! They want to undermine our democracy and seize power, no matter the cost. We must do everything we can to stop them. = Thanks so much, The NDRC Team = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

name: Andy (personal)
subject: This is why I do this work
disclaimer_text: Paid for by In This Together PAC
body:
Peter,

We’re hoping to reach our mid-month fundraising goal by midnight tonight. Before I ask you to chip in to help me reach my goal, I want to remind you why the work we’re doing is so important.

This isn’t just about winning the White House, Senate, House of Representatives, or even ensuring Democratic governors win big next November. It’s about electing leaders who stand for our freedoms, who are working to better their communities, and who believe in the power of our democracy.

The American people deserve leaders who respect them – who will vote for what’s right and never give in to partisan games. These are the leaders I’m working to support every day.

Standing up for what you believe in isn’t always easy, but nothing good comes from taking the easy way out. That’s why I’m so proud to support candidates who fit this profile across the country, and I hope you’ll stand with me in helping their races today.

Can I count on you to chip in toward my mid-month fundraising goal before midnight tonight? Every dollar we raise will go toward helping these incredible leaders win big in their races. >> [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/itt-q3-2025 &refcode2=dpwillis67@gmail.com**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115382142/570130461/841405539?refcode=em25_250916_mm2_fndd_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250916_mm2_fndd_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=b0a15797-ce93-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzNjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjBhMTU3OTctY2U5My1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=RpdBP0qcnF_VlAyD82jnPAvx9VS5qB4PtrPee-OHXwU=)

I can’t thank you enough for standing with me in this critical work for our country,

Andy

Hi Peter,

At Her Bold Move, we are proud to have endorsed **Kimberly Pope Adams for Virginia's House of Delegates District 82** , and we’re excited to share an update from her campaign.

First, quick background/why we at HBM care: Virginia is the last and only safe haven for abortion access for the millions of women in the south, and **Kimberly is on track to unseat the strictly anti-choice incumbent Republican in her district.** As our current presidential administration has openly expressed its desire to roll back women’s rights, we will be looking to state governments to defend us – we need more pro-choice, pro-_women_ _women_ in the rooms where state laws are being written.

** The update: Kimberly’s campaign has officially launched their FIRST television ad of the 2025 general election. This is a major milestone for her candidacy. **

name: DemsGive
subject: Groceries. Gas. Rent. Enough!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Malcolm for PA PAC
body:
Malcolm Kenyatta’s case for relief now.
| | | | | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01K5BZQN4Q82W5W1N9PSJ5FGQ8_0)
---
| | | | Hey Peter, Prices keep climbing and families are stretched. Below is a message from Malcolm Kenyatta with his plan on wages, health costs, housing, and workers’ rights. If you want action, read on and get involved. More soon, Andy DemsGive.org
---
|
---
| |
---
| Hey Peter, It's getting tougher every day:
* Groceries up
* Gas up
* Rent up
* Healthcare up

When does it stop? Working families can't wait for relief—we need change NOW! **Malcolm Kenyatta** is the leader we need. Malcolm knows what it’s like to worry about making rent, affording medicine, and putting food on the table. That’s why he’s fighting **every single day** to:
* Raise the minimum wage.
* Lower healthcare costs.
* Expand affordable housing.
* Protect the right to organize.

Malcolm is building a movement **for all of us** —not just the wealthy, not just the well-connected. But he can’t do it alone. Every voice, every volunteer, every upvote matters in this grassroots movement. Together, we can deliver the relief working families urgently need. Come find out what Malcolm Kenyatta is doing for Americans across the spectrum.
---
| | [ Join Malcolm's Movement ](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01K5BZQN4Q82W5W1N9PSJ5FGQ8_1)
---
| | | | |
---

We will be arresting criminals! We will make our cities safe!
| | | | [](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)

Friend,
Families are being ripped apart, but we’re not going to let it happen any longer!
We’re now moving into Memphis and New Orleans.
Democrats would rather protect **ILLEGALS , CARTELS, and GANGS** than _YOU._
That’s why I declared: **“Criminals, your time is up.”**
We’re bringing buses and handcuffs to arrest every single criminal. LAW & ORDER!
The Open Border is **CLOSED!**
Sanctuary cities are **DONE!**
The great American carnage in our cities will **END!**
I’m rolling in with **ICE!**
I will NOT let families live in _**FEAR**_ while Democrats sit on their hands and point fingers.
This is just the beginning. I will not rest until we make America SAFE again!
**_Not someday. Not later. NOW. _**I’m moving in with ICE and JUSTICE, but before we pick the next city or town...
**_[I CAN’T DO IT ALONE: I need to know if you still STAND WITH TRUMP! >](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)_**

[STAND WITH TRUMP](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
Choose your side NOW because if we fail, we will no longer have a country to save!
You’ve never let me down, and I know you won’t stop now.
**[We’re behind on our fundraising, but your action today will make the difference!>](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)**

[STAND WITH TRUMP](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
May God Bless you,
Donald J. Trump President of the United States

_**EXHIBIT 1 - JOINT FUNDRAISING NOTICE **_

Team Nunn ("JFC") is a joint fundraising committee composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn ("Campaign"), Call to Service PAC ("LPAC") and NRCC (each, a "Committee," and, collectively, the "Committees"). Any contribution to the JFC permissible under the Federal Election Campaign Act, as amended ("FECA"), from contributors who have not exceeded their applicable federal contribution limits, shall be allocated among the Committees pursuant to FECA and the formula set forth in this Notice.

_**Contributions Made by an Individual or Federal Non-Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Individuals or federal non-multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $322,100. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $7,000, designating up to $3,500 to the primary election and up to $3,500 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3\. NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $44,300 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

_**Contributions Made by a Federal Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $120,000. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $10,000, designating up to $5,000 to the primary election and up to $5,000 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3 .NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $15,000 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5 .NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

Contributions to Team Nunn, or to any participating Committee individually, are not deductible as charitable donations for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, national banks, federal government contractors, foreign nationals without green cards, and other federally impermissible sources are prohibited. The contributor's signature designates his or her contribution to the elections described above. Contributions that exceed a donor's contribution limit to a participating Committee shall be reallocated to the remaining Committees according to this allocation formula to the extent permitted by FECA. Any contributor may designate his or her contribution to a specific participant Committee to the extent permitted by FECA. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle or calendar year, as applicable.
Paid for by Team Nunn, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn, Call to Service PAC, and NRCC.

| | Hey Reader, Most civilians don't know this - and I’m shocked the mass media hasn’t picked up on this yet. But a group of American engineers have created **[the first unbreakab](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21956/6374453/6f654d63938541571f75a5d015f0c98a33137f51/f605ef1ce821bbf9269fb4c99212614870e92395)[le tactical glasses](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21956/6374453/6f654d63938541571f75a5d015f0c98a33137f51/f605ef1ce821bbf9269fb4c99212614870e92395)** that meet MIL SPEC ballistics standards for combat use... It’s all thanks to a groundbreaking new methods of using proven technology to create extreme durability and protection in even combat conditions. Now available to civilians for the first time. **[==> THESE are unbelievable](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21956/6374453/6f654d63938541571f75a5d015f0c98a33137f51/f605ef1ce821bbf9269fb4c99212614870e92395)** **Thank You.** **P.S.** Right now, I'm throwing in 4 sets of lenses, a hard case, and FREE S&H!

body:

Peter,
**Tim Walz just announced he’s running to serve another term as Governor of Minnesota.** Today, we’re asking all of Tim’s strongest supporters to add their official endorsement in this race.
[**Peter****, please add your name to Tim’s list of official endorsers so he knows he can count on your early support.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115386531/570143429/424426552?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YWFlZjhlMC1kMjkzLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yaw6ouUgTisv0qddoeHgLj3otd9bQ41V7muFt6887zM=&emci=50a490d9-d293-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=8aaef8e0-d293-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=11244133)
| **[ENDORSE TIM](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115386533/570143431/424426552?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YWFlZjhlMC1kMjkzLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yaw6ouUgTisv0qddoeHgLj3otd9bQ41V7muFt6887zM=&emci=50a490d9-d293-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=8aaef8e0-d293-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=11244133)**
---
All eyes are on us. Everybody, from the national media to our future MAGA opponents, will be paying close attention to the momentum we’re able to build in these first crucial 48 hours.
**By adding your name to this list of official endorsers, you’re letting Tim know that you’re all in.**
[**Add your name to this list of Tim Walz’s official endorsements. We’re trying to gather as many signatures as possible – as quickly as possible – to demonstrate the undeniable momentum behind Tim’s campaign for Governor of Minnesota.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115386535/570143433/424426552?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YWFlZjhlMC1kMjkzLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yaw6ouUgTisv0qddoeHgLj3otd9bQ41V7muFt6887zM=&emci=50a490d9-d293-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=8aaef8e0-d293-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=11244133)
Let’s do this! 💥

Dear Peter,

The fight for reproductive freedom is changing quickly—[**and knowledge is power.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115386530/570143428/-654755916?utm_source=email&utm_medium=ea&utm_campaign=26EMCMA-0901AAX-ON&utm_term=xxxxx&utm_content=quiz&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTFjMmFjMy1kMjkzLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6W_Goi9t61xaTQhh1aooysKxsSHPL1cJ84NV9QT7knA=&emci=985beb80-3993-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=da1c2ac3-d293-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=954237#email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&lastname=Team&firstname=Peter) That's why we recently sued the Trump administration for ignoring three separate FOIA requests about its policies on medication abortion.

Access to medication abortion is under direct attack: Texas has already banned abortion pills by mail, and the Trump administration continues to hide its policies. We're curious...[**how much do you really know about this essential form of care?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115386532/570143430/-654755916?utm_source=email&utm_medium=ea&utm_campaign=26EMCMA-0901AAX-ON&utm_term=xxxxx&utm_content=quiz&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTFjMmFjMy1kMjkzLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6W_Goi9t61xaTQhh1aooysKxsSHPL1cJ84NV9QT7knA=&emci=985beb80-3993-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=da1c2ac3-d293-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=954237#email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&lastname=Team&firstname=Peter) | [**TAKE THE QUIZ**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115386534/570143432/-654755916?utm_source=email&utm_medium=ea&utm_campaign=26EMCMA-0901AAX-ON&utm_term=xxxxx&utm_content=quiz&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTFjMmFjMy1kMjkzLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6W_Goi9t61xaTQhh1aooysKxsSHPL1cJ84NV9QT7knA=&emci=985beb80-3993-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=da1c2ac3-d293-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=954237#email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&lastname=Team&firstname=Peter "TAKE THE QUIZ")

Medication abortion is safe, effective, and now accounts for the majority of abortions nationwide. As politicians push new restrictions and outright bans, protecting access has never been more urgent.

By taking this quiz, you'll see why medication abortion is vital to reproductive health care today—and why it's central to our fight for freedom.

clean_body: In her time as Legislator, Elizabeth introduced more than 100 bills! | | | Friend, The fight for Virginia’s future starts now. Early voting begins on September 19, and your support will make all the difference. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. In her time as Legislator, Elizabeth delivered, showing she can bridge divides and get things done — introducing more than 100 bills! She secured paid sick leave, strengthened collective bargaining rights, and received recognition from organizations like the Virginia Education Association. — Team Guzman | Democrat is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. To donate by check, send to: Friends of Elizabeth Guzman PO Box 74, Nokesville VA, 20182 \- \- Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman. Contributions or gifts to Guzman for Congress are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . subject: Trump’s plan to “dismantle” us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34051?t=1011&refcode=email-20250917_v&akid=9387%2E5885482%2EfA_pCk ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

Trump and his inner circle have openly declared war on the “radical left”.
As the political temperature reaches a boiling point, Trump’s Deputy Chief
of Staff Stephen Miller just vowed to wield the FULL force of state power
to “dismantle” us.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34052?source=email-20250917&t=1060&akid=9387%2E5885482%2EfA_pCk ]Headline: Vance, White House promise to 'go after' left-leaning
organizations

This isn’t rhetoric – they’re looking for any way possible to crackdown on
their political opponents. We don’t know yet exactly how they’re going to
strike, but we are marshaling our resources to secure our organization as
best we can – upgrading our software and tech defenses and investing in
our legal team on standby.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34051?t=1057&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20250917nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9387%2E5885482%2EfA_pCk ]Will you chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can to help Our Revolution
protect our activists, upgrade our security, and keep our movement strong?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

Trump’s team is shouting from the rooftops that it plans to weaponize the
law to silence its political opposition – which includes all of us.

Miller made their plans clear when he threatened, “It could be a RICO
charge, a conspiracy charge, conspiracy against the United States,
insurrection. But we are going to do what it takes to dismantle the
organizations and the entities that are fomenting riots, that are doxxing,
that are trying to inspire terrorism, that are committing acts of wanton
violence.”

To be clear, we’re not doing any of those things! But we know their
playbook. Find ANY way they can to bring charges, real or not, to bring
down the organizations who dare to challenge them.

We are taking precautions – spending money on lawyers to protect our
participants at rallies and quickly moving to audit our online security
and bolster our legal team. But every dollar we spend defending ourselves
is one less dollar we can use for grassroots organizing, phone banking, or
supporting working-class candidates running against the far right.

We never wanted to devote precious time and money to defense instead of
mobilization. But when the President of the United States declares all
political opponents his enemies and his chief lieutenant spells out a
sinister plan for all to hear, we have no choice.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34051?t=1054&amount=22&refcode=email-20250917nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9387%2E5885482%2EfA_pCk ]Can you chip in right now to help us secure Our Revolution, protect
activists in the streets, and keep our fight alive?

When we organize, we win.

clean_body: [ ]Our Revolution logo Peter Willis, Trump and his inner circle have openly declared war on the “radical left”. As the political temperature reaches a boiling point, Trump’s Deputy Chief of Staff Stephen Miller just vowed to wield the FULL force of state power to “dismantle” us. [ ]Headline: Vance, White House promise to 'go after' left-leaning organizations This isn’t rhetoric – they’re looking for any way possible to crackdown on their political opponents. We don’t know yet exactly how they’re going to strike, but we are marshaling our resources to secure our organization as best we can – upgrading our software and tech defenses and investing in our legal team on standby. [ ]Will you chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can to help Our Revolution protect our activists, upgrade our security, and keep our movement strong? If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Our Revolution will process immediately. [ ]CHIP IN $9 [ ]CHIP IN $22 [ ]CHIP IN $27 [ ]CHIP IN $46 [ ]CHIP IN $66 [ ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT Trump’s team is shouting from the rooftops that it plans to weaponize the law to silence its political opposition – which includes all of us. Miller made their plans clear when he threatened, “It could be a RICO charge, a conspiracy charge, conspiracy against the United States, insurrection. But we are going to do what it takes to dismantle the organizations and the entities that are fomenting riots, that are doxxing, that are trying to inspire terrorism, that are committing acts of wanton violence.” To be clear, we’re not doing any of those things! But we know their playbook. Find ANY way they can to bring charges, real or not, to bring down the organizations who dare to challenge them. We are taking precautions – spending money on lawyers to protect our participants at rallies and quickly moving to audit our online security and bolster our legal team. But every dollar we spend defending ourselves is one less dollar we can use for grassroots organizing, phone banking, or supporting working-class candidates running against the far right. We never wanted to devote precious time and money to defense instead of mobilization. But when the President of the United States declares all political opponents his enemies and his chief lieutenant spells out a sinister plan for all to hear, we have no choice. [ ]Can you chip in right now to help us secure Our Revolution, protect activists in the streets, and keep our fight alive? When we organize, we win. clean_body: We still need YOU to CONFIRM your party affiliation before the deadline. Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this Peter, The numbers are in. And they've got Democrats absolutely terrified because voters are fleeing the party in droves. Across the country, voters are walking away from the failed Democratic agenda -- and coming HOME to the Republican Party. Millions have had enough of putting criminals first, open borders, reckless spending that crushes families, and the woke madness taking over our schools and culture. This is our moment, but we have to make it count. Peter, you've proven yourself a trusted America First patriot, so we're giving you one final opportunity to set the record straight and confirm you're still with us. Thank you, NRSC HQ | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: James Talarico
subject: Please make one of the first donations to my campaign for the U.S. Senate.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
After a great deal of reflection and prayer, I’ve made a decision...
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94659?refcode=em20250917-9433&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9433%2E614464%2EZq5qrF)
Peter —
I’ve heard from a lot of Texans this summer. And after a great deal of reflection and prayer, I’ve made a decision:
I’m running for the U.S. Senate.
**[I’m asking you to make one of the first donations to my campaign. Split it between my campaign and Heartland Patriots. This is a massive undertaking, and it would mean the world to me to know you have my back.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94659?refcode=em20250917-9433&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9433%2E614464%2EZq5qrF)**
**[DONATE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94659?refcode=em20250917-9433&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9433%2E614464%2EZq5qrF)**
Right now, there’s something broken in America. Our economy is broken. Our politics are broken. Even our relationships with each other feel broken.
**That’s because the most powerful people in the world want it that way.**
The biggest divide in America is not left versus right — it’s top versus bottom.
Billionaires want us looking left and right at each other instead of looking up at them.
The people at the top work so hard to keep us angry and divided because our unity is a threat to their wealth and power. So their cable news networks and their social media algorithms tear us apart.
They divide us by party, by race, by gender, by religion so we don’t notice they’re defunding our schools, gutting our healthcare, and cutting taxes for themselves and their rich friends.
It’s the oldest strategy in the world: divide and conquer. But we will not be conquered.
**The fight ahead will not be easy. We’re the underdogs.**
We’re going up against these billionaire mega-donors and their puppet politicians. We’re going up against a rigged system. And we’re going up against a lot of money.
But I’m a former middle school teacher — I don’t scare easily. And Texans don’t scare easily.
**Big Money is powerful, but it's nothing compared to people power.**
That’s why this is going to be a campaign fueled by people like you. I’ve never taken a dime of corporate PAC money, and I refuse to start now. So I need you with me.
**[Please split a contribution between my campaign for the U.S. Senate and Heartland Patriots today to become a Founding Donor. We need as many people as possible chipping in on day one to prove our movement is strong enough.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94659?refcode=em20250917-9433&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=9433%2E614464%2EZq5qrF)**
If you have stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to James Talarico and Heartland Patriots will process instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94660?refcode=em20250917-9433&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=5&akid=9433%2E614464%2EZq5qrF) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94660?refcode=em20250917-9433&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=6&akid=9433%2E614464%2EZq5qrF) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94660?refcode=em20250917-9433&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=7&akid=9433%2E614464%2EZq5qrF) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94660?refcode=em20250917-9433&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=8&akid=9433%2E614464%2EZq5qrF) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94660?refcode=em20250917-9433&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=9&akid=9433%2E614464%2EZq5qrF) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94660?refcode=em20250917-9433&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=10&akid=9433%2E614464%2EZq5qrF) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94659?refcode=em20250917-9433&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=9433%2E614464%2EZq5qrF)
---
We're going to make history, and we're going to do it together.
Let’s go.
James

| [](https://www.facebook.com/lucaskuncemo/) | [](https://twitter.com/lucaskuncemo) | [](https://www.instagram.com/lucaskuncemo/)
---|---|---

If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe_heartland_patriots/?t=12&akid=9433%2E614464%2EZq5qrF). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

# [S.O.S. for Home Ownership - The New Homestead Act of 2025](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1454853&post_id=173851945&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTczODUxOTQ1LCJpYXQiOjE3NTgxMjAxNzYsImV4cCI6MTc2MDcxMjE3NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0NTQ4NTMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.PUVEhLe9lPoab-3vieto-PBy32o2QE3JHsZtqwZI-O8)
### A Real Social Program for Economic Mobility Through Home Ownership
| | [Dr. Michael Goldstein](https://substack.com/@drmichaelgoldsteinct) and [Jonathan Goldstein](https://substack.com/@jonathangoldstein81)

| Sep 17

_**Social Justice Begins at Home Ownership - This is the Real Housing Crisis.**_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9712a0fc-5bf1-454f-baf7-1b61e0181b33?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The Homestead Act, signed into law by Abraham Lincoln on May 20, 1862, the President who started a war and a political party to end slavery, **allowed any adult citizen, or intending citizen, to claim 160 acres of public land as long as they lived on it and improved it for five years. It is time to revisit the Homestead Act 163 Years Later.**
[ Pledge your support](https://substack..eTnVooBAqFgeCeiPBfTNTq_9Qcb2547q685pZUk-PoM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=173851945)
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1454853&post_id=173851945&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTczODUxOTQ1LCJpYXQiOjE3NTgxMjAxNzYsImV4cCI6MTc2MDcxMjE3NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0NTQ4NTMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.PUVEhLe9lPoab-3vieto-PBy32o2QE3JHsZtqwZI-O8)
**America 's Current Housing Problem**
* America was founded on the dream of homesteading -- planting your flag, working the land, and building a family legacy through ownership, the greatest form of generational wealth transfer for most Americans.
* The Sad Reality - today, that dream is slipping away. Over the last 50 years, home ownership has fallen from nearly 69% in 2004 to just 65.1% in 2025.
* Home ownership rates and prices have not returned to pre-2008 crisis levels in many parts of this country, except in the wealthiest areas.
* **The monthly cost of owning a home has skyrocketed.** Twenty years ago, average mortgage payments in parts of America were around $700-$1,200 a month. Today, the average payment is $2,715/month on a 30-year loan, and over $3,500/month on a 15-year loan.
* Median monthly housing costs in 2024 were already $2,035-$2,225, making the American Dream nearly impossible for working families.

**We are sending out an SOS -- Save Our Single-Family Homes - A Roadmap for the Push to the November Election**
**The Policy Failure & Environmental Crisis (Yes Conservatives are Green Too)**
* Affordable housing rentals trap families in permanent tenancy and dependency, preventing wealth-building.
* Government subsidies often fuel waste, fraud, and abuse, while first-time buyer credits inflate home prices which results in unaffordable housing or less money down or savings resulting in mortgage default.
* Opportunity Zones, meant to revitalize communities, often invite speculation and insider deals, causing gentrification and displacement and a further eradication of the neighborhood charm.
* The Clinton-era "NINJA" loans and Fannie/Freddie mortgage securitizations fueled the disastrous 2007-2008 housing crisis.
* In places like Fairfield County, home values have rebounded since COVID -- but middle-class affordability remains elusive as even middle-class families cannot afford to live in the neighborhoods they grew up in.

**Connecticut Policy Threats**
* "Development as of Right" allows housing boards to approve housing projects without meaningful community input.
* Transit-Oriented Development (TOD) laws force multi-story apartment blocks into single-family neighborhoods, often as long as properties are within a certain radius of train stations or bus stops.

**Additional Quality-of-Life & Environmental Harms**
* These policies ignore critical infrastructure, parking, and traffic considerations.
* Increased traffic congestion from high-density development leads to longer commutes, more greenhouse gas emissions, and pollution to our waterways -- contradicting environmentalist goals. Urban pollution is high and the tragedy of the commons is increased without sufficient green space for recreation.
* Aging or inadequate sewage treatment systems worsen the situation, especially during storms -- leading to sewage runoff, which contaminates waterways.

**Public Health Impact: Beach Closings & Water Quality**
* Bridgeport beaches have been closed multiple times in 2025 due to high bacteria levels. For instance:
* On June 25, 2025, beaches were closed due to high bacteria levels.
* Again on August 13, 2025, beaches were closed for elevated bacterial contamination.
* Across Southwest Connecticut, heavy rains have frequently triggered beach closures due to elevated bacteria levels, including at beaches like Calf Pasture (Norwalk), Shady Beach, and beaches in Westport, Milford, and West Haven.
* Yes, even wealthy towns are not immune to dirty water for their children to swim in.
* In the greater Long Island Sound, wet weather samples failed safe-swimming water-quality criteria 15.6% of the time in Connecticut over 2022-2024, up from 10.9% in 2020-2022\.

**The Solution: The New Homestead Act**
* **Stake Your Claim** : Towns provide land (via acquisition or eminent domain) for real ownership, not endless rent.
* **Ownership First** : Families receive homes with affordable mortgages priced below local rents.
* **Wealth & Generational Wealth-Building**: Every mortgage payment builds equity, not government dependency. Home Equity trumps rental payments to landlords.
* **Family Legacy** : Homes may be transferred within the family anytime; resale outside the family allowed after 15 years.
* **Flexibility** : Homes may be rented out if life circumstances change (job, family size, military deployment) so home ownership does not turn into a prison sentence of financial insecurity.

**Jobs Creation & Oversight**
* **Citizen Jobs Only** : All construction jobs reserved for U.S. citizens.
* **No** **Prevailing Wage Mandates** : Reduces costs, speeds development.
* **Public -Private Partnerships**: Transparent and accountable partnership designed to prevent waste, fraud, and abuse.

**Opportunity Zone Advantage**
* Aligns with existing Federal Opportunity Zone incentives.
* Redirects private capital into community wealth, not speculation.

**Real Public Benefits -- Not Bloated Bureaucracy and Subsidies for Failing Government Programs**
✔ Families move from renting to owning and bestow pride in ownership to their children
The new home owner becomes the urban pioneer, revitalizes neighborhoods and cities and brings prosperity to underutilized and unutilized land
In dense areas homeowners can join forces to build condominiums
✔ Communities stabilize with long-term homeowners that re-invest in their community.
✔ Jobs and wealth stay more local.
✔ Reduced traffic/emissions compared to high-density sprawl.
✔ Cleaner water and fewer beach closures due to better infrastructure.
**Conclusion: A Blueprint for American Homeownership**
The November elections are coming -- less than 50 days away, not counting early voting. This S.O.S must be the nation's rallying cry.
_**The New Homestead Act connects the original ideals of homesteading with today 's urgent problems: skyrocketing housing costs, declining ownership, environmental degradation, and public health threats from sewage overflow and polluted beaches.**_
This is not gentrification. This is not speculation.
**This is America 's S.O.S -- Save Our Single-Family Homes.**

subject: We’re all Charlie Kirk right now

body:
As a former Navy SEAL, this isn’t the first battlefield death that I’ve seen - but it may be the most poignant | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=996f366778d14bd0aa6e11affa364b1c&_e=F2yvuc6ifDiQY40yl-gEWb6QrpcrKSROXeGWHYGA0ePXge2mWLOU9tDC-n5s26DTNXdlRZXqOF8TtuTgK2dQ5S4USA3YsZmjOV5l3YZ4kBLRfCASPUrmNQy15IdVMBjwDQvrLyx9dPQgyBumWT_K-F2V8hWxlmHBMVcOHvnq90ZFQBvqRbQ3eI4_CwGagPLQXmC6Gt2ufT0rTFn2niK-SssWyEayk7CVjeoeB9QJioSqRr_6bcisklbeRVX83PUn38gi-zytLQukHQ6iDwB11jwbhj83c0E3c_vPJji28aKNfppMrMWk0nKlpE_WJrY5pJDRVcb5jHxdcWWF9-YbYBFlZ8l2q0dgCNTJOB4j_RbVacqwmpSCGnnQKb4dfxbZM1hVmn7I3jLG7rFBitZVmLood0t-Jv0Xu-HoFJqrp89whTO83GnhSLum4gcweJVJ8niILxTFtgo5cRBNsorCHH8nSdj9nKfu6346v-d60Es3QHKsSs_1Nw9MwSz1vwLDwhHrUXHPIRj74Aj1NB_Qr09UviCABH91sE0OTluIRGGcrtG44vVlbLizQ-VdQJXUE1iaDM4GxPKGmULEwhz7TSu4O3GCcp7DxEOhOJLdXpJdqSD2Kj_7TBk1a3Dg0Y8cXl0M1RLXay34Oo8oJcwu6i51o3WdFVakpR6DkHH6PLEfNXnXp6kjTbHTSx9vIxfZ3wKqht8miMcsbQC2M7DYFUOCFDrpLLZlXJbFBjAJ1G0Fla31lv9Ox2YbvJDgBB3NBfn8KVgyjPffK9Segv8JOF2iS1Ef-91bkICyM0wSdH4%3D)
