Fellow Conservative,

The nation mourns the tragic assassination of Charlie Kirk, gunned down on September 10, 2025, at Utah Valley University for daring to speak truth to power. His fearless voice—championing freedom, faith, and the American Dream—was silenced in a brazen act of political violence that has shaken us all to our core. Charlie fought hate with educated debate, not guns, using sharp wit and unyielding principle to challenge radical agendas. **Yet, he was punished with a bullet for his courage to speak.**

My name is Adam Schwarze. **I’m a former Navy SEAL running for the United States Senate in Minnesota, and Charlie Kirk is an inspiration to me.** Over the course of my career, I’ve met some very special men and women willing to put their lives on the line for God and country in some of the most inhospitable places imaginable.

**_I never had the pleasure of meeting Charlier Kirk, but as a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran, I can say with authority that he has to be one of the bravest individuals ever to champion the values of the United States of America._**

Charlie’s candor, professionalism, and respect for everyone he encountered will stick with me as I work to earn the support of every Minnesotan voter during this campaign. **Charlie’s life should serve as an example to my opponents on the other side of the aisle on how to treat political opponents and people who share different viewpoints, with respect.**

I joined the Marine Corps after 9/11, served in over 70 countries, and fought chaos and extremism. I know what it takes to serve something bigger than yourself—just like Charlie did with every debate, every speech, every stand he took. This Senate race is my most challenging mission yet. Minnesota hasn’t gone red since 1976. I’m the underdog. _**[But with your support, we can honor Charlie’s legacy by stopping the radicals who enabled this tragedy](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=996f366778d14bd0aa6e11affa364b1c&_e=F2yvuc6ifDiQY40yl-gEWb6QrpcrKSROXeGWHYGA0ePXge2mWLOU9tDC-n5s26DTNXdlRZXqOF8TtuTgK2dQ5S4USA3YsZmjOV5l3YZ4kBLRfCASPUrmNQy15IdVMBjwDQvrLyx9dPQgyBumWT_K-F2V8hWxlmHBMVcOHvnq90ZFQBvqRbQ3eI4_CwGagPLQXmC6Gt2ufT0rTFn2niK-SssWyEayk7CVjeoeB9QJioSqRr_6bcisklbeRVX83PUn38gi-zytLQukHQ6iDwB11jwbhj83c0E3c_vPJji28aLCUH2L1hO8bhgfegxVIhbgqiwKdYpY9IFKWvu8wv_ZGeHNLa5RrPRjBjCyVCCDIoS1ktlG5qmztR0pQaupgM-QWYxBxksPZ_frbaKs0TvW4YeZwB367xi7dON8ppAqLE_4c2IlFJCKIDuX4SkZ1ngbSX89R-xslMlsK-HClVQkTd2X4FysAb6N0fAxOZo8ui53bqpiFadHuphQPhhVpV4_9yoYDtHJC8XIu1uEZaC8Yt0mVUm4c8YZp0jxmHQLJjC_skKcngAtGJnneq8Uz5VRtyEE8aZsPIj3kVUVSDNF1ht-Iyu3J0VVNzz_PHpxZ8uqnD1CCd-rAM-SwtfsrqQiG6nmZfKapHdEABtmml6skVfLs81EYYPOeHJljum4eoM0eGalsp2Rgdlup2er9IZtaOgDHDQbibhAHRtz7ehWoYxabHcXGusIuLUYoeyBuK2BKNuf15gNs-oBlb-pNShPZ49S3FSiQQTD3xIAO9uPSrD8YA4Lz7Dfvl3qu2IbwfQ%3D)**_.

_[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=996f366778d14bd0aa6e11affa364b1c&_e=F2yvuc6ifDiQY40yl-gEWb6QrpcrKSROXeGWHYGA0ePXge2mWLOU9tDC-n5s26DTNXdlRZXqOF8TtuTgK2dQ5S4USA3YsZmjOV5l3YZ4kBLRfCASPUrmNQy15IdVMBjwDQvrLyx9dPQgyBumWT_K-F2V8hWxlmHBMVcOHvnq90ZFQBvqRbQ3eI4_CwGagPLQXmC6Gt2ufT0rTFn2niK-SssWyEayk7CVjeoeB9QJioSqRr_6bcisklbeRVX83PUn38gi-zytLQukHQ6iDwB11jwbhj83c0E3c_vPJji28aLux-qLGMnNrsoas6a5D14e_HiNoQcMQH8xbaAUmF3wBNDE2_TGWgHqFy1qii4mq9cd-b1IQm47JpeoIIqjgs47vyVAs7wvNQbqJHpwA0oUFJnZ6B6p4st2q-M0SOJeV-aHFhRy-RlRdiL1PvOswgoqse1kmunj-k4wlv1F1jj9RJ9pSc5M4ln6ABSB6gb-TN0Qkp9z_DPvPI-4Ulhcr0gSrZ500lB1PGUeIJeXWnMQAnS2eahULjFo8LDsXVBa7hWhKsvN9PPOCSY01LJhB97cI-y9-sKTn74oqDXTaDUl80yfzgIpGJfKEollxlNvQ7lew8Nh1Oj6w0rqNfDtwr92oehNfPFAkv3j3_XWR0M3tWZfR4tNECZUDkdFPxuf6Gfn4sfvpbgIfgJ0z1XFy2RuYexMHAqpB6VQiw8vJLRQjBDu9f7CklrLIPMX7gHIplxwNHfZKhTKyoidwY9nGMC8J3vjZ-DRUHgpKHsKptYn1fG-c_fcfG_ytl4k4DBG6bg%3D)_
[**FIGHT FOR CHARLIE
**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=996f366778d14bd0aa6e11affa364b1c&_e=F2yvuc6ifDiQY40yl-gEWb6QrpcrKSROXeGWHYGA0ePXge2mWLOU9tDC-n5s26DTNXdlRZXqOF8TtuTgK2dQ5S4USA3YsZmjOV5l3YZ4kBLRfCASPUrmNQy15IdVMBjwDQvrLyx9dPQgyBumWT_K-F2V8hWxlmHBMVcOHvnq90ZFQBvqRbQ3eI4_CwGagPLQXmC6Gt2ufT0rTFn2niK-SssWyEayk7CVjeoeB9QJioSqRr_6bcisklbeRVX83PUn38gi-zytLQukHQ6iDwB11jwbhj83c0E3c_vPJji28aLFdWigJBwT7LsEKrScv1fzsUk_Nk2r1i_Hee7XReiJ3yIpjDFrhByNE7D8930JGUBrFtbcXykkwXfNC3W9wSVbua8_rMM6qpv0VxcTDvaCLGwjlMjCWVWpG2e4scKOGAyfffXzMn27Ep1a_6CeC7SrwvPH6uisiqMVGg1EaojexRQ68Xe_8kog8K4okF9Vkt3-awE96l0xICgq07RtmXnjXeF8c_UhiLKOQYndPLdEYzrLz4uQbLHWraPOQ8jeGb4Yg9SHvGMIbSOVhztIc9P-YONidbdJTWzS49yLXUgnkn0Y6zEHfTXfbX20n7uqql7nwzotu8U0jS8goqLz5SbzjwMeCwZOsjoGJT-7cdQDEqxYJGLG_ar5-rT_A9QhWt5KW8foUBrsX7pJWHFvALYaRzMEF-LOZIioJh1XWns5UQJLg_s9tvk6PfhtH7Ma6rgbmPhtnuDHeZ98YYYcZ1nU-eC-rkxoxhMSNvf_OAJtKdh22vSGFvHPmowTgaNh9fo%3D)
Unfortunately, I’m running against Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, who, like her boss, shares a long history of inflammatory rhetoric.

Days before Charlie’s untimely death, Tim Walz, speaking in front of constituents at a political rally, lamented that President Trump hadn’t yet died, making his scripted condolences for Charlie’s family ring all the more hollow as he _**failed to disavow the extremists celebrating this tragedy online.**_

_**I thank God that President Trump defeated Kamala Harris last November.**_****

**Can you imagine a vice president with so little moral clarity that he would tolerate the hatred that led to Charlie’s murder?** **
**
I can’t.

Tim Walz and my opponent in this Senate race personify everything Charlie Kirk stood against: **arrogance, deceit, and a progressive agenda that sees conservatives not as opponents, but as enemies to be crushed.** Their party’s years of demonizing voices like Charlie’s set the stage for this violence. Their silence on the specifics of this tragedy speaks louder than their words.

They both push to disarm law-abiding Minnesotans while radicals run rampant. They both pander with land acknowledgments, dividing us further. They both view Republicans as threats to be eliminated, just as Charlie was targeted for his beliefs. **The woman in the photo below is my opponent, by the way.**

_[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=996f366778d14bd0aa6e11affa364b1c&_e=F2yvuc6ifDiQY40yl-gEWb6QrpcrKSROXeGWHYGA0ePXge2mWLOU9tDC-n5s26DTNXdlRZXqOF8TtuTgK2dQ5S4USA3YsZmjOV5l3YZ4kBLRfCASPUrmNQy15IdVMBjwDQvrLyx9dPQgyBumWT_K-F2V8hWxlmHBMVcOHvnq90ZFQBvqRbQ3eI4_CwGagPLQXmC6Gt2ufT0rTFn2niK-SssWyEayk7CVjeoeB9QJioSqRr_6bcisklbeRVX83PUn38gi-zytLQukHQ6iDwB11jwbhj83c0E3c_vPJji28aLWtpChVW3ZLmdmZwE-HzfbOO50cMrBouOgPb_AfVHlqknBr5PkWJxseMEV3FMtCAKMPnjJXrg2jXK12uUxW2bdtod7eifONfVKgLdoIOwha_EdiBxv4twIFVKm0wmnOjKbQPLCUUPQQURQ_xEQhOLDCROcXTnpk1EQY0XzrRNM5TL2snFhBiOhEHYVgUszigtYL1NxMC4U292-oee9NhMD14tdw4_GRcNV3Ys2D4JggseeKNSA5380CdcZrmbPVXISXzgcfwqdbm8b-9d6o2q7bh_fQcCbNKNzmeQ7RKEujwOhxUoMNC7Zw0_sCSEH0aPvG2OrDux6I3sG_t3cJRtV1n1m3HK3TtG7jd4TTce--cH1T7MRApV2maCMjJqzzxF0IjqC2-Ht5BONIsK9UYtPMNDQOB5N4U2wU9t-H_qOEm-KMUAlllnSLnoTjV0bFL_05Pve6T_sqHDjBmjN3sCAON4Yaw6QoWW3p7_HOQF38ZA6-ipvXIDzdKT0ha-2eg8%3D)_

**If they get their way, they’ll impose their warped vision on America, silencing patriots like Charlie Kirk forever—patriots who countered lies with reason, not violence.**

This fight isn’t just about Walz or Peggy Flanagan — it’s about the future Charlie Kirk died for. It’s about you, me, and everyone who believes in our nation’s founding values. They think we’re “buffoons.” **They think we’ll stay silent. They think we’ll let Charlie’s murder fade.**

When elected to the United States Senate, I promise I won’t stay silent; I won’t let his memory or work fade into the history books. **[I would be honored if you would consider a small gift of $5 or even $10 right now to help me take my fight to the far-left and ensure that we’re able to complete this mission - for Charlie, for our children, and for the good of the entire nation](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=996f366778d14bd0aa6e11affa364b1c&_e=F2yvuc6ifDiQY40yl-gEWb6QrpcrKSROXeGWHYGA0ePXge2mWLOU9tDC-n5s26DTNXdlRZXqOF8TtuTgK2dQ5S4USA3YsZmjOV5l3YZ4kBLRfCASPUrmNQy15IdVMBjwDQvrLyx9dPQgyBumWT_K-F2V8hWxlmHBMVcOHvnq90ZFQBvqRbQ3eI4_CwGagPLQXmC6Gt2ufT0rTFn2niK-SssWyEayk7CVjeoeB9QJioSqRr_6bcisklbeRVX83PUn38gi-zytLQukHQ6iDwB11jwbhj83c0E3c_vPJji28aIRwX_Ry4547gbtA595xQG6RkOZYcHqFFlky01qcJxn0y6s7NE2GxghDLy7rMszd_Krur8gjgvEeBez-l98Okt76RFK0tR8HBXhYZXRRxd3hjogXAxZ3bdYssJrPn-IzyNzUSxG-4DoW3zxLu_2MerfgtU9NnDMq6DQzgIds44MZSvS40tbtMyKpn72bPFbAgk7M7Jg-cacKc0nqnqwZeii-0rktDNdclim7ibxKuaDj6Hi3SVbEuXIZybxH-odcEWNMxaHmz8MI4y6GaAwRS56Nueuzi4YYi5IFDZGGgiObiK0sMr5idO2hBWt4ysHKBG0rhKBTj0tfWuLr5W5On1noCai61X92CqT1zcU-KpIG8JPD3xXcgXIoG5m2H2lxgEIRpMQHL905nBALiQW46i6O-_bVpeJdjfTMmexcuXrKlMYgNmLfrsnvtn-z0bbe3DxAEeqOSW1C_XWaMWxNqu_XBgVhgy6H72Hfqz6V0o95_Q0d_Klsj7JYPP-azxTyLY%3D)**.

**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=996f366778d14bd0aa6e11affa364b1c&_e=F2yvuc6ifDiQY40yl-gEWb6QrpcrKSROXeGWHYGA0ePXge2mWLOU9tDC-n5s26DTNXdlRZXqOF8TtuTgK2dQ5S4USA3YsZmjOV5l3YZ4kBLRfCASPUrmNQy15IdVMBjwDQvrLyx9dPQgyBumWT_K-F2V8hWxlmHBMVcOHvnq90ZFQBvqRbQ3eI4_CwGagPLQXmC6Gt2ufT0rTFn2niK-SssWyEayk7CVjeoeB9QJioSqRr_6bcisklbeRVX83PUn38gi-zytLQukHQ6iDwB11jwbhj83c0E3c_vPJji28aL7cnqEIbF09MY9cEXvMTZYrXtWw2vLMB8SST45vrHyVAULlkyEUgl6R9D0q6fh1YUWtZ2mfnR9ETyLZ62AkzHyJo-Z602hwgHAKU0ouLhN4MbGFhdY_3TbHZ6XvZlNqz6HQHPcfduCFh0kJxieNlIDLhTOvF_Qp1CRgWon-QbkM-81Vs-Fl01WEf4LXwctxFplSw31k8jxMsXCcqRxCfhB3pRWqEObIaLYV46ooRbbHyPIg8aQcYcJNUO8DKqh5Jwq-lSXgB4LNVlpKPcuepNtmnCT-Wgdj7pF68GWTZkX6JtLcvlSAep5XgLy3dXnE8IHwyW_z-xFLdfSqZTzjWTRlxk3zbwSZW-pQ7QEaBDFMAaFlzLG1GqEh-w6247e_qRiTiMjBmwy19ajvWgzNi_5nBQlq7JRMaMJKBkukJuZVz-sAmfELdzVshgW_aECMqhESungW1BHThbeakD-kjGWSQFs8RZJW4vjhsZS9SWZo5wu5Fr9hhl1RdqULIzXAHA%3D)

Your contribution of $5, $10, or $25 today will fuel our fight to keep Charlie’s vision alive—building a Minnesota and an America where free speech is protected, not punished with bullets.

**You have a choice:** let them sweep this under the rug, or join me to ensure Charlie’s sacrifice galvanizes us to reclaim our values through the same fearless, reasoned debate he embodied.

**I’ve fought tough battles before. With you by my side, we’ll win this one—for Charlie, for America.**

With steadfast resolve,
Adam Schwarze
Retired Navy SEAL
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota

clean_body: As a former Navy SEAL, this isn’t the first battlefield death that I’ve seen - but it may be the most poignant | Fellow Conservative, The nation mourns the tragic assassination of Charlie Kirk, gunned down on September 10, 2025, at Utah Valley University for daring to speak truth to power. His fearless voice—championing freedom, faith, and the American Dream—was silenced in a brazen act of political violence that has shaken us all to our core. Charlie fought hate with educated debate, not guns, using sharp wit and unyielding principle to challenge radical agendas. Yet, he was punished with a bullet for his courage to speak. My name is Adam Schwarze. I’m a former Navy SEAL running for the United States Senate in Minnesota, and Charlie Kirk is an inspiration to me. Over the course of my career, I’ve met some very special men and women willing to put their lives on the line for God and country in some of the most inhospitable places imaginable. I never had the pleasure of meeting Charlier Kirk, but as a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran, I can say with authority that he has to be one of the bravest individuals ever to champion the values of the United States of America. Charlie’s candor, professionalism, and respect for everyone he encountered will stick with me as I work to earn the support of every Minnesotan voter during this campaign. Charlie’s life should serve as an example to my opponents on the other side of the aisle on how to treat political opponents and people who share different viewpoints, with respect. I joined the Marine Corps after 9/11, served in over 70 countries, and fought chaos and extremism. I know what it takes to serve something bigger than yourself—just like Charlie did with every debate, every speech, every stand he took. This Senate race is my most challenging mission yet. Minnesota hasn’t gone red since 1976. I’m the underdog. . Unfortunately, I’m running against Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, who, like her boss, shares a long history of inflammatory rhetoric. Days before Charlie’s untimely death, Tim Walz, speaking in front of constituents at a political rally, lamented that President Trump hadn’t yet died, making his scripted condolences for Charlie’s family ring all the more hollow as he failed to disavow the extremists celebrating this tragedy online. I thank God that President Trump defeated Kamala Harris last November.** Can you imagine a vice president with so little moral clarity that he would tolerate the hatred that led to Charlie’s murder? I can’t. Tim Walz and my opponent in this Senate race personify everything Charlie Kirk stood against: arrogance, deceit, and a progressive agenda that sees conservatives not as opponents, but as enemies to be crushed. Their party’s years of demonizing voices like Charlie’s set the stage for this violence. Their silence on the specifics of this tragedy speaks louder than their words. They both push to disarm law-abiding Minnesotans while radicals run rampant. They both pander with land acknowledgments, dividing us further. They both view Republicans as threats to be eliminated, just as Charlie was targeted for his beliefs. The woman in the photo below is my opponent, by the way. If they get their way, they’ll impose their warped vision on America, silencing patriots like Charlie Kirk forever—patriots who countered lies with reason, not violence. This fight isn’t just about Walz or Peggy Flanagan — it’s about the future Charlie Kirk died for. It’s about you, me, and everyone who believes in our nation’s founding values. They think we’re “buffoons.” They think we’ll stay silent. They think we’ll let Charlie’s murder fade. When elected to the United States Senate, I promise I won’t stay silent; I won’t let his memory or work fade into the history books. . Your contribution of $5, $10, or $25 today will fuel our fight to keep Charlie’s vision alive—building a Minnesota and an America where free speech is protected, not punished with bullets. You have a choice: let them sweep this under the rug, or join me to ensure Charlie’s sacrifice galvanizes us to reclaim our values through the same fearless, reasoned debate he embodied. I’ve fought tough battles before. With you by my side, we’ll win this one—for Charlie, for America. With steadfast resolve, Adam Schwarze Retired Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA** | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Andy Kim
subject: Our Constitution

body:
Our foundation is under threat like never before.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115387656/570147080/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTEwY2RlMS1kNDkzLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F6VXwCHA2COm9LTpJEINNdPsT47Y-nKYl5HDXgrD33U=&emci=e0616ae0-3393-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=8a10cde1-d493-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=26261389)
---

| | Today is Constitution Day. Today I'm reminded of the oath I took to uphold and defend the Constitution. **That oath was about protecting the very foundation of our democracy.** **Right now, that foundation is under threat like never before.** Donald Trump tried to overturn the results of a free and fair election. He encouraged an attack on our Capitol to block the peaceful transfer of power. And now, he continues to push lies and pursue actions and legislation that erode trust in our elections, weaken our democracy, and push the limits of our Constitution to the brink. This isn't just about one man. It's about whether we allow power-hungry politicians to put themselves above the Constitution or whether we stand together to defend it. Our Constitution is more than words on parchment. It's a living promise of checks and balances, freedom of speech, and government by and for the people. **Those promises only survive if we fight for them.** That's why I will never back down in this fight. We need to stay vigilant, organize, and keep building a people-powered movement that no billionaire or demagogue can destroy. Together, we can show that the Constitution still stands strong and that the will of the people will always prevail. More soon, _Andy_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Andy Kim instantly:

_**EXHIBIT 1 - JOINT FUNDRAISING NOTICE **_

Team Nunn ("JFC") is a joint fundraising committee composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn ("Campaign"), Call to Service PAC ("LPAC") and NRCC (each, a "Committee," and, collectively, the "Committees"). Any contribution to the JFC permissible under the Federal Election Campaign Act, as amended ("FECA"), from contributors who have not exceeded their applicable federal contribution limits, shall be allocated among the Committees pursuant to FECA and the formula set forth in this Notice.

_**Contributions Made by an Individual or Federal Non-Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Individuals or federal non-multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $322,100. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $7,000, designating up to $3,500 to the primary election and up to $3,500 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3\. NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $44,300 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

_**Contributions Made by a Federal Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $120,000. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $10,000, designating up to $5,000 to the primary election and up to $5,000 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3 .NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $15,000 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5 .NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

Contributions to Team Nunn, or to any participating Committee individually, are not deductible as charitable donations for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, national banks, federal government contractors, foreign nationals without green cards, and other federally impermissible sources are prohibited. The contributor's signature designates his or her contribution to the elections described above. Contributions that exceed a donor's contribution limit to a participating Committee shall be reallocated to the remaining Committees according to this allocation formula to the extent permitted by FECA. Any contributor may designate his or her contribution to a specific participant Committee to the extent permitted by FECA. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle or calendar year, as applicable.
Paid for by Team Nunn, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn, Call to Service PAC, and NRCC.

Any contribution to the JFC permissible under the Federal Election Campaign Act, as amended ("FECA"), from contributors who have not exceeded their applicable federal contribution limits, shall be allocated among the Committees pursuant to FECA and the formula set forth in this Notice. Contributions Made by an Individual or Federal Non-Multicandidate Political Committee: Individuals or federal non-multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $322,100. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order: 1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $7,000, designating up to $3,500 to the primary election and up to $3,500 to the general election, provided such limits apply. 2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually. 3\. NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $44,300 annually. 4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply. 5\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply. Contributions Made by a Federal Multicandidate Political Committee: Multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $120,000. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order: 1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $10,000, designating up to $5,000 to the primary election and up to $5,000 to the general election, provided such limits apply. 2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually. 3 .NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $15,000 annually. 4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply. 5 .NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply. Contributions to Team Nunn, or to any participating Committee individually, are not deductible as charitable donations for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, national banks, federal government contractors, foreign nationals without green cards, and other federally impermissible sources are prohibited. The contributor's signature designates his or her contribution to the elections described above. Contributions that exceed a donor's contribution limit to a participating Committee shall be reallocated to the remaining Committees according to this allocation formula to the extent permitted by FECA. Any contributor may designate his or her contribution to a specific participant Committee to the extent permitted by FECA. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle or calendar year, as applicable. **High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.** **Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.** At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. **By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch.** She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. **She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.** Nancy is fighting to:
* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast
* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency
* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free
* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate
* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think
* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. **South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.**
---
| |

clean_body: | | Friends, Trump 's Attorney General, Pam Bondi, just said the quiet part out loud: The Department of Justice, under Trump, would "go after" Americans for what they call "hate speech." Let 's be clear: that's not about stopping violence -- it's about silencing critics. | The MAGA movement is now openly threatening to criminalize speech they don't like. Not violence. Not incitement. Just speech. We've seen this playbook before: -- Trump has threatened to "go after" journalists like ABC's Jonathan Karl. -- MAGA operatives are pushing to jail protesters and silence dissent. -- Now, Bondi says the DOJ is ready to prosecute Americans based on what they say. This is dangerous. And if we don 't stop it, we could lose more than just elections -- we could lose the basic right to speak out. No Dem Left Behind is fighting back -- and we need you with us. Let's send them a message: We will not be silenced. We will not back down. And we will not let MAGA criminalize dissent in this country. - Team No Dem Left Behind | | Mail checks to: No Dem Left Behind P.O. Box 15320 Washington, D.C. 2003 | Paid for by No Dem Left Behind PAC Not Authorized by Any Federal Candidate or Candidate's Committee. | | Sent via . Peter, Charlie Kirk didn't just live a full life... He showed us what it meant to live boldly, love deeply, and lead with truth. With every ounce of his strength, he worked tirelessly to wake up a generation... To tell the truth... To save our country... And, above all, to point people back to God. And in the end -- _Charlie gave it all._ No one can replace him. But all of us can carry forward with what he started. Peter, we want to give you a glimpse into the legacy he left behind -- _and the calling that now belongs to us._ **We made this tribute to honor the man who gave everything ... And to remind the world that his mission will press on:**

name: Chris Deluzio
subject: If you work hard and play by the rules, the American Dream is yours
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRIS DELUZIO FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115393003/570163990/1895761198?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmJmMDI1Ni1kYjkzLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UZf31CyVdgk4nI0c47A4FtmdYmFExZicUqBsMffskuI=&emci=a1bf0256-db93-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=a2bf0256-db93-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=13185894) _**Axios: “Belief in the American dream hits record low”**_ A new poll shows that 70% of Americans no longer believe that the American Dream holds true—a 15 year record high. Derek, I grew up here in Western PA, where a lot of our communities have seen firsthand the frustration and heartbreak when hard work doesn’t pay off. For decades, too many in Western PA and across the country have had the American Dream ripped away by powerful corporations and their weak politicians who help them rig the system. I’ve seen huge corporations ship jobs overseas and crush workers and small businesses, cheered on by those same bought-and-paid-for politicians. That’s not the America I believe in. I believe in an America where if you work hard, you can build a good life for your family. Where dignity, a fair fight, and opportunity aren’t just slogans—they’re real. That’s the dream I grew up with, and it’s the dream I’m fighting every day in Congress to restore. [**I’m doing everything I can to stand up for the hardworking people who make this country run. I’m fighting for the American Dream—fighting for an economy and a government that works for the people. If that’s a fight you can get behind, please pitch in today to help me keep up this work in Congress →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115393004/570163996/-898016266?refcode=email_091725_american-dream&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmJmMDI1Ni1kYjkzLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UZf31CyVdgk4nI0c47A4FtmdYmFExZicUqBsMffskuI=) | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115393005/570163999/-898016266?refcode=email_091725_american-dream&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmJmMDI1Ni1kYjkzLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UZf31CyVdgk4nI0c47A4FtmdYmFExZicUqBsMffskuI=)
---
I believe that if you work hard and play by the rules, the American Dream is yours.
**But the thing is, folks are working hard— _yet the cost of living is out of control._ So many families can’t afford childcare, to travel to visit loved ones, to go to a game (or even watch the NFL!), or to put food on the table.**
Meanwhile, Trump and Republicans in Washington are doing nothing to bring down costs. Instead, they’re jamming through a weak agenda that strips millions of hardworking people of their healthcare—while giving a massive tax handout to billionaires and huge corporations.
I’m sick and tired of having the American Dream stolen from us by corporate bosses and their bought-off politicians.
That’s why I’m fighting like hell to give Western Pennsylvanians and hardworking folks across the country a fair shot at the American Dream. We have got to bring down costs, create more solid jobs, and give small businesses a shot to succeed.
[**I’ll never give up on my fight to make life better for Americans and put hardworking people first in Congress. If you’re with me, pitch in now and join the fight to restore the American Dream →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115393010/570164002/-898016266?refcode=email_091725_american-dream&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmJmMDI1Ni1kYjkzLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UZf31CyVdgk4nI0c47A4FtmdYmFExZicUqBsMffskuI=)

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: “Disgusting”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
This is far from the first time our movement has faced baseless, shameless attacks from Trump and MAGA, and it certainly won’t be the last.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1832%2E791427%2ElcgNk5)
Friend, Monday night in the Oval Office, Donald Trump called me “a disgraceful person” and “disgusting” while insulting my constituents.
[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-sep25.9TUzdV&refcode=em250917-1-full&t=2&akid=1832%2E791427%2ElcgNk5)
This comes right after Rep. Nancy Mace lied about me to try to get me kicked off my committee assignments, and a few days after Rep. Randy Fine said I should’ve never been let into this country.
Friends, the truth is that I’m no longer surprised by the right-wing attacks, and I _definitely_ won’t let them stop me from speaking out against injustice. But fighting back against the MAGA onslaught takes resources, so I have to ask:
**[Can you please chip in $10 to support my campaign as we fight back against the Trump administration and push for our positive vision of America — one where everyone gets the respect and prosperity they deserve.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-sep25.9TUzdV&refcode=em250917-1-full&t=3&akid=1832%2E791427%2ElcgNk5)

This is far from the first time our movement has faced baseless, shameless attacks from Trump and MAGA, and it certainly won’t be the last. I promise to continue to fight for ALL of us, and it means the world to me to know that you’re right there with us.
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar

Nancy Mace lied about me to try to get me kicked off my committee assignments, and a few days after Rep. Randy Fine said I should’ve never been let into this country. Friends, the truth is that I’m no longer surprised by the right-wing attacks, and I definitely won’t let them stop me from speaking out against injustice. But fighting back against the MAGA onslaught takes resources, so I have to ask: If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | This is far from the first time our movement has faced baseless, shameless attacks from Trump and MAGA, and it certainly won’t be the last. I promise to continue to fight for ALL of us, and it means the world to me to know that you’re right there with us. In solidarity, Ilhan Omar PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’sentertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zalg0pckg337ljlu2d4dhmvcicmpqi7a63flj74g_rp22sh2s8i6epb0shj6eob2cdh2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z0ajeiiied372tl3pvs41kqimhoeblbmt5fgpcr8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0shj6eob2cdh2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zmifgp88sqhhq227g6rk14dk9rra3vht1vful1g8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0shj6eob2cdh2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z3fqpq5qvm4n4v19fioiea83eucomcuoru2prvo8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0shj6eob2cdh2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z53fnv2mrl364502ao2f39sa47oebarh4n3gffj8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0shj6eob2cdh2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z0teojdfs03h7mcnlsrf3k2fo6q2jm4k861eg7b8_rp22sh2s8i6epb0shj6eob2cdh2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zsoo8n9tf8ndu6c1j0eouihoaf10m52h8th4lfmo_rp22sh2s8i6epb0shj6eob2cdh2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zd63ge7p47ppotfa57g9e4spd6hl62jigeib2b70_rp22sh2s8i6epb0shj6eob2cdh2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---

name: Dems collapsing
subject: The obscure PAC that could pull off biggest GOP coup of 2025
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE
body:
The GOP is on the cusp of pulling off something horrific here in PA, we have two months to stop them. Let’s move before it's too late.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DuvklxWlsv1E6gy_RI2UjdPvsdE8jJB-qFO1mT6gJhCub9t5DVQ8IttS8ZHcIfofEOfyFScS1Z8A6YZg1DvytLCKeZ5uTdu5b0pmoMIs7GYHEVRdAoEMVp_M3hRViBrwh7bfD85XqZj3biC4k2QG0oOODTe-SACVsPWXtBidOdjA5naMaGGdlgzRr3nOpxrrM0S3X-LIoAhB32y5nemreQUzb18wS5pFWo0TFRU0Tn8=&c=9ZwgRzHkGPHcQMeES_MF15KO1SzAeRosHxgc066Zd7KE4c3jotWi8g==&ch=j5NgS0Z9f-hTjfl-q6_hvVmG-xwWYaWxlhqNrh7A0PkRstzqHxfKVA==)
---
| Peter,
A little known MAGA PAC is months, if not weeks, away from pulling off nothing short of the controlled demolition of the Pennsylvania Democratic Party.
With CA moving to redistrict GOP seats in retaliation to TX's push to remove Dem congressional seats, MAGA is desperately searching to find more states to redistrict. One of the key states they've decided on: Pennsylvania.
To tear up the PA map they need to remove the Dem majority on the PA Supreme Court who are up for reelection in November. Enter Early Vote Action (EVA).
EVA is a far-right PAC run by conservative rising star Scott Pressler, its focus is on turning out the GOP base for elections like the upcoming 2025 PA Supreme Court election. Right now they're on the cusp of pulling off the biggest GOP coup of 2025:
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DuvklxWlsv1E6gy_RI2UjdPvsdE8jJB-qFO1mT6gJhCub9t5DVQ8IttS8ZHcIfofEOfyFScS1Z8A6YZg1DvytLCKeZ5uTdu5b0pmoMIs7GYHEVRdAoEMVp_M3hRViBrwh7bfD85XqZj3biC4k2QG0oOODTe-SACVsPWXtBidOdjA5naMaGGdlgzRr3nOpxrrM0S3X-LIoAhB32y5nemrecPgCmo03Ul-3Ka33mshbnI=&c=9ZwgRzHkGPHcQMeES_MF15KO1SzAeRosHxgc066Zd7KE4c3jotWi8g==&ch=j5NgS0Z9f-hTjfl-q6_hvVmG-xwWYaWxlhqNrh7A0PkRstzqHxfKVA==)
---
| | | | Judicial elections like the one coming up in PA are extremely low turnout which is why the GOP is pumping millions into the voter drive being run by Early Vote Action. What they're doing is working and for the first time in history the GOP is weeks if not days from surpassing Dems in voter registration in PA.
Democrats on the other hand are nowhere to be found, Pressler says it himself in the tweet above, at local events the Democratic party has no presence.
It is an open secret now that the DNC is embarrassingly low on funds because of the gargantuan debt saddled upon them by the Kamala Harris campaign. For the second quarter in a row now the GOP has massively outraised us and invested into states like PA while we are still stuck paying off the Harris campaign's debt.
The cavalry from DC won't be coming into save PA this November. We are on our own and to salvage the situation and ensure we don't lose the only thing standing between PA and a GOP redistricting that removes every Democratic seat (our supreme court dems) we're going to need support from every dem in the nation.
[Can you come to the aid of Pennsylvanians in our time of crisis and step up where the national party can't by making a donation of $50, $25, or even $5 to help us put up a fight here?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DuvklxWlsv1E6gy_RI2UjdPvsdE8jJB-qFO1mT6gJhCub9t5DVQ8IttS8ZHcIfofYUq1dMqKS-32qfPDCpWvKGIvH63eVcKtfIiLKiyzisutORUud1RgQgA24CtsWdZQ5XboJbd4G4qO732LIOp0txyq0SjnI192eIh4Jt39qbqGfqqKagcPnosfDiDq3JVHgkj1L_kOHLTkkbzaze_5M2rPzcXkAz30RiuRixf1DHSxCrlmzClrLQ==&c=9ZwgRzHkGPHcQMeES_MF15KO1SzAeRosHxgc066Zd7KE4c3jotWi8g==&ch=j5NgS0Z9f-hTjfl-q6_hvVmG-xwWYaWxlhqNrh7A0PkRstzqHxfKVA==)

clean_body: The GOP is on the cusp of pulling off something horrific here in PA, we have two months to stop them. Let’s move before it's too late. | | | | | == | Peter, A little known MAGA PAC is months, if not weeks, away from pulling off nothing short of the controlled demolition of the Pennsylvania Democratic Party. With CA moving to redistrict GOP seats in retaliation to TX's push to remove Dem congressional seats, MAGA is desperately searching to find more states to redistrict. One of the key states they've decided on: Pennsylvania. To tear up the PA map they need to remove the Dem majority on the PA Supreme Court who are up for reelection in November. Enter Early Vote Action (EVA). EVA is a far-right PAC run by conservative rising star Scott Pressler, its focus is on turning out the GOP base for elections like the upcoming 2025 PA Supreme Court election. Right now they're on the cusp of pulling off the biggest GOP coup of 2025: | == | | | | Judicial elections like the one coming up in PA are extremely low turnout which is why the GOP is pumping millions into the voter drive being run by Early Vote Action. What they're doing is working and for the first time in history the GOP is weeks if not days from surpassing Dems in voter registration in PA. Democrats on the other hand are nowhere to be found, Pressler says it himself in the tweet above, at local events the Democratic party has no presence. It is an open secret now that the DNC is embarrassingly low on funds because of the gargantuan debt saddled upon them by the Kamala Harris campaign. For the second quarter in a row now the GOP has massively outraised us and invested into states like PA while we are still stuck paying off the Harris campaign's debt. The cavalry from DC won't be coming into save PA this November. We are on our own and to salvage the situation and ensure we don't lose the only thing standing between PA and a GOP redistricting that removes every Democratic seat (our supreme court dems) we're going to need support from every dem in the nation. == | | | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | | | | == The GOP is on the cusp of pulling off something horrific here in PA, we have two months to stop them. body:
| | | Hi friend, it's Marc Elias. **I beat Donald Trump 64 times in court. And now, working with the DSCC,_I'll beat him again._**

[**Before I tell you more, will you chip in $5 to the DSCC to help power the work to stop Trump's allies and take back the Senate majority? >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/21844?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250917-MarcElias-EliasSuingTrump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250917-MarcElias-EliasSuingTrump-Pros-sl1&akid=21243%2E9716520%2ELkoTbZ)

Right now, Donald Trump is attacking our longstanding values and principles. He's ignoring due process, flaunting anti-corruption laws, and, worst of all, **attacking our democracy and voting rights -- the very bedrock of American society.**

It's disgusting, but not surprising from the guy who claimed he wanted to be a dictator on his first day in office.

That's where my team and the DSCC come in -- the very moment Trump signed an executive order to interfere in our elections and threaten the rights of voters, we _immediately_ filed suit against him on behalf of Democrats across the nation. And we've already notched some key victories in the case!

**But the fight isn't over.** We all know that Trump and his allies will keep trying to break American democracy. We can't let them, so we need ALL Democrats -- from leaders like Barack and Michelle Obama to supporters like you -- working together.

**So I'm asking for your help as we work to stop Trump, take back the Senate, and defend democracy:[Please, will you donate $5 or more today to support the DSCC's work and take back the Senate?](https://go.dscc.org/go/21844?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250917-MarcElias-EliasSuingTrump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250917-MarcElias-EliasSuingTrump-Pros-sl1&akid=21243%2E9716520%2ELkoTbZ)**

name: Congresswoman Sarah Elfreth
subject: It’s official: I’m Running For Re-Election 🇺🇸
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elfreth for Maryland
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q3-2025-em?refcode=blu_em_sefc_2025-09-17 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q3-2025-em?refcode=blu_em_sefc_2025-09-17]
I’ve filed paperwork to run for re-election in Maryland’s Third District in the 2026 midterms. 🇺🇸
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q3-2025-em?refcode=blu_em_sefc_2025-09-17 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q3-2025-em?refcode=blu_em_sefc_2025-09-17]
When I was first elected as your Congresswoman, I said that while progress isn’t promised, it is possible. I ran on the principle that we can’t complain about the chaos of Washington and not be willing to be a part of the solution. We bet on the idea that the American people want leaders who know how to bring people together, solve big problems, and put people above politics.
This Constitution Day, I am once again reminded of the great experiment that our Founders embarked on to create a government of the people, by the people, for the people – with checks and balances and coequal branches of government. Since coming to Congress, I have worked each and every day to stand up for our federal workforce, stop the bleeding the Trump Administration has caused, and bring forward innovative solutions to improve the lives of all Marylanders. Just 257 days into this first term, I’m more committed than ever to delivering for the American people and realizing the promise of our nation set in motion 238 years ago today.
Even on the hardest days, it has been the honor of my life to represent Maryland’s Third District in the U.S. House of Representatives. I’m staying in the fight and am committed to ensuring House Democrats can take back the majority and the tools and gavels necessary to reassert Congress’s Constitutional responsibility to check and balance the Executive. I look forward to all that we can accomplish together. Join us:
CONTRIBUTE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q3-2025-em?refcode=blu_em_sefc_2025-09-17&amount=5.00]
CONTRIBUTE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q3-2025-em?refcode=blu_em_sefc_2025-09-17&amount=10]

OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q3-2025-em?refcode=blu_em_sefc_2025-09-17]
Thank you,
Sarah Elfreth

body:
This is urgent, Peter.
#
_This is urgent, Peter._ A new poll shows Abigail Spanberger's opponent, Winsome Earle-Sears, closing the gap in the Virginia's Governor's race.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94557?refcode=em20250917-9434&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9434%2E614464%2EXOoW_c)
**[Will you split a contribution between Abigail's campaign and State Democrats Committee to help us shore up undecided voters and win the biggest election of 2025?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94557?refcode=em20250917-9434&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9434%2E614464%2EXOoW_c)**

---
Let's be clear about where things stand:
_Abigail remains in a strong position to flip Virginia blue._ But four years ago, Republicans won the Governorship after consistently being down in polls. And this poll shows that tens of thousands of voters remain undecided.
**Now, with Trump attacking Abigail directly, we can't take anything for granted.**
We know it seems small in the scheme of things, but your $5 will fund critical investments in ads and organizers, which could be the difference between victory and defeat on November 4th.
**[So, what do you say? Will you make a donation of $5 (or more!) to Abigail Spanberger and State Democrats Committee to help us stay ahead in this race? name: Rev. Raphael Warnock
subject: We need you, Peter
body:
Peter, it’s Sen. Raphael Warnock.
The Trump administration and Republicans in Washington are _not_ fighting for you. They’re raising costs, stripping people of their healthcare and food assistance, and attacking agencies like the CDC that keep us healthy and safe.
**But Democratic governors like Wes Moore are on the frontlines fighting back.** While Trump and his allies are attacking ordinary Americans, governors like Wes are fighting for the people.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250917-1?refcode=em-20250917-1&refcode2=635_1086043_Jz5Tts&akid=635%2E1086043%2EJz5Tts)
**[That’s why I’m proud to support Wes for another term as Governor of Maryland, and I hope you’ll join us in this fight for our nation. Will you chip in $5 or any amount today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250917-1?refcode=em-20250917-1&refcode2=635_1086043_Jz5Tts&akid=635%2E1086043%2EJz5Tts)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250917-1?amount=5&refcode=em-20250917-1&refcode2=635_1086043_Jz5Tts&akid=635%2E1086043%2EJz5Tts)**
Americans are suffering under this reckless and dangerous agenda. Trump’s last few months have been dedicated to selling out people’s lives and livelihoods to enrich special interests and Republican allies.
In this moment, it is critical that we have leaders who will stand up for our neighbors, our children, and everyone who is in need.
**[I’m fighting back in the Senate, and I need governors like Wes fighting back on my side. Will you chip in to Wes Moore’s reelection campaign today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250917-1?refcode=em-20250917-1&refcode2=635_1086043_Jz5Tts&akid=635%2E1086043%2EJz5Tts)**
Thank you for being part of this movement, Peter.
In gratitude,
Rev. Raphael Warnock
U.S. Senator from Georgia

* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20250917-1&t=1&refcode2=635_1086043_Jz5Tts&akid=635%2E1086043%2EJz5Tts)**

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 9/17/2025 🖋️
body:
Lawsuit and liberty on the line as Shots for Freedom launches in Colorado Springs
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Happy Constitution Day! 🖋️🇺🇸
🎙️ Check out today's Mountain Minute podcast [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)! Here is a summary of today's top stories:
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** Gun owners are launching Shots for Freedom in Colorado Springs to fund their [lawsuit against Governor Polis’ new permit-to-purchase law](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). In District 49, two staffers were suspended after allegedly [approving of Charlie Kirk’s assassination](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), while Evergreen High will now have a [full-time school resource officer](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) after last week’s shooting. In Teller County, a couple is fighting to [save their greenhouse](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), claiming it’s protected by state law and tied to their ministry. An appeals court also ruled a Denver judge [wrongly stripped a father of custody rights](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), and Denver Mayor Mike Johnston unveiled a [$3.6 billion budget](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) with no new taxes, cuts to tech and services, and reduced migrant and homelessness spending.
**Colorado will honor Charlie Kirk with a[Sept. 18 vigil at CSU’s Canvas Stadium](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**—the day he was set to speak there—following a 5,000-strong memorial at BRAVE Church that underscored the deep grief and lasting impact of his legacy.
**🇺🇸 On the National Stage...** Fallout from Charlie Kirk’s assassination dominates headlines. Utah prosecutors charged 22-year-old Tyler James Robinson with [capital murder and multiple felonies](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), calling it “an American tragedy.” Vice President [JD Vance honored Kirk](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) in a tribute urging Americans to “have faith” and “be bold,” highlighting his legacy of courage and defense of families and communities. Meanwhile, RFK Jr. and Dr. Oz announced a [$50 billion plan to rescue rural health care](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.).
🗣️ **Commentary Spotlight...** This week’s commentary paints a wary picture of Colorado’s direction: a BLS revision could erase the state’s meager reported gains—just 3,100 jobs from March 2024–March 2025—pushing Colorado into [job-loss territory and foreshadowing service cuts](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), Mike O’Donnell warns. Veteran educator Priscilla Rahn says she [left teachers’ unions after decades](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) because they’ve become political machines, diverting focus and resources from students and classrooms. And opponents of a [“progressive” income tax](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) argue Colorado’s load already hits low-income families hardest.
This is the Mountain Minute for Wednesday, September 17, 2025.
– Team RMV
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[Lawsuit and liberty on the line as Shots for Freedom launches in Colorado Springs](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY JEN SCHUMANN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
With just days to go, Colorado gun owners are gearing up for Shots for Freedom — a two-day range weekend and banquet in Colorado Springs that organizers say is about more than rifles, raffles or fellowship. Hosted by the Colorado State Shooting Association, the September 20–21 event is tied directly to the fight against Governor Jared Polis’ new gun law.
Tickets are still available through the event signup page, with proceeds funding the group’s lawsuit against Governor Jared Polis’ recently signed permit-to-purchase law, Senate Bill 25-003.
Organizers say the strategy is to combine culture and community with legal action. “Every round fired and every seat filled helps fund the lawsuit that will decide whether Colorado remains a place where citizens can exercise their rights without government permission slips,” CSSA President Ray Elliott stated.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Colorado mourns Charlie Kirk with vigil on Sept. 18–same day he was to speak at CSU](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY JEN SCHUMANN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* A vigil for Charlie Kirk will be held Sept. 18 at CSU’s Canvas Stadium, the same day he was scheduled to speak there, organized by Turning Point USA students.
* CSU is enforcing strict security measures, including clear-bag rules, magnetometers, and a ban on firearms, though it emphasizes the event is not university-endorsed.
* The vigil follows a larger memorial at BRAVE Church that drew over 5,000 in-person attendees and thousands online, reflecting the widespread mourning and honoring of Kirk’s life and legacy.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[Is the Colorado Economy More of a Train Wreck than it Currently Appears?](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY MIKE O'DONNELL, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* A major BLS revision cut 911,000 jobs from national counts between March 2024–25, raising fears Colorado’s meager 3,100 job gain may flip into losses.

* Even a modest 0.2% correction would erase 4,000 jobs in Colorado, while the full 0.6% revision could wipe out 15,000, signaling deeper economic trouble.

* Sluggish hiring is blamed on AI adoption reducing workforce needs, post-pandemic consolidations, inflation-driven weak demand, and high housing costs—factors pushing workers toward more business-friendly states.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
** ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
**[The Union vs. Students: Why I Walked Away](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**BY PRISCILLA RAHN | COMMENTARY | SEPTEMBER 16** _For 32 years I poured my life into teaching, believing the teachers’ union stood for students and educators like me. But somewhere along the way, the mission shifted—from strengthening classrooms to fueling politics. That’s when I knew I had to walk away._

**[“God’s timing, not mine”: Rose Pugliese on closing one chapter and trusting what comes next](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** **BY JEN SCHUMANN | STATE | SEPTEMBER 15** _Rose Pugliese describes her resignation from the Colorado House as one of the hardest decisions of her life, shaped by prayer, sacrifice — and the voices of her children. “I truly want to follow God’s path and I think part of God’s path for me now is making sure I prioritize my children,” she explained._

**[Colorado’s laws put parents on the sidelines — and kids at risk](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** **BY HEIDI GANAHL | COMMENTARY | SEPTEMBER 15** _Colorado politicians have been busy passing laws that put government between parents and kids. From mental health and gender identity to abortion and what’s taught in the classroom, the message is clear — parents don’t get a say. Families across our state are raising the alarm, sharing stories of confusion, heartbreak, and harm._

**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [tori@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:tori@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\))) or send us a message on social media to chat
|
---
|
---
**🖋️ DID YOU KNOW?** Constitution Day marks the signing of the U.S. Constitution on September 17, 1787, and also honors all American citizens—hence its alternate name, Citizenship Day. Remarkably, the Constitution is both the **world’s longest-surviving written charter of government** for a major power and the **shortest written constitution** of any major nation.
|
---
**CARTOON OF THE DAY**
|
---
**QUOTE OF THE DAY** “The happy Union of these States is a wonder; their Constitution a miracle; their example the hope of Liberty throughout the world.” - James Madison
|

name: Susan Daggett Bennet
subject: Asking for a favor on my birthday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
Since I can't celebrate with him today, I'm reaching out and asking his top supporters to do me a little favor on my big day:
| | |
---
Hi, folks. I'm Susan, Michael's wife, and today is my birthday.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115396016/570173080/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk918-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTc2YTQxMC1lMDkzLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JkfgcSjNl6lz3QSpnfWBVCl3eZr_HYkSQuxtqtui6l4=)
Michael is in D.C. today fighting President Trump’s corruption and working to protect Colorado from the damage he’s caused. When we spoke this morning, we talked about the major fundraising deadline just around the corner..
Michael’s biggest end-of-quarter deadline so far in the governor's race hits at 11:59 p.m. on Sept. 30. And last I heard, he and his team are not on pace to make it on time.
So since I can't celebrate with him today, I'm reaching out and asking his top supporters – folks like you – to do me a little favor on my big day: **keep Michael on track to hit his quarterly goal ahead of the deadline.**
I’ve known Michael for more than 30 years. He has a deep sense of responsibility to Colorado, this country, and the world – and he’s tireless in working to solve problems and improve lives, especially for Colorado’s kids.
Now, Michael is running to be our next governor because he knows the best solutions to our toughest challenges will come from right here at home.
**I’d love to show Michael today that we’re all behind him at this crucial moment** – **and when he’s back home representing us as governor, we can all celebrate together in Colorado.**
**[So, before my birthday comes to an end at 11:59 p.m. tonight, will you please chip in any amount to Michael's campaign? I need your help to surprise him with the resources to hit his quarterly goal and stay competitive in this race.>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115396017/570173081/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk918-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTc2YTQxMC1lMDkzLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JkfgcSjNl6lz3QSpnfWBVCl3eZr_HYkSQuxtqtui6l4=)**

name: Haley Stevens
subject: I want to hear from you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
Take 60 seconds to tell me your thoughts

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=856%2E49239%2EHkq7GL)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5921?t=2&akid=856%2E49239%2EHkq7GL)
---
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5922?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=3&akid=856%2E49239%2EHkq7GL)
Hi null, it’s Haley – just thinking back on my recent _Made in Michigan_ tour!
I had the chance to speak with so many incredible Michiganders, and each conversation is reminding me why I’m running for Senate: to fight for the hardworking people who make this state great.
But I can’t talk to everyone in person, and that’s why I’m reaching out: **[Will you take 60 seconds to fill out my September Priorities Survey?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5922?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=4&akid=856%2E49239%2EHkq7GL)**
| | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5922?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=5&akid=856%2E49239%2EHkq7GL)
---
From rising costs to protecting Social Security to defending Michigan’s manufacturing jobs, I’ve heard a lot about what is keeping people up at night. But I genuinely want to know:**What’s on YOUR mind, null?**
[**We’re hoping to get 50 more responses from 18326 before midnight tonight –** can I count on you to take the survey now?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5922?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=6&akid=856%2E49239%2EHkq7GL)
Grateful you're on this team,

Haley
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5923?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=7&akid=856%2E49239%2EHkq7GL) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5921?t=8&akid=856%2E49239%2EHkq7GL)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=9&akid=856%2E49239%2EHkq7GL)
Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate.
33717 Woodward Ave #539
Birmingham, MI 48009

name: Sean Feucht
subject: Podcast: Time to WAKE UP the Woke Church in America featuring Charlie Kirk
body:
| | |
---
| | Peter,
---
This week, I’ve been thinking a lot about my friend Charlie Kirk—reminiscing on our time together, our conversations, and our shared heart to see spiritual revival sweep across America.

I want to share a conversation we had back in 2022 when I joined Charlie for Freedom Night in America in Phoenix, AZ to talk about the Church.

At that time, we were just coming out of COVID, when churches across America bent the knee to government mandates, shut their doors, and gave in to fear.

Charlie and I dove deep into the challenges facing the Church—wokeism, cowardice—and highlighted the courageous pastors who were fighting back and standing boldly for Truth.

clean_body: | | | | | Peter, This week, I’ve been thinking a lot about my friend Charlie Kirk—reminiscing on our time together, our conversations, and our shared heart to see spiritual revival sweep across America. I want to share a conversation we had back in 2022 when I joined Charlie for Freedom Night in America in Phoenix, AZ to talk about the Church. At that time, we were just coming out of COVID, when churches across America bent the knee to government mandates, shut their doors, and gave in to fear. Charlie and I dove deep into the challenges facing the Church—wokeism, cowardice—and highlighted the courageous pastors who were fighting back and standing boldly for Truth. "Time to WAKE UP the woke church in America - Charlie Kirk - Sean Feucht" LISTEN ON ITUNES ⬇︎⬇︎⬇︎ | | "And you know, God wants us to live in a state of freedom. He wants to set the captives free. That's why I love the story of Exodus so much. And you know, kind of very similar to what you're talking in Sacramento—is there is a yearning in the human heart to want to be free." | | Till all hear, | | | | Sean Feucht | | | | | | ---|---|--- Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Hold The Line.

Friend, Charlie Kirk didn't just live a full life... He showed us what it meant to live boldly, love deeply, and lead with truth. With every ounce of his strength, he worked tirelessly to wake up a generation... To tell the truth... To save our country... And, above all, to point people back to God. And in the end -- _Charlie gave it all._ No one can replace him. But all of us can carry forward with what he started. Friend, we want to give you a glimpse into the legacy he left behind -- _and the calling that now belongs to us._ **We made this tribute to honor the man who gave everything ... And to remind the world that his mission will press on:**

name: Natalie Jones
subject: 🌍It’s a Small World… Or is It? 🌍
body:
EVERY country that is a part of the United Nations has paid maternity leave; except for Papua New Guinea, the Marshall Islands, M
| | |
---
| |
---
| Friends-
EVERY country that is a part of the United Nations has [paid maternity leave](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ubR436zoHQCT2m9H1q9g55ys6mMfroeUdj3W8dyV9H2mpTCN-gyWaPAhjh4L4v3Md0nP9aEGxfjccjP2BzHET7DxyDYR_zfG2snKJFEkGpp0kjGif2mkjTgr7gw02htrpyFmqWFjiYOZubfKa5qT-_n-NNRsto6tvr7p6LY0EKDcIDyi9nB9hEbAjdyOG7vkbny1aHhavDfsUe4BZf3GX46ym1NottZAf1E8T7JwCYscM38bAB0rUA==&c=Butt3hQY8Fnfvt5jcRSlvpraf_3rsQz6jIRhWC94I8rZ7u2S841Mzw==&ch=vvH7aehxuxXkyA8rJwSqe4Tz6OXoS5ms-0sulpDxmRWV3tqjp913Sg==); except for Papua New Guinea, the Marshall Islands, Micronesia... oh, and the United States. Of the 50 states, only eight have paid parental leave; California, New Jersey, Connecticut, Delaware, New York, Oregon, Colorado, and Rhode Island. We are beyond disappointed that Virginia has still not been added to that list.
This year, a bill that would provide up to twelve weeks of paid leave for a qualifying medical event of yourself or a loved one- including the birth of a new baby- passed the Virginia General Assembly and was then vetoed by the Governor.
---
| | [](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ubR436zoHQCT2m9H1q9g55ys6mMfroeUdj3W8dyV9H2mpTCN-gyWaEmLSxmxtZ3K0xYaqJSqL5YPBjmfW5o4Aid4gqJJ1qLn02o34-FjXQNzO1yGppzNgCyPfn203980Z1wEShCsnyZFPXYftUmxksKuum3BddkNfkvr-gp9FAM6lJ1HPaQWe-qUOf4nlQ9RoYeq1yzZIOgJJ0du55tkmXkFiJNASPOJd9UKZXkM_L25qTa9rvIW0FNdVVpl19WrSyQ03st4vnU5HuSZY1G2UBOmY1ttUmKhZQm_XxhU8imqlRTc3TUvww==&c=Butt3hQY8Fnfvt5jcRSlvpraf_3rsQz6jIRhWC94I8rZ7u2S841Mzw==&ch=vvH7aehxuxXkyA8rJwSqe4Tz6OXoS5ms-0sulpDxmRWV3tqjp913Sg==)
---
| | [Read Full Article Here](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ubR436zoHQCT2m9H1q9g55ys6mMfroeUdj3W8dyV9H2mpTCN-gyWaPAhjh4L4v3MUpjGaxZT0lOqWRyvVqsWt0zUeD1hL9eo7w-55rmsQEmb_HxlCGhTNEpGAR26FHvZFcYQ4uCTVjJ-GpMCejA9aNr53X0Fs91puMFlfMIP44RQNZvFIMHTKfQAQ3IpznM85ospfnxojlu4uC3YoOkaWVDZ9jjKptvHGOEquMqKZA3Buxb_7vS6a9H9NuO6AiXEMJVWzAjbK_BkBwEltHzFqM-nFza6aHRM&c=Butt3hQY8Fnfvt5jcRSlvpraf_3rsQz6jIRhWC94I8rZ7u2S841Mzw==&ch=vvH7aehxuxXkyA8rJwSqe4Tz6OXoS5ms-0sulpDxmRWV3tqjp913Sg==)
---
| In Virginia, it is estimated that [78% of working people](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ubR436zoHQCT2m9H1q9g55ys6mMfroeUdj3W8dyV9H2mpTCN-gyWaNKaROZYpsguG2ot1WJ8xLIA8ILt0aztJgMr8oEw-nXllyKXPySJAvLMHKooXh0k53idC7BEBl5S6beWxjxNb2q6eA68gfPMHbVEwl675MxTYwUIF8GhpLPGB6NsKCJo7-O8O2A40YVhXSY4D-CDQXIqfltAFW3jaKjq1qdZB3fMPsl9xmstH-PDZ2uc-boLjNVyFPVJOgHGmtOgoK_pZwM=&c=Butt3hQY8Fnfvt5jcRSlvpraf_3rsQz6jIRhWC94I8rZ7u2S841Mzw==&ch=vvH7aehxuxXkyA8rJwSqe4Tz6OXoS5ms-0sulpDxmRWV3tqjp913Sg==) - about 3.4 million workers - have no guarantee that they won't miss a critical paycheck when these things happen. We need to ensure that everyone in Virginia has access to paid family and medical leave so that they can focus on their families and not miss a paycheck.
Natalie Jones Communications Director
---

name: Lt. Col. David Flippo
subject: I have just endorsed Governor Lombardo for re-election!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Flippo for Nevada]( "Paid for by David Flippo for Nevada")
body:
Governor Lombardo has been hard at work delivering conservative wins for Nevada. We need to keep him in Carson City! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/230106519b95/welcome-to-team-flippo-10340293?e=273c9a71fb)
---
| | [ ](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=1f305ba043&e=273c9a71fb)
---
| | I am proud to announce that I **officially endorse Governor Lombardo for re-election!** Governor Lombardo has been hard at work for the people of Nevada, and I am confident he will do the same with another term! During his time in office, he has worked to provide economic development, provided pay raises for Nevada’s teachers, protected our students, and is doing everything he can to advance our America First agenda! Here is what I had to say when I officially endorsed the Governor:
---
| [ ](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=a3bdc42cee&e=273c9a71fb)
---
| “Governor Lombardo has dedicated his life to serving the people of Nevada, and it is truly remarkable what he has achieved for our state during his first term. Governor Lombardo has worked to cut red tape to provide economic development for the state of Nevada and has been a passionate advocate for Nevada’s teachers and students. Governor Lombardo’s leadership has allowed him to deliver on conservative promises that he made to the people of Nevada, despite facing opposition, and Republicans controlling neither chamber of the state legislature. I applaud Governor Lombardo for sticking to his word and working to advance America First policies in Carson City. Governor Lombardo is doing a phenomenal job and has my complete and total endorsement!”
---
| [STAND WITH GOVERNOR LOMBARDO](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=d0d7a87463&e=273c9a71fb "STAND WITH GOVERNOR LOMBARDO")
---
| Conservatives across the state are uniting to ensure that Republicans win up and down the ballot this coming election, and we can be a part of that.
We have a real opportunity to bring real, positive, conservative change to Nevada, but it will take all of us working together. **Will you join our movement to flip NV-04?**

name: Eva Piatek, Evergreen
subject: Short survey for you
body:
What kind of information do you want from us?
| | | | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3988216/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
---
| Hi there,

I know that we write to you often, so I wanted to check in and see if you’re getting what you need from us.

**_Are we sending too many emails? Want more policy content, or more actions? What else can we do for you?_**

🗣️ Now is your chance to tell us!

At Evergreen, we work every day to design and implement bold state climate policies that can resist political attacks and Big Oil’s influence, while doing everything we can to defend climate progress at the federal level.

In doing so, **we strive to be as genuine, helpful, and audience-led as possible.** To help make that happen, [**we’ve created a brief survey to help us better understand what climate issues you care about and what kind of content you’d like to receive from us.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3988217/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3988218/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| As the person who makes sure these messages get delivered to your inbox, it’s one of my priorities to learn more about the folks who engage with our work and make so much of it possible. _And that includes you!_

I also believe that through shared knowledge and connection, we can build a movement powerful enough to take on the fossil fuel industry and deliver a thriving, just, and inclusive clean energy future for all.

But to do that effectively, [**we need to hear from Evergreen supporters like you.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3988219/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
[SHARE YOUR THOUGHTS](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3988220/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| I know your time and input are extremely valuable, so I really appreciate you taking two minutes today to help guide what resources we create and how we show up in your inbox in the months ahead. |
---
| In community, |
---
| | |
---
### Eva Piatek
Digital Lead – Email
Evergreen Collaborative
---
---
| **P.S.** We take the security of your data seriously and promise to protect it at all times. [**So, let’s get started!**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3988221/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
* * *
---
| _Evergreen is building the ambitious, actionable policy roadmap for an all-out mobilization to defeat climate change—and to create millions of jobs in a thriving, just, and inclusive clean energy future. None of this would be possible without your support._ |
---
[DONATE](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3988222/87SdQ4wZ)
---
