# Hello Capitalists,
### **Here is everything you should be following today:**
* The NYT is shamed after issuing a horrendous correction about Charlie Kirk
* Charlie Kirk's books and podcast soar to the top of the charts
* TPUSA sees a massive surge in in signups, nearly 40,000 chapters
* China just banned ALL Nvidia chip purchases
* Ben & Jerrys founder quits after massive liberal tantrum

### **Today 's markets:**
* **DOW: 46070.83 ( ⬆️0.68%) - ✅**
* **S &P: 6598.00 (⬇️0.13%) - 🔴**
* **NASDAQ: 22211.15 ( ⬇️0.55%) - 🔴**
* **CBOE VIX Volatility Index: $16.55 ( ⬆️1.16%) - ⚠️⬆️**

* * *
* * *
# NYT is dragged after issuing a correction for accusing Charlie Kirk of anti-semitism
In a stunning reversal, **[The New York Times issued a correction](https://substack.com/redirect/0ced2ddf-290a-452d-9ffc-d6ebc766b2f2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Thursday admitting it falsely accused conservative activist Charlie Kirk of making an antisemitic podcast statement, which he had actually quoted and critiqued from social media.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0ced2ddf-290a-452d-9ffc-d6ebc766b2f2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Correction Admits Misattribution** : The Times clarified Kirk was quoting a social media post and immediately criticized it, not endorsing the remark as its original report implied.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0ced2ddf-290a-452d-9ffc-d6ebc766b2f2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Persistent Accusation Lingers** : Despite the fix, the article still labels Kirk a proponent of "replacement theory" and criticizes his comments on Jewish donors funding liberal causes.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9298142c-5e9d-4e91-bc1a-5e2eb212255f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Kirk Defends Pro-Israel Stance** : Kirk previously highlighted conservative Christians as Judaism's top defenders and urged Jews to reject anti-Israel movements like Black Lives Matter.
* **Netanyahu's Posthumous Praise** : Israel's PM hailed Kirk as a "once-in-a-generation" defender of Judeo-Christian values and the U.S.-Israel bond after his recent assassination.

* * *
* * *
**[Together with Ifrah Law](https://substack.com/redirect/74dc524d-5767-4f4a-b54d-52c68c6c4e2f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **[Ifrah Law heightens the success of iGaming clients through every phase of their business cycle](https://substack.com/redirect/74dc524d-5767-4f4a-b54d-52c68c6c4e2f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Led by a managing partner who has been **[at the center of every significant court case affecting online gaming,](https://substack.com/redirect/74dc524d-5767-4f4a-b54d-52c68c6c4e2f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Ifrah Law operates at the cutting edge of technology, innovation, and regulation.
Its lawyers represent industry players throughout the entire business cycle, from the formation of a corporation or licensing relationship, through marketing, partnering, growth, and disputes, to profitable exits.
We're proud to share that all partners at Ifrah Law have been ranked by Chambers and Partners, the gold standard for evaluating legal excellence worldwide.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/74dc524d-5767-4f4a-b54d-52c68c6c4e2f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/74dc524d-5767-4f4a-b54d-52c68c6c4e2f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
* * *
# Charlie Kirks book is number 1 on Amazon - His podcast is number 1 on Apple
In the wake of conservative activist Charlie Kirk's shocking assassination at Utah Valley University last week, **[his latest book rocketed to No. 1](https://substack.com/redirect/0ae0a912-6454-4a42-ab47-5659ffb36b3d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** on Amazon while his **[podcast claimed the top spot](https://substack.com/redirect/0ae0a912-6454-4a42-ab47-5659ffb36b3d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** on Apple, drawing renewed attention to his influential legacy.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0ae0a912-6454-4a42-ab47-5659ffb36b3d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Books Dominate Amazon Rankings:** Kirk's December 2025 release, "Stop, in the Name of God," hit No. 1 on Amazon, with his 2022 title "The College Scam" at No. 6 and June 2024's "Right Wing Revolution" at No. 20, reflecting a posthumous sales boom.
* **Podcast Tops Apple Charts:** "The Charlie Kirk Show" surged to No. 1 in both "All Podcasts" and "News" categories on Apple by Tuesday, fueled by tribute episodes featuring Kirk's wife Erika and guest host Vice President JD Vance.
* **Turning Point Expansion Accelerates:** Kirk's organization, Turning Point USA, founded in 2012 to promote conservative values, now boasts 900 college and 1,200 high school chapters, with over 37,000 new chapter requests pouring in after his death.
* **Legacy Galvanizes Youth Movement:** Executive producer Andrew Kolvet credits the surge to Kirk's enduring message on freedom and limited government, noting how the assassination has inspired young conservatives nationwide to advance his vision.
* * *
* * *

# TPUSA sees HUGE surge in chapters in both high school and colleges after Kirk assassination
The assassination of Turning Point USA founder Charlie Kirk during a Utah campus event has sparked a **[massive surge in job offers and chapter inquiries](https://substack.com/redirect/108c46a1-e914-4f18-b420-b7293ab0e56d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for the conservative youth organization, as supporters rally to perpetuate his bold political legacy.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/108c46a1-e914-4f18-b420-b7293ab0e56d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Rapid Chapter Expansion Momentum:** Over 37,000 inquiries flooded in to launch new campus chapters, accelerating Kirk's vision for Club America presence in all 23,000 U.S. high schools beyond the existing 900 college and 1,200 high school outposts.
* **Explosive Job Application Surge:** Spokesman Andrew Kolvet reports personally receiving hundreds of offers to work for TPUSA, including unpaid roles and volunteer help, signaling widespread enthusiasm to join the cause.
* **Kirk's Shocking Assassination Details:** Founder Charlie Kirk, 31, was gunned down Wednesday at Utah Valley University's outdoor "American Comeback Tour" stop in Orem, Utah, while debating students under a "Prove Me Wrong" tent.
* **Widow's Fierce Leadership Vow:** Erika Kirk pledged the movement "will become stronger, bolder, louder," ensuring no one forgets her husband's name while confirming the annual AmericaFest conference proceeds in Phoenix this December.

* * *
* * *
# China BANS purchases of all Nvidia chips, send the stock tumbling -2.6%
In a bold escalation of U.S.-China tensions, Beijing has ordered its tech firms to **[halt purchases of Nvidia's powerful AI chips,](https://substack.com/redirect/74423b13-bcda-42a0-b303-8ac21bcb1cf5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** prompting House Speaker Mike Johnson to brand China a U.S. adversary during a Capitol Hill briefing on September 17, 2025.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/be0c00c9-7e70-4297-8f9c-4835710532e6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Nvidia Faces Revenue Hit** : The ban targets Nvidia's high-end AI processors, threatening billions in sales from China, a key market driving the company's explosive growth in artificial intelligence.
* **Geopolitical Tensions Surge** : Johnson's "adversary" label underscores deepening U.S.-China rivalry, potentially sparking retaliatory trade measures and disrupting global tech supply chains.
* **Domestic Tech Push Likely** : China aims to bolster its own semiconductor industry, accelerating efforts to reduce reliance on American innovations amid ongoing export restrictions.
* **Breaking News Unfolds** : As a developing story, the directive could evolve into broader restrictions, with U.S. policymakers eyeing stronger countermeasures to protect national security interests.
* **Nvidia CEO Responds:** **[Jensen Huang expressed deep disappointment](https://substack.com/redirect/feafe0b2-5d50-4e78-a86e-2ad6060c5ab0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/feafe0b2-5d50-4e78-a86e-2ad6060c5ab0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)Wednesday after reports revealed China ordered its tech giants, including Alibaba and ByteDance, to halt purchases of the company's AI chips amid escalating U.S.-China trade tensions.
* **Huang Voices Market Disappointment** : Nvidia's leader lamented the restrictions, stating the firm can only serve markets that welcome it, while recognizing broader U.S.-China geopolitical agendas.
* **CAC Issues Purchase Directive** : China's Cyberspace Administration mandated domestic firms avoid Nvidia's AI processors, including the compliant H20 variant, following an anti-monopoly probe into Nvidia's Mellanox deal.
* **US Export Deal Complicates Sales** : Despite August's U.S. license for H20 chips--requiring 15% of China revenue to Washington--the new Chinese order disrupts Nvidia's "rollercoaster" business there.
* **Nvidia Eyes Global Diversification** : Amid the fallout, the company pledged $15 billion for U.K. AI infrastructure, signaling a pivot to alternative markets while vowing support for both U.S. and Chinese policies.

* * *
* * *
# Ben & Jerrys Liberal founder has liberal meltdown and quits his own company
After 47 years building Ben & Jerry's into a socially conscious ice cream empire, co-founder **[Jerry Greenfield resigned Wednesday](https://substack.com/redirect/f74cd429-c4d7-4ddc-a461-eb681e1385f1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** as brand ambassador, accusing parent company Unilever of silencing the brand's independent voice on issues like the Gaza conflict and civil rights.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/878239cb-4f58-4546-97ae-6721ceda34b0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Greenfield's Painful Exit Decision** : Described his departure as one of the hardest choices ever, emphasizing undiminished love for Ben & Jerry's staff while lamenting the loss of the company's original mission to fight for equity and justice.
* **Unilever's Independence Betrayal** : Greenfield claimed the 2000 buyout promised autonomy, but Unilever undermined it since 2021, especially by suppressing Ben & Jerry's "genocide" label for the Israel-Hamas war and halting West Bank sales.
* **Ongoing Legal Corporate Clash** : Ben & Jerry's sued Unilever for silencing efforts, though Greenfield isn't involved; Unilever's ice cream unit disputes his views and seeks dialogue to reinforce the brand's values-based stance.
* **Broader Political Outrage Echoed** : Greenfield criticized the current U.S. administration for eroding civil, voting, immigrant, women's, and LGBTQ rights, tying his exit to a larger fight against perceived injustices.

We're proud to share that all partners at Ifrah Law have been ranked by Chambers and Partners, the gold standard for evaluating legal excellence worldwide. | | ---|---|--- Charlie Kirks book is number 1 on Amazon - His podcast is number 1 on Apple In the wake of conservative activist Charlie Kirk's shocking assassination at Utah Valley University last week, on Amazon while his on Apple, drawing renewed attention to his influential legacy. | | ---|---|--- Books Dominate Amazon Rankings: Kirk's December 2025 release, "Stop, in the Name of God," hit No. 1 on Amazon, with his 2022 title "The College Scam" at No. 6 and June 2024's "Right Wing Revolution" at No. 20, reflecting a posthumous sales boom. Podcast Tops Apple Charts: "The Charlie Kirk Show" surged to No. 1 in both "All Podcasts" and "News" categories on Apple by Tuesday, fueled by tribute episodes featuring Kirk's wife Erika and guest host Vice President JD Vance. Turning Point Expansion Accelerates: Kirk's organization, Turning Point USA, founded in 2012 to promote conservative values, now boasts 900 college and 1,200 high school chapters, with over 37,000 new chapter requests pouring in after his death. Legacy Galvanizes Youth Movement: Executive producer Andrew Kolvet credits the surge to Kirk's enduring message on freedom and limited government, noting how the assassination has inspired young conservatives nationwide to advance his vision. TPUSA sees HUGE surge in chapters in both high school and colleges after Kirk assassination The assassination of Turning Point USA founder Charlie Kirk during a Utah campus event has sparked a for the conservative youth organization, as supporters rally to perpetuate his bold political legacy. | | ---|---|--- Rapid Chapter Expansion Momentum: Over 37,000 inquiries flooded in to launch new campus chapters, accelerating Kirk's vision for Club America presence in all 23,000 U.S. high schools beyond the existing 900 college and 1,200 high school outposts. Explosive Job Application Surge: Spokesman Andrew Kolvet reports personally receiving hundreds of offers to work for TPUSA, including unpaid roles and volunteer help, signaling widespread enthusiasm to join the cause. Kirk's Shocking Assassination Details: Founder Charlie Kirk, 31, was gunned down Wednesday at Utah Valley University's outdoor "American Comeback Tour" stop in Orem, Utah, while debating students under a "Prove Me Wrong" tent. Widow's Fierce Leadership Vow: Erika Kirk pledged the movement "will become stronger, bolder, louder," ensuring no one forgets her husband's name while confirming the annual AmericaFest conference proceeds in Phoenix this December. China BANS purchases of all Nvidia chips, send the stock tumbling -2.6% In a bold escalation of U.S.-China tensions, Beijing has ordered its tech firms to prompting House Speaker Mike Johnson to brand China a U.S. adversary during a Capitol Hill briefing on September 17, 2025. Nvidia Faces Revenue Hit : The ban targets Nvidia's high-end AI processors, threatening billions in sales from China, a key market driving the company's explosive growth in artificial intelligence. Geopolitical Tensions Surge : Johnson's "adversary" label underscores deepening U.S.-China rivalry, potentially sparking retaliatory trade measures and disrupting global tech supply chains. Domestic Tech Push Likely : China aims to bolster its own semiconductor industry, accelerating efforts to reduce reliance on American innovations amid ongoing export restrictions. Breaking News Unfolds : As a developing story, the directive could evolve into broader restrictions, with U.S. policymakers eyeing stronger countermeasures to protect national security interests. Nvidia CEO Responds: after reports revealed China ordered its tech giants, including Alibaba and ByteDance, to halt purchases of the company's AI chips amid escalating U.S.-China trade tensions. Huang Voices Market Disappointment : Nvidia's leader lamented the restrictions, stating the firm can only serve markets that welcome it, while recognizing broader U.S.-China geopolitical agendas. CAC Issues Purchase Directive : China's Cyberspace Administration mandated domestic firms avoid Nvidia's AI processors, including the compliant H20 variant, following an anti-monopoly probe into Nvidia's Mellanox deal. US Export Deal Complicates Sales : Despite August's U.S. license for H20 chips--requiring 15% of China revenue to Washington--the new Chinese order disrupts Nvidia's "rollercoaster" business there. Nvidia Eyes Global Diversification : Amid the fallout, the company pledged $15 billion for U.K. AI infrastructure, signaling a pivot to alternative markets while vowing support for both U.S. and Chinese policies. Ben & Jerrys Liberal founder has liberal meltdown and quits his own company After 47 years building Ben & Jerry's into a socially conscious ice cream empire, co-founder as brand ambassador, accusing parent company Unilever of silencing the brand's independent voice on issues like the Gaza conflict and civil rights. Greenfield's Painful Exit Decision : Described his departure as one of the hardest choices ever, emphasizing undiminished love for Ben & Jerry's staff while lamenting the loss of the company's original mission to fight for equity and justice. Unilever's Independence Betrayal : Greenfield claimed the 2000 buyout promised autonomy, but Unilever undermined it since 2021, especially by suppressing Ben & Jerry's "genocide" label for the Israel-Hamas war and halting West Bank sales. Ongoing Legal Corporate Clash : Ben & Jerry's sued Unilever for silencing efforts, though Greenfield isn't involved; Unilever's ice cream unit disputes his views and seeks dialogue to reinforce the brand's values-based stance. Broader Political Outrage Echoed : Greenfield criticized the current U.S. administration for eroding civil, voting, immigrant, women's, and LGBTQ rights, tying his exit to a larger fight against perceived injustices. Thanks for reading The Capitalist! This post is public so feel free to share it. You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Matthew Miller 548 Market Street PMB 72296, San Francisco, CA 94104 ? ?

name: Shawnna Bolick
subject: 🇺🇸 We the People: Honoring Constitution Day 🇺🇸
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTE BOLICK
body:
| | |
---
---
| | **“We the People.” **Three words that changed the course of American history. As President Reagan reminded us in his farewell address:
> _“Ours was the first revolution in the history of mankind that truly reversed the course of government... Our Constitution is a document in which ‘We the People’ tell the government what it is allowed to do. ‘We the People’ are free.”_
Today marks the signing of the U.S. Constitution in 1787—by 39 brave men who laid the foundation for our republic. Constitution Day honors both this historic moment and those who have become U.S. citizens. As James Madison said:
> _“The happy union of these states is a wonder; their Constitution a miracle; their example the hope of Liberty throughout the world.”_

🗳️ Civics in Action When I served in the Arizona House, I sponsored [legislation](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=a12d93094b&e=a7ab36849c) establishing Civics Day in honor of Justice Sandra Day O’Connor. Since then, I’ve visited several public schools across Arizona to help students celebrate and learn about our Constitution. Every legislative session since, we’ve worked to expand civics education in our K–12 curriculum—because understanding our nation's history, rights and responsibilities is essential to preserving our republic.
🕊️ A Time to Reflect We are all grieving the tragic assassination of Charlie Kirk last week. Charlie was killed during one of his “Prove Me Wrong” college campus events—forums designed to foster debate and civil discourse. Political violence is never an acceptable response to speech.
Our Constitution gives us the tools to settle differences peacefully. Yet, according to a recent FIRE [poll](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=6ac49c70f4&e=a7ab36849c), more college students are accepting violence as a way to silence opposing views.
🔗 View FIRE’s Free Speech [Rankings](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=3d8375fb0c&e=a7ab36849c)
> _“We have a republic—if we can keep it.”_
> —Benjamin Franklin

Let’s recommit to civil discourse, civics education, and the principles that make America strong. 🇺🇸 Happy Constitution Day! 🇺🇸
---
| 🗳️ **Help Place My Name on the 2026 Republican Primary Ballot** As many of you may know, I was involved in a car accident at the end of June. I’ve spent the past few weeks focusing on healing and physical therapy, and I’m grateful for the support and well wishes I’ve received. Now, I’m turning my attention back to serving our community—and I need your help. If you reside in the following zip codes, there is a good chance I represent you at the state capitol: 85022, 85023, 85024, 85027, 85029, 85032, 85050, 85053, 85085, 85308, 85310, or 85331.

Please take a moment to sign my secure online nomination petition to ensure my name appears on the August 4, 2026, Republican primary ballot. 👉 [Click here](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=fe9b5713ea&e=a7ab36849c) to sign the petition
Your support means the world to me, and I’m excited to continue working on behalf of our legislative district.
---
| [Sign My Petition](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=72b8efd3be&e=a7ab36849c "Sign My Petition")
---
| | 🗳️ **Help Us Keep This Seat — Support Our Campaign Today**
As you may know, I will need to raise a significant amount of resources to retain this highly competitive State Senate seat. Your support is critical to helping us continue the work we’ve started and to ensure our community’s voice remains strong at the Capitol. If you are so inclined, please consider making a contribution to our campaign today. 👉 **[Donate](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=eca7400e1b&e=a7ab36849c)** **Now**
Thank you for staying engaged. Warm regards,
Shawnna

name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: All of us will miss Charlie. None of us will ever forget him.
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj207m4vokdtde89k1px99vbti541ppw5b1qlm5wbug4ti7vosojczephju9qsvk88gd68dgcr4jxpj1qi6x2&__stmp=t2qt7l&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2qt7l&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol3zrqwc3dt8hdgadv8isk65xe7kjmkp6pivb39jdtiwjh16l585bxhc4gqb07l2oxmmevve2pwc50lmaaz930jh8upyyqkrj3xwilczqesitr535xnc91bsje5enbo6p8tw7jx3c0pp&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2qt7l&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2qt7l&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2qt7l&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2qt7l&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol3zrqwc3dt8hdgadv8isk65xe7kjmkp6pivb39jdtiwjh16l585bxhc4gqb07l2oxmmevve2pwc50lmaaz930jh8upyyqkrj3xwilczqesitr535xnc91bsje5enbo6p8tw7jx3c0pp&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2qt7l&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2qt7l&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

body:
The Senate HELP Committee just finished their hearing for the former CDC director Susan Monarez. This hearing appears to have been less about uncovering the truth behind her termination and more about undermining Secretary Kennedy's qualifications through orchestrated criticism.

| | | [ ](https://www.mahaaction.com/?e=674c9b4e7ea0bed829630c80c355f23d&utm_source=maha&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=media_hub_7_9&n=1)
---
---
MAHA Warriors, This has been a big week for MAHA and there are no signs of it slowing down. Here’s what you need to know right now:
### An active plan is underway to undermine confidence in the Secretary Kennedy’s leadership
The Senate HELP Committee just finished their hearing for the former CDC director Susan Monarez. This hearing appears to have been less about uncovering the truth behind her termination and more about undermining Secretary Kennedy's qualifications through orchestrated criticism. Rather than engaging in these divisive tactics, we should use this moment to unite in support of President Trump and Secretary Kennedy. The American people made their voices clear when they voted for MAHA—we want reform and accountability, not the continuation of the corrupt practices exemplified by officials like Monarez. **Here is what we all need to do right now:**
* Call your senators (202.224.3121) and tell them about your support for Bobby and for MAHA. Speak from the heart!
* [Download and share clips from today’s hearing.](https://www.mahaaction.com/r?u=k_YtA-MOXVkiKBqlQnmlZIwe9NPBC8jacZZqFQFpHtU&e=674c9b4e7ea0bed829630c80c355f23d&utm_source=maha&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=media_hub_7_9&n=2) We’re compiling the highlights to make it easy for you to lead the conversation online.
* Learn about the corruption inside the CDC and share with everyone you know:
* [Poul Thorsen, Danish Vaccine Researcher, Arrested in Germany](https://www.mahaaction.com/r?u=23a3lz9UaadQwOMdtpakrLPOwOk4TThTnS98tknJa4VviR1cX0C1jnNjDSUZVTWwLgqmc9ptTjBD-RiniD1cIZBbkTzU__twP1M5mivyy9Zll-eZDD6V52FQr3eEiUin&e=674c9b4e7ea0bed829630c80c355f23d&utm_source=maha&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=media_hub_7_9&n=3)
* [At the CDC, Kennedy is at War with Scientific Fraud – Not Science](https://www.mahaaction.com/r?u=23a3lz9UaadQwOMdtpakrLPOwOk4TThTnS98tknJa4Wd784VygQbpgc3861xq8No-0gsaTO0WBeCYewuEQZsUZlSd1cD8SI848GF031iJTA&e=674c9b4e7ea0bed829630c80c355f23d&utm_source=maha&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=media_hub_7_9&n=4)
* [David Geier Was Initially Denied Access to the CDC Vaccine Safety Datalink. Why?](https://www.mahaaction.com/r?u=23a3lz9UaadQwOMdtpakrLPOwOk4TThTnS98tknJa4WcbNYV8gZILdQH-Bd2CAq552MJ3rRHkmkyCOLi1DgODugv_EjWvdhWJKPWS3rCOERy_QQEQ5IsXi3ac0V1meTP&e=674c9b4e7ea0bed829630c80c355f23d&utm_source=maha&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=media_hub_7_9&n=5)

### Join us this afternoon for our weekly MAHA Media Hub call as we lay out a clear plan to combat these false narratives
We live in a time where the truth is being put on trial. That’s why we need to expose the systemic corruption within the CDC, highlight the arrest of Paul Thorsen, fact check Monarez’s testimony from today’s hearing, and shine a light on the pervasive influence of pharmaceutical money in Congress. Once again, we are being joined by an incredible lineup of inspiring leaders:

clean_body: The Senate HELP Committee just finished their hearing for the former CDC director Susan Monarez. This hearing appears to have been less about uncovering the truth behind her termination and more about undermining Secretary Kennedy's qualifications through orchestrated criticism. | | | MAHA Warriors, This has been a big week for MAHA and there are no signs of it slowing down. Here’s what you need to know right now: An active plan is underway to undermine confidence in the Secretary Kennedy’s leadership The Senate HELP Committee just finished their hearing for the former CDC director Susan Monarez. This hearing appears to have been less about uncovering the truth behind her termination and more about undermining Secretary Kennedy's qualifications through orchestrated criticism. Rather than engaging in these divisive tactics, we should use this moment to unite in support of President Trump and Secretary Kennedy. The American people made their voices clear when they voted for MAHA—we want reform and accountability, not the continuation of the corrupt practices exemplified by officials like Monarez. Here is what we all need to do right now: Call your senators (202.224.3121) and tell them about your support for Bobby and for MAHA. Speak from the heart! We’re compiling the highlights to make it easy for you to lead the conversation online. Learn about the corruption inside the CDC and share with everyone you know: Join us this afternoon for our weekly MAHA Media Hub call as we lay out a clear plan to combat these false narratives We live in a time where the truth is being put on trial. That’s why we need to expose the systemic corruption within the CDC, highlight the arrest of Paul Thorsen, fact check Monarez’s testimony from today’s hearing, and shine a light on the pervasive influence of pharmaceutical money in Congress. Once again, we are being joined by an incredible lineup of inspiring leaders: Join us today, September 17th, at 4:00PM EDT | "SAVE YOUR SPOT" Limited Spots Remaining It’s more important than ever for us to come together and fight for the truth. MAHA Action Make America Healthy AgainTM and MAHATM are trademarks owned by MAHA TM LLC © 2025 MAHA Action. All rights reserved. 307 W 36th St, 11FL, New York, NY 10018, United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com · • •

name: Christina Bohannan (personal)
subject: Found it! 🙃
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRISTINA BOHANNAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Checked the couch cushions, the kitchen, even the trash can.

| Peter,

I just spent 25 minutes tearing my house apart looking for my phone. Checked the couch cushions, the kitchen, even the trash can. You know where it was? Wedged in the car seat, laughing at me the whole time. 🙃 (At least that's how it felt.)

This happens to me more often than I’d like to admit — phones, keys, you name it. My daughter has had to help me find both more times than she can count. I swear it was her part-time job at one point.

But the reason I was looking so hard was because I wanted to reach out to you. At the end of this month, our campaign will file our fundraising report.

Those numbers will be public, and they’ll show everyone in our district — and Mariannette Miller-Meeks — how serious we are about this race. Meeting our mid-month goal tonight is a great way to make sure we turn out a strong performance on September 30th.

**So I’m asking — before I misplace this phone again — will you pitch in today? >>** **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cb-q3-2025?refcode2=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115401560/570192247/-1612730695?refcode=em25_250917_mm3_fndd_gq_act___cbpers_ettx&&&&utm_campaign=em25_250917_mm3_fndd_gq_act___cbpers_ettx&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&refcode2=c0e6a6d9-e993-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMGU2YTZkOS1lOTkzLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IGXEy8huw0tEOyqG-HrRgnGyNwwGj9WTeTZv7tC_pQA=)**

Thanks for helping me keep my eye on what really matters,

Christina
_Sent from my iPhone_ |

name: Team Jena
subject: Your time is valuable, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2509-q3-jg?refcode=250917-volunteeremail [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2509-q3-jg?refcode=250917-volunteeremail]
Peter,
This campaign is powered by people like you. If we’re going to win this race and protect the Colorado way of life, we need a strong team of volunteers standing with us every step of the way.
There are so many ways you can get involved, including:
* Make phone calls to connect with voters across the state
* Attend a caucus to show your support for Jena
* Write postcards to help us reach Coloradans in every community
* Knock on doors to tell voters about Jena’s vision for the future
And more!
See the full list of opportunities and sign up to become a volunteer with our campaign today. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/YlbBAO3FvUCFmmSRJ4yexQ2]
Every action you take helps us build the momentum we need to win. Whether you can give a few hours a week or just a little time here and there, your involvement will make a real difference.
Together, we can stand up to extremists, protect our rights, and build a stronger future for Colorado.
Thank you for being part of this movement,
Team Jena
Follow Jena Online:
https://www.facebook.com/Jenaforcolorado/ [https://www.facebook.com/Jenaforcolorado/] https://twitter.com/JenaGriswold [https://twitter.com/JenaGriswold] https://www.instagram.com/jenagriswold/ [https://www.instagram.com/jenagriswold/] https://www.threads.net/@jenagriswold [https://www.threads.net/@jenagriswold] https://bsky.app/profile/jenagriswold.bsky.social [https://bsky.app/profile/jenagriswold.bsky.social]

name: Texas Organizing Project
subject: Make an impact with us / Haz un impacto con nosotros 💪🏿💪🏾💪🏽💪🏼
body:
Lea el boletín en español abajo [#Español]
NEXT SATURDAY:
Plug into TOP's probation reform efforts in San Antonio!
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Scales%20and%20gavel%20-%20R2J.png]
Join TOP next Saturday, Sept. 27, from 11 a.m. - 2 p.m. in San Antonio, as we brainstorm over brunch to make local policy changes, so that more residents can successfully complete probation in Bexar County as a rehabilitative experience, allowing them to more freely contribute to the well-being of our families and communities.
https://secure.everyaction.com/JElzt9IXtEaLa0r72CHK_g2 [https://secure.everyaction.com/JElzt9IXtEaLa0r72CHK_g2]
Our first visioning brunch was a well-attended success, so come be a part of our fight for a local probation system that works fairly for EVERYONE in Bexar County — no matter race, age, gender, or background.
For more event information, email Michael at mnachebe@organizetexas.org [mnachebe@organizetexas.org] or Laquita lgarcia@organizetexas.org [lgarcia@organizetexas.org] .
TAKE OUR SURVEY:
Help TOP unite around one major campaign priority for Texans
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Make%20your%20voice%20heard.png]
There's still time! If you live in Texas and care about building a more progressive future for our state, we want to hear from you. TOP is uniting around one major campaign priority that we believe will reflect the Texas we deserve. Your voice is essential in shaping our collective fight for justice and equity.
https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSc0JcmarckcN1aeYp7Qy807cgCm0rIjxGJsg2s5nfS7STQ-cA/viewform [https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSc0JcmarckcN1aeYp7Qy807cgCm0rIjxGJsg2s5nfS7STQ-cA/viewform]
For more information about this survey and campaign effort, contact Sofia at slopez@organizetexas.org. [slopez@organizetexas.org.]
Celebrating and channeling the power of our Latino communities
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Hispanic%20heritage%20month%20graphic.jpg]
Latinos are deeply woven into the cultural fabric of our state and nation, overcoming societal barriers to move our communities forward each and every day. As we recognize Hispanic Heritage Month, TOP honors the contributions of Latinos – including our Afro-Latino and Indigenous brothers and sisters – who have poured into our movement’s pursuit of justice and freedom for all.
At TOP, we know Latino liberation is linked to Black liberation. We believe it’s our moral obligation to acknowledge, challenge, and correct anti-Blackness and colorism embedded in our institutions – an ugly byproduct of colonialism – that for too long has collectively held us back. Our solidarity is powerful. We are stronger together.
That’s why we celebrate Latinidad through our commitment to racial and economic justice, organizing to improve the lives of working people – regardless of age, race, faith, or spoken language – so we can rise to create a brighter Texas built on dignity and respect for every person.
TOP Tip: Keep your mind engaged and your spirits high
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Ways%20to%20relax%20.jpg]
We all can benefit from the occasional social media breather. Disconnect from the algorithms for a bit if you feel it’s needed; it can do your mind and body good! Here's a list of positive activities you can do to ward off mindless (or doom) scrolling. [https://charlesdoublet.com/2024/09/are-you-doom-scrolling-social-media-50-things-to-do-instead/]
Español
PRÓXIMO SÁBADO:
Únase a los esfuerzos de TOP para reformar la libertad condicional en San Antonio
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Scales%20and%20gavel%20-%20R2J.png]
Acompaña a TOP el sábado 27 de septiembre, de 11 a.m. a 2 p.m. en San Antonio , mientras compartimos un brunch y generamos ideas para lograr cambios en las políticas locales, de modo que más residentes puedan completar con éxito su libertad condicional en el Condado de Bexar como una experiencia de rehabilitación, permitiéndoles contribuir más libremente al bienestar de nuestras familias y comunidades.
https://secure.everyaction.com/JElzt9IXtEaLa0r72CHK_g2 [https://secure.everyaction.com/JElzt9IXtEaLa0r72CHK_g2]
Nuestro primer “brunch” visionario fue todo un éxito, así que participe en nuestra lucha por un sistema local de libertad condicional que funcione de manera justa para TODOS en el condado de Bexar, sin importar raza, edad, género u origen.
Para obtener más información sobre el evento, escriba a Michael a mnachebe@organizetexas.org [mnachebe@organizetexas.org] o a Laquita lgarcia@organizetexas.org [ lgarcia@organizetexas.org] .
PARTICIPE EN NUESTRA ENCUESTA:
Ayude a unirse en torno a una campaña de importante priorida para los tejanos
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Levanta%20Tu%20Voz.png]
¡Todavía hay tiempo! Si vives en Texas y te importa construir un futuro más progresista para nuestro estado, queremos escucharte. TOP se está uniendo en torno a una gran prioridad de campaña que creemos reflejará el Texas que merecemos.
https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSc0JcmarckcN1aeYp7Qy807cgCm0rIjxGJsg2s5nfS7STQ-cA/viewform [https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSc0JcmarckcN1aeYp7Qy807cgCm0rIjxGJsg2s5nfS7STQ-cA/viewform]
Tu voz es esencial para darle forma a nuestra lucha colectiva por la justicia y la equidad. Para más información sobre esta encuesta y la campaña, contacta a Sofía en slopez@organizetexas.org [slopez@organizetexas.org] .
Celebrando y canalizando el poder de nuestras comunidades latinas
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Hispanic%20heritage%20month%20graphic.jpg]
Los latinos estamos profundamente entrelazados en el tejido cultural de nuestro estado y de nuestra nación, superando barreras sociales para hacer avanzar a nuestras comunidades cada día. Al reconocer el Mes de la Herencia Hispana, TOP honra las contribuciones de los latinos –incluyendo a nuestros hermanos y hermanas afro-latinos e indígenas– que han entregado su esfuerzo a la lucha de nuestro movimiento por la justicia y la libertad para todos.
En TOP, sabemos que la liberación latina está ligada a la liberación negra. Creemos que es nuestra obligación moral reconocer, cuestionar y corregir el anti-negritud y el colorismo incrustados en nuestras instituciones –un feo resultado del colonialismo– que por demasiado tiempo nos han detenido colectivamente. Nuestra solidaridad es poderosa. Somos más fuertes juntos.
Por eso celebramos la latinidad a través de nuestro compromiso con la justicia racial y económica, organizándonos para mejorar la vida de los trabajadores, sin importar su edad, raza, fe o idioma, para que podamos levantarnos y crear un Texas más brillante, basado en la dignidad y el respeto por cada persona.
Consejos de TOP: Mantén tu mente ocupada y tu ánimo en alto
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Ways%20to%20relax%20.jpg]
Todos podemos beneficiarnos de un respiro ocasional en las redes sociales. Desconéctate de los algoritmos por un rato si lo sientes necesario; ¡puede ser beneficioso para tu mente y tu cuerpo! Aquí tienes una lista de actividades positivas que puedes hacer para evitar el desplazamiento sin sentido (o fatalista). [https://charlesdoublet.com/2024/09/are-you-doom-scrolling-social-media-50-things-to-do-instead/]
Copyright (C) 2025 Texas Organizing Project. All rights reserved.

Texas Organizing Project
700 S. Zarzamora, Suite 212
San Antonio, TX 78207
United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/_pdeZq7FqkSM3uHo3kegbw2?unsubscribedata=YC9WgS4Xa7F3ph6UwWWieHJkJEmLtpqscLYNutTHq%2FmTUniPetIYUiC%2B0iBcpLu4rYvAHid4KxxCW%2FxLT2RM818lVN5eeaome0vVxOOz7q6Os3gAL%2Bw%2Fya1cpWlNXmlEM9LGLQ9%2Bu8%2Bi21vUg1pe9VmSe8QDpIShO5tcvFJI5I97xNBmuF0spZ%2FXYvue6oGtaGNo9h2ag4SV5yXtoueg2Bh8dZ3VI1fOXHi482rZ3ivnWNqFsblPr0qoW1oUIpcS7eu60UhmHHsHgVzQwHnV9EVUIFVuzXaEcEWY8y%2BdumyiqOwEa5lZQICcXkRH5hWxGGVpn835b9doYnC6LbXLuGNh9D6wTtfrLSyXqn4Fv5Niydu8n23K6AjoSuE4andWJZw%2BQZfyl8LcnUTlHjl8cMf2j0eYPaeUXZOdBRvKTyw%3D .

TAKE OUR SURVEY: Help TOP unite around one major campaign priority for Texans [] There's still time! If you live in Texas and care about building a more progressive future for our state, we want to hear from you. TOP is uniting around one major campaign priority that we believe will reflect the Texas we deserve. Your voice is essential in shaping our collective fight for justice and equity. [] For more information about this survey and campaign effort, contact Sofia at slopez@organizetexas.org. [slopez@organizetexas.org.] Celebrating and channeling the power of our Latino communities [] Latinos are deeply woven into the cultural fabric of our state and nation, overcoming societal barriers to move our communities forward each and every day. As we recognize Hispanic Heritage Month, TOP honors the contributions of Latinos – including our Afro-Latino and Indigenous brothers and sisters – who have poured into our movement’s pursuit of justice and freedom for all. At TOP, we know Latino liberation is linked to Black liberation. We believe it’s our moral obligation to acknowledge, challenge, and correct anti-Blackness and colorism embedded in our institutions – an ugly byproduct of colonialism – that for too long has collectively held us back. Our solidarity is powerful. We are stronger together. That’s why we celebrate Latinidad through our commitment to racial and economic justice, organizing to improve the lives of working people – regardless of age, race, faith, or spoken language – so we can rise to create a brighter Texas built on dignity and respect for every person. TOP Tip: Keep your mind engaged and your spirits high [] We all can benefit from the occasional social media breather. Disconnect from the algorithms for a bit if you feel it’s needed; it can do your mind and body good! Here's a list of positive activities you can do to ward off mindless (or doom) scrolling. [] Español PRÓXIMO SÁBADO: Únase a los esfuerzos de TOP para reformar la libertad condicional en San Antonio [] Acompaña a TOP el sábado 27 de septiembre, de 11 a.m. a 2 p.m. en San Antonio , mientras compartimos un brunch y generamos ideas para lograr cambios en las políticas locales, de modo que más residentes puedan completar con éxito su libertad condicional en el Condado de Bexar como una experiencia de rehabilitación, permitiéndoles contribuir más libremente al bienestar de nuestras familias y comunidades. [] Nuestro primer “brunch” visionario fue todo un éxito, así que participe en nuestra lucha por un sistema local de libertad condicional que funcione de manera justa para TODOS en el condado de Bexar, sin importar raza, edad, género u origen. Para obtener más información sobre el evento, escriba a Michael a mnachebe@organizetexas.org [mnachebe@organizetexas.org] o a Laquita lgarcia@organizetexas.org [ lgarcia@organizetexas.org] . PARTICIPE EN NUESTRA ENCUESTA: Ayude a unirse en torno a una campaña de importante priorida para los tejanos [] ¡Todavía hay tiempo! Si vives en Texas y te importa construir un futuro más progresista para nuestro estado, queremos escucharte. TOP se está uniendo en torno a una gran prioridad de campaña que creemos reflejará el Texas que merecemos. [] Tu voz es esencial para darle forma a nuestra lucha colectiva por la justicia y la equidad. Para más información sobre esta encuesta y la campaña, contacta a Sofía en slopez@organizetexas.org [slopez@organizetexas.org] . Celebrando y canalizando el poder de nuestras comunidades latinas [] Los latinos estamos profundamente entrelazados en el tejido cultural de nuestro estado y de nuestra nación, superando barreras sociales para hacer avanzar a nuestras comunidades cada día. Al reconocer el Mes de la Herencia Hispana, TOP honra las contribuciones de los latinos –incluyendo a nuestros hermanos y hermanas afro-latinos e indígenas– que han entregado su esfuerzo a la lucha de nuestro movimiento por la justicia y la libertad para todos. En TOP, sabemos que la liberación latina está ligada a la liberación negra. Creemos que es nuestra obligación moral reconocer, cuestionar y corregir el anti-negritud y el colorismo incrustados en nuestras instituciones –un feo resultado del colonialismo– que por demasiado tiempo nos han detenido colectivamente. Nuestra solidaridad es poderosa. Somos más fuertes juntos. Por eso celebramos la latinidad a través de nuestro compromiso con la justicia racial y económica, organizándonos para mejorar la vida de los trabajadores, sin importar su edad, raza, fe o idioma, para que podamos levantarnos y crear un Texas más brillante, basado en la dignidad y el respeto por cada persona. Consejos de TOP: Mantén tu mente ocupada y tu ánimo en alto [] Todos podemos beneficiarnos de un respiro ocasional en las redes sociales. Desconéctate de los algoritmos por un rato si lo sientes necesario; ¡puede ser beneficioso para tu mente y tu cuerpo! Aquí tienes una lista de actividades positivas que puedes hacer para evitar el desplazamiento sin sentido (o fatalista). [] Copyright (C) 2025 Texas Organizing Project. All rights reserved. Texas Organizing Project 700 S. Peter,
Hey there, it’s Hope Walz.
You might have heard already, but my Dad, Tim Walz, is running for reelection as Governor of Minnesota.
I’ve always known I had kickass parents. But the older I get, the more I understand just how true that is.
I’m the reason my dad went from an A to an F rating by the NRA. After the Parkland shooting, I told my Dad that he needed to use his power as an elected official to do something — and he listened.
He signed historic gun safety measures into law in 2023. And right now, he’s calling on the Minnesota State Legislature to ban assault weapons.
He’s always shown me the value of standing up for what you believe in and sticking up for others — which is why he’s the right guy to lead Minnesota.
He’ll keep fighting for the people being ignored or attacked by the Trump administration, lowering costs, and protecting our rights and freedoms.
[**So while my Dad keeps fighting for us, I want to make sure we’ve got his back. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: They’re mad because I’m telling the truth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
They want to silence our movement. We can’t let that happen.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250917-5437-footer&t=1&akid=5437%2E420207%2E6Ckwfm)
Peter,
**One of the far right’s most extreme influencers, so-called Libs of TikTok, just went after me on social media** for doing what I’ve always done: telling the truth and giving people the tools to peacefully resist Donald Trump’s authoritarian agenda.
At a recent Resistance Lab training, I laid out the facts: Trump is taking concrete steps to eliminate opposition, silence dissent, and remake the state in his image.
**These are textbook authoritarian tactics. And they’re happening right now.**
Libs of TikTok saw the progress we’re making and wants to intimidate us out of organizing for our rights and freedoms.
The reality is the Resistance Lab has always focused on the importance of nonviolent resistance. But the irony isn’t lost on me — **Libs of TikTok is outraged because I called out far-right efforts to silence dissent, and now they’re literally trying to stop us from speaking out in defense of our democracy.**
This is _exactly_ why we launched the Resistance Labs in the first place: To train people in non-violent resistance, based on decades of research on the rise of authoritarianism, and how people-powered movements have successfully stopped it before.
Thousands of people from every state have already attended a training, so it’s no wonder the far-right is upset. They know that the more informed and organized we are, the harder it is for them to get away with their extreme power grabs.
So what do they do? They distract. They point fingers. And they try to bait us into a petty fight.
**That’s not going to work on us.** We’re not falling into their trap — we’re doubling down to expand our movement, reach more people, and continue standing up in nonviolent resistance to defend our democracy.
But I can’t do it without you. Resistance Labs are only possible because of grassroots support, and with our movement under attack, we need to stand firm — now is not the time to stop speaking out.
[**Will you rush a donation to help us continue organizing across the country and show the far right that we won’t be silent?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250917-1?refcode=em20250917-5437&refcode2=5437_420207_6Ckwfm&akid=5437%2E420207%2E6Ckwfm)

And if you’d like to attend an upcoming Resistance Lab, you can register **[here.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/51422?utm_source=em20250917-5437&t=2&akid=5437%2E420207%2E6Ckwfm)**
Let’s continue to build this movement, defend democracy, and peacefully resist far-right extremism together.
In solidarity,
Pramila Jayapal

clean_body: They want to silence our movement. We can’t let that happen. Peter, One of the far right’s most extreme influencers, so-called Libs of TikTok, just went after me on social media for doing what I’ve always done: telling the truth and giving people the tools to peacefully resist Donald Trump’s authoritarian agenda. At a recent Resistance Lab training, I laid out the facts: Trump is taking concrete steps to eliminate opposition, silence dissent, and remake the state in his image. These are textbook authoritarian tactics. And they’re happening right now. Libs of TikTok saw the progress we’re making and wants to intimidate us out of organizing for our rights and freedoms. The reality is the Resistance Lab has always focused on the importance of nonviolent resistance. But the irony isn’t lost on me — Libs of TikTok is outraged because I called out far-right efforts to silence dissent, and now they’re literally trying to stop us from speaking out in defense of our democracy. This is exactly why we launched the Resistance Labs in the first place: To train people in non-violent resistance, based on decades of research on the rise of authoritarianism, and how people-powered movements have successfully stopped it before. Thousands of people from every state have already attended a training, so it’s no wonder the far-right is upset. They know that the more informed and organized we are, the harder it is for them to get away with their extreme power grabs. So what do they do? They distract. They point fingers. And they try to bait us into a petty fight. That’s not going to work on us. We’re not falling into their trap — we’re doubling down to expand our movement, reach more people, and continue standing up in nonviolent resistance to defend our democracy. But I can’t do it without you. Resistance Labs are only possible because of grassroots support, and with our movement under attack, we need to stand firm — now is not the time to stop speaking out. And if you’d like to attend an upcoming Resistance Lab, you can register Let’s continue to build this movement, defend democracy, and peacefully resist far-right extremism together. In solidarity, Pramila Jayapal | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

name: Fight Like Hell PAC
subject: This will be one of the closest races in 2026
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC
body:
Governor Whitmer is ready to do all she can to keep Michigan blue. |
#
---
Team, we already knew Michigan is a battleground state. **Now, with Senator Gary Peters announcing that he’s not seeking re-election, the stakes couldn’t be higher.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115403037/570197124/1700965107?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250917_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2NkN2QyZTYtZWQ5My1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=J87i2UKBXfMHQIzRsVdyP40gsNNAxmBLotpi0SpRf1k=) All eyes will be on Michigan Democrats next year. Not only will we have the Governor’s race and elections down the ballot — but now with an open Senate race, Republicans are going to spend big to flip all of these seats **red.** Gov. Kansas GOP leadership wants to bring all the corruption, self-dealing, and blind partisanship that defines Washington right back home to Kansas. No more dissenting voices. No more competitive Congressional elections.
**That’s the _opposite_ of what our state needs right now.** Here in Kansas, we know better than anyone what happens when the far-right controls all the levers of power. We all experienced it just a few short years ago under Sam Brownback: Lost jobs. Underfunded public schools. Rural hospitals shuttered.
[_**We can’t go back to the time of one-party rule here in Kansas. More than ever, we need leaders like Sharice in office — leaders who will never be afraid to stand up to DC politicians and do what’s right for our state. Don’t listen to their finely-tuned talking points. Just check their travel schedules: = Yes, you read that correctly. Instead of lowering costs or investing in our schools, Kansas Republican lawmakers are taking a field trip to Washington, just to receive direct marching orders from Donald Trump. = | | = Kansas GOP leadership wants to bring all the corruption, self-dealing, and blind partisanship that defines Washington right back home to Kansas. No more dissenting voices. No more competitive Congressional elections. That’s the opposite of what our state needs right now. Here in Kansas, we know better than anyone what happens when the far-right controls all the levers of power. We all experienced it just a few short years ago under Sam Brownback: Lost jobs. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115403245/570197768/2145945666?refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.09.17_FloorSpeech_X2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGYxY2ZmNy1lZTkzLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YuX3lnukz4lP4e9vxmlZUpP-tL9SDmwjDEolVuppKO4=&emci=4ebbff36-db93-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=ddf1cff7-ee93-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=23483442) | Peter, [_**I didn’t intend to make this speech — but I had to say something.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115403246/570197769/-2122446049?hl=en&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.09.17_FloorSpeech_X2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGYxY2ZmNy1lZTkzLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YuX3lnukz4lP4e9vxmlZUpP-tL9SDmwjDEolVuppKO4=&emci=4ebbff36-db93-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=ddf1cff7-ee93-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=23483442) The House was discussing amendments to the annual defense spending bill. I was preparing to speak in favor of a bipartisan bill that supports childcare, housing, and healthcare for all those who serve in our Armed Forces and their families. But then a person who represents South Carolina introduced several amendments that serve no purpose other than attacking and dehumanizing trans people. This person introduced those amendments using disgusting, hateful, violent language that I will not repeat. _[**So, when it was my turn to speak, I addressed that person from South Carolina* and their unhinged vendetta against our trans neighbors.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115403247/570197770/-1241486548?hl=en&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.09.17_FloorSpeech_X2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGYxY2ZmNy1lZTkzLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YuX3lnukz4lP4e9vxmlZUpP-tL9SDmwjDEolVuppKO4=&emci=4ebbff36-db93-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=ddf1cff7-ee93-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=23483442)_ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115403248/570197771/-2122446049?hl=en&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.09.17_FloorSpeech_X2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGYxY2ZmNy1lZTkzLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YuX3lnukz4lP4e9vxmlZUpP-tL9SDmwjDEolVuppKO4=&emci=4ebbff36-db93-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=ddf1cff7-ee93-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=23483442) (*In my speech, I mistakenly said this person was from “North Carolina.” I apologize – I don’t believe in referring to someone in a way that ignores their identity.) This was not the first time this person has attacked the rights and dignity of trans children, parents, servicemembers, and military personnel. They have made their bigotry a central feature of their political brand, from their speeches to the bills they introduce to their [_**campaign merchandise.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115403249/570197772/353534094?refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.09.17_FloorSpeech_X2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGYxY2ZmNy1lZTkzLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YuX3lnukz4lP4e9vxmlZUpP-tL9SDmwjDEolVuppKO4=&emci=4ebbff36-db93-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=ddf1cff7-ee93-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=23483442) I ran for Congress to bring your voices to Capitol Hill. I will continue to use my voice to call out bigotry, hate, and violent threats to my neighbors. Thank you for your support 💙 – Emily P.S. Finding Common Ground - Charlie Kirk, Political Violence, and America's Divide | Season 2025, Episode 30 | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/latinos.vote/podcast-season2025-ep30-8344334?e=5bd167f239)

# **[NEW PODCAST EPISODE OUT NOW!](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=d241200d76&e=5bd167f239)**
---
| [ ](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=db7422ed38&e=5bd167f239 "Finding Common Ground - Charlie Kirk, Political Violence, and America's Divide")
---

_**Finding Common Ground**_

**Charlie Kirk, Political Violence, and America's Divide**

The Latino Vote Podcast Season 2025 Episode 30
| Chuck Rocha is back with stories of **climbing Yosemite's Half Dome and fishing in Belize** , but the tone quickly shifts as he and Mike Madrid confront the **shocking assassination of Charlie Kirk**. Together, they reflect on America’s rising political violence, and how social media and polarization are fueling America’s darkest impulses.

>From Civil War analogies to personal stories of friendship across partisan lines, this episode asks: **Can we still find what binds us together as a nation?**
---
|
---
| | | |
**Today's Headlines:**

[Texas GOP may be banking on low Hispanic turnout in new map](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=5b122839ea&e=5bd167f239) By: El Paso Times

[Trump Falling Out of Favor With Latino Voters Across Demographics, Survey Finds](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=4ebcffd5e3&e=5bd167f239) By: The Latin Times

[Tejano Icon Bobby Pulido Is Officially Running for Congress: South Texas Is ‘In My DNA’](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=d717e60f0a&e=5bd167f239) By: Rolling Stone

[ICE raids take toll on Latino mental health: ‘It’s been nonstop’](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=e91d60aa1d&e=5bd167f239) By: Daily Kos

[Here’s how Newsom’s maps are already changing California’s congressional races](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=9f5baf6601&e=5bd167f239) By: CalMatters

[Proposition 50: Allowing California to use new congressional maps to counter redistricting in Texas](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=3788201dab&e=5bd167f239) By: LAist

[Many Hispanic Heritage Month celebrations scrapped due to ICE raid fears, changed political climate](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=250e229bdc&e=5bd167f239) By: CBS News

[New polling shows Latinos sour on Trump](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=379efdca82&e=5bd167f239) By: POLITICO

[Fear of ICE raids causing some cities to cancel Hispanic Heritage Month celebrations](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=08f9bfab0c&e=5bd167f239) By: NBC News

[Trump Hasn’t Proclaimed Hispanic Heritage Month (Yet)—Unlike In First Term](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=1ed056c7ab&e=5bd167f239) By: Forbes

[Trump admin boosts HBCU funding after cutting grants for Hispanic-serving colleges](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=22fc2e1a4c&e=5bd167f239) By: ABC News

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Kash Patel loses it after pressed on Epstein files
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=8980%2E5257348%2EHPCgBa ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek —

Yesterday, FBI Director Kash Patel appeared before the Senate Judiciary
Committee.

It didn’t go well for him — to say the least.

He struggled to answer questions about his campaign of retribution at the
FBI, where he is illegally firing top-notch agents who investigated
Trump.

After claiming for years that Epstein had a list of powerful clients for
the women he trafficked, he now tried to persuade the American people that
the only name on Jeffrey Epstein’s list was ... Jeffrey Epstein.

But what really set him off was when I asked why Epstein’s co-conspirator
was suddenly moved to a minimum security prison after seemingly
exonerating Trump.

At that point, he just lost it and began screaming at me.

Derek, this is par
for the course for Kash Patel. But it is shameful behavior from anyone,
let alone the nation’s FBI Director.

I’ve raised red flags about Kash Patel before.

He’s spread dangerous, false conspiracy theories about a “deep state” that
is unfairly persecuting MAGA world.

He’s called for and is conducting a comprehensive “housecleaning” or purge
of professionals at the Justice Department.

While I served on the House Intelligence Committee, Kash Patel was a major
part of the efforts to sabotage a thorough investigation of Russia’s
involvement in the 2016 election — and for his work, he was rewarded with
a post in the Trump Administration.

I could go on, but I think you understand how unfit Kash Patel is to serve
as FBI Director. He’s a threat to the critical mission of the Bureau, not
to mention the justice system and our democracy — and we need to hold him
and the entire Trump administration to account.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q32025_abs_em.sQXYU5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250917_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=8980%2E5257348%2EHPCgBa ]Help me continue to speak out about Kash Patel and the dangers he poses
in his high-ranking position in the Trump administration. Pitch in a
contribution of any amount today.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=q32025_abs_em.rdw9Dy&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250917_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1005&akid=8980%2E5257348%2EHPCgBa ]EXPRESS DONATE
$10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=q32025_abs_em.rdw9Dy&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250917_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=25&t=1006&akid=8980%2E5257348%2EHPCgBa ]EXPRESS DONATE
$25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=q32025_abs_em.rdw9Dy&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250917_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=50&t=1007&akid=8980%2E5257348%2EHPCgBa ]EXPRESS DONATE
$50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=q32025_abs_em.rdw9Dy&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250917_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=100&t=1008&akid=8980%2E5257348%2EHPCgBa ]EXPRESS DONATE
$100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=q32025_abs_em.rdw9Dy&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250917_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=250&t=1009&akid=8980%2E5257348%2EHPCgBa ]EXPRESS DONATE
$250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q32025_abs_em.sQXYU5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250917_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=8980%2E5257348%2EHPCgBa ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Derek, we
cannot let Trump officials like Kash Patel betray the hard-working men and
women of the FBI, and the public safety. We must fight back.

More soon,

Adam

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q32025_abs_em.sQXYU5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250917_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=8980%2E5257348%2EHPCgBa ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner; text Schiff to 724433

name: Voter Action Project
subject: We must protect our elections from conspiracy theorists
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Folks,
Donald Trump just handed control of U.S. election infrastructure to a known 2020 conspiracy theorist — and Congress is doing nothing to stop it.
Heather Honey, a far-right operative who pushed Trump’s lies about election fraud, has been appointed to a key Department of Homeland Security role overseeing how our elections are secured. She helped push sham audits, spread false claims in court, and even worked to seize voting machines in Pennsylvania . Now she’s in charge of protecting the very elections she tried to undermine.
Election officials across the country are begging for more funding to secure our voting systems — but the opponents of voting rights who control Congress refuse to act. Instead, they’re greenlighting a takeover by people who want to sabotage the next election from inside the system.
Tell Congress: Don’t let 2020 election deniers rig the 2026 elections. Block their appointments and provide funding to protect our elections and our democracy now >> [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/tell-congress-protect-our-elections-from-2020-deniers-now?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-actions]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/tell-congress-protect-our-elections-from-2020-deniers-now?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-actions]
This is all part of a coordinated plan by Trump and his allies to rig the rules ahead of 2026. And with MAGA in control of Congress, they might just get away with it.
We can’t stand by and let that happen. Congress must launch an immediate investigation into Honey’s appointment and pass emergency funding to protect our elections from partisan interference. The longer they stall, the greater the risk of chaos and manipulation in 2026.
We know what Trump and his loyalists did in 2020. We saw the lies, the lawsuits, the violent attack on the Capitol. Now they’re trying again—with more power and fewer safeguards. Congress has a choice: stand up for democracy or enable its destruction.
Add your name today to demand urgent action. The integrity of our next election depends on us stepping up to defend our democracy >> [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/tell-congress-protect-our-elections-from-2020-deniers-now?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-actions]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/tell-congress-protect-our-elections-from-2020-deniers-now?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-actions]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=091725_1&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=091725_1&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.
Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails are a crucial way to keep supporters up to date on the latest attacks on voting rights and our efforts to expand ballot access for all Americans. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=LbymI7e92UReHF3OWpVE2JwDUzTx2xaDzHIQr6YRb0B1TvfTsvBTM4yvu4vTtUa8bDpAx%2BYzFwtUZjD2xxMZUEJC5W6RfSyhqFkHefzct0QxEMcdn245ZjH52yb0HSGlQpVge0iAEyLsaK42OM37K2%2F6LlnUdFMZWhlPkAdsKpv%2FCLZIO8qurIVNGkZUrVxXwrniA2JVKBhJ6h2N78RVBO%2BKOPoGgCOzOqCpD4ZZ4PailrFZDtFjQG0d2RROZKB%2BaIPa7dJPy9FDhsd8IEzxLbdcCLzPate6YqClvti1XF745Vzj2E7DD5OCbmdIdNqY8j2iYjSCD9DXTT7pZum4KLFbfWt9m6vvtmb3XvZnVYEqmUGx3C5aMUnnDL4oDG69zjKfmWjmvwnPx7uV%2FPgB5bnsSlJ7vN5bilMJxKt%2Bd28%3D .

It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [] Donate Now [] Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. name: TN House Democratic Caucus
subject: Tennessee Republican throws tantrum, threatens punches
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Tennessee House Democratic Caucus, Ronnie Glynn, Treasurer_
body:
Ogles’ craziness isn’t working for Tennessean families
| | | | Can't see this email? [View in Your Browser](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01K5CDC5S3EZYS2J8FN439R8TB_0)
---
| | | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01K5CDC5S3EZYS2J8FN439R8TB_1)
---
| | | | Peter, Andy Ogles has done it again. Over the weekend, he stormed into a Spring Hill town hall itching for a fight. He screamed at citizens, threatened to “punch” Nashville’s mayor in the nose, and pledged to sic the National Guard on our cities — turning troops into political actors in Donald Trump’s authoritarian theater and mass distraction campaign. Ogles even ranted about “housing for gay frogs” while suggesting we rewrite the Constitution so Trump can serve a third term. None of this is even remotely funny - this guy is a U.S. congressman and a threat to Tennessee families. Let’s be clear: Ogles is not a leader. He’s not even close. He’s a dangerous, delusional grandstander who remains under investigation by a House ethics committee that his own party controls. Ogles doesn’t care about his lies, our brave National Guard personnel, our families, women, or our democracy. He only cares about trying to salvage any shred of a political future by doing anything he can to get Trump to acknowledge him. We see through his nonsense. **We know that self-serving grandstanders like Ogles aren’t fit for public service** , much less competent enough to find real solutions to the problems facing working families. We know the only way to stop them is to unite — across political divides — as citizens of the **United States of America** and demand better. That’s where you come in. Chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can today to help us hold Andy Ogles and the Trump sycophants in the state legislature accountable. If we don’t fight back now, the next headline could be even worse. Let’s do this together.
— Tennessee House Democratic Caucus

---
| | [ Donate Now ](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01K5CDC5S3EZYS2J8FN439R8TB_2)
---
| | | |

name: Sen. Jacky Rosen
subject: Senate GOP blocked my resolution to protect kids against RFK Jr.'s reckless agenda
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
RFK Jr. is putting our kids' health at risk
| | |
---
Friend, without vaccines, our kids are in danger.
That’s why I led my Democratic colleagues yesterday in calling for the Senate to pass a resolution condemning efforts to end vaccine mandates for schoolchildren being pushed by Florida officials and Secretary of Health and Human Services Robert F. Kennedy Jr.
**Unfortunately, Senate Republicans blocked my resolution – putting kids at risk of polio, smallpox, rubella, and other deadly diseases that have _already been eradicated_ from our society.**
This fight isn't over because I won’t _ever_ stop pushing to keep our kids safe, friend. But attacks on our public health like these are part of the Project 2025 agenda that Trump and Republicans have been pushing since they took office. **That’s why we must take back our Senate majority to stop them. And to do that, we need to build up our resources NOW.**
**[So if you are as outraged as I am about Republicans continuing to put our health in danger, I hope you'll pitch in $5 or more to help us reach our urgent $10,000 goal before midnight. I'm Retired Brigadier General Shawn Harris -- and **I'm running against the most dangerous voice in Congress, Marjorie Taylor Greene.** When I was a kid in rural Georgia, summers meant gathering under the big elm tree at my neighbor's house. That's where the county delivered free lunches -- peanut butter sandwiches, fruit, milk -- so no kid went hungry. We laughed, we played, and we looked out for each other. Now Marjorie Taylor Greene wants to gut SNAP and slash the local programs that made moments like that possible. She's forgotten what it means to look out for your neighbors. I never will. I served this nation for 40 years. I'm running for Congress to protect the lifelines that help our kids, our families, and our communities thrive. But I can't do it alone.
