name: Scott Colom
subject: Is there ANYTHING we can say?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC
body:
What if we told you we have a real path to flipping this seat, but it will take a grassroots team – starting now, at the very beginning of this campaign?
| Team, The Long Run allowed me to reach out to you today with an important question:

Is there anything we can say to convince you to become a Founding Donor to my campaign for the U.S. Senate in Mississippi?

[_**If you’re already with me in this fight, could you seal it by becoming a Founding Donor of this grassroots movement and split $10 between my campaign and The Long Run’s team? Every dollar counts. >>**_](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/4837?t=1&akid=5608%2E196590%2ERmQ-rn)
---
| [DONATE ](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/4837?t=2&akid=5608%2E196590%2ERmQ-rn)
---
What if we told you we have a real path to flipping this seat, but it will take a grassroots team – starting now, at the very beginning of this campaign?

What if we told you that my opponent, Senator Cindy Hyde-Smith, is deeply unpopular with Mississippi voters, making her one of the most vulnerable Republican Senators in 2026? And what if we told you that in 2023, Mississippi Democrats had their best showing in 20 years and came within a stone’s throw of flipping the Governor’s Mansion?

We can build on that progress. But to fully take advantage of Cindy Hyde-Smith’s unpopularity, we need to begin the work of building a competitive campaign at full sprint.

Beginning here. Today.

That means we’ll need a strong grassroots team, chipping in what they can, when they can afford to. One donation of $10 may not sound like a lot – but by the time you’ve gotten to this part of the email, a few people have already made their contribution.

Now, I need you to join them. The only way we’re going to be able to compete and win in a race like this one is together. So what do you say?

[_**Please split a donation of $10 or $25 between my campaign and The Long Run to help us win in Mississippi. Become a Founding Donor now by clicking here.**_](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/4837?t=4&akid=5608%2E196590%2ERmQ-rn)
| | | [CONTRIBUTE $5 ](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/4838?t=5&akid=5608%2E196590%2ERmQ-rn)

---

Thank you,
Scott Colom for U.S. Senate

name: Tucker Carlson
subject: Charlie’s fight is now ours
body:
Right now, Charlie would say, “Don’t you dare quit”

| | | [](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---
Patriot
---
I don’t write emails like this often. But right now? After what happened to Charlie... _I can’t stay quiet._ **Charlie Kirk was my friend.** Not just someone I admired, but someone I loved and respected deeply. Losing him was devastating.
---
[](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---
In many ways, all of us share in this loss. Charlie fought every day of his life for each one of us... fighting to keep America as great, free, and prosperous. No one I know ever fought for that harder than Charlie. America won't ever be the same. **No one can ever replace him — but we can make sure his legacy continues on.** _We owe him that._ Because if you knew Charlie, you would know exactly what he would say to us right now: _**"Don’t you dare quit."**_ Charlie poured his heart into building a movement to save America. He believed in young people. He believed in ordinary Americans. And he believed that even in our darkest hours, America was the beacon of goodness, freedom, and truth. That’s what the Turning Point movement was all about — and Charlie gave everything he had to that fight. **And our task now is not only to protect what he built — it’s to grow it bigger, stronger, and bolder than anyone ever thought possible.** More students. More churches. More families. More courage from everyday Americans to stand up and fight for what is right. Turning Point USA was Charlie’s vehicle to save America. **He didn’t just start a movement... _he started a revival._** And now, Patriot, we must carry that forward. If you share the same sense of responsibility that I do to honor Charlie’s work and press on with his vision... **_Then please join me in keeping his fight alive by making a gift to Turning Point USA today._** **[Let’s make Turning Point USA the biggest thing that this nation has ever seen... bigger than Charlie ever thought possible. That’s how we honor him best.](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)**
---
[ **Give in Charlie's Honor**
**Support Turning Point USA** ](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---
Rest in peace, Charlie. We’ll carry the torch you lit from here.
---
**For Charlie,** Tucker Carlson
---
[](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---
[ **Give in Charlie's Honor**
**Support Turning Point USA** ](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e321078/VaHR0cHM6Ly9vZGIubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA5MTc/LbmNsUnZhdTZxeA/qP2hpZHM9bmNMRTZ1bkR5Rld3REtscw/gaMr7eg/s6m6951efcc)

This seat was left WIDE OPEN when Freedom Caucus Rep. Mark Green retired, and with Hakeem Jeffries on the prowl to take control of the House, it’s up to you and me to make sure it stays in conservative hands. And let me tell you, **Jody isn’t a career politician**. He’s a small business owner, a family man, and a relentless defender of our values. But he stepped up and ran for the TN legislature because he knew our country was in big trouble. His record speaks for itself: **> > Fighting to protect life and defend the Second Amendment.** **> > Repealing “sanctuary” laws harboring illegal aliens.** **> > Rejecting unconstitutional COVID mandates.** **> > Exposing government waste and corruption; and so much more.** _**This is exactly the kind of man we need in Congress.**_ But time is short, and the election is just weeks away. I’m asking you from the bottom of my heart, _**will you send your most generous gift to my close friend, Jody Barrett, so we can keep this seat?**_ Let’s keep Tennessee—and America—First. For Freedom,

This election will be here quicker than you know. I’m asking you to send in a donation of $20 or more to support my friend, Jody Barrett. This seat was left WIDE OPEN when Freedom Caucus Rep. Mark Green retired, and with Hakeem Jeffries on the prowl to take control of the House, it’s up to you and me to make sure it stays in conservative hands. And let me tell you, Jody isn’t a career politician. He’s a small business owner, a family man, and a relentless defender of our values. name: Senator Rand Paul
subject: It’s time for Trump to clean out the Fed – Do you agree???
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY RAND PAUL FOR U
body:
Fellow Patriot,

I want to hear Donald Trump say "you're fired" one more time.

The Federal Reserve is spending billions of dollars -- of YOUR money! -- on itself while it crushes Americans like you and me with unbearable inflation.

_There must be accountability -- that's why Fed Chairman Jerome Powell needs to go_!

If you haven't heard the news about the Federal Reserve's lavish "renovation" plan, consider yourself lucky.

According to the latest reports, the Fed is spending $2.5 BILLION on marble palaces and rooftop terraces.

Donald Trump himself called out this travesty as a fireable offense.

But you and I need to encourage him to put his money where his mouth is and pull the plug on Jerome Powell.

**[Please click here to sign your petition to Donald Trump showing your support for FIRING Jerome Powell](http://track.randforkentucky.com/?xtl=rd05i7g71bzem0qfsri9m4bd5znh5uusuwsuht6nfzdac06ptwqo9fdh7186wsemd42q8q6lj9fylinhvpsslyzw91j5ga6fawut6ljnt6klqglqptiduwwbgqzysfofc5gm6cqda0qy49wxvepp&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2qw9x&__onlt=h).**

The Fed is a behemoth agency with the ability to manipulate and control the entire American economy. Our jobs, our finances, our savings and, ultimately, our livelihoods -- all of them are subject to the decisions made at the Fed.

No other institution has so much unchecked power. Look no further than the unlimited authority the Fed used in response to the COVID-19 pandemic.

The Fed printed money, purchased government-backed securities and doled out massive amounts of money to Banksters and favored industries. These actions added almost $5 TRILLION in debt to the Fed's balance sheet -- the American taxpayers' balance sheet, you and your children's balance sheet.

_All of that has led to the crippling inflation that has afflicted America ever since the pandemic_.

And yet, in the midst of all that, Jerome Powell has no issue with the Fed spending even MORE billions of dollars of your money to do a glorified home makeover.

Enough is enough. This is madness!

Donald Trump needs to send a message that there will be consequences for this type of behavior.

_He needs to fire Jerome Powell right away_.

Of course, Trump will get serious pushback for such a move, but I want him to know that he'll have the support of Americans like you.

If you and I can show him that type of support, that might give him the confidence he needs to make this courageous decision.

Your voice matters to President Trump, but only if you speak up.

**[That's why I need you to click here to sign your petition to Donald Trump urging him to FIRE Jerome Powell](http://track.randforkentucky.com/?xtl=rd05i7g71bzem0qfsri9m4bd5znh5uusuwsuht6nfzdac06ptwqo9fdh7186wsemd42q8q6lj9fylinhvpsslyzw91j5ga6fawut6ljnt6klqglqptiduwwbgqzysfofc5gm6cqda0qy49wxvepp&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2qw9x&__onlt=h).**

In Liberty,

U.S. Senator Rand Paul (R-KY)

P.S. It is long past time for President Trump to fire Jerome Powell as Chairman of the Federal Reserve.

But I know that he will get massive blowback for doing so.

_And so will I, since the media knows that I am the one pushing him the hardest to make this critical move_.

**[Fellow Patriot, I want you to click here to sign your petition urging Trump to FIRE Jerome Powell](http://track.randforkentucky.com/?xtl=rd05i7g71bzem0qfsri9m4bd5znh5uusuwsuht6nfzdac06ptwqo9fdh7186wsemd42q8q6lj9fylinhvpsslyzw91j5ga6fawut6ljnt6klqglqptiduwwbgqzysfofc5gm6cqda0qy49wxvepp&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2qw9x&__onlt=h).**

**[But once you have done that, I am also asking you to make a generous donation of $100, $50, $25, or $10 so that I can fight back against any attacks by the Democrats or the media in retribution for this](http://track.randforkentucky.com/?xtl=8yqg7jszpkc9zitcbwhgw6as6a0wwizj1mdk8dugqzcmh9599kk3zwkwck9vcguibcgoyvchcftn0v5hvwqzg91uyhw3xu5qwbl0j4fr5ucajlcsx4sx9eejrtp0egomie944wm7kcagof52hnkbvmi1jsutkxt&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2qw9x&__onlt=h).**

_****_ _**_**PAID FOR BY RAND PAUL FOR U.S. SENATE**_**_ _****_ _****_
* * *
_****_ _****_

name: Ghazala Hashmi
subject: Reasonable? Really?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Hi, it’s Ghazala Hashmi, Democratic nominee for Virginia Lieutenant Governor.
My opponent, John Reid, claims he will lead in a manner that is “responsible and reasonable.”
But let’s be clear about what that really means:
* He’s called for SHUTTING DOWN public schools.
* He’s compared abortion to SLAVERY.

name: Kat Abughazaleh
subject: As fascism grows stronger, what will we do?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kat for Illinois
body:
|
---
To unsubscribe from future communications, please click [here](https://ka4il.us/l/RItEufs0OewL)
---
| [ ](https://ka4il.us/l/wV6x88N1lusr)
---
Friend, Donald Trump is once again trying to seize complete control of our country by promising retribution against "the left". **First, it was pro-Palestinian protestors. Now, it's anyone who disagrees with him.** Trump's attempts to strong-arm universities like Columbia, UC Berkeley, and Northwestern here in Chicago... have worked, and they're only the beginning. Authoritarians see capitulation as permission to push harder, and while these universities might throw away their students' right to freedom of speech so that they can continue to get funding, **I won't ever back down.** It's why I won't stop showing up at the ICE detention center in Broadview despite physical violence against me. It's why I won't stop speaking out despite the hate I receive online. And it's why I would push every one of my colleagues in Congress to fight back against Trump's fascist actions.
[**Friend, will you chip in to our people-powered campaign and help us crush our End of Quarter fundraising goal so that we can fight for change in Congress?**](https://ka4il.us/l/hegslaTt9Ik0)**** Friend, it's Kat Abughazaleh, and if this isn't a sign of what's to come, I don't know what is.
As always, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, click [**here**](https://ka4il.us/l/CO0q29Q92hbV)**,** or if you'd like to unsubscribe from all future emails, click **here**.
**_Donald Trump is planning on attacking payment processor ActBlue in another attempt by his administration to push the limits of his power._**
The detainment of Mahmoud Kahlil, the deportation of Kilmar Abrego Garcia, and the outright denial to follow a ruling made by the Supreme Court are all blatant oversteps that attack our right to free speech and due process and challenge the rule of law.
Friend, I've spent years watching Fox News and listening to their rhetoric get more and more extreme, and Donald Trump is doing exactly what they want.
**_Fascism is, and has always been, their end goal._**
Their vision is one of a militarized country where only certain people—a few dozen rich men—have a seat at the table, and dissidents like me are silenced.
Trump and Elon know that progressive movements like ours are in the way because I've made it abundantly clear that strongly worded letters, wearing matching outfits while holding up signs, and meaningless acts of symbolism **aren't my thing.**
As a member of Congress, I'm going to be unwavering in my fight for our communities.
I will not vote for authoritarian bills in the name of "compromise," I will not abandon or demonize vulnerable groups to cater to the right, and I will not change my stances for fear of retaliation.
And Friend, that's what this action on ActBlue is: retaliation. Campaigns like ours rely on small dollars from people like you to support us, and ActBlue is integral to making that work.
[**If you can before you go, can you chip in (through ActBlue) to help us continue to fund mutual aid efforts and bring our unwavering commitment to the people of our district to Congress?**](https://ka4il.us/l/IfYuGAgV2vbx)

I will not vote for authoritarian bills in the name of "compromise," I will not abandon or demonize vulnerable groups to cater to the right, and I will not change my stances for fear of retaliation. And Friend, that's what this action on ActBlue is: retaliation. Campaigns like ours rely on small dollars from people like you to support us, and ActBlue is integral to making that work. | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | Take care, Kat Abughazaleh Friend, it's Kat Abughazaleh, and if this isn't a sign of what's to come, I don't know what is. As always, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, click , or if you'd like to unsubscribe from all future emails, click here. Donald Trump is planning on attacking payment processor ActBlue in another attempt by his administration to push the limits of his power. The detainment of Mahmoud Kahlil, the deportation of Kilmar Abrego Garcia, and the outright denial to follow a ruling made by the Supreme Court are all blatant oversteps that attack our right to free speech and due process and challenge the rule of law. Friend, I've spent years watching Fox News and listening to their rhetoric get more and more extreme, and Donald Trump is doing exactly what they want. Fascism is, and has always been, their end goal. Their vision is one of a militarized country where only certain people—a few dozen rich men—have a seat at the table, and dissidents like me are silenced. Trump and Elon know that progressive movements like ours are in the way because I've made it abundantly clear that strongly worded letters, wearing matching outfits while holding up signs, and meaningless acts of symbolism aren't my thing. As a member of Congress, I'm going to be unwavering in my fight for our communities. I will not vote for authoritarian bills in the name of "compromise," I will not abandon or demonize vulnerable groups to cater to the right, and I will not change my stances for fear of retaliation. And Friend, that's what this action on ActBlue is: retaliation. Campaigns like ours rely on small dollars from people like you to support us, and ActBlue is integral to making that work. | Email is a really important way that grassroots campaigns can actually win: we have power when we use technology to organize a large group of people. Our email sending software likes it when we have "clicks", but we don't always ask you to click a donation link. We understand that email can be overwhelming. If you only want to receive the most important emails, click . If you're really just sick of every email, click and you'll be unsubscribed! | Democratic leaders are abandoning us. Our District deserves a fighter in Congress — someone who shows her constituents every day that she is doing everything possible to stop the authoritarian takeover of the United States. Kat has fought fascists before as a citizen, union rep, and independent journalist. Now, she's going to do the same in Congress. Let's win this together. ** | | Paid for by Kat for Illinois

name: Bob Fertik, Democrats.com
subject: re: Sign the petition to raise taxes on billionaires
body:
Billionaires are gaming the system—and Congress is letting them. | | |
---
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.EtNV8HBC60Tl7UuGmXS3sYMMMCXQg6tLXTP6gYXpdfRK86UUFFOVapF-SyYktuHHRmjHyNWGEu-3KQCMnyr_OIREHR07Mpd9WRe8OSeyFwfSy_Ed4RmVJPIw9jtGZ5q-he5ee6HDaC5AEZybKGqM0sKbnwPVtQAKMm9p-wsERqvbz2Rjm8Vvly0eICt2YpaHX0CupbIt7tbomRFWk8pAJEigzjwPavuklK29QEadEIP0alSx-4YVcnVGomJngR2NsewWdpABkJw11Uq8OIo0eA1FsoYL-qDBLLalQGwF4E_zyqXbentbz3OY579WgwnnStbGQcq4I-opFBinVo5pt870l8WwwvzV43QUxzqmosRHi39abUzIXUJ7EXtFzvtyhGfkEn8iq3i-kVrYIHdJ3Q/4jz/U5OkZGIBSaiuJm6IC5a7Dw/h0/h001.5PRonCB2G2d0daBWWOFQJLo7Awzmb78_tPHaIDEMKt8)Hi Friend, Billionaires are gaming the system—and Congress is letting them. The “Buy, Borrow, Die” loophole is billionaires’ golden ticket: they buy assets that soar in value, borrow against them to fund their luxury lifestyles tax-free, and then pass everything to heirs without ever paying taxes. Meanwhile, working families get taxed every paycheck, every time. [**Tax the Billionaires**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.EtNV8HBC60Tl7UuGmXS3sYMMMCXQg6tLXTP6gYXpdfRK86UUFFOVapF-SyYktuHHRmjHyNWGEu-3KQCMnyr_OIREHR07Mpd9WRe8OSeyFwfSy_Ed4RmVJPIw9jtGZ5q-rE_WIeJSTZUibxTRPmuP6hdRxjGctZvh7xU6lTPJfUbKAHeZrkRpa3xj9r7MBKhB4XW7X1AGUr7gbQGGIMPBwynXqeFUg5QhXuGGLo6dou1Q9cxCS0q6OF7Sa_dw3_sT5JOKg1iIuDV_kfNUgH9ZgcJaAur5SzfNLqymEV9cuLxmfYRKdIzOQUBPBkI0Ntv9trYQrwCe6Gm7bSm__sXo4qgNVxee3GJojehdaQOclpS5cBhn200JMciscp0UciI_iVMaY9Js73HQSdCNbb5Apw/4jz/U5OkZGIBSaiuJm6IC5a7Dw/h1/h001.e5r5FG35HqCMfquMrrlga8rg7rq2JillFfQCd_Hu_sE)
This scam steals trillions from schools, healthcare, housing, and climate action—all so billionaires can live tax-free. Senator Ron Wyden tried to stop it in 2023 with the Billionaires Income Tax Act, but lobbyists crushed it. Now Wyden is expected to bring the bill back. This is our shot—and we can’t let the billionaires win again. **[Tell Congress: “Make billionaires pay their fair share of taxes. Close the ‘Buy, Borrow, Die’ loophole.”](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.EtNV8HBC60Tl7UuGmXS3sYMMMCXQg6tLXTP6gYXpdfRK86UUFFOVapF-SyYktuHHRmjHyNWGEu-3KQCMnyr_OIREHR07Mpd9WRe8OSeyFwfSy_Ed4RmVJPIw9jtGZ5q-Q3Bbzle6VGRcSrpeMU1FqQLJuXNNMMvcJE22jGP0z3mkETYmVnKBkjOqphaDjt-iWvoh_tlGut7xnQ16uj1Sp8aMknX3GvNBEVVOvjVB91cze9riQ2t6jGV-AxtQc3_imUbZ-sNiG4XlvHfuCpnd6LVhXRVqeBGDfAdUY4BONo0sY7iDCuAAe3Spthq3bLYd6RK_Jt6Q8E1KjuiiiNJkNffrzUvNhmfX7bszBesrEZcpL9VmHPLWJr7IqHZrk-cvq5j0JgZR65_YIddxLgAWzA/4jz/U5OkZGIBSaiuJm6IC5a7Dw/h2/h001.NAaGL-EFqrmI4OSIDpK9fW36OLe1HRHHISEBI2Y_hXs)** Under Donald Trump, prices for groceries, gas, and rent are skyrocketing while billionaires laugh their way to the bank. As The Atlantic revealed, “Buy, Borrow, Die” isn’t a loophole anymore—it’s the billionaire business model. It’s unfair, it’s destructive, and working people are demanding action. With the midterm elections rapidly approaching, Congress has a choice: side with everyday Americans or keep letting billionaires rob the country blind. End the scam that erases taxable gains at death. Tax billionaires on their unrealized gains every year. Shut down the borrowing tricks that let the rich live tax-free. It’s common sense. **[Add your name and demand Congress pass legislation to kill “Buy, Borrow, Die” once and for all. Let’s prove that billionaires don’t run this country—we do.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.EtNV8HBC60Tl7UuGmXS3sYMMMCXQg6tLXTP6gYXpdfRK86UUFFOVapF-SyYktuHHRmjHyNWGEu-3KQCMnyr_OIREHR07Mpd9WRe8OSeyFwfSy_Ed4RmVJPIw9jtGZ5q-VVvQTniIPdKGcPvwszZY-aTVPW4fMqcAuHxIhtGhdBBjhPHBmDkMEGnakywB4EILT9zVhuH63ZwSjNCVA14apCSHc4PLwB3QrAt3d--l0FoulzG6en_2SfoYon2nQUIHLVCW3odDvc-vXY76ZhwhHwbOdbSMLXkB0KRkROOu8CD1b5TP2_6ek9WJUAX2TDkx5i_y2rfp6tXiJweEDV2HInAGvsC_JzolrsGieRpCzPpSd8tq4EcQYbqYaUPziLgDs0D6TuZAAfNneuB_pMLaWg/4jz/U5OkZGIBSaiuJm6IC5a7Dw/h3/h001.loXi1Nc45GETdcaGjJ0U0tnVyqNd8jiJCDmALVxY6PM)** Thanks for everything you do. Josh [**Tax the Billionaires**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.EtNV8HBC60Tl7UuGmXS3sYMMMCXQg6tLXTP6gYXpdfRK86UUFFOVapF-SyYktuHHRmjHyNWGEu-3KQCMnyr_OIREHR07Mpd9WRe8OSeyFwfSy_Ed4RmVJPIw9jtGZ5q-ykXxkncVlhBM1n9HyATgFxaqmFFJkGEIOjmrDQ2wvtlT4BySCrHgPs6UVqJu9AGONNY0xUNYpB0vQjj77y_Eu7f1p5zuzBJvLgYGSgkrvlZy-tBSAtWdihnBbVcQWVaAkNXibxhRWB1iizVNLNmnvb6cjUf711IxeVweNJ25vrM0Lrp0K3QdzxHDTH1IQgXkpEDYw_7aM-Zw520ZvsYnCjqp3gU3jkGXNAdEdnpM0EDqTXtT4UHjphLz6GroNU2_Zm__HyFdR6HzEQ4emtZ03g/4jz/U5OkZGIBSaiuJm6IC5a7Dw/h4/h001.74c3QlKQuyKSjG0zNHF_PJqYentOZ1smyxW3mnaUbng)

| | Sent via [ActionNetwork.org](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.vJH41MPG4bgUd6h6NGKFpj-Lrvy5aFcFyt94Rovp4kU/4jz/U5OkZGIBSaiuJm6IC5a7Dw/h5/h001.6ZrOyVmgIGmRdjTCAhziL8NA9dMKd8x-CDxRsO5IB7k). To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Democrats.com, please [click here](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-gP0Xd1LL-Lub7Gk22PHy99tg6drYfLd55TVlvw8lazVn9EaENHrfA43eX1guI2d2UnyOeG8JM_hZHI-lHshxJ6hi5GCU0BPEeWDg2FFsvp7ZRVajRTnyBNCabYwph39I7i9-Yeo5fNCVNJ4PtD8b2pFjx0NBV18WXiK_pkuIlx9Qk1VE9QfuCp9kqMfPqFXw/4jz/U5OkZGIBSaiuJm6IC5a7Dw/h6/h001._xpGFmtrpnD-_fFka6BlEwOYvi1uPl0GU-tt8PZLZSI).

**[A monthly recurring donation—whether it’s $5, $15, or $25—helps us tend to this campaign day after day.](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/s/c/xEFJwMgf_xHNPM_9EHOeaIuiTGk3axEGF7Lxhyv3ZacEcUtb2wbMQS5wCjUcAKoY8ywDhoOyx1sThLm0U97ryV77aq617NMK56MptZCtKghpskS0AlZbOdRhSGvS6TuEyKFBii7TI0oOx6LIBCaYNLxMzkq2zZ3OAB2xKEmaPzXysHcAu0CP0X2SwoRa2T4GuZkQfnudP85Ptm4ed3QpgFV5TvieecGFEhwfyRpYzIy_OqymJlGoZArmIbOWxpkZQNy4W-tT8WmeahHCNr1nXuEhVOeiXez6twNZNN3JEhWGiupnj_LmdCOoYvK1jMKBnze6MQ4i9EmyFUyEZtYo91H2_4DDgMoZHBpxmuaR7Yp9g7iKIDnIM0LOsHhjBvHnLjACv5Hu1kP82MT_I7U3G6T4M_t_aH5y1DgLzBnrGy9AkaA7OML2KR6XdRfhNtjkdUB68AVvt4Pm-Pr3_zwphT0q0t3Q2M851I2YX5vf_1k38_rI32KOh-MK46NFjVPfGIna51bbawPYdZ-g1fkCVBtt3ontgx8vPqvWWVnnBWhmK2SAE2-wUGCufp1bu90z7bpvWsBnNsZhmpt96rUla7qjBWT3niuGaiMGRiwVkEP-34dgmMiLMK6o8EnqrIVkqcYS2i9zZi1_Mv6NefJ4GW0_jan1H8BC53AA5wBcjJjKb7o/D-8QmdCyvXTGcM9eeQTZ0q8GpHjo6bje/12)**
When we can count on you, friend, a member of our top Team Burchett supporters, we can plan for the weeks and months ahead. It allows us to run ads, send more emails, and create more awesome merch—and the more we do all that, the more Tim can:

❌ Stand up to wasteful spending

**That’s why we’re asking you to consider becoming a monthly supporter of Team Burchett.**
This is the easiest way to make a world of difference for conservatives. Just like on the farm, steady work builds strong roots that bear fruit for generations.
[**Can we count on you to chip in a monthly gift today?**](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/s/c/Di9YuiUong4CininSiYhGSPCT7cqF5SLQEX_WLL-fZRrh7NGcxTHdrBTvpSJswrdFOWZsL49V5aL6A7WqyO3rOjk0tRXZaGPBgNXDzzlntc94Gw51fOIRBLnffonR-TLwCf5PsYD95ONLvNJs_SzaiYX7eCdQht_1qqi5EEyS014EhMsiNXQcq9FA4Aj_ElZw0mYCdB77HzO92tWbe-_91v0JECyoCgOYXY_6wE6ad0tjQNhzsttgOiY8kTHZHy4Yt7qXUgU6Pbo6FQwk8PA4JjJ8XjC5oa_iEWedeswuO7FT7Wb4GRm92FFSlIHnCPzIpijW1641YMlL-ZDFxEgFHp9QBRtfFDqyDvfrKMYJdnN626vzSAHrtdGSyLA0qqlOs4rHb_ZkM06uOFlt8b7MBBMICD4vpkvnWT-xr6Zq5A3YL9VPfjzlUY1cwek6nhvX8InM5W-Pc714WgcLiI_LXioAcYVog1tuI8MB16PZOy4Q73YkBGr1S6AeHqw-A_PvYUuLuzto8cwO_Zgve-nkaMIw-Vi717Qzh_pTqdE8hZ3dyazdk1KiEzXLAcPCPZgcuDuv-4M1NR_QkyCnwdXnyK0vir9oNouoalAS1luWbBJVHS4BIRAzZoQ1xFyqYqGxUEFWmMAsZ03PrRDFuZOi2ND9bA95m7-G0SagbEoXlTuL8Q/dAgBKOSxle6I9SAscq9I_zfLMmsNSe29/12)

name: Team Downing
subject: China is taking over the USA one farm at a time.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
It’s time to draw a line in the sand. Please read:

Peter,
Whether you want to admit it or not, the Chinese Communist Party is quietly taking over America one farm at a time.
China already owns land in **27 states** , including properties alarmingly close to U.S. military bases. **
* **Our ****farmers are being undercut.**
* **Our food supply is at risk.**
* **The CCP is expanding its footprint on American soil.**

** We’re not just facing a serious economic threat. This is a full-blown national security crisis.
**It’s time to draw the line.**
President Trump’s Cabinet, including Treasury Secretary Bessent, is working overtime to rein in the abuse China has inflicted on the United States for far too long. But that’s not enough.
We need grassroots support to stop this takeover. That means citizens like YOU stepping up and demanding real action to thwart China’s takeover efforts.

name: Deb Haaland
subject: I want your name on this wall
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=714%2E181023%2EfPGtID)
This is Deb Haaland with some exciting news:
**We have officially opened the doors to our campaign headquarters in Albuquerque!** This isn’t just a place to make phone calls or plan rallies — it’s where our movement will come together to build a better future for families across New Mexico.
[](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-haaland.c3PqNz&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250917_PM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=714%2E181023%2EfPGtID)
And right in the heart of our office is our **Grassroots Donor Wall** , a permanent reminder that our campaign is powered by people, _not_ billionaires and political insiders. I want your name on that wall!
**We’re going to be adding the names of _everyone_ who pitches in to this email to our donor wall, no matter how big or small your donation is.** [**Can I count on you to split a donation between my campaign and Jocelyn Benson today so we can put your name up there?**](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-haaland.c3PqNz&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250917_PM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=714%2E181023%2EfPGtID)
Every volunteer, visitor, and staff member will see it and know that you helped make this movement possible.
With Donald Trump and his billionaire allies already trying to buy this election, the fight ahead will be tough. But when supporters like you pitch in, we can build something they can’t match:**a people-powered campaign** that reaches every corner of New Mexico.
I’ve seen what we can accomplish when everyday people come together. So let’s get to it!
**[If you can, please split a contribution of $10 or any amount today between my campaign and Jocelyn so we can get your name on the Grassroots Donor Wall.](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-haaland.c3PqNz&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250917_PM1_V1_S1&amount=10&t=4&akid=714%2E181023%2EfPGtID)**
Be fierce,
Deb

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with supporters like you.
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-jbmi/?t=5&akid=714%2E181023%2EfPGtID)

PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR

23133 Woodward Ave, Number 116,
Ferndale, MI 48220

And right in the heart of our office is our Grassroots Donor Wall , a permanent reminder that our campaign is powered by people, not billionaires and political insiders. I want your name on that wall! We’re going to be adding the names of everyone who pitches in to this email to our donor wall, no matter how big or small your donation is. Every volunteer, visitor, and staff member will see it and know that you helped make this movement possible. With Donald Trump and his billionaire allies already trying to buy this election, the fight ahead will be tough. But when supporters like you pitch in, we can build something they can’t match:a people-powered campaign that reaches every corner of New Mexico. I’ve seen what we can accomplish when everyday people come together. So let’s get to it! Be fierce, Deb

**➤➤ BREAKING: Trump’s DOJ sues Maine and Oregon for refusing to hand over voter data** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115405740/570206607/-1876887045?refcode=em-9.17.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjRjZWU1MC1mNDkzLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AxPhAOg5bnjCLnS68kPfAYuVopBg7Mvri8yC_pXTfcg=)**
* * *
Friend, The Trump administration just launched lawsuits against Maine and Oregon, accusing them of “noncompliance” because their Secretaries of State refused to turn over full voter registration rolls, including private data. **Let us be clear: this is not normal. This is not business as usual. This is a full-blown authoritarian tactic to consolidate control and intimidate election officials.** Both Secretary Shenna Bellows (ME) and Secretary Tobias Read (OR) have stood firm in the face of Trump’s threats. They’ve upheld state law and protected the privacy of every voter in their state. And now they’re being dragged into court**for doing their job.** Shenna Bellows said it best: **“They really need to stay out of trying to interfere with our safe, free and secure elections.”** This is about revenge, control, and dismantling the independence of our elections state by state. **Trump’s DOJ will not stop with Maine and Oregon.** East or West, from corner to corner of this country, Trump and his administration will not stop. Other states will be next. And unless we push back immediately and forcefully, this authoritarian playbook becomes the norm. That’s why DASS is going all-in to support the leaders on the front lines. But legal fights like this are expensive, and time is critical. **[This is an URGENT development, friend. Will you rush a $3 or whatever you can to help DASS support Secretaries of State who refuse to back down, who defend voting rights in defiance of this suppression campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115405742/570206609/957523928?refcode=em-9.17.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjRjZWU1MC1mNDkzLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AxPhAOg5bnjCLnS68kPfAYuVopBg7Mvri8yC_pXTfcg=)** __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | | **[Chip in $5 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115405743/570206610/957523928?refcode=em-9.17.25-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjRjZWU1MC1mNDkzLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AxPhAOg5bnjCLnS68kPfAYuVopBg7Mvri8yC_pXTfcg=)**

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Go! Pack! Go! 🏈
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=4986%2E35263%2E1-1tpv)
No Wisconsinite should be forced to watch the Lions or Vikings play on Sundays — **yet through no fault of their own, that’s exactly what we’re up against.** It’s not just football either — 415,000 Wisconsinites have been assigned to an out-of-state media market, which means that they lack access to programming that’s relevant to their hometowns, like information about local and state government. That’s why I’ve introduced the _Go Pack Go Act,_ a bipartisan piece of legislation that would make sure that every Wisconsinite is able to cheer on the Packers on Sundays. **[Will you sign on to support the _Go Pack Go Act_ right now and stand with me in this work against big media corporations?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/go-pack-go?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250917_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=4986%2E35263%2E1-1tpv)** | | [SIGN ON](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/go-pack-go?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250917_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=4986%2E35263%2E1-1tpv)
---
Thank you, and GO! PACK! GO!
— Tammy 💚💛

name: Donald Trump, Jr.
subject: Charlie’s legacy must live on
body:
Let’s finish what Charlie started
His fire lit a movement. It's up to us to keep it burning.

| | | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=496dd243c6124957b77190db9520c2fa&_e=2zVdRObHo7mhu3kI8wd0nv9lcjCzLZ3h4ls_DKmq-XZxeLSp_fG3NhdAA6-69f1SkCAMyCTZ_TXkPBKKdjQxHW1FOUUh0WGcoaAnsv7kwTeMjV_Db4QpOCTW5RGTttlreQAcx_cEm3qXgDRDEHS_xqaEfb4WXpRp99CGSe6CsrpW9ab0Ft2upwKWHGnCQkPKr-n14hp7v3XtaP7B3_IOnOfbeA_xjTcIiWN9IR_E1CeM-lHq7Huj1fGfvY2N9e6h46ldoqc_CTAMxufDN9sKIPWcy0mNV5YV1r679ldA3HaCh7rouyAWOjEaA7eTnVbHixg5miCUGaghDVTcetRKZ5srf5Ewz4ZloTQanZAzG6_QPojgMEdKpDvPL9UyNOdIjtd8SAsW0BagB9teVAc8takIcU_uGfuauC9osuyHJ7rQRdvoZLsp3PXg9IYzkpw5qsZnJUp8LRevQ7hSKvOmi6UC5Ry33e4rcKuvolthG9UKxEg2fSl65NTdZshS7tFPrMzCKQPimm4IG7XCTurUNv2NG5BTsOWJ9eorMbb-T1FKFBSjauXnXt0dLYC1BCnv83iGf4QQ5WXsXclIZjgmbttSs77Wg-mlR3BPA41qYYK2HyYOfDz_ebQ6MfBA_lKtKGQNQ2WbwHwzY2U0qjOvCzlJruJigzgMdU1RbHPdV3VVduPlQ48N1RK3SL-GSUTcwgbCxkwVbGw15uDqLwgmgWNRNpjUhnJxeVjR6Jbr1Do%3D)
---
Peter, I don't even know how to begin to put into words the loss I am feeling... but this isn't about me. **Today, tomorrow, next week -- they're all about Charlie. ** Because Charlie was truly one of the best men I'll ever know. He changed the direction of this nation. He was a leader, a fighter, and a man whose character and conviction were rare. Too rare. He was an inspiration to millions around the world. **To me, Charlie was a little brother.** That honor I will carry with me forever.
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=496dd243c6124957b77190db9520c2fa&_e=2zVdRObHo7mhu3kI8wd0nv9lcjCzLZ3h4ls_DKmq-XZxeLSp_fG3NhdAA6-69f1SkCAMyCTZ_TXkPBKKdjQxHW1FOUUh0WGcoaAnsv7kwTeMjV_Db4QpOCTW5RGTttlreQAcx_cEm3qXgDRDEHS_xqaEfb4WXpRp99CGSe6CsrpW9ab0Ft2upwKWHGnCQkPKr-n14hp7v3XtaP7B3_IOnOfbeA_xjTcIiWN9IR_E1CeM-lHq7Huj1fGfvY2N9e6hqJn80-3tm2lYwWL1Sp_mqu3B0zrF7nmJ8nIIGwjwJL69yAzPgb66PrE6-yyyKAbAwo0Iq5hEVm8UQT7iJwAGdwQxQmrCgxQkWNWh2BJ-ra4lc1fsSeFLVf0ZFDknpHL06EvJr9vNjYXAuF6l1DyWikIgRziDqg3UQ93qCXh5VqG5bQjkOHC3Pru_b1ZEZZ7_MXqdN56NOHiJo2Siu_DFR6cgHmfrl3SN34zwgc3lKLpHNCmdJxa9Og0r2iAtN3MFjGdzgCYj3yllShZ3pltqOAMNxJR75IhOmD7MG7jtsi7mqJfgv6DJEUhouB2m7FtL4lJ6HqL5jwliZU1xdOS5JMZC3PTvw9Ifyn1kECp8ll7edC-SjF4gl4ipzH_qdL2COw-hBXSuV8nLpeepIGPkya_xwVXn5PRbUHRjJ5_bNcmb6TCkdwqzwIS9vXkK5_qJTSisJiXbzIbZQ3e3Uq9ndn_3JDhICwkf7hl5Zs2fQvc%3D)

I'm heartbroken knowing his death will leave a hole in the heart of our nation.... and an even larger one in my life. Charlie may no longer stand beside me -- to remind me to push on when things get tough._But his memory will.__And I 'll make sure it does for this country he loved so well._Charlie led a life of courage, strength, and conviction. **Now it 's time for me, for you, and for every patriot to stand up and fight for everything Charlie stood for. **He poured every ounce of energy he had into saving this nation -- and he did that through Turning Point USA.No one fought harder than Charlie. It was his mission in life to give people the courage to speak up -- and he did that. And none of us will ever be silenced again.He fought for you and all America. Now we must fight for him.**Peter, it 's on us to keep his life's work alive...** so it can continue to reach young people, change lives, and embolden the American people.**As his friend, I ask that you help me make certain that Charlie 's voice is never silenced, stopped, or forgotten.** That it's heard across the nation... in every church, in every school, and in every home for generations._Let 's make the world remember him._**[Peter, the only way to do that is to make Turning Point USA the biggest thing America has ever seen... because Charlie’s legacy doesn’t end here.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=496dd243c6124957b77190db9520c2fa&_e=2zVdRObHo7mhu3kI8wd0nv9lcjCzLZ3h4ls_DKmq-XZxeLSp_fG3NhdAA6-69f1SkCAMyCTZ_TXkPBKKdjQxHW1FOUUh0WGcoaAnsv7kwTeMjV_Db4QpOCTW5RGTttlreQAcx_cEm3qXgDRDEHS_xqaEfb4WXpRp99CGSe6CsrpW9ab0Ft2upwKWHGnCQkPKr-n14hp7v3XtaP7B3_IOnOfbeA_xjTcIiWN9IR_E1CeM-lHq7Huj1fGfvY2N9e6h5Y0jZ9jC5iDGG8VUYcHievAwH_HXC3ybiUFs1cbH5ETu4hbAvK2YMMHVIY7gT4a_drD4rEkzBQoBMvLRtYlRY9Q2YdIOoKzalaUmV8R6ZU7OT4RSSZp--xof58L9rKWY3BOQZhVozhoH4jiBKWm7nHMsaBJynlQMeZsKZZiIlYcfsclCPLpzaQJbj335gOsmAh-nxa2BI4eA7qW8JEhRwW7yO4XZ2mbZl3KW2K3uqZ5B8kahp7qd6Bl-oZWXpE7YYbSPB4-o7OKupz_JRe_a-e8tt0og3kAsJdmeaTxkp6LasDZUwOwGaVkR1bbhh-GlLp3eHAhy8qt2mYtcafAC_Q2ZR7bM3Cfca5fLah1cv5eXf2pmXy00SkdIXzyIusR7q15oatEm66pI22JvaJjkP7yUdoOqOTGxpZRIsgm-04ewy4vQcKaOB9dOakNltT7ENkYsU8SPWqMHzGnEIrlo6ROTuJpBVTiTkL2rBSwQtdY%3D)**

clean_body: Let’s finish what Charlie started His fire lit a movement. It's up to us to keep it burning. | | | Peter, I don't even know how to begin to put into words the loss I am feeling... but this isn't about me. Today, tomorrow, next week -- they're all about Charlie. Because Charlie was truly one of the best men I'll ever know. He changed the direction of this nation. He was a leader, a fighter, and a man whose character and conviction were rare. Too rare. He was an inspiration to millions around the world. To me, Charlie was a little brother. That honor I will carry with me forever. I'm heartbroken knowing his death will leave a hole in the heart of our nation.... and an even larger one in my life. Charlie may no longer stand beside me -- to remind me to push on when things get tough.But his memory will.And I 'll make sure it does for this country he loved so well.Charlie led a life of courage, strength, and conviction. Now it 's time for me, for you, and for every patriot to stand up and fight for everything Charlie stood for. He poured every ounce of energy he had into saving this nation -- and he did that through Turning Point USA.No one fought harder than Charlie. It was his mission in life to give people the courage to speak up -- and he did that. And none of us will ever be silenced again.He fought for you and all America. Now we must fight for him.Peter, it 's on us to keep his life's work alive... so it can continue to reach young people, change lives, and embolden the American people.As his friend, I ask that you help me make certain that Charlie 's voice is never silenced, stopped, or forgotten. That it's heard across the nation... in every church, in every school, and in every home for generations.Let 's make the world remember him. Charlie, we'll keep fighting the good fight. We'll carry forward the torch you lit... and we'll make sure it shines brighter than ever.For you, we 'll save our great country.Rest in peace, brother.For Charlie, Don Jr. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

Hi — Clean water shouldn’t be a luxury.
But in Trump’s 2026 budget, the GOP has proposed cutting $8 million from the National Estuary Program — including critical funding for clean water initiatives right here in New York.
These programs protect our drinking water, preserve coastal habitats and safeguard communities from pollution. Slashing their funding would leave Long Island and countless other communities more vulnerable to contamination and environmental damage.
That’s why we’re launching a new petition to give folks like you a platform to speak out.
[**_Our goal is 25,000 signatures in the next 72 hours to show overwhelming public support for protecting clean water and rejecting Trump’s reckless planned cuts. Will you add your name today?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115405907/570207265/719908094?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2025.09.17_Protect-Clean-Water_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjI1N2ViOS1mNTkzLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yK91dmJXrLfwfDimU5lreeKz8UldK2SzC8XtGzAdQCM=&emci=24085361-1490-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=36257eb9-f593-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=7659029)

Trump and his team making blanket cuts to programs isn’t just a mistake. It’s dangerous.
Every single signature matters. Every single voice helps show that Americans won’t stand by while corporate polluters and budget slashers put profits ahead of people.
We cannot let the Trump administration gamble with our health, our environment and our future. Together, we can send a powerful message: clean water is not negotiable.

name: Justin Riemer - RITE President
subject: RITE PAC Victorious in Supporting Clean and Accurate Voter Rolls in Florida
body:
Federal court dismisses lawsuit brought by progressive activists |
---
| |
---
| | **RITE PAC VICTORIOUS IN SUPPORTING CLEAN AND ACCURATE VOTER ROLLS IN FLORIDA**
**Orlando, FL** — Restoring Integrity and Trust in Elections PAC (“RITE PAC”), an organization dedicated to protecting election integrity, secured a major legal victory when a Florida federal district court [dismissed](https://riteusa.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc5917dfc5aa19cc3795efbb2&id=0908ae7cca&e=ea91f782ea) a lawsuit brought by progressive activist groups seeking to upend Florida’s voter registration verification procedures.

RITE PAC supported the intervention of the Republican Party of Florida, which entered the case to defend the integrity of the state’s voter registration system. The lawsuit attempted to challenge Florida’s longstanding and commonsense practice of verifying identifying information applicants provide when registering to vote by checking it against against government records to ensure accuracy and eligibility and prevent duplicate registrations.

“Florida’s registration safeguards are essential to ensuring that only those eligible are added to the voter rolls,” said RITE PAC President Justin Riemer. “This is just one of many of RITE’s ongoing initiatives to support robust registration verification procedures.”

The court found the plaintiffs’ complaint so deficient it constituted a “shotgun pleading,” failing to explain how any specific defendant violated the law. It also noted the plaintiffs’ failure to name 63 out of 67 county supervisors of elections, despite seeking statewide relief.

“This was an unserious lawsuit, but it targeted a very serious issue,” Riemer continued. “We’re proud to stand with the RPOF in defending Florida’s right to maintain secure and accurate voter rolls.”

RITE and RITE PAC continue to support litigation efforts around the country to protect clean voter rolls, including in [Pennsylvania](https://riteusa.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc5917dfc5aa19cc3795efbb2&id=836abf1f74&e=ea91f782ea) where RITE has a pending lawsuit against the state for its directive that restricts local election officials from performing the same checks that Florida was sued for here. ###

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Ilhan and I won’t let them silence us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Racist attacks on elected women of color. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWPspv_u11QQy__YCyRGa1TPHn2gqBHRUNxGPkuNmoNVqTscU6X5z7gC7nhrxeC8Pbck4hnSC4E8ELdxaTQtTo2VZBVYPY0OG8YBdNk6_BVHm3YTzFCO3uEJpvuhF83dOZRANiRMAgInVZRcWkwIgdTTjYexjwez07-A7qT9MOPkk/4jz/XT1Q8xPbREuwFd-6z-zp7g/h0/h001.jZym3TIHMLIuBo6C4hDkG5MsGwRyyIcaHyQdZ7nTXUc)

Friend, Last week, Republicans introduced a censure resolution against me for demanding our government stop enabling war crimes. **This week, they’ve introduced a censure resolution against my sister-in-service Ilhan Omar, along with a resolution seeking to kick her off of her committees—all because she spoke out against white supremacy.** Republicans don’t bat an eye when their fascist President sends troops into Black-led cities or sends masked federal agents to snatch immigrants off our streets. They’re happy to rip healthcare and food away from vulnerable people, attack our trans neighbors, and continue to send weapons of war to Israel for the genocide against the Palestinian people. **But, when women of color speak up about racism and call out violence against marginalized people, they police our words and attempt to censure us.** [**Let’s have Ilhan’s back! Click here to split a donation between our campaigns today and keep us in Congress fighting for you.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJoYLO7imVk-0eAE_R-0L9oSe9-xZil10GMCFGeLfp9Dq5_aNDAL4BXhoJmxWbWgY7xCJnoC4IyeLdho9jgwjnXkkmYbRYCPHFzvMs8nCS1Fel6etmDoaYr3wK_tnzZiX_xcDqJEK7wavItMDvtEJAZOWC-b66GR4plD84pSkr3qrGwDGD41hChUJcXhycxrEHsVWOXzjQHbzFRM6zrDbOX_lAW4YZTkE3DEmkrA7iJZMr6frfcT4ZCbKF5CNzPVtfA9UcxEOPBxWTNqAx-e_b6hqFmSFPQQFE76l9lDN9SBmxz5MZNHhfQ-ee3SHgiyJM/4jz/XT1Q8xPbREuwFd-6z-zp7g/h1/h001.-cOZR-PyF8HprkNXSkJ1T-KMo7EyPDP0S07jgvttpco) | [SPLIT A DONATION](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJoYLO7imVk-0eAE_R-0L9oacCeNE2haNSJ2AwXYK4x06N-YkCSUF0LOwNIZj-vH2Ud_ISbFz3_x9duJNm4VCwI8akZNRLZ_5bSIls7N1t6515j8aYMvQoG5NxUoGqw9lzXOkNaSBRdGHPbSceKzF-YQEtJo4qK6guK8finVUo3J0aWPzq7tHqr5sjUEw364jG_nqACGoPnXhQllwNFVeNyfuFRLwF0UphWsHdoQJZH_M8pgbc6APTy_IP62u4lcBbnNfyLnQNkSfpxC2JAy3TEpVybEMICDnOo-nChlzI-bkQaOZ9WTMSpQurPCiZvMcB/4jz/XT1Q8xPbREuwFd-6z-zp7g/h2/h001.SefAx8NZMkdcdZYR-UWXI6aoX4T8LqKYb5XxQCxddyA)

The far-right are increasing their attacks against Democrats and our base. This week we’ve seen an uptick in hateful calls to our campaign office.
GOP rhetoric fuels racism, misogyny, transphobia, and other kinds of hate—which leads to violence against our communities. Their racist attacks on elected women of color endanger not only those of us in public office but also the people who share our identities or are otherwise marginalized.
**We won’t stop standing up for our communities in the face of hateful attacks.**
[**Have Ilhan’s back and split a donation today between our campaigns to show the haters that we’re here to stay!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJoYLO7imVk-0eAE_R-0L9oZVlMQAPxvyiIORDn-2RrdnGH1uS8LqhveYTPI7eUjFewWkYoWhgPwnktexJafP6qmHXXMdFQJ_7WmkUnhoTNTGY6Y-Tj3Xt94Dg9fEe80KOMDftK3fW6kQ66RYi6mJi_eO4Li0BWfUgHJQ2wihC8Z9QAx613RxzDgz-P8FXmV9ILF3BbK8SIi2VKMwIx1Tuz1pv9T7ryczMtYiWkVdj7nXyYDoqGARtjtCaMqvbWw9sYfEqTI7yZdytgYSGMpwGIwYOm5T0m8sAbDQrDYLQrbr4SRczZwvQtTuae4GS0eU4/4jz/XT1Q8xPbREuwFd-6z-zp7g/h3/h001.iRDuwdQB0ZV9u5t7AqFYxEdyUA6r3pyW6iGtC1s4fTQ)

clean_body: Racist attacks on elected women of color. | | | Friend, Last week, Republicans introduced a censure resolution against me for demanding our government stop enabling war crimes. This week, they’ve introduced a censure resolution against my sister-in-service Ilhan Omar, along with a resolution seeking to kick her off of her committees—all because she spoke out against white supremacy. Republicans don’t bat an eye when their fascist President sends troops into Black-led cities or sends masked federal agents to snatch immigrants off our streets. They’re happy to rip healthcare and food away from vulnerable people, attack our trans neighbors, and continue to send weapons of war to Israel for the genocide against the Palestinian people. But, when women of color speak up about racism and call out violence against marginalized people, they police our words and attempt to censure us. | The far-right are increasing their attacks against Democrats and our base. This week we’ve seen an uptick in hateful calls to our campaign office. GOP rhetoric fuels racism, misogyny, transphobia, and other kinds of hate—which leads to violence against our communities. Their racist attacks on elected women of color endanger not only those of us in public office but also the people who share our identities or are otherwise marginalized. We won’t stop standing up for our communities in the face of hateful attacks. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between Rashida Tlaib and Ilhan Omar | | | | | | | | | Together, we’ll keep fighting for vulnerable communities and building the society we deserve, with equity and dignity for all. In solidarity, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . name: JamesTalarico.com
subject: If everyone reading this pitched in even $10, we’d be on track to build the largest grassroots campaign in Texas history.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
We know this isn’t the first time we’ve asked since James launched his campaign for the U.S. Senate in Texas — but we hope you’ll hear us out.

Taking back Texas from the billionaire mega-donors is going to require an enormous grassroots effort. And James is committed to doing it the right way. This will be a campaign powered by people — not a dime from corporate PACs.
James knows that the status quo is broken. The powerful few profit at our expense, and he refuses to take money from those at the top that are desperate to keep the system rigged against working people.

If everyone reading this pitched in even $10, we’d be on track to build the largest grassroots campaign in Texas history. We’d be well on our way to taking back Texas and taking back the Senate majority.

The most common donations to our campaign are $10 and $25. Many folks give less. Some give more. But it’s the action that counts. Together, we are a threat to the billionaire mega-donors and puppet politicians who have taken over our state and our country.

[**If taking back Texas and electing a leader who always puts people first seems worth $10 to you, we’re sincerely asking you to give today.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em250917-ak&t=1&akid=45%2E1347274%2EAgRS_V)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._
| | **[Donate $10](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/676?c0=jt-em-launch.qIrTcy&refcode=em250917-ak&t=2&akid=45%2E1347274%2EAgRS_V)**
---
****
| **[Donate Other](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em250917-ak&t=3&akid=45%2E1347274%2EAgRS_V)**
---
****

Thanks for being with us.
Team Talarico

Paid for by Talarico for Texas
Talarico for Texas
PO Box 14508
Austin, TX 78761

name: Congressman Al Green, TX-09
subject: They want me to stop talking
body:
https://www.fox7austin.com/news/texas-senate-congressional-maps-greg-abbott-redistricting [https://www.fox7austin.com/news/texas-senate-congressional-maps-greg-abbott-redistricting]
Friends, it's Congressman Al Green.
My commitment is simple: to fight for justice for all people, whether they are in Houston's Third Ward or in Gaza.
This commitment has put a target on my back. Now, the redistricting fight and the 2026 election cycle are merging into one critical battle.
Losing this seat means one less voice for peace, one less vote for human rights. We must build our movement wall strong, starting today.
Please, make a contribution to help me continue serving you and fighting for justice for all. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/925txftbackemtx]
Let's Keep Fighting [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/925txftbackemtx]

In the fight,
Congressman Al Green

subject: Welcome to the team, Peter!

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115407330/570212213/1117401451?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_KMC_EG_WEL_PET_NTL_2025_SR1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjM2NDZiNi1mODkzLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eWFPeY6OOGKx-H581Y6GbLem6K_yHSElYs5XUdvRzSE=)
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115407339/570212231/371871054?contactdata=Jf2F2t9CsnagFu4egQCdHJSBtIpWojLzj94BV2DXc2VyBsmmabTTDN5BCGrBBKFqfjxvzXf29c11DkIvnqz0v3p99rSQIGdNuP1WAro9EbcUYzZJtWWz+yAMNqnEB5xFMvOrx7Vg2ozZkfOKoi2FyQWc3l7fJ4RIYDOs83P4k18=&refcode=AU_KMC_EG_WEL_PET_NTL_2025_SR1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjM2NDZiNi1mODkzLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eWFPeY6OOGKx-H581Y6GbLem6K_yHSElYs5XUdvRzSE=&emci=04cb97a6-ff98-ee11-8925-002248223cbb&emdi=963646b6-f893-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=33198651) **Hi there, and welcome to the team, Peter!** My name is Katherine Clark, and I proudly represent Massachusetts’ 5th district in Congress. I also serve in House leadership as the Democratic Whip — the second most senior position in the House Democratic Caucus. When I first came to Congress in 2013, there weren’t many women serving alongside me. More than once, I was stopped and mistaken for someone’s spouse, and told I wasn’t allowed on the House floor. Thankfully, the halls of Congress look very different now. **There are more women serving in Congress than ever before — 94 women in the House Democratic Caucus alone!** But I’m still only the second woman ever to be elected to one of the top leadership positions in the House of Representatives. As the highest ranking woman in Congress, I am passionate about helping elect more women to Congress, because representation matters — and for too long, women have been left out and left behind. These days, with MAGA extremists pushing their agenda, a lot of women are feeling more anxious than ever. They're asking real questions every day: _Can I afford the health care my family needs? How am I supposed to keep up with the rising prices of rent, gas, and groceries? And where can I even find affordable child care?_ **As Donald Trump and MAGA extremists in Congress threaten to take us back even further, the stakes of our work couldn’t be higher.** [**That’s why I’m writing to you today, Peter. If you’re committed to fighting alongside me, please add your name below:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115407348/570212244/371871054?contactdata=Jf2F2t9CsnagFu4egQCdHJSBtIpWojLzj94BV2DXc2VyBsmmabTTDN5BCGrBBKFqfjxvzXf29c11DkIvnqz0v3p99rSQIGdNuP1WAro9EbcUYzZJtWWz+yAMNqnEB5xFMvOrx7Vg2ozZkfOKoi2FyQWc3l7fJ4RIYDOs83P4k18=&refcode=AU_KMC_EG_WEL_PET_NTL_2025_SR1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjM2NDZiNi1mODkzLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eWFPeY6OOGKx-H581Y6GbLem6K_yHSElYs5XUdvRzSE=&emci=04cb97a6-ff98-ee11-8925-002248223cbb&emdi=963646b6-f893-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=33198651) | [ADD MY NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115407354/570212259/371871054?contactdata=Jf2F2t9CsnagFu4egQCdHJSBtIpWojLzj94BV2DXc2VyBsmmabTTDN5BCGrBBKFqfjxvzXf29c11DkIvnqz0v3p99rSQIGdNuP1WAro9EbcUYzZJtWWz+yAMNqnEB5xFMvOrx7Vg2ozZkfOKoi2FyQWc3l7fJ4RIYDOs83P4k18=&refcode=AU_KMC_EG_WEL_PET_NTL_2025_SR1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjM2NDZiNi1mODkzLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eWFPeY6OOGKx-H581Y6GbLem6K_yHSElYs5XUdvRzSE=&emci=04cb97a6-ff98-ee11-8925-002248223cbb&emdi=963646b6-f893-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=33198651)
---
There is so much on the line, and as the Democratic Whip, I’m responsible for helping Democrats take back control of the House. While Republicans strip away money for health care, food, and schools, they are hoping the American people forget who is responsible. I’m committed to making sure voters in every corner of the country know and remember that it was Republicans who sold them out in favor of tax breaks for billionaires.
**Right now, our families are under attack. Taking back the House majority isn’t an option — it’s a necessary step toward protecting our freedoms and building the kind of country and future our kids deserve.**
[**We’re so much stronger when we work together, and I’m counting on you to join me in the fight. Add your name and help us fulfill the country’s promise of giving everyone a fair shot.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115407359/570212266/371871054?contactdata=Jf2F2t9CsnagFu4egQCdHJSBtIpWojLzj94BV2DXc2VyBsmmabTTDN5BCGrBBKFqfjxvzXf29c11DkIvnqz0v3p99rSQIGdNuP1WAro9EbcUYzZJtWWz+yAMNqnEB5xFMvOrx7Vg2ozZkfOKoi2FyQWc3l7fJ4RIYDOs83P4k18=&refcode=AU_KMC_EG_WEL_PET_NTL_2025_SR1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjM2NDZiNi1mODkzLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eWFPeY6OOGKx-H581Y6GbLem6K_yHSElYs5XUdvRzSE=&emci=04cb97a6-ff98-ee11-8925-002248223cbb&emdi=963646b6-f893-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=33198651)
[ADD MY NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115407362/570212296/371871054?contactdata=Jf2F2t9CsnagFu4egQCdHJSBtIpWojLzj94BV2DXc2VyBsmmabTTDN5BCGrBBKFqfjxvzXf29c11DkIvnqz0v3p99rSQIGdNuP1WAro9EbcUYzZJtWWz+yAMNqnEB5xFMvOrx7Vg2ozZkfOKoi2FyQWc3l7fJ4RIYDOs83P4k18=&refcode=AU_KMC_EG_WEL_PET_NTL_2025_SR1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjM2NDZiNi1mODkzLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eWFPeY6OOGKx-H581Y6GbLem6K_yHSElYs5XUdvRzSE=&emci=04cb97a6-ff98-ee11-8925-002248223cbb&emdi=963646b6-f893-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=33198651)
---
I’ll keep you posted on our work, so please make sure to add me to your contacts list, and I’ll be in touch soon.
All my best,
— Katherine
Katherine Clark for Congress
P.O. Box 159
Belmont, MA 02478
United States **[katherineclark.org](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115407371/570212302/567842951?refcode=AU_KMC_EG_WEL_PET_NTL_2025_SR1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjM2NDZiNi1mODkzLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eWFPeY6OOGKx-H581Y6GbLem6K_yHSElYs5XUdvRzSE=&emci=04cb97a6-ff98-ee11-8925-002248223cbb&emdi=963646b6-f893-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=33198651) | [info@katherineclark.org](mailto:info@katherineclark.org)** | Paid for by Katherine Clark for Congress
---
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please [unsubscribe.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/ThB1e8zKFU2akGfCVrfhmQ2?unsubscribedata=hrUAN3DnZzp7%2FlIWrbiOSuJlPIJuffFsZCuD4k9%2BIZHXWFPtbyyyz8f%2FA1PudbIP5o0YHSLyr7uTvxejnd6CHHGBojihvlpPcRE8PfEghqwIo3M0eDKp33D4i68uzSzIYzEPdjqL3YXEAKpqZwCGpar6ACtnTM%2BQvj1VreSNsHBi8%2BJHNoZDeNlDzYlZFwy9Svt5b%2Fd%2F%2BAIGaLeKRtjgSn8bfcuucz4SR1knAjlqFrNbbHH31v5iCa4X6bFKGMYPqjzSYJoHgQ1xt9mDEsyIaTMV%2FsXIbcocVcfyLUS0T8Zml9j3cXZTdYAxrDjs%2BiLBmSQtmh5PxmYDHc5hsGRg%2BUMtQGlk4uFMT7oBKEt%2Fjvxo1K4ijzLa%2FEPD0mR4alqQUjE9I2hTXySELGtwr8P%2F23x8GCWK8BjvQH4PjOfAQtd%2FaOE54oCku3YVkPdg1WCb)

name: Tim Walz
subject: This is why I’m running for reelection, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
I’m officially running for reelection as Governor of Minnesota.
#

Hey, it’s Ruben. The most important thing we can do right now is win elections. I’m sending over an email from Tim Walz, and I’d appreciate you taking a look and chipping in if you can.
---
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-twalz-split.E7Y6sy&refcode=em250917-1-30&refcode2=3972.734936.Rw3NAa&t=1&akid=3972%2E734936%2ERw3NAa)
---
Peter, I wanted to reach out personally to share this news with you:
**I’m officially running for reelection as Governor of Minnesota, because our work to make our state the best place in America to live, work, and raise a family isn’t finished.**
[**If you’re with me, can I count on you to split a donation between my campaign and Ruben Gallego today? Knowing I have your early support in this race would mean the world to me.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-twalz-split.E7Y6sy&refcode=em250917-1-30&t=2&akid=3972%2E734936%2ERw3NAa)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your split contribution to Ruben Gallego and Tim Walz instantly._
| | **[Donate $5](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1061?c0=ruben-em-twalz-split.WegUHw&refcode=em250917-1-30&t=21&akid=3972%2E734936%2ERw3NAa)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1046?c0=ruben-em-twalz-split.F-wYMl&refcode=em250917-1-30&t=22&akid=3972%2E734936%2ERw3NAa)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1039?c0=ruben-em-twalz-split.y97AkQ&refcode=em250917-1-30&t=23&akid=3972%2E734936%2ERw3NAa)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1040?c0=ruben-em-twalz-split.w90LXw&refcode=em250917-1-30&t=24&akid=3972%2E734936%2ERw3NAa)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1041?c0=ruben-em-twalz-split.pIzsgr&refcode=em250917-1-30&t=25&akid=3972%2E734936%2ERw3NAa)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-twalz-split.22N3dM&refcode=em250917-1-30&t=26&akid=3972%2E734936%2ERw3NAa)**
---
****
I grew up in Butte, Nebraska – a town of 400 people. There were 24 kids in my high school class. Living in a small town, you learn early on what it means to look out for your neighbors and to serve others.
That call to service is what led me to enlist in the Army National Guard just two days after my 17th birthday. I was proud to wear the uniform of this country for the next 24 years.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-twalz-split.E7Y6sy&refcode=em250917-1-30&t=27&akid=3972%2E734936%2ERw3NAa)
My drive to serve others eventually set me on a new path: teaching. My wife Gwen and I met while teaching high school. Kids carry their whole lives with them into the classroom and Gwen and I got to know our students and see the obstacles they faced. **It was my experience as a teacher and my passion for education that led me to run for governor.**
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-twalz-split.E7Y6sy&refcode=em250917-1-30&t=28&akid=3972%2E734936%2ERw3NAa)
Serving as Governor of Minnesota has been the honor of my life, and I couldn’t be prouder of the progress we’ve won. From providing universal free school meals for students, to protecting reproductive freedom, and cutting taxes for the middle class, we’ve secured tangible results that Minnesotans can actually feel.
The values that inspired me to serve our country in uniform, become an educator, and run for governor are the same ones I still carry with me each day as I work for the people of Minnesota. I still believe in helping our neighbors, protecting our freedoms, and investing in the future for our next generation. And I believe that, despite Donald Trump and MAGA’s attempts to tear us apart, we are still all in this together.
**Right now, we have an opportunity to continue delivering progress for Minnesotans – but only if we hold onto this Governor seat.** That’s why I’m asking you to have my back today, Peter.
[**Would you split a donation between my campaign and Ruben Gallego? Thank you in advance for your support.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-twalz-split.E7Y6sy&refcode=em250917-1-30&t=29&akid=3972%2E734936%2ERw3NAa)
[DONATE](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-twalz-split.E7Y6sy&refcode=em250917-1-30&t=30&akid=3972%2E734936%2ERw3NAa)
I’ll be in touch soon,
Tim Walz

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts. If you'd like to receive only the most important emails going forward, [tell us at this link](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/fewer_emails/?source=fewer-emails&t=31&akid=3972%2E734936%2ERw3NAa). Or, if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=32&akid=3972%2E734936%2ERw3NAa). If you would like to support Ruben's campaign for Senate, please consider [making a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruben-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=33&refcode2=3972_734936_Rw3NAa&akid=3972%2E734936%2ERw3NAa)

name: Adam
subject: Keep Charlie Kirk’s vision alive
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
As a former Navy SEAL, this isn’t the first battlefield death that I’ve seen - but it may be the most poignant | [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=875b6658106b4edfba14f9b32f0d9ee5&_e=Et_CPQZ6vcHoZlObj3FfT8pFqAb-Yr6deCP4GEXmAQg43MNIsVmHE9Uq3yJqdmv0ldazpEro4haii530gvKZAVspkeit5z85-TMdVpOwpzWmk8jTvWSwjiV6HPmeobE1iGvyiFS5V4c38n4vD4hW6epFSy6FY8fPJ7j42RonnHT4tOCXOHZH8Ej6uD7pcXBc5_lM0n7mutQ2gdQEqPdnWrZDfWh3SE0sA5c9stOFvZQo8euAd3Ro2lGDkdeYJVCZPfyTExaLtAOTyoezQg7XnzXpzAd0bofvp51VYMixr1ylkjucMNsjvLAaWfeq4i-Wn_SWQ3hBDkE70bqKDEfhe4lc7khDEWuWNrEmpcjBN60XJIAFR5ef_KyMW3ZSzjN1OU4ig6HXhxzq1psy2-TFGQjxwrHcyobsKJxfJJRs60XdL_PN9MHcBxXi5fzKGuUWS7RwOUXPCZu1MQFRqdzZ-l-xrIpJm7sGsnuxv-RCK9_MS_zb-nAVd9aqJisS7rgE3gihe7O83LCp93E6cBX0yblzO4_GINMH1zPFPQoRg44K_HQ3U9YYiYCDU4twmsCwjK2SlTX2z5kBZz1KtwAxj0_4d3S5R3ObghR0Yz-1B7DLhqlRsJST8fwg0EwUXnSB8r_LaxckaaCWHRrazpLTSCZxauTpxpSPGPLM_WNmaLyUJkWw_t51FI47PEOxrBOz8F0XpUZrpXOOTe4aIclvm0sidLhfnItW244NF50zUwZkPqFl7bcM9zQGtgKMIOOgfnAYbpZ7NhCRbGW7-L4tnfzHfOcEuV2ypXcXny2qI9I%3D)

---

Fellow Conservative,

The nation mourns the tragic assassination of Charlie Kirk, gunned down on September 10, 2025, at Utah Valley University for daring to speak truth to power. His fearless voice—championing freedom, faith, and the American Dream—was silenced in a brazen act of political violence that has shaken us all to our core. Charlie fought hate with educated debate, not guns, using sharp wit and unyielding principle to challenge radical agendas. **Yet, he was punished with a bullet for his courage to speak.**

My name is Adam Schwarze. **I’m a former Navy SEAL running for the United States Senate in Minnesota, and Charlie Kirk is an inspiration to me.** Over the course of my career, I’ve met some very special men and women willing to put their lives on the line for God and country in some of the most inhospitable places imaginable.

**_I never had the pleasure of meeting Charlier Kirk, but as a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran, I can say with authority that he has to be one of the bravest individuals ever to champion the values of the United States of America._**

Charlie’s candor, professionalism, and respect for everyone he encountered will stick with me as I work to earn the support of every Minnesotan voter during this campaign. **Charlie’s life should serve as an example to my opponents on the other side of the aisle on how to treat political opponents and people who share different viewpoints, with respect.**

I joined the Marine Corps after 9/11, served in over 70 countries, and fought chaos and extremism. I know what it takes to serve something bigger than yourself—just like Charlie did with every debate, every speech, every stand he took. This Senate race is my most challenging mission yet. Minnesota hasn’t gone red since 1976. I’m the underdog. _**[But with your support, we can honor Charlie’s legacy by stopping the radicals who enabled this tragedy](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=875b6658106b4edfba14f9b32f0d9ee5&_e=Et_CPQZ6vcHoZlObj3FfT8pFqAb-Yr6deCP4GEXmAQg43MNIsVmHE9Uq3yJqdmv0ldazpEro4haii530gvKZAVspkeit5z85-TMdVpOwpzWmk8jTvWSwjiV6HPmeobE1iGvyiFS5V4c38n4vD4hW6epFSy6FY8fPJ7j42RonnHT4tOCXOHZH8Ej6uD7pcXBc5_lM0n7mutQ2gdQEqPdnWrZDfWh3SE0sA5c9stOFvZQo8euAd3Ro2lGDkdeYJVCZPfyTExaLtAOTyoezQg7XnzXpzAd0bofvp51VYMixr1wcwNF4XztAOeFYh6Eh3sOvqs3pQasMrfINYNqrbkTqlKxh25UbFQ_tkauf9ptu3iqNZLa8VZ5dWZZOqEBRTPS8Hr4ZF4rBx0ab8gb9RU5F2LCr5gOcXzDK1FRAQI-Ev7K_ajF1D8U6uD_aM0LzqZl3WfybfePsXwjsd1rMP7XRb89XoJie4_CaS4e_zQJy4avswmMQo4ZoO84uKI8Cw5if582dfrn8_m34NNP-F2d2O1cJ24ssJ3Qs9Uc4vJIW6Zw3BX3wGpsKcmH_FlxX82P6GqEErteO34T4RCdW7Yn7_P6bDejlSay1HtfUMr2vNUvqtNtfQMIZGVWRmBoArMpPzowxnb4tQ7ysgSOAh2aq-zA5FLg6qJ1t1U30j8fFQocJkEU9ZzPGCqBNcFVHjbwwipcy2BwiLPBL8QBJN_0LrYniyZ5ysA4Vx006i7zwxnYKRouresmOHIwGEoi6h-ugxGjejKU7dh013jsWToErbZCyq6_nraXJltw6oHelBS4%3D)**_.

Unfortunately, I’m running against Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, who, like her boss, shares a long history of inflammatory rhetoric.

Days before Charlie’s untimely death, Tim Walz, speaking in front of constituents at a political rally, lamented that President Trump hadn’t yet died, making his scripted condolences for Charlie’s family ring all the more hollow as he _**failed to disavow the extremists celebrating this tragedy online.**_

_**I thank God that President Trump defeated Kamala Harris last November.**_****

**Can you imagine a vice president with so little moral clarity that he would tolerate the hatred that led to Charlie’s murder?** **
**
I can’t.

Tim Walz and my opponent in this Senate race personify everything Charlie Kirk stood against: **arrogance, deceit, and a progressive agenda that sees conservatives not as opponents, but as enemies to be crushed.** Their party’s years of demonizing voices like Charlie’s set the stage for this violence. Their silence on the specifics of this tragedy speaks louder than their words.

They both push to disarm law-abiding Minnesotans while radicals run rampant. They both pander with land acknowledgments, dividing us further. They both view Republicans as threats to be eliminated, just as Charlie was targeted for his beliefs. **The woman in the photo below is my opponent, by the way.**

**If they get their way, they’ll impose their warped vision on America, silencing patriots like Charlie Kirk forever—patriots who countered lies with reason, not violence.**

This fight isn’t just about Walz or Peggy Flanagan — it’s about the future Charlie Kirk died for. It’s about you, me, and everyone who believes in our nation’s founding values. They think we’re “buffoons.” **They think we’ll stay silent. They think we’ll let Charlie’s murder fade.**

When elected to the United States Senate, I promise I won’t stay silent; I won’t let his memory or work fade into the history books. **[I would be honored if you would consider a small gift of $5 or even $10 right now to help me take my fight to the far-left and ensure that we’re able to complete this mission - for Charlie, for our children, and for the good of the entire nation](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=875b6658106b4edfba14f9b32f0d9ee5&_e=Et_CPQZ6vcHoZlObj3FfT8pFqAb-Yr6deCP4GEXmAQg43MNIsVmHE9Uq3yJqdmv0ldazpEro4haii530gvKZAVspkeit5z85-TMdVpOwpzWmk8jTvWSwjiV6HPmeobE1iGvyiFS5V4c38n4vD4hW6epFSy6FY8fPJ7j42RonnHT4tOCXOHZH8Ej6uD7pcXBc5_lM0n7mutQ2gdQEqPdnWrZDfWh3SE0sA5c9stOFvZQo8euAd3Ro2lGDkdeYJVCZPfyTExaLtAOTyoezQg7XnzXpzAd0bofvp51VYMixr1zv9vu-Q3cC42bQhaMOmCZkuTdzOuXjKOdRNhSzNEr133gz_r98aiPn4BEwC6Ni7jh4m6lBYbqSsPpKyd_shrbUbln0Cp3robW3xEMzu4N11MVuZGrHWRJlKkePjl-ruhv05Q4PZrkJ8GIdhAenorZSEN6tMI7aPNh4etXubkVLWgpXOfwrMxjVUixb4JfYshZSvstfLKzAnyxn2qZEPJPeiwNhc3HBfTLgMMC6dd7TzU__FNm-EiZqp5WOhO8b_l164wyxrvnAKR9khOiyIyen4wKmnEh8KRh3zEa2lH1Rde7l6uGZg5RCqiWmVvPl0-Odsz9wJCHd1QpdF_C5V8vK_DHmT8FjmcAgy3AKK0r-72FbB6rVNSVMEyFvoAvl6mDZeE3h_Q4dthKFdlV06PFSC3QIQr8aD5ZdqfuAzO_e5efaEc6JqHkvC8SpiQdnX1uG5dalyKiw7OZzxmb3Mm2D2YUy7xpvix33kOgs8W8xKCBkXzVtCBTB-sXv-XB9wfs%3D)**.

clean_body: As a former Navy SEAL, this isn’t the first battlefield death that I’ve seen - but it may be the most poignant | Fellow Conservative, The nation mourns the tragic assassination of Charlie Kirk, gunned down on September 10, 2025, at Utah Valley University for daring to speak truth to power. His fearless voice—championing freedom, faith, and the American Dream—was silenced in a brazen act of political violence that has shaken us all to our core. Charlie fought hate with educated debate, not guns, using sharp wit and unyielding principle to challenge radical agendas. Yet, he was punished with a bullet for his courage to speak. My name is Adam Schwarze. I’m a former Navy SEAL running for the United States Senate in Minnesota, and Charlie Kirk is an inspiration to me. Over the course of my career, I’ve met some very special men and women willing to put their lives on the line for God and country in some of the most inhospitable places imaginable. I never had the pleasure of meeting Charlier Kirk, but as a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran, I can say with authority that he has to be one of the bravest individuals ever to champion the values of the United States of America. Charlie’s candor, professionalism, and respect for everyone he encountered will stick with me as I work to earn the support of every Minnesotan voter during this campaign. Charlie’s life should serve as an example to my opponents on the other side of the aisle on how to treat political opponents and people who share different viewpoints, with respect. I joined the Marine Corps after 9/11, served in over 70 countries, and fought chaos and extremism. I know what it takes to serve something bigger than yourself—just like Charlie did with every debate, every speech, every stand he took. This Senate race is my most challenging mission yet. Minnesota hasn’t gone red since 1976. I’m the underdog. . Unfortunately, I’m running against Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, who, like her boss, shares a long history of inflammatory rhetoric. Days before Charlie’s untimely death, Tim Walz, speaking in front of constituents at a political rally, lamented that President Trump hadn’t yet died, making his scripted condolences for Charlie’s family ring all the more hollow as he failed to disavow the extremists celebrating this tragedy online. I thank God that President Trump defeated Kamala Harris last November.** Can you imagine a vice president with so little moral clarity that he would tolerate the hatred that led to Charlie’s murder? I can’t. Tim Walz and my opponent in this Senate race personify everything Charlie Kirk stood against: arrogance, deceit, and a progressive agenda that sees conservatives not as opponents, but as enemies to be crushed. Their party’s years of demonizing voices like Charlie’s set the stage for this violence. Their silence on the specifics of this tragedy speaks louder than their words. They both push to disarm law-abiding Minnesotans while radicals run rampant. They both pander with land acknowledgments, dividing us further. They both view Republicans as threats to be eliminated, just as Charlie was targeted for his beliefs. The woman in the photo below is my opponent, by the way. If they get their way, they’ll impose their warped vision on America, silencing patriots like Charlie Kirk forever—patriots who countered lies with reason, not violence. This fight isn’t just about Walz or Peggy Flanagan — it’s about the future Charlie Kirk died for. It’s about you, me, and everyone who believes in our nation’s founding values. They think we’re “buffoons.” They think we’ll stay silent. They think we’ll let Charlie’s murder fade. When elected to the United States Senate, I promise I won’t stay silent; I won’t let his memory or work fade into the history books. . Your contribution of $5, $10, or $25 today will fuel our fight to keep Charlie’s vision alive—building a Minnesota and an America where free speech is protected, not punished with bullets. You have a choice: let them sweep this under the rug, or join me to ensure Charlie’s sacrifice galvanizes us to reclaim our values through the same fearless, reasoned debate he embodied. I’ve fought tough battles before. With you by my side, we’ll win this one—for Charlie, for America. With steadfast resolve, Adam Schwarze Retired Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA** | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine.
