name: Donald Trump, Jr.
subject: Charlie’s legacy must live on
body:
His fire lit a movement. It’s up to us to keep it burning.

#
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/02af3b8f-0627-44d7-8e95-99cd880695fe?source_code=MAWCO70237&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ck_legacy&utm_term=MAWCO70237]

Dear friend,

I don’t even know how to begin to put into words the loss I am
feeling... but this isn’t about me.

TODAY, TOMORROW, NEXT WEEK — THEY’RE ALL ABOUT CHARLIE.

Because Charlie was truly one of the best men I’ll ever know.

He changed the direction of this nation.

He was a leader, a fighter, and a man whose character and conviction
were rare. Too rare.

He was an inspiration to millions around the world.

TO ME, CHARLIE WAS A LITTLE BROTHER. That honor I will carry with me
forever.

#
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/02af3b8f-0627-44d7-8e95-99cd880695fe?source_code=MAWCO70237&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ck_legacy&utm_term=MAWCO70237]

I’m heartbroken knowing his death will leave a hole in the heart of
our nation.... and an even larger one in my life.

Charlie may no longer stand beside me — to remind me to push on when
things get tough.

_But his memory will._

_And I’ll make sure it does for this country he loved so well._

Charlie led a life of courage, strength, and conviction. NOW IT’S
TIME FOR ME, FOR YOU, AND FOR EVERY PATRIOT TO STAND UP AND FIGHT FOR
EVERYTHING CHARLIE STOOD FOR.

He poured every ounce of energy he had into saving this nation — and
he did that through Turning Point USA.

No one fought harder than Charlie. It was his mission in life to give
people the courage to speak up — and he did that. And none of us
will ever be silenced again.

He fought for you and all America. Now we must fight for him.

PATRIOT, IT’S ON US TO KEEP HIS LIFE’S WORK ALIVE... so it can
continue to reach young people, change lives, and embolden the
American people.

AS HIS FRIEND, I ASK THAT YOU HELP ME MAKE CERTAIN THAT CHARLIE’S
VOICE IS NEVER SILENCED, STOPPED, OR FORGOTTEN. That it’s heard
across the nation... in every church, in every school, and in every
home for generations.

_Let’s make the world remember him._

FRIEND, THE ONLY WAY TO DO THAT IS TO MAKE TURNING POINT USA THE
BIGGEST THING AMERICA HAS EVER SEEN... BECAUSE CHARLIE’S LEGACY
DOESN’T END HERE.
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/02af3b8f-0627-44d7-8e95-99cd880695fe?source_code=MAWCO70237&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ck_legacy&utm_term=MAWCO70237]

GIVE IN CHARLIE'S HONOR
SUPPORT TURNING POINT USA

Charlie, we’ll keep fighting the good fight. We’ll carry forward
the torch you lit... and we’ll make sure it shines brighter than
ever.

FOR YOU, WE’LL SAVE OUR GREAT COUNTRY.

Rest in peace, brother.

FOR CHARLIE,

Don Jr.

#

clean_body: His fire lit a movement. It’s up to us to keep it burning. [] Dear friend, I don’t even know how to begin to put into words the loss I am feeling... but this isn’t about me. TODAY, TOMORROW, NEXT WEEK — THEY’RE ALL ABOUT CHARLIE. Because Charlie was truly one of the best men I’ll ever know. He changed the direction of this nation. He was a leader, a fighter, and a man whose character and conviction were rare. Too rare. He was an inspiration to millions around the world. TO ME, CHARLIE WAS A LITTLE BROTHER. That honor I will carry with me forever. [] I’m heartbroken knowing his death will leave a hole in the heart of our nation.... and an even larger one in my life. Charlie may no longer stand beside me — to remind me to push on when things get tough. But his memory will. And I’ll make sure it does for this country he loved so well. Charlie led a life of courage, strength, and conviction. NOW IT’S TIME FOR ME, FOR YOU, AND FOR EVERY PATRIOT TO STAND UP AND FIGHT FOR EVERYTHING CHARLIE STOOD FOR. He poured every ounce of energy he had into saving this nation — and he did that through Turning Point USA. No one fought harder than Charlie. It was his mission in life to give people the courage to speak up — and he did that. And none of us will ever be silenced again. He fought for you and all America. Now we must fight for him. PATRIOT, IT’S ON US TO KEEP HIS LIFE’S WORK ALIVE... so it can continue to reach young people, change lives, and embolden the American people. AS HIS FRIEND, I ASK THAT YOU HELP ME MAKE CERTAIN THAT CHARLIE’S VOICE IS NEVER SILENCED, STOPPED, OR FORGOTTEN. That it’s heard across the nation... in every church, in every school, and in every home for generations. Let’s make the world remember him. FRIEND, THE ONLY WAY TO DO THAT IS TO MAKE TURNING POINT USA THE BIGGEST THING AMERICA HAS EVER SEEN... BECAUSE CHARLIE’S LEGACY DOESN’T END HERE. [] GIVE IN CHARLIE'S HONOR SUPPORT TURNING POINT USA Charlie, we’ll keep fighting the good fight. We’ll carry forward the torch you lit... and we’ll make sure it shines brighter than ever. FOR YOU, WE’LL SAVE OUR GREAT COUNTRY. Rest in peace, brother. FOR CHARLIE, Don Jr. [] GIVE IN CHARLIE'S HONOR SUPPORT TURNING POINT USA 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

name: Donald Trump, Jr.
subject: Charlie’s legacy must live on.
body:
For Charlie. For America.
His fire lit a movement. It's up to us to keep it burning.

| | | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=66a3d1f6726449b5bb202cf276e41f6b&_e=5_WjiRktgMO-2R2mZ9GLqZEmKYv0YV2z5dEud1aqfMwK5xEtefAYx-VHeNO05RA4mr4NegCDnsucLYWA3XLBju98Wqblv3A7EUE1Z7FroM73CykoyQ_tFDbwKbRFjM2NFt2oOIJHe69YgfCk-a9K9bvrWtwhNabbib-P580qtUSTbfEIaS5lPDtMbKXWUmaWHgBZSHEafQpgg5w6xg0LON7ePhMNQF7Ulmano5N4492wvHjQAl4cKlgdsxie6Jd0opnqp8fNx9ue3Gvav6THC89P3qJXEm2Nkwrrii8HdE5v5LT2adbHwMMEG53CPu_imq5F1MJAtFNgD1tu3nHNgap6Sc_rdYPCdtJb1qm1u_i6R7VJgtci0x3d_LJSHe7IyDXy4I5G6qBeieyByIip60XZxMDm6GwAKkmEBNpTBX898PHGrCWz9gYo4Bgso1eUCuwBsV6rr1TJ7953Q449yENIEtkim9yf_AkvXZHUJcILKSy8gkjdbWoADIawSC-jlvoGSXnJmycHZ7GUdQmejXkHGB6kisVvI0_HAqWD97MIx4I7k1d5J0I-zZy7aCUodfQdhf-RZg21ZJ68IgMGR0mjgG21Mufs1XTWGwchkJmLUWe2E_OAnm1bS5cVrg3unll9Q_BV7vUKZVYAmrVjfQ6gNCTvL_mLONzRaiZecfpzaeAcB4m_chcuLMZNzTwlf07ayTdb2fwXGd73r5RCLIF5d6aojEG7s4rJaT0aqo0%3D)
---
Friend, I don't even know how to begin to put into words the loss I am feeling... but this isn't about me. **Today, tomorrow, next week -- they're all about Charlie. ** Because Charlie was truly one of the best men I'll ever know. He changed the direction of this nation. He was a leader, a fighter, and a man whose character and conviction were rare. Too rare. He was an inspiration to millions around the world. **To me, Charlie was a little brother.** That honor I will carry with me forever.
---
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=66a3d1f6726449b5bb202cf276e41f6b&_e=5_WjiRktgMO-2R2mZ9GLqZEmKYv0YV2z5dEud1aqfMwK5xEtefAYx-VHeNO05RA4mr4NegCDnsucLYWA3XLBju98Wqblv3A7EUE1Z7FroM73CykoyQ_tFDbwKbRFjM2NFt2oOIJHe69YgfCk-a9K9bvrWtwhNabbib-P580qtUSTbfEIaS5lPDtMbKXWUmaWHgBZSHEafQpgg5w6xg0LON7ePhMNQF7Ulmano5N4492wvHjQAl4cKlgdsxie6Jd0QBVqcKhHH-5_G68GQfYUYXuAFc-dACtcGDHOfUcnpQ2sgUFn5zKX7p_BjVj-bPY0GXOqf-22Y2lZi05XKD5Hp8bQeXLxwcanSOj4BWM59cUs7MCr8LrYoq1N5vprmMvK53E0jwibY-0kGW6QmPZXgeRb4SzOefdQ_mpsay2HnEarWgvgayQd5dlWaJ1N14ZZKcPGsi0nTh2VOglMv_EstnszGRenfy1aI5SGfzC_UNwoo86d7GjuyRV43TTDk_DddsIQDn6TR-Ub4rVQp9st8eEcN8hdW_PftTCTe6IWtM5oEpb7DqyaYMUKvMyd7M1g4eQl-MBIP2NVJbVl2qhmHwy4HohljCpAqAVYXtCGs6e4foopIJoZGu_dOWQdilTeyZmmDypNy6JYnSohvDTf5HDtQpCeaAhQLm_QsxUamKAHsqD26Jn3wt1a0AzfI4sYvS4CuvsGyiba8v3cRm3TrdbXaqwWUh5myg-iMKswG14%3D)
---
I'm heartbroken knowing his death will leave a hole in the heart of our nation.... and an even larger one in my life. Charlie may no longer stand beside me -- to remind me to push on when things get tough._But his memory will.__And I 'll make sure it does for this country he loved so well._Charlie led a life of courage, strength, and conviction. **Now it 's time for me, for you, and for every patriot to stand up and fight for everything Charlie stood for. **He poured every ounce of energy he had into saving this nation -- and he did that through Turning Point USA.No one fought harder than Charlie. It was his mission in life to give people the courage to speak up -- and he did that. And none of us will ever be silenced again.He fought for you and all America. Now we must fight for him.**Friend, it 's on us to keep his life's work alive...** so it can continue to reach young people, change lives, and embolden the American people.**As his friend, I ask that you help me make certain that Charlie 's voice is never silenced, stopped, or forgotten.** That it's heard across the nation... in every church, in every school, and in every home for generations._Let 's make the world remember him._**[Friend, the only way to do that is to make Turning Point USA the biggest thing America has ever seen... because Charlie’s legacy doesn’t end here.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=66a3d1f6726449b5bb202cf276e41f6b&_e=5_WjiRktgMO-2R2mZ9GLqZEmKYv0YV2z5dEud1aqfMwK5xEtefAYx-VHeNO05RA4mr4NegCDnsucLYWA3XLBju98Wqblv3A7EUE1Z7FroM73CykoyQ_tFDbwKbRFjM2NFt2oOIJHe69YgfCk-a9K9bvrWtwhNabbib-P580qtUSTbfEIaS5lPDtMbKXWUmaWHgBZSHEafQpgg5w6xg0LON7ePhMNQF7Ulmano5N4492wvHjQAl4cKlgdsxie6Jd0psvUnMRSaCGxeonU3JIyimRcliBc-YSYO-UV_QfNm_FO_RO1_XLnqTj-pHrMJFdFaoKbCO2lYJ2kZ1d3XZGB38h0_Z0bq-Y3gQTK2PlSZqjnMBSIs6S_B4J7zIiS9dd8RHxCULlrl7zZTUGsZB2h1xUzyjjpiYfEK70kyQyBGhcyhb6yBco7slMsSi-14qRmDF4uCgk6VzL9irb62e2glXCD10M1Fg_mIigAEJEswpf8o4qNKBqWV743nnpItcJOz4HQbLV-je6xIAMbUqNeHTpaARIiVUnk568RVMB44Rn_-iqIeFfVaj-2iZK7IGUhU_sAZ67_yj_NkJF4gWsJ3lvnwQOYsnkycZE9mPaxoRyAooLK6aMDwQY4unNna38Rcezb8LMPGUZGiON_EKIHxzuLVrQRMN8blQbLQTNzbXf88wahfshTfBYR6UQXWk3aHpXVncoqXwFrb5mjmYLpiOMhDNM2xy9T7pK26seNGYI%3D)**

clean_body: For Charlie. For America. His fire lit a movement. It's up to us to keep it burning. | | | Friend, I don't even know how to begin to put into words the loss I am feeling... but this isn't about me. Today, tomorrow, next week -- they're all about Charlie. Because Charlie was truly one of the best men I'll ever know. He changed the direction of this nation. He was a leader, a fighter, and a man whose character and conviction were rare. Too rare. He was an inspiration to millions around the world. To me, Charlie was a little brother. That honor I will carry with me forever. I'm heartbroken knowing his death will leave a hole in the heart of our nation.... and an even larger one in my life. Charlie may no longer stand beside me -- to remind me to push on when things get tough.But his memory will.And I 'll make sure it does for this country he loved so well.Charlie led a life of courage, strength, and conviction. Now it 's time for me, for you, and for every patriot to stand up and fight for everything Charlie stood for. He poured every ounce of energy he had into saving this nation -- and he did that through Turning Point USA.No one fought harder than Charlie. It was his mission in life to give people the courage to speak up -- and he did that. And none of us will ever be silenced again.He fought for you and all America. Now we must fight for him.Friend, it 's on us to keep his life's work alive... so it can continue to reach young people, change lives, and embolden the American people.As his friend, I ask that you help me make certain that Charlie 's voice is never silenced, stopped, or forgotten. That it's heard across the nation... in every church, in every school, and in every home for generations.Let 's make the world remember him. Charlie, we'll keep fighting the good fight. We'll carry forward the torch you lit... and we'll make sure it shines brighter than ever.For you, we 'll save our great country.Rest in peace, brother.For Charlie, Don Jr. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

name: Garlin Gilchrist
subject: just $1
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
give me 30 seconds to tell you why I need you to split a donation of just $1 between my campaign and Blue Amp Action:

| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te2c0532b-03f8-4c63-b171-83a074fb71ce/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

A nerdy 6’8” Black guy asking you to donate to his Democratic Campaign for Governor of Michigan isn’t a top priority. **[But give me 30 seconds to tell you why I need you to split a donation of just $1 between my campaign and Blue Amp Action:](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td7bdcb87-d688-46de-a122-3960f8780964/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**

|
1. In November 2026, our most-likely Republican opponent is as far-right as they get. He’s Trump and Musk yes man.
2. Donald Trump flipped Michigan last November – so we’re in serious danger of losing the Governorship to a far-right extremist.
3. I’m running to make sure everyone in Michigan knows they can stay here and succeed. We deserve good paying jobs, good schools, and safe communities with homes people can actually afford.

[**So Peter** **– split a donation of just $1 between my campaign and Blue Amp Action to help us get one step closer to stopping a Trump henchman from becoming the next Governor of Michigan >>**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T82e790b6-5c99-44c1-a7f8-f6b40747c661/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8e1a4dbf-1f0d-497e-a7b9-e13e6477f2f2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Team Yass
subject: Peter, will you take our survey?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress
body:
|
---
Peter — Congress is back in session after the August district work period, and Yassamin is hard at work to deliver for Arizonans. There’s a lot on Yassamin’s agenda: fighting for due process to protect immigrant communities, making housing more affordable and accessible to everyone, taking on Big Oil, and demanding transparency and accountability for the abusers who enabled Jeffrey Epstein’s heinous crimes. **[But we want to make sure that your concerns are central to our priorities this fall. name: Tucker Carlson
subject: Charlie’s fight is now ours
body:
Right now, Charlie would say, “Don’t you dare quit”

| | | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Patriot
---
I don’t write emails like this often. But right now? After what happened to Charlie... _I can’t stay quiet._ **Charlie Kirk was my friend.** Not just someone I admired, but someone I loved and respected deeply. Losing him was devastating.
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
In many ways, all of us share in this loss. Charlie fought every day of his life for each one of us... fighting to keep America as great, free, and prosperous. No one I know ever fought for that harder than Charlie. America won't ever be the same. **No one can ever replace him — but we can make sure his legacy continues on.** _We owe him that._ Because if you knew Charlie, you would know exactly what he would say to us right now: _**"Don’t you dare quit."**_ Charlie poured his heart into building a movement to save America. He believed in young people. He believed in ordinary Americans. And he believed that even in our darkest hours, America was the beacon of goodness, freedom, and truth. That’s what the Turning Point movement was all about — and Charlie gave everything he had to that fight. **And our task now is not only to protect what he built — it’s to grow it bigger, stronger, and bolder than anyone ever thought possible.** More students. More churches. More families. More courage from everyday Americans to stand up and fight for what is right. Turning Point USA was Charlie’s vehicle to save America. **He didn’t just start a movement... _he started a revival._** And now, Patriot, we must carry that forward. If you share the same sense of responsibility that I do to honor Charlie’s work and press on with his vision... **_Then please join me in keeping his fight alive by making a gift to Turning Point USA today._** **[Let’s make Turning Point USA the biggest thing that this nation has ever seen... bigger than Charlie ever thought possible. That’s how we honor him best.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)**
---
[ **Give in Charlie's Honor**
**Support Turning Point USA**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Rest in peace, Charlie. We’ll carry the torch you lit from here.
---
**For Charlie,** Tucker Carlson
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
[ **Give in Charlie's Honor**
**Support Turning Point USA** ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e20413926/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MTc/LbmNsejFCdFduNg/qP2hpZHM9bmNSdlBTbExnaU1EbHhscw/gaMsMzA/sds2c641432)

Now, as often happens, football season and election season are at their peak around the same time. And while I don't often wade into politics, there's too much at stake to sit on the sidelines.
**In the race for Governor of Virginia, I'm all in for Abigail Spanberger.** She's tough, she's bright, and she's focused on the issues that folks in my hometown of Roanoke and all across Virginia are concerned about most, from lowering prices to investing in education to making healthcare more affordable.
_But just like in football, these campaigns come down to the team around you._

clean_body: But just like in football, these campaigns come down to the team around you. = = Hi, Tiki Barber here. I spent ten seasons as a running back in the NFL and four formative years at the University of Virginia with my twin brother, Ronde. Now, as often happens, football season and election season are at their peak around the same time. And while I don't often wade into politics, there's too much at stake to sit on the sidelines. In the race for Governor of Virginia, I'm all in for Abigail Spanberger. She's tough, she's bright, and she's focused on the issues that folks in my hometown of Roanoke and all across Virginia are concerned about most, from lowering prices to investing in education to making healthcare more affordable. But just like in football, these campaigns come down to the team around you. = = = = = = = One last thing: I know families across the Commonwealth are turning on the game and seeing all of these campaign ads — and it's hard to parse fact from fiction. Well, I can tell you that I know Abigail Spanberger — and I trust Abigail Spanberger to put Virginians first. We're in the fourth quarter now. Early voting starts on Friday, so make sure you get out there and cast your ballot. Appreciate your time, Tiki By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. Message & data rates may apply. Text HELP for more info. Text STOP to stop receiving messages. . Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 United States

The start of our campaign has been a whirlwind, and I’m grateful that so many of you have stepped up to support our team with a donation, by endorsing my candidacy, or by sharing our news online. Thank you. However, it’s been awhile since I heard from most of you directly. I thought this would be a good opportunity to check in. name: Donald Trump, Jr.
subject: Charlie’s legacy must live on
body:
His fire lit a movement. It's up to us to keep it burning.

| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/Juuo6VXDp4YCYUkCPg7LZptc8C8LG18rhBY1REWOslmXcrYW--DpVrdGhWS2GAq7uEgOB4Qc0Xd_F__mS2dF5Dyf8MG1aMQpM3HXzvbHEc1SEfmkQ18r2NAavWeQbuX_E2KeK41hOI151gaZ4RDsZ85AsQ76vvoB7LMsNcV--mX1HwbmZ7lhu0DXNsEhPcSF0VXULVTOwkS_0_7YKTYjPL2LI1GqEXdrzWanI7RtNQv6h3buQwqkNDJsGQ0MjcjCmDYUWXK_lz4bT83lvyXtkrrxRRy5NBB6SYCzwB6yVLyZ5jEraWODuskIcyaRl-z2RXnk0PB0qVEzm2ACHpHjJVJ5rV8aPaS8tivPVcQWReawALD6sgxFSyHqVI9sHc27ZkYQT7_hO_lmcEPWK2qQbEFeY3b0nVeJ0LPcDvuge4S_5XpeWkQ0nvwSGiWm1a0VksDjfPQ3o4-kBzkYEBXkenYGMzeBXhwhtJVZAjOsWyEOBYv44WcM1X8Sru7Llvsn_c3Se0ZggA7CGggWSpDm-pLjyZA61frsKGgSwRqmnDBL2TCD87CYeTAcVpEfnH0w5P29BkxgMbvtZOlbE2vWclvaIZjcTgxg4Tvp4ufQKNmZ-PljR8-7WOW4niKgnHJLCykRIk-9HDPZY8RppCwkQHJszU-9C5xMACGTDKjavXBUm8mnbB-6aNSP9KQdsqKJGzd1izVBzmzq4qbpU3f05RMjfObTZfNraCk8Z-07VSXCrTaVLFUvVZKF0SmXZwzkWYAG8-GaPmWqKcnooqYZU24YbpOqiT_DudKKr2S5rk95zxBBNwPvwhRlC_1XTCTXBka8elXBB9xKWVErOZssAbLX5IoWj_Ve_SZviBcFsBZSl8LxRrbxPatCiyAnX-YGtp-o3pBAjsBtpDmBLC2C/1kwdehNObEh69k7iyDIRVD_PBzX7RmPZ/12)
---
Dear Peter, I don't even know how to begin to put into words the loss I am feeling... but this isn't about me. **Today, tomorrow, next week -- they're all about Charlie. ** Because Charlie was truly one of the best men I'll ever know. He changed the direction of this nation. He was a leader, a fighter, and a man whose character and conviction were rare. Too rare. He was an inspiration to millions around the world. **To me, Charlie was a little brother.** That honor I will carry with me forever.
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/jmG2WadFwRR9xb8-sOUchAjqdGm3XSmyFOYCHwzYW9-fS3vwBllsc8lIPrhwDEUib6TG5Y2_RIsYnqFAMWty726i2gxmTg_T6kk0CYTQqGXl0CNFyB1jdMH8s80YZQYUTUWY2nAKUU9hURj57eqPstDONCpKe2VuQ5QUcHWquBZoWgdm4Eb0n97b3zrKlgOBgKjtfERYVLgl1qXvMsbtIoKf5262qKiaGSSSHJ1E9kLtcYKm2YCtxpO6vMXvRTi2dlK3h4MsI24AHLQI9s5mEI8qvQfDudhqJ96Zz6_f2WAsO0A8_o2qSKyREJQdnLsQT-yr4F_0QNr4QpkmU4dDAUUM4Mdy73A0TsXXd5VzltWtW-hWDFWsq_R1KwRcUYOsp-l3H8Dtr1iBfPkglEKwW50Pk4AOI3VLi8pAtxj-N42qjY95_JK6-WVxbFjemGToVpXzjrpVJAkJPuTSAmzv-7iC5Sii_67a1UguNGYtmu_Bo1QvK31OKcQNuuLK7O_YlFZC5Uff6FpkJUYv6-xwZu4ypqBduAp16AygP5fSXBg5azFAHOX-K9-anmuk61Ni-fu1HicYxvT9UoY1Xycjz51-F_NPMonTjK7jCyYcpyJJYmdcE6vPwtB55zx4xQi79U5NIiQGNjAFpwAXJOsS-xKV_TDqKqVTZUUZbDBZuAztF4_G1MxdHaH4kohw5OhUcHUeQCvKnH_S78UpQhkSN48YYKaLZ-gE5coVN2TzI3WcclLKyzQvBhlDTTchR9nqoA5YJp4znWBnK1nFztG0HCGR1jgTk7CZAWhbwUgVdY1xLH_R4qy28SEvJeJxfkPqvmObi805LBFt_lvVpOrVOHhylZwdpz4nifCQ2WmrBI0jzLkCfPpogNZ9wLNeO1fdXjKaHdThjE1e8OwOEfm_/d-kszWjowzLzsl5YL-P7IciU8BgUtaMO/12)
---
I'm heartbroken knowing his death will leave a hole in the heart of our nation.... and an even larger one in my life. Charlie may no longer stand beside me -- to remind me to push on when things get tough._But his memory will.__And I 'll make sure it does for this country he loved so well._Charlie led a life of courage, strength, and conviction. **Now it 's time for me, for you, and for every patriot to stand up and fight for everything Charlie stood for. **He poured every ounce of energy he had into saving this nation -- and he did that through Turning Point USA.No one fought harder than Charlie. It was his mission in life to give people the courage to speak up -- and he did that. And none of us will ever be silenced again.He fought for you and all America. Now we must fight for him.**Peter, it 's on us to keep his life's work alive...** so it can continue to reach young people, change lives, and embolden the American people.**As his friend, I ask that you help me make certain that Charlie 's voice is never silenced, stopped, or forgotten.** That it's heard across the nation... in every church, in every school, and in every home for generations._Let 's make the world remember him._**[Peter, the only way to do that is to make Turning Point USA the biggest thing America has ever seen... because Charlie’s legacy doesn’t end here.](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/iwasbbW0hInQ-OJDmerGM5eKMd2021AoG2Q1lNp1aq8szgK3wekhV2JT4wsJ1oL2vV65y0JgKE8ejLQA0SnYj5P7le0bdnhHwETftRZv3Q3rvz3SdzAENo6GIgDr0UaxEIhmnB0l17EUya_AcNgppsIbGIHm3GwTwsex4NHcOyvG3EQLYhpxZRXd4MuCpS2CfAQeK2oiq1BW6f7x1Yh_oI4Pr6vUpu8sNbaQwGRNLxCoMH6escyGLIBqDgqX4o0hwb7UJARm6AHkx6cTkRlGOelIhLtyiFa1lHt2yYNMhuzMrVK_Tz325-iRzZ1vuZPFIWj2eXnqbn9bvwxhVU9aQmnk4mD5u2ExxzKGZDl2S_6qUkYqlXQB_DFL3-rMp7tBe7rfc8OoUiMK1x9AevzkWLvjlWrRcou9hEj5iz0FxiyeDCf8w-fYqPZYuzDPzwg5g1e74fBhOIFHCKkddv4OMnbvd-FlO5IbrSekQx3NcQe_aSIATAgv9FvJVB8yrnK2FrdMVh1bDcMbcRFcwWFW8xrP5jJC4BR5rGPtlO1gLrSQYW13S1TmUe_ginqNxOsl3EzeGhSgCBWRi5qzIVDxqp5vc2StjoAqOSUpV46B9G8Jwkua4scjYVYHBTPXVn6d7rci-5Ib39guMUg2ouJcWUpiO2uWn9E4RQfP7Bjazr-z_NpIK12pw5FC0zaKYfn6cNmWak-MeOoqojcrSldGQff677A_yR9mj__ilB45oeaiRAUxw18QKzfRCUnumjdyDoroZE_phVxMUpW1T8m_OKxUG5q2k_MwkT10q1S1gGxul4P3HLY2xwQ12qunmKKTffdmGrLuKafS1C--cOzz5jpQNkWXcxVG7vqZDqvN03edvjTOKE7lpUbTzSizjlzZMHHBxLzeBjBhDQYA-QXi/Gn9Pmw-CY-jIe5jZWUb7TOQTvmknWmbY/12)**

clean_body: His fire lit a movement. It's up to us to keep it burning. | | | Dear Peter, I don't even know how to begin to put into words the loss I am feeling... but this isn't about me. Today, tomorrow, next week -- they're all about Charlie. Because Charlie was truly one of the best men I'll ever know. He changed the direction of this nation. He was a leader, a fighter, and a man whose character and conviction were rare. Too rare. He was an inspiration to millions around the world. To me, Charlie was a little brother. That honor I will carry with me forever. I'm heartbroken knowing his death will leave a hole in the heart of our nation.... and an even larger one in my life. Charlie may no longer stand beside me -- to remind me to push on when things get tough.But his memory will.And I 'll make sure it does for this country he loved so well.Charlie led a life of courage, strength, and conviction. Now it 's time for me, for you, and for every patriot to stand up and fight for everything Charlie stood for. He poured every ounce of energy he had into saving this nation -- and he did that through Turning Point USA.No one fought harder than Charlie. It was his mission in life to give people the courage to speak up -- and he did that. And none of us will ever be silenced again.He fought for you and all America. Now we must fight for him.Peter, it 's on us to keep his life's work alive... so it can continue to reach young people, change lives, and embolden the American people.As his friend, I ask that you help me make certain that Charlie 's voice is never silenced, stopped, or forgotten. That it's heard across the nation... in every church, in every school, and in every home for generations.Let 's make the world remember him. Charlie, we'll keep fighting the good fight. We'll carry forward the torch you lit... and we'll make sure it shines brighter than ever.For you, we 'll save our great country.Rest in peace, brother.For Charlie, Don Jr. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 |

name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: Ilhan is under attack. Again.
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250917-1524-foote&t=1001&akid=1524%2E342411%2EGrFsyx ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

The attacks on Rep. Ilhan Omar haven’t stopped since the day she was
elected — and now, the right wing is escalating again.

Republican Rep. Nancy Mace just introduced a resolution to remove Ilhan
from her committee assignments. Why? Because Ilhan refuses to be silent in
the face of injustice.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250917-movement.A04_Qy&refcode=em20250917-1524&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1524%2E342411%2EGrFsyx ]Tweet from Rep. Nancy Mace: 'BREAKING: We're filing a resolution to
strip @Ilhan of her committee assignments after her disgraceful remarks on
Charlie Kirk's assassination.'

This isn’t about policy. It’s personal. It’s rooted in the same
Islamophobia, racism, and xenophobia that have fueled years of right-wing
smear campaigns. They’ve tried to paint her as dangerous simply for
fighting for a better world.

Nancy Mace knows Ilhan condemns political violence. But truth isn’t the
point here — outrage is. They want headlines, Fox News hits, and a pat on
the back from Donald Trump.

This is a game to them. But for our communities, the stakes are real. It’s
shameless. And we’re not having it.

Ilhan has always stood strong against hate — but no one fights alone.
That’s where the Squad Victory Fund comes in.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250917-movement.A04_Qy&refcode=em20250917-1524&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=1524%2E342411%2EGrFsyx ]Will you chip in $3 — or any amount — to help us defend
Ilhan and protect the movement we’re building together?

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250917-movement.A04_Qy&refcode=em20250917-1524&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1524%2E342411%2EGrFsyx ]Contribute ››

In solidarity,

The Squad Victory Fund

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1524%2E342411%2EGrFsyx

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated equally among: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://ericswalwell.com [https://ericswalwell.com]
Friend,

Yesterday was National Voter Registration Day, but Republicans are working overtime to make certain votes count more than others by rigging the system so certain voters have an unfair advantage – disenfranchising millions.

From voter purges to restrictive voting laws and the weaponization of federal agencies, their goal is clear: silence voices that don’t align with their agenda.

I’m done watching people sit on their hands while Republicans continue to fight dirty. We cannot just stand by while our democracy is under attack.

Stand with me today to protect voting rights and make sure every vote counts equally. The future of our country depends on it.

TAKE ACTION NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Sept2025-FR-September?&refcode=E15243-20250917-RiggingVotes-SB-GOP&amount=25]

Thank you for your commitment to democracy.

- Eric

name: Robert Garcia
subject: 🚨Stop Trump’s 40-Day Cover-Up 🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
Demand the DOJ Release the Epstein Files NOW
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115409159/570218650/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTBiZGJlNy1mZjkzLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8dowoF5oRmVP28-rFTLpvvyXr4IV8W8gBCC4FdOUhgg=)
Hi, it’s Congressman Robert Garcia, the top-ranking Democrat on the House Oversight Committee.
I need your help to break a 40-day wall of silence and obstruction.
Last month, Oversight Dems subpoenaed the FULL, unredacted files from the Department of Justice to get justice for survivors and expose every single person involved in Epstein’s ring of predators.
**Their response?_A giant nothingburger._** They sent over old, already-public files to distract us. Meanwhile, Republicans are just... letting them get away with it.
But we’re fighting back. Last week, we got documents from the Epstein Estate and directly verified that Donald Trump’s creepy birthday note to Epstein is, in fact, real. **But this is just one piece of the puzzle they're trying to hide.**
We cannot let them bury the truth. The survivors and the American public deserve justice.
**[That’s why I’m demanding the Department of Justice comply with our subpoena and release the full Epstein files. Will you add your name right now to put the pressure on Trump’s DOJ to finally expose his ultimate cover-up once and for all?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115409160/570218651/-1957785870?refcode=250917_RG_40-day-pet&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTBiZGJlNy1mZjkzLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8dowoF5oRmVP28-rFTLpvvyXr4IV8W8gBCC4FdOUhgg=&emci=4abbe847-d593-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=d50bdbe7-ff93-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=16877361)**
[add your name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115409161/570218652/-1957785870?refcode=250917_RG_40-day-pet&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTBiZGJlNy1mZjkzLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8dowoF5oRmVP28-rFTLpvvyXr4IV8W8gBCC4FdOUhgg=&emci=4abbe847-d593-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=d50bdbe7-ff93-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=16877361)
The Department of Justice has a duty to uphold the rule of law in this country. And right now, they’re burying the evidence to let Trump get away with his heinous crimes.
**This will not stand.**
**[Republicans know that their days sweeping Trump’s Epstein ties under the rug are coming to an end. They’re running scared. And with your help, we can put the pressure on, finally release the files, and hold dangerous predators like Trump accountable.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115409162/570218653/-1957785870?refcode=250917_RG_40-day-pet&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTBiZGJlNy1mZjkzLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8dowoF5oRmVP28-rFTLpvvyXr4IV8W8gBCC4FdOUhgg=&emci=4abbe847-d593-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=d50bdbe7-ff93-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=16877361)**

A Fox News host just suggested jailing homeless people.
His co-host Brian Kilmeade called for “involuntary lethal injection” for homeless people, saying, _“Just kill them.”_

Our nation is experiencing a spike in homelessness, driven by our nation’s housing affordability crisis and the dismantling of our social safety net.
People with disabilities, children, and older adults, including veterans, are disproportionately experiencing homelessness.

clean_body: | | | A Fox News host just suggested jailing homeless people. His co-host Brian Kilmeade called for “involuntary lethal injection” for homeless people, saying, “Just kill them.” He still has his job. Is this where we are as a society? Is the right-wing suggesting that the solution to homelessness is to have the state kill the unhoused? Our nation is experiencing a spike in homelessness, driven by our nation’s housing affordability crisis and the dismantling of our social safety net. People with disabilities, children, and older adults, including veterans, are disproportionately experiencing homelessness. At Able Dems, we fight to elect Democrats with disabilities and our allies - and we need your help to STOP MAGA cruelty and defeat Republicans. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Kilmeade’s comments echo dystopian eugenics from darker times in history. This is fascism, and it threatens our democracy and our lives. We need more Democrats with disabilities and our allies in power who will fight for human rights, democracy and compassionate solutions! ** ****Thanks for your support. -Able Dems | elects Democrats with disabilities. We fight to protect accessible voting, expand health care and Social Security, and equality for all. name: Jane Fonda
subject: The county council election that could change everything
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
Our climate champions are ready to shake things up.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115410502/570222860/1328794144?refcode=ea.f096bef3-0194-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.f096bef3-0194-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYwOTZiZWYzLTAxOTQtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-89tTYebLyDGp5vEsDf6rwcp-KS17DXeQqtGFnalz1w=&emci=c6c994ec-0194-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=f096bef3-0194-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=4823105)
---
I want to tell you about a place where our movement is on the brink of something major: **_Luzerne County, Pennsylvania._** In 2023, the Luzerne County Council was dominated by Republicans. There were 10 Republicans and just one Democrat who was terming out. That year, JanePAC backed a slate of five candidates organized by a local PAC, Luzerne United. Four of them won. Suddenly, a council that Oily Republicans had controlled for years came into play. Now, in 2025, we are just **two seats** away from flipping Luzerne’s County Council to a pro-climate majority. That would mean real action on environmental justice in a county that is scarred by multiple Superfund sites, abandoned mines, and fracking and industrial pollution. **That’s why I am proud to announce that JanePAC is endorsing Dawn Simmons, Chris Belles, and Denise Williams for Luzerne County Council this November.** **[What happens in Luzerne County will echo far beyond Pennsylvania. But, too often, local races like these go overlooked and underfunded, which means our endorsed candidates truly depend on people like you to help them reach and mobilize the voters they need to win. Will you split a donation three ways between Dawn, Chris, and Denise to help make it happen?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115410503/570222861/1001077450?refcode=ea.f096bef3-0194-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.f096bef3-0194-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYwOTZiZWYzLTAxOTQtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-89tTYebLyDGp5vEsDf6rwcp-KS17DXeQqtGFnalz1w=)** | **Meet Our Climate Champions** **🌏 Dawn Simmons** , a veteran and community advocate, is fighting for clean water and against new fossil fuel infrastructure. **🌏 Chris Belles** , a data analyst and community volunteer, is focused on clean energy investments that create local jobs and make county operations more sustainable. **🌏 Denise Williams** , a nurse and former chair of the county Board of Elections, is leading the charge to cut emissions and expand renewable energy access.
---
This local election is a pivotal moment for our movement, and I’m not exaggerating when I say that your support today could make the difference in flipping control of the Luzerne County Council.
**[Can you split a donation between Dawn, Chris, and Denise right now? Together, we can finish the fight we started in 2023 and flip Luzerne County to a pro-climate majority.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115410504/570222862/1001077450?refcode=ea.f096bef3-0194-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.f096bef3-0194-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYwOTZiZWYzLTAxOTQtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-89tTYebLyDGp5vEsDf6rwcp-KS17DXeQqtGFnalz1w=)**

clean_body: Our climate champions are ready to shake things up. | I want to tell you about a place where our movement is on the brink of something major: Luzerne County, Pennsylvania. In 2023, the Luzerne County Council was dominated by Republicans. There were 10 Republicans and just one Democrat who was terming out. That year, JanePAC backed a slate of five candidates organized by a local PAC, Luzerne United. Four of them won. Suddenly, a council that Oily Republicans had controlled for years came into play. Now, in 2025, we are just two seats away from flipping Luzerne’s County Council to a pro-climate majority. That would mean real action on environmental justice in a county that is scarred by multiple Superfund sites, abandoned mines, and fracking and industrial pollution. That’s why I am proud to announce that JanePAC is endorsing Dawn Simmons, Chris Belles, and Denise Williams for Luzerne County Council this November. = | Meet Our Climate Champions 🌏 Dawn Simmons , a veteran and community advocate, is fighting for clean water and against new fossil fuel infrastructure. 🌏 Chris Belles , a data analyst and community volunteer, is focused on clean energy investments that create local jobs and make county operations more sustainable. 🌏 Denise Williams , a nurse and former chair of the county Board of Elections, is leading the charge to cut emissions and expand renewable energy access. This local election is a pivotal moment for our movement, and I’m not exaggerating when I say that your support today could make the difference in flipping control of the Luzerne County Council. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Onward, xx Jane = | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Send donations via check to: Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

name: Justin Kwasa, LCV
subject: Join us again to send the message: No Kings
body:
October 18 in communities across the nation

If you are unable to see the message below, [click here to view](https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTI5NDgwNTUS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjMwMDIzODY5MQS2&mt=1&rt=0).
| | | |
---
|
* * *
---
| | | | Peter,
---
| | Donald Trump is acting like a dictator: abducting immigrants, occupying cities, weakening our environmental protections, gutting healthcare and education, silencing voters, and rewarding billionaires while working families struggle. For the past nine months, LCV has spearheaded the resistance against this would-be-King and now we’re asking you to join us.
---
| | On October 18, communities across the nation will rise up again at [**_No Kings 2_**](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/rNykfE6wY9CW/QWhTYVJiYzBxQ3oyT0taL3VKblBBS1pFbVhXT0hkNllOVEpiazZWS2lEQTI0bzVEbVQzZEpEWEZpVGFVb3pZY3ZoNUhOUzA5R1V5N3R4dUdCRkNvL2xwejk1bjd4K29DL0N5YncvcHY2RXc9S0/) to make clear to Trump that in this country, we don’t have kings or wannabe dictators. We will come together with one clear message: America belongs to us. No Kings. No Crowns. No Thrones. No Dictators!
---
| | [**We need you in the fight. Will you show up?**](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/X6bzs~jLazBP/QWhTYVJiYzBxQ3oyT0taL3VKblBBS1pFbVhXT0hkNllOVEpiazZWS2lEQTI0bzVEbVQzZEpEWEZpVGFVb3pZY3ZoNUhOUzA5R1V5N3R4dUdCRkNvL2xwejk1bjd4K29DL0N5YncvcHY2RXc9S0/)
---
| | No Kings is a peaceful movement of millions of Americans from all walks of life rising up to make it clear: We don’t do dictators or kings in America. We never will. We’re organizing and taking action to defend each other and our communities, demand dignity, and say enough to all of the Trump administration’s power grabs. Millions of us took to the streets in June, and we’re doing it again on Saturday, October 18.
---
| | To get involved, go to [**NoKings.org**](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/ebDKc8EXa2SR/QWhTYVJiYzBxQ3oyT0taL3VKblBBS1pFbVhXT0hkNllOVEpiazZWS2lEQTI0bzVEbVQzZEpEWEZpVGFVb3pZY3ZoNUhOUzA5R1V5N3R4dUdCRkNvL2xwejk1bjd4K29DL0N5YncvcHY2RXc9S0/) to find an event in your area. Make sure to also search the website for other helpful resources like virtual safety trainings and messaging toolkits to inform others in your community on social media. We can’t hold Trump accountable if we’re not united together. Thank you for supporting us on October 18 and beyond because this isn’t a moment, it’s a movement!
---
| | Justin KwasaDemocracy Program DirectorLeague of Conservation Voters
---
| | |
* * *
---
| | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,[ _update your contact information_](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=12948055&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjMwMDIzODY5MQS2&spReportId=MjMwMDIzODY5MQS2) _._ [_Click here to unsubscribe_](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=12948055&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjMwMDIzODY5MQS2&spReportId=MjMwMDIzODY5MQS2) from our supporter list. [_Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here_](mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=) , or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.
**740 15th St NW, Suite 700**
**Washington, DC 20005**
**202-785-8683**
---
| | | [ DONATE ](https://links.messages.lcv.)
---
|
* * *

Peter?

A report hit our desk, and the headline stopped me cold:

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8c644f4470cd47ab97dfbefdd58c9d67&_e=zD_ZjbPNPr3S46nZ4riUydNsG723Bi0T8hu1c8JCjlxxLPnoVhSEN4fOsHlpCRe0fnHXXtGBvVpLHkDRN1M1cXV7qjGkJl4HNgEEhLYrq2XESAcZDMIlpj19lSnqZv0w7maKe1bqQ09WnpDK3XqtGqCZcYOZUR97xybt6rU7vUzxfYProbe7ENmaBj1WNxbx4Rrg-KE35zfHzlTx1-kgfcqmAkoGI7Vz7UASVfrvPY26YEKap-7TquMAd8yKBC8bkLroZHq_xFDqAJ-0P_FVTOjTBbClE0J_WHbpOZ_e71wRV9cdaUjOJd8nvjkZHwa7FFF2yMtKG0HnjNj3jE9CrmQKYWwxSr2ZUO8GID8ZMgPNitTIelicYp1UyMIYn3pP-TRQ2eqosYPNyMJ5vvzCRDDOxeJ9nWHRBZGBRUVHvcmwUjH1APkPqW4EEW8Q6jrMMVIpbCiX-iGFKMWa3qijJLuuDA7LrDK3p7RfBmOYvBt0JhlqBcOb7rlSiONWW1HrazqlmPDKOO56ejLVWx-T5OoNaaazQNvHQq5NrXnorEGrWaJ7PHcsq58Bs7AaWI-xW3yWq65i779dc6FKiTmbVibEAOLuZd_rHyqxkHgphbWke6Epcgm06F0OKBau1PSB_kgyt_Z2GeJp1AVpt2y7eKqg9eDRJbhuJIw4afGn4GQL712SptKSdpck3Nbz7FYKkMMpWhauFmsZGQWPzQDi_rO-BWQRRU19MB_vucvENWGW3hWZiYAEtV9enmmlGH2pvW18Y3-jX2uk6qlvOgpoP0-S2cHKeir6YjiBT9iAi1KK5_9tRkX4Aubwj5ACOKjMbkJOs1tiNpMolljST1EvZuNN3LRRh45RudY3qh2K1tc%3D)

clean_body: We’re asking one last time | Peter? A report hit our desk, and the headline stopped me cold: Barack Obama is stepping back into politics to take on President Trump and flip the Senate. If we ignore this, we do it at our own peril. I’ve prepared a short memo for you on Obama’s latest threat to MAGA — and how we can beat him. — Obama Alerts If you want to help Republicans PROTECT and EXPAND our Senate majority, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Peter - I often think about my father's journey to America. He arrived with just $1.75 in his pocket and a dream in his heart. It's a reminder that the American Dream is within reach, no matter where we start.

As I run for Governor of Virginia, I'm reminded of the power of small actions adding up to make a big difference. That's why I'm writing to ask for your help today.

_**If every person reading this email could give just $1.75, we would hit our major fundraising goal and be one step closer to winning this toss-up race.**_ It's a small ask, but it would make a huge impact.

You see, my father's story isn't just about him - it's about the opportunities that America provides. It's about the chance to build a better life, to work hard, and to succeed. And that's exactly what I'm fighting for.

As a Marine, a businesswoman, and a public servant, I've seen firsthand the positive impact that conservative policies can have on our communities. I've fought for education reform, economic growth, and individual freedom. _**And I'm just getting started.**_

[**So I'm asking you to join me in this fight. Will you give $1.75 today to help us reach our goal? Lieutenant Governor.I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, and I've held many titles in my life. Each one hasn't been a cakewalk, but I like a challenge. clean_body: | | | | | | | | Peter - I often think about my father's journey to America. He arrived with just $1.75 in his pocket and a dream in his heart. It's a reminder that the American Dream is within reach, no matter where we start. As I run for Governor of Virginia, I'm reminded of the power of small actions adding up to make a big difference. That's why I'm writing to ask for your help today. If every person reading this email could give just $1.75, we would hit our major fundraising goal and be one step closer to winning this toss-up race. It's a small ask, but it would make a huge impact. You see, my father's story isn't just about him - it's about the opportunities that America provides. It's about the chance to build a better life, to work hard, and to succeed. And that's exactly what I'm fighting for. As a Marine, a businesswoman, and a public servant, I've seen firsthand the positive impact that conservative policies can have on our communities. I've fought for education reform, economic growth, and individual freedom. And I'm just getting started. Together, we can keep the American Dream alive for our kids and grandkids. We can build a brighter future, and we can show the country what it means to lead with conservative values. Thank you for your support, and let's do this! Winsome Earle-Sears . Marine. Mom. Small Business Owner. Lieutenant Governor.I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, and I've held many titles in my life. Each one hasn't been a cakewalk, but I like a challenge. I've tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born.Sure, a silver spoon would've made it easier, but I've found a helping hand from your community means so much more. ** This will be another challenge, but with you on my side, I know I can do this. | Paid for by Winsome for Governor Neither military info nor photographs of Winsome Earle-Sears in uniform imply endorsement of Winsome Earle-Sears by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments. PO Box 71596 Richmond, VA 23255-1596

name: Team Abdul
subject: Money is a huge factor in winning elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20250917-928&t=1001&akid=938%2E251025%2EGEeoqV ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20250917-928&t=1002&akid=938%2E251025%2EGEeoqV ]Abdul for US Senate

Peter,

This Senate race will be decided in one of the toughest battleground
states in America, and the corporate PACs backing our opponents are
betting they can simply outspend us.

As much as we wish things were different, money is a huge factor in
winning elections.

[ A ]A graph from OpenSecrets titled 'Percent of Races Won by Top Spending
Candidate' In 2024, the Senate race % is 87.88%.

OpenSecrets found that in 2024, 87% of the victorious Senate campaigns
were the top spenders in their race. That’s a massive margin we can’t
ignore.

And here’s why this race is unique: Abdul is the only candidate in this
race who has never taken a dime of corporate PAC money — and he rejects
money from AIPAC, too.

That means 100% of this campaign is fueled by supporters like
you, Peter.

So today, we’re asking: [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ms-aes-20250917-1-ak?amount=1&refcode=em20250917-928&refcode2=938_251025_GEeoqV&akid=938%2E251025%2EGEeoqV ]Will you donate $1 today? If everyone reading
this email pitches in $1 or more, we’ll have enough resources to continue
hosting events and reaching more Michiganders across the
state.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ms-aes-20250917-1-ak?amount=1&refcode=em20250917-928&refcode2=938_251025_GEeoqV&akid=938%2E251025%2EGEeoqV ]Donate $1 ››

Thanks,

Team Abdul

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. To contribute via check, please address it to Abdul for U.S. Senate, PO Box 126, St. Clair Shores, MI 48080.

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1004&akid=938%2E251025%2EGEeoqV
Update Your Information: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/update-your-information
Unsubscribe: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1005&akid=938%2E251025%2EGEeoqV

Email us: info@abdulformichigan.com

Paid for by Abdul for U.S. Senate

name: Team Lombardo
subject: Help Joe Finish the Job
body:
Now is not the time to Slow Down
| | | | | [](https://xfumircbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lQ2Dx6yLdyERz5UTX6griPLXDxykcctp8DvbTS5ka6ICpsTMcmv1JuxRF0IB2tzOCZIRAJ6OnjtRYkFVqcB2OkE77KHQKx3H55gEN40ozm3RWioSDatjlJdzRH4PjCQea0pYu90veG8lixa0HaMQcCdWtk8V6rYKBKgenJ6F8ysTQ8MhUsU3W0UxKh1LbESF7lSNWPLlS8z4D1fqwANppjXjV0t9MCE4&c=MnWTWwFgwtGiOzjRxG_WEFHasKIWE3-rXlRgxguJKfIHCFQVgGpypw==&ch=AILzQI3IpF4TvjS0qe2pX2MnBVZK959SCqTSRwCciQCghQ183wbsMg==)
---
| Peter,
---
| Earlier this week, Governor Joe Lombardo announced that he is running for re-election because it's time he finished the job for Nevada.
---
| | [DONATE TO RE-ELECT JOE LOMBARDO](https://xfumircbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lQ2Dx6yLdyERz5UTX6griPLXDxykcctp8DvbTS5ka6ICpsTMcmv1JuxRF0IB2tzOCZIRAJ6OnjtRYkFVqcB2OkE77KHQKx3H55gEN40ozm3RWioSDatjlJdzRH4PjCQea0pYu90veG8lixa0HaMQcCdWtk8V6rYKBKgenJ6F8ysTQ8MhUsU3W0UxKh1LbESF7lSNWPLlS8z4D1fqwANppnW1RxRishdm&c=MnWTWwFgwtGiOzjRxG_WEFHasKIWE3-rXlRgxguJKfIHCFQVgGpypw==&ch=AILzQI3IpF4TvjS0qe2pX2MnBVZK959SCqTSRwCciQCghQ183wbsMg==)
---
| When he took office in 2022, Nevada's economy was failing, our students were falling behind, and our streets were crowded with crime. Our state was at a crossroads, and we needed a leader who not only has spent over 30 years protecting our community, but has a deep history and love for the state we call home. That's exactly why Nevadans chose Joe Lombardo--and he's delivered.
While in Carson City, Governor Lombardo:
✅Made the Largest Investment in Public Education in Nevada History, and Provided Students and Parents More Choice in Education
✅Kept our Streets Safe by Placing Harsher Penalties for Drug Dealers and Predators
✅Kickstarted our Economy by Cutting Red Tape and Rolling Back Over 600 Burdensome Regulations
Thanks to Joe Lombardo's leadership, State Representatives in Carson City are back in the Capitol doing what they're supposed to do: working for you. The progress we've made can be seen all across the state, from the dinner table to the classroom. However, all of the great work will be undone if we don't get Joe re-elected. Democrats want to flip our state blue, and have unchecked single-party rule. We can't let them win, and we can't let them take our state backwards. Will you make a donation today and help Joe finish the job?

---

clean_body: Now is not the time to Slow Down | | | | | == | Peter, | Earlier this week, Governor Joe Lombardo announced that he is running for re-election because it's time he finished the job for Nevada. | | == | When he took office in 2022, Nevada's economy was failing, our students were falling behind, and our streets were crowded with crime. Our state was at a crossroads, and we needed a leader who not only has spent over 30 years protecting our community, but has a deep history and love for the state we call home. That's exactly why Nevadans chose Joe Lombardo--and he's delivered. While in Carson City, Governor Lombardo: ✅Made the Largest Investment in Public Education in Nevada History, and Provided Students and Parents More Choice in Education ✅Kept our Streets Safe by Placing Harsher Penalties for Drug Dealers and Predators ✅Kickstarted our Economy by Cutting Red Tape and Rolling Back Over 600 Burdensome Regulations Thanks to Joe Lombardo's leadership, State Representatives in Carson City are back in the Capitol doing what they're supposed to do: working for you. The progress we've made can be seen all across the state, from the dinner table to the classroom. However, all of the great work will be undone if we don't get Joe re-elected. Democrats want to flip our state blue, and have unchecked single-party rule. We can't let them win, and we can't let them take our state backwards. Will you make a donation today and help Joe finish the job? | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | For Nevada, Team Lombardo Please watch our latest ad ==, or == | | | Lombardo for Governor | == | == == == | | | | Lombardo for Governor | P.O. Box 371176 | Las Vegas, NV 89137 US | |

name: Judicial Watch Corruption Chronicles
subject: Judicial Watch Sues Justice Department for Communications with Axios on Biden-Hur Audio, Epstein Memo
body:
Judicial Watch announced today it filed a Freedom of Information Act
(FOIA) lawsuit against the U.S. Department of Justice for
communication the department had with the media outlet Axios regarding
the outlet’s “exclusives” on the release of audio of
then-President Joe Biden’s August 2023 interview with then-Special
Counsel Robert Hur regarding Biden’s handling of secret documents
and the July 2025 memo that states there is no Jeffrey Epstein
“client list” (Judicial Watch Inc. v. U.S. Department of
Justice (No. 1:25-cv-03225)).

[alt_text]

[*****]
September 17, 2025

body:
| Hi Peter — **As a doctor, Ami Bera is the frontline defense against RFK JR’s reckless policies that endanger lives and weaken access to healthcare for millions of Americans.**

The bottom line is this: we have to win back the House majority in 2026. And the only way we can protect Americans’ healthcare is by **keeping leaders like Ami Bera in office.**

[**That’s why we need you to chip in today and help us make our September goal. Please chip in $15 or whatever you can today to help us reach our $5,013 mid-month goal today →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115411429/570225908/-390128352?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_AB_20250916_FR_MMFR_0_3MO_TeamBera_NA_NA_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjBmNThjZS0wNTk0LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=URAFCB4CgtV_DV6-8_1YoiWxHgURTfhKzDqV0-v6Anw=) **[RUSH A DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115411430/570225909/-390128352?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_AB_20250916_FR_MMFR_0_3MO_TeamBera_NA_NA_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjBmNThjZS0wNTk0LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=URAFCB4CgtV_DV6-8_1YoiWxHgURTfhKzDqV0-v6Anw=)**
**_Begin Forwarded Message:_** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115411432/570225911/-390128352?source=EM_NBI_AB_20250916_FR_MMFR_0_3MO_TeamBera_NA_NA_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjBmNThjZS0wNTk0LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=URAFCB4CgtV_DV6-8_1YoiWxHgURTfhKzDqV0-v6Anw=) Peter, As a doctor, **_I am deeply disturbed by what RFK Jr. is doing to America’s public health system._**

He’s driving out dedicated public health experts because they refuse to rubber-stamp his dangerous views on vaccines. These experts are our first line of defense against outbreaks and emerging threats. Their resignations make clear that they are no longer being allowed to do their jobs to protect the health and safety of the American people.

That’s why we need to raise the pressure until President Trump has no choice but to rein in RFK Jr. — or better yet, fire him.

[**_Will you help us raise the heat by contributing $15, $25, or whatever you can to help us hit our mid-month goal of $5,689? Your support will help us hold RFK Jr. and the Trump administration accountable — and flip the House to restore truth, science, and leadership to Washington._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115411434/570225913/-390128352?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_AB_20250916_FR_MMFR_0_3MO_TeamBera_NA_NA_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjBmNThjZS0wNTk0LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=URAFCB4CgtV_DV6-8_1YoiWxHgURTfhKzDqV0-v6Anw=) If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately by pressing a button below. **[DONATE $8 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115411436/570225915/-390128352?amount=8&express_lane=true&contactdata=U8Bqgdk50lO5MnWOb9WhhdDgrO/yFhP5qpqgCDtR1FWPhY4E5ww75YedGHtgDjLZhzNnfVhfHOI97J9Z95IiI6qhIalgXHMnJ/YTBxnETg+pHGEeFaoyJTjSWsS77MSQhMQM3eILjSgwgtLIc7zno6CBUKqJ0OoSYO38xMZMUl7LEePOr0Kt5MNV8Jwmt9Ra&refcode2=6f0f58ce-0594-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&source=EM_NBI_AB_20250916_FR_MMFR_0_3MO_TeamBera_NA_NA_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjBmNThjZS0wNTk0LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=URAFCB4CgtV_DV6-8_1YoiWxHgURTfhKzDqV0-v6Anw=)**

name: Chris Pappas
subject: I’d love to chat with you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
I’m reaching out to personally thank you for being part of this team.
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=2406%2E582294%2Edeymn9)
Hi,
One of the greatest privileges of this work is getting to talk with people like you. Hearing your stories and learning what matters to you makes me a better public servant — and more fired up than ever to win this race.
That’s why I’m calling some of my supporters to thank them for their generous contributions — and I want to talk to you.
[**If you’re able to contribute $5, you might be added to my call list, and there’s a chance we could talk soon.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250917_1_calls?refcode=em20250917-2406&amount=5&refcode2=2406_582294_deymn9&akid=2406%2E582294%2Edeymn9)
**These calls give me a chance to show a small token of appreciation to supporters like Michael, who have stood with me since day one.**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250917_1_calls?refcode=em20250917-2406&amount=5&refcode2=2406_582294_deymn9&akid=2406%2E582294%2Edeymn9)
_Calling a grassroots donor named Michael to thank him for his support_
Every bit of support — donating, volunteering, or just sending good vibes — makes a difference. That’s what grassroots power is all about: a million small actions building something huge.
It’s how we’ve been able to win _four times in a row_ despite running in one of the most competitive districts in the country. **But this time is different.** Right-wing billionaires and MAGA-aligned dark money groups are going all in. They’re getting ready to pour unprecedented amounts of money into an all-star cast of former failed Senators to defeat me. They’ll use every trick in the book to flip New Hampshire red.
[**So if you’re ready to prove just how strong we are, please consider chipping in $5 or anything you can give. If you donate right now, you might just receive a personal call from me to say thank you.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250917_1_calls?refcode=em20250917-2406&amount=5&refcode2=2406_582294_deymn9&akid=2406%2E582294%2Edeymn9)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250917_1_calls?amount=5&refcode=em20250917-2406&refcode2=2406_582294_deymn9&akid=2406%2E582294%2Edeymn9)**
Thanks for being on this team. It means everything to me that you’re with me in the fight.
With gratitude,
Chris
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer&refcode=em20250917-1?t=2&refcode2=2406_582294_deymn9&akid=2406%2E582294%2Edeymn9)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_receive_fewer_emails/?t=3&akid=2406%2E582294%2Edeymn9)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_update_your_information/?t=4&akid=2406%2E582294%2Edeymn9)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrispappas.org/unsubscribe/cps_unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=2406%2E582294%2Edeymn9)

Email us: [teampappas@chrispappas.org](mailto:teampappas@chrispappas.org)
Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
Chris Pappas for Senate
PO Box 313
Manchester, NH 03105
United States

name: Heidi Hall
subject: [PHOTO] It all started because of my two boys
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HEIDI HALL FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250917_em_fr_b1_HH_big [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250917_em_fr_b1_HH_big]
Friend, when I moved to Grass Valley to get away from the city life and raise my two boys, I didn't think that I'd ever run for Congress.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250917_em_fr_b1_HH_big [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250917_em_fr_b1_HH_big]
But looking back now, it's one of the most important decisions I've ever made.
I joined this race to unseat Kevin Kiley because I was tired of seeing him constantly put the Republican Party and his career over our communities.
Even though pundits claimed that this race would be tough for a challenger, I knew that with Trump in office, Kiley would be no better than a lapdog and that we desperately needed a leader who actually cared about the people they represented.
As we introduced our platform and spread our message, polls showed that voters agreed and that we had closed the gap, putting us in an extremely tight race.
Friend, no matter what the congressional maps may be on Election Day, I want you to know that nothing matters more to me than creating a better future for you, for our district, and for the two boys who brought me to Grass Valley and started this all.
This seat could decide control of Congress. Party bosses aren't going to decide who wins. The people will. We have an End of Quarter Fundraising Deadline at the end of the month. Our numbers go public after. Can you be 1 of the 112 more grassroots supporters we need TODAY to stay on track to flip this seat? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250917_em_fr_b1_HH_big]

Heidi Hall has spent her three-decade public service career working with others to solve problems, protect our land and water, improve health, and build opportunities for others, all while raising two boys primarily as a single mom.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250917_em_fr_b1_HH_big [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250917_em_fr_b1_HH_big]
Raised by parents who had persisted to make a middle-class life for their kids in Contra Costa County while lifting up others, Heidi was taught to push through and overcome challenges rather than complain about them. She learned to stick up for the vulnerable, to respect working people, and to value equal opportunity and justice.
After graduating from Pomona College and earning graduate degrees from Columbia and Rutgers, Heidi went to work for the Rockefeller Foundation promoting reproductive care and then began her career at the Environmental Protection Agency, stopping the dumping of toxic waste and holding corporate polluters accountable.
Today, Heidi chairs the Nevada County Board of Supervisors, where she’s taken on homelessness, expanded broadband access, and worked to reduce crime and illegal cannabis growth. Heidi flipped her seat from red to blue – and now she’s ready to do it again in Congress to take on toxic politics in Washington and put people first.

clean_body: [] Friend, when I moved to Grass Valley to get away from the city life and raise my two boys, I didn't think that I'd ever run for Congress. [] But looking back now, it's one of the most important decisions I've ever made. I joined this race to unseat Kevin Kiley because I was tired of seeing him constantly put the Republican Party and his career over our communities. Even though pundits claimed that this race would be tough for a challenger, I knew that with Trump in office, Kiley would be no better than a lapdog and that we desperately needed a leader who actually cared about the people they represented. As we introduced our platform and spread our message, polls showed that voters agreed and that we had closed the gap, putting us in an extremely tight race. Friend, no matter what the congressional maps may be on Election Day, I want you to know that nothing matters more to me than creating a better future for you, for our district, and for the two boys who brought me to Grass Valley and started this all. This seat could decide control of Congress. Party bosses aren't going to decide who wins. The people will. We have an End of Quarter Fundraising Deadline at the end of the month. Our numbers go public after. Can you be 1 of the 112 more grassroots supporters we need TODAY to stay on track to flip this seat? subject: Biden DOJ targeted Charlie — the truth is out.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | |
---
| | [](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/VfL49Hpv7iSzVIM19o0-_YgJHOZxW5Ge7iqgUAHvilE3nvXwGI5jMWfhQ-hJjqpnJxr2-a-MG0z2eTr4eAKdCSJLrSeOt4oi0Obg2NaT9raZthO57ZOCmJ0i4g-Gp3vCrw510xMYuqQ9vRdxGAaXdHdbPwydngjjW0B5lDvWP_cLolU9jqk08gi1FwmWEnQEla5OX6wQHZa8t353hrV2ipAfV6rKSqfS8_hxx6M0_sqSKBVnJStj4ekz3A46wZlEdBjJfYfmntX89AyFiD6cGMJdcNirb_Wqkn9xIHigDWVv6XwdC7SgfbbZECymANEAebgiQO1YuQI04wbANfIRhjOkq5tAKFHXla4IAlEM34K6E998iNEYKvANuBuX03K4ljkuVEAQPD3eCfJysSR6XyAjwON7yUGq9c8nXzS7LQEM9gfLpsfXUCajsrZxzDqrf7LkTrdyx_2JOVc/fLT6tedoKFxOxDA8KC5-9Z1E4-UHvYnI/12)
---
| | The truth is coming out — the Biden DOJ targeted Charlie Kirk and TPUSA. This is yet another example of Joe Biden weaponizing government power to silence and intimidate political opponents. It’s unacceptable, and it’s a threat to every American who stands for free speech and faith. But Charlie was never intimidated. He stood strong, spoke the truth, and pointed people to Jesus until the very end. That courage is his legacy—and it calls us to action.
---
| | [](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/meZJTGoL_UI7yZeycFpqg7SjOECFZObiFRNnra-aXiy9Ss3R7QAU0CdwwS2PrhD72ZyILqy8trqlOdhV_sRuenRpYJPHNt8JHoHaLVl5C4A5b9jJ7G5vNJqLPJQ6EeJLAJ3T0ab6KZeSLMnOq9cL1gRB-I5xUihgyBQUjfRahbMNfB54uO6hrm__Lep4YAsiRhRlonIVhbAcy4jCeIJbuuLdqR2PaKH6pC888sIg8OlfzGLWlegkKnI5FY8wUKoUPEuhHAQEZKfCI4rr01pztKNCncAPAIN8qLb5jlwYawgRnu_G-E1B6P0-P3x_taXrniLsXCZu3HyPu5EbV0uUP_qHmOtZcLAzeHtO8KwOeClRXjvKTW_KaEx6x60TyMrfhqDMYQJFUddSaL55kfn0Xdg_8Bxfpsun98qDw0Yv7GDxU3o9tE5w86OvsyJNhDHrGghdgtz5TL5i-qk/jx-Ft80hVmp-vMPxj6P7i40AmFZ3oaOn/12)
---

He stood strong, spoke the truth, and pointed people to Jesus until the very end. That courage is his legacy—and it calls us to action. | | The Left created the climate of hate and division we’ve lived under for years. # Braun, Indiana Office of Commerce announce Power Up Indiana initiative
---
| | Fox 59
David Gay
September 9, 2025 [https://fox59.com/indianapolitics/braun-indiana-office-of-commerce-announce-power-up-indiana-initiative/](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/8IWwuMAkXHJ4AJmy8pXGfQq5US200xd6neV0t-Pl6cZrV3amOyKF5T-rWwuiha-axgms7brs0aRiSYde0mP38lk6NaLZlFsNjNKyPLpKZY-ynaaGOHT5QwS1riKJLJAFUacQ9KQdZKuZrW-ykZRt2jWhQ5YvWrCSDIBV28mZu4f6vK_TvVwM-JpJ2caBr9FB87j7wy7y-0sOWgo_RVcs3lOU79Y-_ZH-4RQUbjjppsps-YDapDm1ZYvwvkZ7L3vBzeo04FEcv_Uqk0Rqxhd_cug0EWgec7RVZ7ItY-rzM8VSBSWfLisFAQwnuKTmfTHtAPHN6s8e6bgsaz5JBvs_TCPvmdhPO9ayIRAI5xyYBnGjhQ0zRRFzC1IN3e42QYDOGFBjG--FRdLMk53y-HGoqu8zsNiJqgn3OrB_CteJsiAdyCP42Lia56zcSo95McrW6q6DeTjN06O4z7v4A7O-YjaC_oSO2DhwmWPZBhuLQ06u7YGIy0KnRxhTenhbT9raaIzKrzIZli8dJf_Q2rBnPMjpDgo6VKNKsRbt-UtF1ex4HeWXpKuSRYMdKSpM/I2MPImCQ4QvXkXzZZQgn5R3RpYY2WT3w/12)
INDIANAPOLIS — “The talent you need is already on the job. Now, let’s empower them.” That’s the message of Power Up Indiana, a new initiative announced by Indiana Gov. Mike Braun and the Indiana Office of Commerce on Tuesday. According to a news release from Braun’s office, Power Up Indiana incentivizes employers to “invest within by training and promoting current jobholders.” This comes as officials with the Indiana Department of Workforce Development state that Indiana is at “full employment.” “Power Up Indiana targets incentives to established Hoosier businesses and workers,” Braun said in the release. “We are growing employees’ paychecks while strengthening Indiana companies.”
---
---
“Power Up Indiana targets incentives to established Hoosier businesses and workers,” Braun said in the release. “We are growing employees’ paychecks while strengthening Indiana companies.”
---
The initiative’s website states that employers will be rewarded through upskill training, so employers can be ready for the skills needed for high-value and high-paying jobs. The purpose of the initiative is to:
* Celebrate companies already leading in upskilling
* Shift Indiana’s economic development focus toward talent capacity
* Equip more employers to do the same through clear incentives and accessible tools
* Strengthen regional and sector-based partnerships that can scale impact statewide

“It recognizes and rewards companies that train, retrain and advance talent from within,” the website states, “and builds a culture of lifelong learning across the state.” The initiative is open to Indiana businesses of all sizes, the release said, “from manufacturers and healthcare providers to logistics firms and Main Street employers.” The initiative has the following eligibility requirements:
* Indiana-based company
* Company is upskilling current employees through training, certifications or leadership pathways
* Tracking growing wages.

For participants in the initiative, the release said the provided training solutions are tailored to the respective companies. Officials said that funding reimbursement for the training is also available. “This is how we reward leadership, raise wages, and make Indiana more competitive—one worker at a time,” Indiana Secretary of Commerce David Adams said in the release. “This program marks a significant step toward a more competitive, future-ready workforce.” According to a news release from the Indiana Chamber of Commerce, Todd Hurst, the chamber’s senior vice president of strategic partnerships and impact, praised the new initiative. “We applaud the Governor’s focus on upskilling that leads to advancement retention and a stronger economy in Indiana,” Hurst said in the release. “We think the Power Up initiative is aligned to support the talent needs of the state and will be beneficial to Hoosier enterprises. “We look forward to working with the Indiana Department of Workforce Development in communicating about the program and helping employers advance their talent development strategies,” he continued. “This will give employers the tools needed to upscale their teams.” For more information about the Power Up Indiana initiative, [click here](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/zXOnsD828fvHcyOXqic3tE8EFXkO7RPB5TRFI34w3HegQM6CvHt-G6zDvcl3BWU2zo-0xB-TXAfAtbEkbYnvgA-mquyUqUcu05iHr7vUpCdHEBd3yZflTbxBcbjyiUdCOuAXU7HntDfp2RPuyCzd-JBgsNA-YBNLbqCbkuQK4Jn8Bb6Ex0fajnx5D_zKipZGK8B8wZAES-vKZoI-LX1vjtf-jzW1Iq6KoDcsr-bWzQ5ASfl5xNsrm-6L1oq8MLYpBPhkRsGJcNWqNKjfjYQxufGvDB6yvVPD-ggHwr98_PyhotyYIJ_Mq1-iSuzkihliX-77guL9n0aEqrVj-Q2rIIK9sR-Bbt5HamZVfP-fKQyCyIL4NgKFYyV1j862/rv_BpRNLK9HL07cHBZhlKOaqKjCoPLF7/12).

Officials said that funding reimbursement for the training is also available. “This is how we reward leadership, raise wages, and make Indiana more competitive—one worker at a time,” Indiana Secretary of Commerce David Adams said in the release. “This program marks a significant step toward a more competitive, future-ready workforce.” According to a news release from the Indiana Chamber of Commerce, Todd Hurst, the chamber’s senior vice president of strategic partnerships and impact, praised the new initiative. “We applaud the Governor’s focus on upskilling that leads to advancement retention and a stronger economy in Indiana,” Hurst said in the release. “We think the Power Up initiative is aligned to support the talent needs of the state and will be beneficial to Hoosier enterprises. “We look forward to working with the Indiana Department of Workforce Development in communicating about the program and helping employers advance their talent development strategies,” he continued. “This will give employers the tools needed to upscale their teams.” For more information about the Power Up Indiana initiative, . | | | | | | PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE. | | NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. WWW.INDIANA.GOP. | | 101 W. OHIO ST., SUITE 2200 INDIANAPOLIS, IN 46204 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |
