subject: Wiley is running for Wake County DA!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley for Wake**
body:
It’s time to bring experience and real change to our local justice system. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115412377/570229535/-343666687?refcode=AU_GWN_EG_GEN_LAU_AC_20250917_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTI2N2E0OC0wOTk0LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IeJvq448GVHuD24XfSkA5neQ5rWlB_Nn74ajGEvZ7AA=&emci=c4f2e68c-ec93-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=f9267a48-0994-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=28008880)

Peter, we’ve got big news: **Wiley Nickel is running for Wake County District Attorney!** This race couldn’t come at a more important moment. As a former Congressman, State Senator, and Obama White House official, Wiley has spent his career fighting for justice and protecting our rights. He’s taken on extremists trying to restrict our freedoms. He’s stood up to corrupt politicians. And he’s delivered real results for working families right here in Wake County. Now, he’s bringing that fight home. Wiley’s running to make sure the law works for _everyone_ — not just the wealthy or well-connected. He’s running to keep our communities safe while also breaking the cycles of crime that keep people trapped. He’s running to restore public trust at a time when so many people feel like the system is rigged against them. Wiley knows the stakes, and he knows what it means to lead with integrity. As District Attorney, he’ll put justice ahead of politics, ensure equal treatment under the law, fight corruption, and protect the rights and freedoms that are under attack nationwide. **But to win this race, we need to start strong. A big show of support during launch week will prove that Wake County is ready for new leadership in the DA’s office. ** [**Will you add your name now to stand with Wiley in this fight for a fairer, safer Wake County?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115412382/570229542/934673495?refcode=AU_GWN_EG_GEN_LAU_AC_20250917_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTI2N2E0OC0wOTk0LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IeJvq448GVHuD24XfSkA5neQ5rWlB_Nn74ajGEvZ7AA=&emci=c4f2e68c-ec93-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=f9267a48-0994-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=28008880) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115412386/570229546/934673495?refcode=AU_GWN_EG_GEN_LAU_AC_20250917_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTI2N2E0OC0wOTk0LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IeJvq448GVHuD24XfSkA5neQ5rWlB_Nn74ajGEvZ7AA=&emci=c4f2e68c-ec93-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=f9267a48-0994-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=28008880)

— Team Latimer
* * *
_Begin Forwarded Message from George Latimer:_
Hi Peter,
Folks across our district are feeling the impact of decisions made in Washington by an out of control Republican Party. From attacks on healthcare, education, government programs, voting access and much more, too many politicians are putting their party ahead of their constituents – many of whom rely on these services to get by.
This past month, I’ve been on the ground across NY-16, meeting with constituents, small business owners, and community leaders. **One thing is clear: rising costs and inflation are top concerns for everyone—and they believe Trump’s policies are making things worse. We need economic policies that help working families, not the ultra-wealthy.**
I’ve spent my career focusing on delivering real results for our communities — making sure that our infrastructure and public services actually work, rather than getting lost in political games.
Fourteen months from now, we’re going to have a choice: do we let Republican chaos continue? Or, do we take back the House so we can pass common sense legislation, and deliver for our communities?
Taking back the House won’t be easy, but if we meet each and every one of our goals, and stick together, we can do it. **[With my mid-month fundraising deadline fast approaching, can you contribute $10 to my campaign and put us in the best possible position to take back the House in 2026?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115412546/570230033/-559829547?amount=10&source=SBD_GL_EM_FR_091725_MM02_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQwMzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWJlOTYwNjItMDk5NC1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=wtjGH_R-ip-kSQxqpeovUnWa6OFJhoqFrtjFRoISrt8=)**

Now, he's taking that work to the next level by serving as your Congressman, representing New York's 16th District. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Hey Peter, it’s the team here at Latimer HQ. Read on for George’s original message — Team Latimer Begin Forwarded Message from George Latimer: Hi Peter, Folks across our district are feeling the impact of decisions made in Washington by an out of control Republican Party. From attacks on healthcare, education, government programs, voting access and much more, too many politicians are putting their party ahead of their constituents – many of whom rely on these services to get by. This past month, I’ve been on the ground across NY-16, meeting with constituents, small business owners, and community leaders. One thing is clear: rising costs and inflation are top concerns for everyone—and they believe Trump’s policies are making things worse. We need economic policies that help working families, not the ultra-wealthy. I’ve spent my career focusing on delivering real results for our communities — making sure that our infrastructure and public services actually work, rather than getting lost in political games. Fourteen months from now, we’re going to have a choice: do we let Republican chaos continue? Or, do we take back the House so we can pass common sense legislation, and deliver for our communities? name: VoteVets HQ
subject: Doug Collins is out of control
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
He got confirmation votes because of his supposed “commitment” to the VA, and as soon as he got into office he started throwing it into the wood chipper
#
Peter, Doug Collins is systematically dismantling the Department of Veterans Affairs.
Tens of thousands of VA staff have already been forced out, and he plans to eliminate a total of 30,000 jobs. DOGE used AI to cancel countless contracts without proper review, leaving VA staff and patients in the lurch. He’s spending $34 billion in funding for the VA on privatized care, a 55% increase. 60,000 VA staff are up for a raise, and Collins hasn’t given it to them. And now, he’s stripped all of them of their union and collective bargaining rights.
All this from a guy who said he’d be the “biggest cheerleader” for VA staff. He got confirmation votes because of his supposed “commitment” to the VA, and as soon as he got into office he started throwing it into the wood chipper.
But what can we do about it?
Well, think about this for a minute: Trump and MAGA didn’t get into power by sitting around and feeling sorry for themselves. They did it by kicking and screaming, whining about every little thing. They act like toddlers, but we gotta hand it to them. It worked.
If we want to start getting results out of the VA the first thing we need to do is get angry and loud. Real loud.
So, today, we’re asking you to yell at Doug Collins.
**[Add your voice here and demand that Doug Collins make good on his promises. Be the VA’s biggest cheerleader. Stop the privatization, give your staff their raises, restore their collective bargaining rights, and make sure every VA employee gets to exercise their constitutional rights.**](https://act.votevets.org/signup/250917_vv_va/?source=em250917-1-120&akid=34620%2E3013755%2ExnLUjP)
| [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.votevets.org/signup/250917_vv_va/?source=em250917-1-120&akid=34620%2E3013755%2ExnLUjP)
---
It might seem small, but it’s not. Because when you add your name you are joining thousands of other people just like you. Together, we’re going to make them hear us.
Thanks,
The team at VoteVets

name: George Whitesides
subject: Our first FEC deadline since a GOP challenger filed to run against us.
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115413010/570231410/-1384072709?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzZiZTFiZS0wOTk0LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GIQmiQbLg45m17rp1A4TRUNNjsZl7-oIloE-27rFWEc=)
I’m going to pull back the curtain, Peter, because we’re rapidly approaching a key benchmark.

**The end of this month marks our end-of-quarter deadline -- our first public deadline since a Republican challenger officially filed papers to run against me.**

After this deadline hits, we’re required to report our fundraising numbers to the FEC. For the first time since my election, what we raise will be compared directly against our new opponent.

National Republicans will be watching closely to gauge whether it’s time to ramp up their attacks. And as one of the only Democrats to flip a red seat in 2024, they've already labeled me a top target.

This seat is a must-win for control of the House majority, and with Democrats back in power, we can finally hold this administration accountable.

clean_body: | = I’m going to pull back the curtain, Peter, because we’re rapidly approaching a key benchmark. The end of this month marks our end-of-quarter deadline -- our first public deadline since a Republican challenger officially filed papers to run against me. After this deadline hits, we’re required to report our fundraising numbers to the FEC. For the first time since my election, what we raise will be compared directly against our new opponent. National Republicans will be watching closely to gauge whether it’s time to ramp up their attacks. And as one of the only Democrats to flip a red seat in 2024, they've already labeled me a top target. This seat is a must-win for control of the House majority, and with Democrats back in power, we can finally hold this administration accountable. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | = ---|--- = | = = | =** Thank you, GW | = = = George has spent his career solving problems. name: Team Kaptur
subject: The Midwest is key.
body:
Friend, the road to retaking the House runs right through the Midwest. Our district is one of the most important races in the country.

| |
---
Friend, retaking the House starts right here in the Midwest. Our district is one of the most critical blue seats in the nation. It's a frontline battleground race that we _**must**_ win if we're going to retake the House in 2026. Republicans know that, which is why they're already doing everything they can to tip the election in their favor. They're spending millions in dark money and even trying to redraw Ohio's congressional districts to give themselves more seats. **[Friend, Ohio is not for sale, and there's too much on the line to lose. ### About Marcy Kaptur
Marcy Kaptur is a fighter for high-wage jobs, growing a workforce to meet the needs of the 21st century, and protecting our region’s most vital natural resource, the Great Lakes. She’s worked with both parties to secure investments in our communities and has been a true friend of veterans, seniors, first responders and working people. subject: DeSantis is planting seeds for Florida to follow in Texas’s footsteps

body:
We’ve got to fight together to hold the line against this attempt to destroy our democracy
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115413579/570233280/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVlNDdkNjVhLTBiOTQtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Q68ROUkhw0NI2iaIKv9o3eDc10N6K-K9NZa4EOSiGho=&emci=d1d56ce7-d093-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=5e47d65a-0b94-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=8431045)

Peter,

I hope you’re sitting down. Florida Governor Ron DeSantis went on Sean Hannity’s show recently and blamed _Democrats_ for Republicans’ latest attempts to steal power through gerrymandering in states like Texas, Missouri, Indiana, and beyond. **This is some of the strangest gaslighting I’ve seen in a long time.** He called out President Obama and A.G. Holder directly, alleging that they “gerrymandered brutally across the country in this decade’s census.” What an insane lie! What actually happened is the exact opposite, of course: President Obama and A.G. Holder started the NDRC to fight tirelessly to make elections fairer, driving out extreme partisan gerrymandering that had systematically taken power away from the voters. And that work paid off — helping deliver what the New York Times called the “fairest House map of the last 40 years.” Ron DeSantis is upset because he doesn’t like a level playing field. He knows what we know — **when maps are fair, Democrats win.** **DeSantis is lying about us as part of his attempt to plant seeds for Florida to follow in Texas’s footsteps and complete its own mid-decade redraw. We cannot let that happen.** [**Will you rush a donation to fight back against anti-democracy extremists like DeSantis, who want to unfairly lock in power for themselves at the expense of voters?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115413581/570233282/1110433579?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_DesantisGerrymander_email_20250917-NDRC-Tier1-DesantisGerrymander_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250917-NDRC-Tier1-DesantisGerrymander_&utm_campaign=DesantisGerrymander&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVlNDdkNjVhLTBiOTQtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Q68ROUkhw0NI2iaIKv9o3eDc10N6K-K9NZa4EOSiGho=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

And get this: Now, DeSantis wants Florida to suddenly be awarded an “extra seat in Congress,” which would allow him to redraw its map once again — to consolidate even more power for himself and his party. He even says they’re “entitled to” it.
**The stakes here couldn’t be higher. Anti-democracy extremists like DeSantis are trying to silence millions of Americans. The NDRC is committed to doing everything we can to hold the line against this assault on our democracy.**

clean_body: We’ve got to fight together to hold the line against this attempt to destroy our democracy | Peter, I hope you’re sitting down. Florida Governor Ron DeSantis went on Sean Hannity’s show recently and blamed Democrats for Republicans’ latest attempts to steal power through gerrymandering in states like Texas, Missouri, Indiana, and beyond. This is some of the strangest gaslighting I’ve seen in a long time. He called out President Obama and A.G. Holder directly, alleging that they “gerrymandered brutally across the country in this decade’s census.” What an insane lie! What actually happened is the exact opposite, of course: President Obama and A.G. Holder started the NDRC to fight tirelessly to make elections fairer, driving out extreme partisan gerrymandering that had systematically taken power away from the voters. And that work paid off — helping deliver what the New York Times called the “fairest House map of the last 40 years.” Ron DeSantis is upset because he doesn’t like a level playing field. He knows what we know — when maps are fair, Democrats win. DeSantis is lying about us as part of his attempt to plant seeds for Florida to follow in Texas’s footsteps and complete its own mid-decade redraw. We cannot let that happen. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = And get this: Now, DeSantis wants Florida to suddenly be awarded an “extra seat in Congress,” which would allow him to redraw its map once again — to consolidate even more power for himself and his party. He even says they’re “entitled to” it. The stakes here couldn’t be higher. Anti-democracy extremists like DeSantis are trying to silence millions of Americans. The NDRC is committed to doing everything we can to hold the line against this assault on our democracy. = Thanks so much, Marina Jenkins Executive Director of the NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: I'll get right into it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi friends, I'll get right into it --

**_Chuck Schumer_** emailed you.
**_Kamala Harris_** emailed you.
**_James Carville_** emailed you.
**_Mark Kelly_** emailed you.
**_Roy Cooper_** emailed you.
**_Sherrod Brown_** emailed you.
**_Adam Schiff_** emailed you.
**_Marc Elias_** emailed you.
And now, **_I've_** emailed you too!

All of us emailed you because ever since the GOP trifecta took office, Donald Trump and his allies in Congress have worked against the American people. **[Flipping the Senate blue is the _best_ and _surest_ way _to stop them._](https://go.dscc.org/go/21844?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250917-KirstenGillibrand-GillibrandTheyAllEmailedYou-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250917-KirstenGillibrand-GillibrandTheyAllEmailedYou-ETG-sl1&akid=21191%2E9716520%2EwAxaCY)**

Without control of the Senate, Donald Trump won't be able to pass his destructive ideas into law. He'll lose his rubber stamp for his extreme nominees. So right now, **we need _all hands on deck_ to win this thing.**

This team of Democratic leaders is staying in the fight from now until Election Day. We KNOW this grassroots team is ready to fight, too -- but we have a MASSIVE fundraising deadline coming up at _midnight_ , we're about to fall short, _and we don't have much time to catch up!_

**We must end Trump and his allies' dangerous, unchecked power -- and that work starts right now with you, me, and this wonderful team of grassroots supporters banding together to put more Democrats in the Senate.**

**[So please, join us by chipping in $5 right now to stop the GOP's agenda in its tracks.>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/21844?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250917-KirstenGillibrand-GillibrandTheyAllEmailedYou-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250917-KirstenGillibrand-GillibrandTheyAllEmailedYou-ETG-sl1&akid=21191%2E9716520%2EwAxaCY)**

We need your help to fight for the Senate. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

subject: I won’t sugarcoat it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress
body:
Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/lNYIdkhPikOBrh6RGc-KWg2?unsubscribedata=2jzxIwjHM4J6FQ%2FX%2FF8BBC9Waz7pFbBl73sTcw%2FChbODGIErDuHiM7PDytp01g9uokA1Q24o8MOKmlhsEYnuyCVCxQ%2B7r%2FUSaTUv284FOk7J62Z%2BLUOlx%2FVjQymDOBlL2GbgXjAxXbiIv2%2BODmSqGud9aMLBFGA5fh2pquDZ9BfkxXet5VwA%2FWwrTWLvYws4OeyjOQ%2FEPOumQ0vGFOiVmqLiCqJcvkmFFWGcfHX8b%2F2%2B6wmyDSQkH9zHL6lHa8FEVkikp%2FOgT4aVZUVfUPyBMQuuFwJrfP%2Fg%2FxboiBGCXDLAN3bfFDR8F8pWcFwLdQd8VPC5Tfi5ehSmIpHQQfjIVd2JLDkR05DkmpKRtUogOHohiq2qJLLZX%2F1tnLjcv2z2Vx1c5PkBKpvcUdnSZ4HOuWAq1dMuWtoK6rRhcQbQ1Qw%3D)

| |
---
Saludos — I’m reaching out personally, because I need you to hear this before the night’s over. Our $10,000 mid-month fundraising deadline hits tonight, and I won’t sugarcoat it: we’re not where we need to be yet. Republicans are pouring large amounts of dark money into this race. They’re testing attacks, running ads, and doing everything they can to flip this seat — because they know NM-02 is one of their best shots at keeping the House RED. This mid-month push is our chance to show we’re ready for the fight ahead — and to prove we have the grassroots power to close Q3 strong. We’re close, but I need one final push to hit our goal before midnight. Will you chip in right now to help us close the gap and show we’re not backing down? name: Lizzie Fletcher
subject: Defending our Constitution
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/Non-Re-Elect%20Logo.png]
It’s Constitution Day, the anniversary of the day our founders completed signing the revolutionary document in 1787.
Revolutionary it was. The new government was not only a new government, it was a new form of government, vesting the power not in a King but instead vesting the power of the government with the people. As President Lincoln later described it: a government “of the people, by the people, and for the people.” The Constitution, in its genius, separates the power of government into three branches—each to serve as a check on the others.
This year, during the second Trump administration, our Constitution is being tested every single day and in every way imaginable. I have written to you often about those attacks on our Constitution. We see attacks on the rights and privileges our Constitution guarantees for citizens—from freedom of speech, press, assembly, and religion to freedom to travel to citizenship itself. We see attacks on the separation of powers and the role of the Congress and the courts—from failing to execute the laws the Congress has passed to rejecting the decisions of the courts. And, sadly, we have seen this Republican-led Congress let it happen.
But we see something else in the streets. We see Americans from every corner of the country standing up for our country and our Constitution. From the “No Kings” rallies to letters to the editor, Americans are speaking up and speaking out. I have met with so many people who are not giving up and not giving in, some—young and old—getting involved in politics for the very first time.
And at a scary time. This year, as we have witnessed the increased attack on our constitution, we also see escalating attacks on our citizens. Dangerous rhetoric and actions have turned political disagreements into physical violence, including assassinations, arson, threats, and intimidation. There is no place for this political violence in a democratic society. None.
Every American should be safe—and feel safe—participating in civic life, whether voting, debating issues, attending events, or making their voices heard on issues that matter to them. All of us must reject the effort to divide Americans, to dehumanize our neighbors, and to demonize those who disagree. Instead, we must protect the right of every American to participate in our democratic society—and make it safe for them to do so.
At this difficult moment, the stakes could not be higher. But each of us can and must stand up and defend the founding principles and enduring values of our country. And we can look to our Constitution for inspiration and guidance, and to generations of Americans who have fought for its principles and for the American people.
Together we can do anything,
Lizzie Signature [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie_signature-1.png]

All I can say is _thank you_ , Peter.
Since I announced I’m running for reelection, I’ve been beyond humbled by the level of support we’ve received so far this week. Every contribution, personal endorsement, and message of encouragement from the members of this team has filled me with hope for the future.
We’re off to an incredible start — and it’s all because of you.
**I can’t thank you enough for being an early supporter of our grassroots campaign for Minnesota.** You are the power behind this team, Peter, so I’m counting on your continued support as we prepare for the many fights ahead.
[**Please chip in to help build our campaign’s early momentum. name: Rob Bonta
subject: We all have a role to play in a stronger and healthier democracy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
When fear keeps people from speaking out or showing up, democracy itself is at risk.
# [](https://act.robbonta.com/go/3?refcode=em250916&t=1&akid=1947%2E1088799%2EBkTAwn)
When I heard the news last week that conservative activist Charlie Kirk had been shot and killed, I was shocked and disgusted.
He leaves behind two children and a wife who can never hug him again. As a dad and a husband in the public eye, I feel those losses on a human level. I’m sad for his loved ones and dismayed at this horrific act of violence. No life should be ended because of their political views.[
](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-250916?refcode=em20250917-1947&refcode2=1947_1088799_BkTAwn&akid=1947%2E1088799%2EBkTAwn)
This is an important moment for reflection in our country. Our political discourse has grown too toxic. There has to be a clear line — and that line is violence. It is never acceptable, and it cannot continue.[
](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-250916?refcode=em20250917-1947&refcode2=1947_1088799_BkTAwn&akid=1947%2E1088799%2EBkTAwn)
We all have a role to play in creating a stronger and healthier democracy. Part of that is calling out and condemning political violence — no matter the party of the victim or the party of the perpetrator. And part of that is also continuing our passionate and peaceful work for progress.[
](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-250916?refcode=em20250917-1947&refcode2=1947_1088799_BkTAwn&akid=1947%2E1088799%2EBkTAwn)
So many people across the country are pushing to advance our society, taking on issues that touch their lives or the lives of their loved ones. So many are pouring their hearts into creating change, justice, and opportunity. That’s a good thing, and I encourage every one of you to continue speaking up and pushing for the values you hold dear. Engagement is the lifeblood of our democracy. [
](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-250916?refcode=em20250917-1947&refcode2=1947_1088799_BkTAwn&akid=1947%2E1088799%2EBkTAwn)
Today, let’s take a moment and acknowledge that throughout this important work for progress, there is a line in the sand no one must cross — because when fear of violence keeps people from speaking out or showing up, running for office, or even voting, democracy itself is at risk.[
](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-250916?refcode=em20250917-1947&refcode2=1947_1088799_BkTAwn&akid=1947%2E1088799%2EBkTAwn)
Thanks for reading.[
](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-250916?refcode=em20250917-1947&refcode2=1947_1088799_BkTAwn&akid=1947%2E1088799%2EBkTAwn)
Rob
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-250916?refcode=em20250917-1947&refcode2=1947_1088799_BkTAwn&akid=1947%2E1088799%2EBkTAwn)
Rob Bonta
Attorney General of California
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-250916?refcode=em20250917-1947&refcode2=1947_1088799_BkTAwn&akid=1947%2E1088799%2EBkTAwn)**
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.robbonta.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=1947%2E1088799%2EBkTAwn)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.robbonta.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.robbonta.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=1947%2E1088799%2EBkTAwn)

To give by check:
Rob Bonta for Attorney General 2026
c/o Deane & Company
1700 Tribute Road, Suite 201
Sacramento, CA 95815
Email us: [info@robbonta.com](mailto:info@robbonta.com)
PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642

No life should be ended because of their political views. This is an important moment for reflection in our country. Our political discourse has grown too toxic. name: Ashley from Team Taylor
subject: Winning an election is not easy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
body:
Right-wing special interests can swoop in at any time, spend tens of millions of dollars, and boost an unqualified, extreme candidate to victory.
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20250917-585&t=1&akid=589%2E294397%2ECXEFGd)
I wish elections were as simple as the strongest candidate winning.
If that were the case, we could all breathe easy knowing Judge Chris Taylor would be on the Wisconsin Supreme Court for the next decade.
But the truth is, winning an election is not easy.
Right-wing special interests can swoop in at any time, spend tens of millions of dollars, and boost an unqualified, extreme candidate to victory.
We’ve seen it happen in Wisconsin before:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_20250917_1_ak?amount=10&refcode=em20250917-585&refcode2=589_294397_CXEFGd&akid=589%2E294397%2ECXEFGd)
And unless we prepare now, it could happen again.
**That’s why we’re fundraising early and often — and Judge Chris Taylor is counting on this grassroots team to make sure we have the resources to fight back and win.**
[**Will you pitch in $10, or whatever makes sense for you, today to power this campaign?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_20250917_1_ak?amount=10&refcode=em20250917-585&refcode2=589_294397_CXEFGd&akid=589%2E294397%2ECXEFGd)

Thank you.
Ashley
Campaign Manager

name: Ken Martin (via Democrats.org)
subject: We can do better. We must be better.
body:
---
Derek, Yesterday, in my home state of Minnesota, there was a special election. Do you know why? Because voters had to fill the seat left empty by the murder of my dear friend Melissa Hortman. I knew Melissa for half my life. Three months ago, Melissa and her husband Mark were shot and killed in their home by a madman. One day they were here, and the next, they were stolen in a horrific assassination. Last week, Charlie Kirk was executed in broad daylight on a college campus by a maniac. It was a despicable, cowardly act that has left so many in our country grieving and angry. In both cases, the murderers will be held to account. In both cases, justice will be swift, and justice will prevail. But let me be blunt: I am sick and tired of losing friends to political violence. I know Republicans feel the same. **In this moment, we need leadership.** We've reached a breaking point in this epidemic of political violence, and Americans are asking for leadership, unity, and basic decency. In the past, in moments of national tragedy, we’ve turned to our president to calm the storms, to heal the divides, and to bring us together as Americans. But if I can speak freely here, Donald Trump has done absolutely nothing in this moment to bring us together. Instead, he has used political violence for political gain, including having his Department of Justice threaten to criminalize speech and stifle opposition. While this is unfortunately who we have become as a nation, it does not need to be who we are. Regardless of our views, regardless of our politics, we need to come together. And through the pain we’re feeling, these murders, this violence, they cannot be used as justification to abandon our basic ideals. As I said after Charlie Kirk was killed, in this great country, we make our opinions known in many ways. We protest, petition our government, go on the airwaves, and yes, we speak. We get loud, we get involved, we find community, and we vote. We make our opinions known at the ballot box. Through democracy. But we don’t chill belief and opinion with weapons and violence. We don’t bridge our differences with bullets. And we certainly don’t capitalize on pain to go after our own countrymen and women. We need to come together, denounce the violence happening in our country, and make clear what this moment calls for — courage and respect. Because, my friends, believing in America means understanding that, despite our fiercest of disagreements, none of us are enemies. We can do better. We must be better. Thank you. Ken Ken Martin
Chair
Democratic National Committee

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

name: Lateefah Simon
subject: Where the Constitution Stands Now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lateefah Simon for Congress
body:
This Constitution Day, I’m not reflecting. I’m fighting back. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115414251/570235723/658807468?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzg3NmRmODAtMGU5NC1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=R9urtFuff3ASuziNbDYvQhGDa4T8obJyQsQ6NsQqNa0=&emci=f8ccccc6-ed93-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=7876df80-0e94-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=22554739) [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115414252/570235724/-92377995?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzg3NmRmODAtMGU5NC1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=R9urtFuff3ASuziNbDYvQhGDa4T8obJyQsQ6NsQqNa0=) [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115414253/570235725/-1535407989?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzg3NmRmODAtMGU5NC1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=R9urtFuff3ASuziNbDYvQhGDa4T8obJyQsQ6NsQqNa0=)
---
| | Hi Friend, Today is Constitution Day, the anniversary of the signing of one of the most important documents in American history. But anniversaries aren’t just for remembering. They’re for reckoning. Because in 2025, the Constitution is under attack. In courtrooms and communities across the country, constitutional rights are being eroded in real time:
* The Supreme Court’s ruling on presidential immunity opened the door for future presidents to act beyond the reach of the law — a direct threat to the idea that no one is above the Constitution.
* The current administration has pushed executive overreach to new extremes, from proposing to end birthright citizenship to targeting lawyers and deploying federal force in Washington, D.C.
* Ongoing court battles over abortion access, voting rights, and environmental protections all hinge on the narrowing interpretation of constitutional freedoms.
* This month, the Supreme Court allowed racial profiling in immigration enforcement, stripping vital protections from immigrant communities and empowering discriminatory tactics.
* And Trump and extremist Republicans continue to reject constitutional checks and democratic norms, seeking unchecked power and political retribution.

Each of these actions signals a crisis, not just in law, but in trust, accountability, and democracy itself. That’s why I ran.
That’s why I’m in this fight.
And that’s why I’m not backing down. Whether I’m defending immigrant communities, protecting the Voting Rights Act, or holding the Administration accountable from the Oversight Committee, I’m fighting to make sure our Constitution works for **everyone** , not just the privileged few. **This Constitution Day, I’m asking you to help defend our constitutional protections, however you can.** | [**DONATE TODAY →** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115414254/570235726/978493616?refcode=E15260-20250917-ConstitutionDay-SB-Other&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzg3NmRmODAtMGU5NC1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=R9urtFuff3ASuziNbDYvQhGDa4T8obJyQsQ6NsQqNa0=)
---
We are in a fight for the soul of this democracy. And I’m proud to be in it — with you, and for you.
With hope and resolve,
** — Lateefah**
|

clean_body: This Constitution Day, I’m not reflecting. I’m fighting back. | = = | | Hi Friend, Today is Constitution Day, the anniversary of the signing of one of the most important documents in American history. But anniversaries aren’t just for remembering. They’re for reckoning. Because in 2025, the Constitution is under attack. In courtrooms and communities across the country, constitutional rights are being eroded in real time: The Supreme Court’s ruling on presidential immunity opened the door for future presidents to act beyond the reach of the law — a direct threat to the idea that no one is above the Constitution. The current administration has pushed executive overreach to new extremes, from proposing to end birthright citizenship to targeting lawyers and deploying federal force in Washington, D.C. Ongoing court battles over abortion access, voting rights, and environmental protections all hinge on the narrowing interpretation of constitutional freedoms. This month, the Supreme Court allowed racial profiling in immigration enforcement, stripping vital protections from immigrant communities and empowering discriminatory tactics. And Trump and extremist Republicans continue to reject constitutional checks and democratic norms, seeking unchecked power and political retribution. Each of these actions signals a crisis, not just in law, but in trust, accountability, and democracy itself. That’s why I ran. That’s why I’m in this fight. And that’s why I’m not backing down. Whether I’m defending immigrant communities, protecting the Voting Rights Act, or holding the Administration accountable from the Oversight Committee, I’m fighting to make sure our Constitution works for everyone , not just the privileged few. This Constitution Day, I’m asking you to help defend our constitutional protections, however you can. | = We are in a fight for the soul of this democracy. And I’m proud to be in it — with you, and for you. With hope and resolve, — Lateefah | | | ---|---|--- Lateefah Simon for Congress 1714 Franklin St #100 - 438 Oakland, CA 94612 mailto:info@lateefahsimon.com = = Lateefah Simon has spent her career fighting for justice—fighting for folks without a voice. Now, as a 25-year veteran organizer and nationally recognized advocate for civil rights and social justice, she’s fighting this fight from the Capitol. In Lateefah, CA-12 has a proven champion. name: John Padora
subject: This is my “why”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Padora for Colorado
body:
My story and why this campaign matters.

| [|
---](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/7meQmoqTfjGrxcS4I-Yh9Q~~/AAUS1hA~/PApabVJ4Btf9I_1hEzteOnVNMC08qol5zGewWF9wUeAVyezAF0FedGyC3mFlZnLkCf1sT-wh2_9Yab3FOHIbSqi1J9v4ticIAjw30u3WhPZKWLD1WfS21T6UpHTBPuL2)
| | Hi friend, Every so often, I stop and ask myself why I’m doing this. Why I’m running for Congress. Why I’m putting my family and myself through the grind of a campaign against Donald Trump’s MAGA machine. And the answer always takes me back to where I came from. When my dad got sick with MS, we relied on Medicaid and food stamps just to get by. I know what it’s like to wonder how you’ll put food on the table. Later, I fought through opioid addiction and chronic pain — struggles that nearly broke me. But I came out the other side with a deeper purpose: to fight like hell for families who are barely holding it together. **That’s my “why.”** Because right now, too many families in Eastern Colorado are being left behind while politicians in Washington bicker, posture, and chase headlines. Folks don’t need another celebrity politician or corporate puppet. They need someone who’s lived the struggle, who understands what it means to get knocked down, and who’s not afraid to fight for them. [**That’s why I refuse corporate PAC money. That’s why I’m running this campaign powered by people like you. FBI Director Kash Patel **[clashed with Democrat Rep. Eric Swalwell](https://substack.com/redirect/4035dec6-44bd-4ed0-ac6d-204c9be8a39d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** over then number of times President Donald Trump's name allegedly appears in the Epstein Files.
"Why don't you focus on reducing violent crime in this country and the number of pedophiles that are illegally harbored in your sanctuary cities in California?!! I'll work with you on that!!!" Patel exploded at Swalwell.
**[Patel didn't fall for his trap... Watch the revealing exchange here: ](https://substack.com/redirect/4035dec6-44bd-4ed0-ac6d-204c9be8a39d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/4035dec6-44bd-4ed0-ac6d-204c9be8a39d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# President Trump greets UK royal family amidst rallies breaking out
President Trump arrived at Windsor Castle on Wednesday for his second state visit to Britain, receiving a ceremonial welcome from long time friend King Charles III. The visist solidifies Trump as the **[first president to be invited for two state visits](https://substack.com/redirect/6aa1fc70-4845-499f-9ac2-812994be604b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** by the British monarch.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6aa1fc70-4845-499f-9ac2-812994be604b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* The **[lavish welcome](https://substack.com/redirect/b1de28bc-d3c3-4926-98b9-0581dca1deea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** included a 41-gun salute, military procession with 120 horses and 1,300 servicemen, and performances of "The Star-Spangled Banner."
* King Charles III and Queen Camilla host Trump and first lady Melania Trump for the two-day visit, which features a state banquet for 150 guests and accommodations at Windsor Castle while Buckingham Palace undergoes renovations through 2027.
* "My relationship is very good with the U.K., and Charles, as you know, who's now king, is my friend," **[Trump told the U.K. Standard](https://substack.com/redirect/c0d27762-74aa-48dd-a6cb-57347771bd25?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** ahead of the planned visit.
* Outside of Parliament Square Wednesday, **[a group of protesters](https://substack.com/redirect/b1de28bc-d3c3-4926-98b9-0581dca1deea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** gathered in a "'Trump Not Welcome' rally Wednesday.
* The visit includes a tribute to Queen Elizabeth II, with Trump expected to lay a wreath at her tomb in St George's Chapel, and concludes Thursday with meetings between the president and UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer.

* * *
**[Together with Next Thing Technologies](https://substack.com/redirect/6d48c59b-40b2-46ac-9aee-0ac22c6e9f23?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **[The $1Trillion Mineral Push Just Made This Battery Company Unstoppable](https://substack.com/redirect/6d48c59b-40b2-46ac-9aee-0ac22c6e9f23?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6d48c59b-40b2-46ac-9aee-0ac22c6e9f23?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Right now, almost every battery in America runs on **lithium**.
Your phone. Your laptop. Your car. Even the power grids storing clean energy. But here's the catch: **China controls over 80% of the world 's lithium**.9
That means America's future is tied to a supply chain we don't control. If China slows exports or raises prices...we're stuck.
Washington knows this can't continue. That's why the White House just launched a **$1 trillion push to bring mineral production back home.** 9 10
The goal: secure America's energy independence and cut China out of the equation.1
This shift opens the door for a new winner.
Because while everyone else fights over lithium, one overlooked solution is ready right now... **sodium-ion batteries**.1
Here's why they're a game changer:
* Sodium is**1,400x more abundant** **than lithium** , with significant reserves located in the U.S9
* Batteries can be made at a **fraction of the cost of lithium -- up to 90% less expensive in the first year of use.6**
* They last longer8, are safer7, and can be built at scale using domestic materials.1 9

And one company has already cracked the code:**Next Thing Technologies.**
Their batteries scale from**massive grid storage projects** to**affordable $100/month home backup systems.** 1 9
That means they can power everything from America's infrastructure to your neighborhood.1
The timing couldn't be better.
Billions in federal funding are flowing into U.S. mineral projects. Manufacturing is coming back home. And America is determined to break free from China's supply chains.1
Next Thing Technologies is positioned to be the **backbone of this new energy era**.1
Over **7,800 investors** have already backed them with **$7M+**.3
You **[can still invest in their current round at just $6/share](https://substack.com/redirect/6d48c59b-40b2-46ac-9aee-0ac22c6e9f23?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) 4** -- **with up to 20% bonus shares** 4

* * *
# **Federal prosecutors present key evidence in Trump assassination attempt trial**
The federal case against Ryan Routh, **[charged with attempting to kill President Donald Trump](https://substack.com/redirect/7bf648e8-614f-4b3c-9e5d-dd32fadb9b66?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** at his Florida golf course, continued Wednesday with critical witness testimony as the proceedings entered their eighth day.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7bf648e8-614f-4b3c-9e5d-dd32fadb9b66?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **New witnesses set to take the stand, including the alleged gun seller.** Ronnie Jay Oxendine is set to testify today about reportedly providing Routh with the weapon central to the case. Several FBI personnel are also set to appear, including digital evidence specialist Laura E. Haller and task force member Patrick M. Lantry.
* **Digital communications and forensic evidence dominated Tuesday's court session.** Investigators presented text messages and WhatsApp communications allegedly from Routh's confiscated phones, including statements expressing animosity toward Trump with phrases like "I hate him... shan't get elected again." FBI forensic specialists testified that DNA analysis connected Routh to various items found at what prosecutors describe as a concealed shooting position, including weaponry, a bag, and protective gear.
* **Judge Aileen Cannon controlled courtroom proceedings while Routh represents himself.** The Trump-appointed judge pressured government attorneys to simplifify questioning and stopping Routh's disruptions. Legal experts expect prosecutors to complete their presentation by Friday, after which Routh will have the opportunity to call defense witnesses next week.

The **[September 2024 incident](https://substack.com/redirect/c34e86f3-690e-4b94-b9a3-03160faa49f6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** occurred while Trump was at his West Palm Beach golf facility, marking one of the most serious alleged threats against the president in recent memory.
* * *
# Bill Ackman fires back at Candace Owens theory of Charlie Kirk/Israel blackmail
Billionaire Bill Ackman **[published WhatsApp messages](https://substack.com/redirect/46e5601f-cf95-412d-9e0e-5c662c18a613?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** with Charlie Kirk showing friendly exchanges, including dinner invitations with their wives, to refute Candace Owens' allegations that he staged a Hamptons "intervention" to blackmail Kirk over Israel policy.
* **Denies threatening or pressuring Kirk:** Ackman explicitly stated he "never threatened Charlie Kirk, Turning Point or anyone associated with him" and "never blackmailed anyone," while clarifying the Hamptons event was held at a hotel, not his house, and involved no NDAs or secret agreements.
* **Reveals Kirk's own complaints about pro-Israel pressure:** Ackman disclosed that Kirk had complained to him that "some pro-Israel advocates view any criticism of Israel as antisemitic" and both agreed this perspective was wrong, contradicting claims of Ackman pressuring Kirk on Israel issues.
* **Disputes Tucker Carlson disinvitation claims:** Ackman denied reports that he pressured Kirk to rescind Tucker Carlson's invitation to events, stating he only asked why Carlson had attacked him and that Kirk thought Ackman's response was "a great one."
* **Owens dismisses response as propaganda:** Candace Owens rejected Ackman's evidence, calling The New York Post "a propagandist outfit for Israel" and refusing to participate in what she termed "another predictable, radical-Zionist hit piece," while claiming an "awakening of the masses" about the "occupied state of our nation."

Candace Owen's claims can be seen in her podcast episode responding to the Charlie Kirk's assassination investigation, here:
[](https://substack.com/redirect/b6918dd6-aec9-4904-b3d8-d56d9bdc492a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

name: Deb Haaland
subject: most people running for office wouldn’t choose to speak candidly about alcohol addiction
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
Thank you for hearing my story.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=4484%2E400544%2E7cPVuy)
I want to tell you about a milestone I’m proud of: **I have reached 35 years of sobriety.**
Most people running for office wouldn’t choose to speak candidly about alcohol addiction. But I’m not like most people running for office. My story is different.
I was about 23 years old when I made the brave decision to get sober. It was a struggle at first, but I persevered because I was committed to doing all I could. I went to AA meetings and probably read 20 books on addiction.
My struggles made me fierce, which is why I chose to speak openly about my sobriety in my very first campaign ad when I ran for Congress 7 years ago. And I’m so glad I did. I'll never forget the day we went to the Marigold Parade in the South Valley, and people came up to me right and left and thanked me for my honesty in my ad. They shared stories about themselves, their parents, and their loved ones struggling with addiction, and it brought tears to my eyes that people felt represented by someone like me.
**My journey to sobriety taught me that you must face hard truths if you want to make change, which is why I’ll never shy away from the tough fights that lie ahead for New Mexico.**
High prices, homelessness, crime, and addiction weigh heavy on our state. As Governor, I will address these head on by investing in addiction services, helping families get the resources to support their loved ones, and requiring health insurers in New Mexico cover drug and alcohol treatment.
**My promise to you: I will always be honest about topics other politicians might try to sweep under the rug, because I believe if we’re brave, we can heal.**
Thank you for hearing my story. That’s how we’ll win this race — by sharing our stories, lifting each other up, and being fierce enough to fight for the bright future New Mexicans deserve. **[If you can, I’d be so grateful if you’d pitch in $5 so we can keep traveling New Mexico to hear from voters and win this race.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250917_1_sobriety?amount=5&refcode=em20250917-4484&refcode2=4484_400544_7cPVuy&akid=4484%2E400544%2E7cPVuy)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250917_1_sobriety?amount=5&refcode=em20250917-4484&refcode2=4484_400544_7cPVuy&akid=4484%2E400544%2E7cPVuy)**
Thank you for everything.
Deb
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250917-1&t=2&refcode2=4484_400544_7cPVuy&akid=4484%2E400544%2E7cPVuy)**
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Sign up for Texts](https://deb4gov.us/text-me)
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=3&akid=4484%2E400544%2E7cPVuy)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=4&akid=4484%2E400544%2E7cPVuy)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
clean_body: Thank you for hearing my story. I want to tell you about a milestone I’m proud of: I have reached 35 years of sobriety. Most people running for office wouldn’t choose to speak candidly about alcohol addiction. But I’m not like most people running for office. My story is different. I was about 23 years old when I made the brave decision to get sober. It was a struggle at first, but I persevered because I was committed to doing all I could. I went to AA meetings and probably read 20 books on addiction. My struggles made me fierce, which is why I chose to speak openly about my sobriety in my very first campaign ad when I ran for Congress 7 years ago. And I’m so glad I did. I'll never forget the day we went to the Marigold Parade in the South Valley, and people came up to me right and left and thanked me for my honesty in my ad. They shared stories about themselves, their parents, and their loved ones struggling with addiction, and it brought tears to my eyes that people felt represented by someone like me. My journey to sobriety taught me that you must face hard truths if you want to make change, which is why I’ll never shy away from the tough fights that lie ahead for New Mexico. High prices, homelessness, crime, and addiction weigh heavy on our state. As Governor, I will address these head on by investing in addiction services, helping families get the resources to support their loved ones, and requiring health insurers in New Mexico cover drug and alcohol treatment. My promise to you: I will always be honest about topics other politicians might try to sweep under the rug, because I believe if we’re brave, we can heal. Thank you for hearing my story. That’s how we’ll win this race — by sharing our stories, lifting each other up, and being fierce enough to fight for the bright future New Mexicans deserve. Thank you for everything. Deb

“Vance pitches Trump’s sweeping new law as a ‘working families’ tax cut’ in swing-state Georgia” - The Associated Press

Did you see this, friend?

After Republicans passed Donald Trump’s massive tax break for billionaires, JD Vance had the audacity to come to Georgia last month and flat-out lied to folks – telling them the bill was actually a “working families’ tax cut.”

But the cold, hard truth is this: Trump’s budget bill is going to rob up to 15 million Americans of their health care, raise costs on virtually every American, and take food away from hungry children – all to help billionaires get richer.

Trump, Vance, and their allies in Washington are selling out working folks and lying about it simply because they think they can. So today, I’m asking for your help to send a loud and clear message to the GOP that they’re wrong – that the American people are outraged and that they’re going to hold Republicans accountable.

My team created a new poll so you can make it clear where you stand, and I’m counting on your response by midnight tonight. Please, speak out now:

Do you approve of Trump and Vance’s budget bill?

body:
#

[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-schiff-2025.TGWBI2&refcode=em250917-1-b&t=1&akid=10882%2E3935704%2EAXjLHH)

Friend -- it's Senator Adam Schiff. I asked GIFFORDS if I could reach out with an important update.
Yesterday, FBI Director Kash Patel appeared before the Senate Judiciary Committee.
It didn’t go well for him — to say the least.
He struggled to answer questions about his campaign of retribution at the FBI, where he is illegally firing top-notch agents who investigated Trump.
After claiming for years that Epstein had a list of powerful clients for the women he trafficked, he now tried to persuade the American people that the only name on Jeffrey Epstein’s list was...Jeffrey Epstein.
But what really set him off was when I asked why Epstein’s co-conspirator was suddenly moved to a minimum security prison after seemingly exonerating Trump.
At that point, he just lost it and began screaming at me.
**Friend, this is par for the course for Kash Patel. But it is shameful behavior from anyone, let alone the nation’s FBI Director.**
I’ve raised red flags about Kash Patel before.
He’s spread dangerous, false conspiracy theories about a “deep state” that is unfairly persecuting MAGA world.
He’s called for and is conducting a comprehensive “housecleaning” or purge of professionals at the Justice Department.
While I served on the House Intelligence Committee, Kash Patel was a major part of the efforts to sabotage a thorough investigation of Russia’s involvement in the 2016 election — and for his work, he was rewarded with a post in the Trump Administration.
I could go on, but I think you understand how unfit Kash Patel is to serve as FBI Director. He’s a threat to the critical mission of the Bureau, not to mention the justice system and our democracy — and we need to hold him and the entire Trump administration to account.
[**Help me continue to speak out about Kash Patel and the dangers he poses in his high-ranking position in the Trump administration. Please split a contribution between my campaign and GIFFORDS PAC today.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-schiff-2025.TGWBI2&refcode=em250917-1-b&t=2&akid=10882%2E3935704%2EAXjLHH)

name: Tucker Carlson
subject: Charlie’s fight is now ours
body:
META TAG (title): TheFederalistWire.com

@media (max-width:520px){.image_block div.fullWidth{max-width:100%!important;}.mobile_hide{display:none;}.row-content{width:100%!important;}.stack .column{width:100%;display:block;}.mobile_hide{min-height:0;max-height:0;max-width:0;overflow:hidden;font-size:0;}.desktop_hide,.desktop_hide table{display:table!important;max-height:none!important;}}META TAG (title): @media (max-width:520px){.image_block div.fullWidth{max-width:100%!important;}.mobile_hide{display:none;}.row-content{width:100%!important;}.stack .column{width:100%;display:block;}.mobile_hide{min-height:0;max-height:0;max-width:0;overflow:hidden;font-size:0;}.desktop_hide,.desktop_hide table{display:table!important;max-height:none!important;}}

Please read the following message from our sponsor.

Friend,I don’t write emails like this often. But right now? After what happened to Charlie... I can’t stay quiet.Charlie Kirk was my friend. Not just someone I admired, but someone I loved and respected deeply. Losing him was devastating. In many ways, all of us share in this loss. Charlie fought every day of his life for each one of us... fighting to keep America as great, free, and prosperous. No one I know ever fought for that harder than Charlie.America won't ever be the same. No one can ever replace him — but we can make sure his legacy continues on. We owe him that. Because if you knew Charlie, you would know exactly what he would say to us right now: "Don’t you dare quit."Charlie poured his heart into building a movement to save America. He believed in young people. He believed in ordinary Americans. And he believed that even in our darkest hours, America was the beacon of goodness, freedom, and truth.That’s what the Turning Point movement was all about — and Charlie gave everything he had to that fight.And our task now is not only to protect what he built — it’s to grow it bigger, stronger, and bolder than anyone ever thought possible. More students. More churches. More families. More courage from everyday Americans to stand up and fight for what is right.Turning Point USA was Charlie’s vehicle to save America. He didn’t just start a movement... he started a revival. And now, Friend,, we must carry that forward. If you share the same sense of responsibility that I do to honor Charlie’s work and press on with his vision...Then please join me in keeping his fight alive by making a gift to Turning Point USA today. Let’s make Turning Point USA the biggest thing that this nation has ever seen... bigger than Charlie ever thought possible. That’s how we honor him best. Give in Charlie's Honor Support Turning Point USARest in peace, Charlie. We’ll carry the torch you lit from here. For Charlie, Tucker Carlson Give in Charlie's Honor Support Turning Point USA4940 East Beverly RoadPhoenix, Arizona 85044

DISCLAIMER

name: Powered by People
subject: Good news and not-so-good news
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

We have some good news and bad news:

The good: We beat Ken Paxton in court on Friday! It’s important to note
that the judges on the court were all appointed by Greg Abbott. They
unanimously ruled against Paxton and immediately removed his restraining
order from our work.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250917.S8C-_o&refcode=ema20250917-240360&t=1002&akid=240360%2E444211%2EX7chWu ]Houston Chronicle

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250917.S8C-_o&refcode=ema20250917-240360&t=1003&akid=240360%2E444211%2EX7chWu ]Beto O'Rourke wins another round against Ken Paxton — but at a great
cost

The not-so-good news: We’ve had to spend nearly $400,000 on legal fees to
fight Ken Paxton and his abuse of office in court. That is a significant
portion of our cash-on-hand and was quite an unexpected cost for us.

Now, we need your help to get our fundraising
and organizing back on track to elect Democrats up and down the ballot in
Texas in 2026 and 2028.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250917.S8C-_o&refcode=ema20250917-240360&t=1004&akid=240360%2E444211%2EX7chWu ]Please, donate $3 right now to help us cover our legal
fees and fight for the future of our state. Every single donation will
make a difference.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250917.S8C-_o&refcode=ema20250917-240360&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=240360%2E444211%2EX7chWu ]DONATE $3

Beto doesn’t take a salary from Powered by People — he volunteers his
time. So every dollar you donate today will be put to the best possible
use.

Thank you so much,

Team Powered by People

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=240360%2E444211%2EX7chWu

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE

Getting our own ads up will be expensive, but it could make all the difference in a state as large as California. That’s why we need you, Peter.

subject: We can't afford to wait
body:
|
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115414897/570237997/-140265690?refcode=WUEFE932_20250917_RaceText_ALL_v1s4&sourceid=1057004&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzEzZmU1Ni0xMTk0LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qo4TvZ0U_Udk5b2LTk5kMhwyEMZ30wes-BGw_0lVmoI=) Peter,

We can't afford to wait until 2026 to start fighting back.

That's why, today, EMILYs List is launching our **Race to 2025 Fund** to raise $100,000 before Friday at midnight to secure Democratic wins in the most critical races leading into the midterms. ****[**Will you be one of the first donors to our fund and help secure Democratic victories before 2026?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115414898/570237998/-140265690?refcode=WUEFE932_20250917_RaceText_ALL_v1s4&sourceid=1057004&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzEzZmU1Ni0xMTk0LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qo4TvZ0U_Udk5b2LTk5kMhwyEMZ30wes-BGw_0lVmoI=)**** | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115414899/570237999/-140265690?refcode=WUEFE932_20250917_RaceText_ALL_v1s4&sourceid=1057004&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzEzZmU1Ni0xMTk0LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qo4TvZ0U_Udk5b2LTk5kMhwyEMZ30wes-BGw_0lVmoI=)
---
The stakes couldn't be higher: Republicans are already laying the groundwork to flip key governorships, gerrymander state legislatures, and stack the courts. **If we don't act now, they’ll lock in their power for a generation.**

The good news is we have a proven plan to stop them. We're recruiting, training, and electing Democratic pro-choice women who will safeguard our rights and build power where it matters most.

We've endorsed more than a dozen women running in critical races up and down the ballot this fall, including:
* Mikie Sherrill (NJ-GOV)
* Abigail Spanberger (VA-GOV)
* Ghazala Hashmi (VA-LG)
* Adelita Grijalva (AZ-07) *Special Election on 9/23!*
* Amanda Edwards (TX-18)
* Sylvia Garcia (TX-29)
* Debra Shigley (GA-SD-21) *Special Runoff Election on 9/23!*
* Elizabeth Guzmán (VA-HD-22)
* Lily Franklin (VA-HD-41)
* May Nivar (VA-HD-57)
* Stacey Carroll (VA-HD-64)
* Nicole Cole (VA-HD-66)
* Jessica Anderson (VA-HD-71)
* Leslie Mehta (VA-HD-73)
* Lindsey Dougherty (VA-HD-75)
* Kimberly Pope Adams (VA-HD-82)
* Kacey Carnegie (VA-HD-89)
* Eileen Higgins (Miami Mayor)
* Helena Moreno (New Orleans Mayor)
* Michelle Wu (Boston Mayor)
* Mary Sheffield (Detroit Mayor)
* Vi Lyles (Charlotte Mayor)
* Christine Donohue (PA-Supreme Court)

Investments in these races are the difference between these women winning and losing — and your support right now will set the tone for the entire cycle.
****[**We need to win these races in order to be in the best position possible for 2026. So, please, donate now toward our Race to 2025 Fund to help EMILYs List women secure 2025 victories:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115414900/570238000/-140265690?refcode=WUEFE932_20250917_RaceText_ALL_v1s4&sourceid=1057004&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzEzZmU1Ni0xMTk0LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qo4TvZ0U_Udk5b2LTk5kMhwyEMZ30wes-BGw_0lVmoI=)****

clean_body: | = Peter, We can't afford to wait until 2026 to start fighting back. That's why, today, EMILYs List is launching our Race to 2025 Fund to raise $100,000 before Friday at midnight to secure Democratic wins in the most critical races leading into the midterms. **= | = The stakes couldn't be higher: Republicans are already laying the groundwork to flip key governorships, gerrymander state legislatures, and stack the courts. If we don't act now, they’ll lock in their power for a generation. The good news is we have a proven plan to stop them. We're recruiting, training, and electing Democratic pro-choice women who will safeguard our rights and build power where it matters most. We've endorsed more than a dozen women running in critical races up and down the ballot this fall, including: Mikie Sherrill (NJ-GOV) Abigail Spanberger (VA-GOV) Ghazala Hashmi (VA-LG) Adelita Grijalva (AZ-07) Special Election on 9/23! Amanda Edwards (TX-18) Sylvia Garcia (TX-29) Debra Shigley (GA-SD-21) Special Runoff Election on 9/23! Elizabeth Guzmán (VA-HD-22) Lily Franklin (VA-HD-41) May Nivar (VA-HD-57) Stacey Carroll (VA-HD-64) Nicole Cole (VA-HD-66) Jessica Anderson (VA-HD-71) Leslie Mehta (VA-HD-73) Lindsey Dougherty (VA-HD-75) Kimberly Pope Adams (VA-HD-82) Kacey Carnegie (VA-HD-89) Eileen Higgins (Miami Mayor) Helena Moreno (New Orleans Mayor) Michelle Wu (Boston Mayor) Mary Sheffield (Detroit Mayor) Vi Lyles (Charlotte Mayor) Christine Donohue (PA-Supreme Court) Investments in these races are the difference between these women winning and losing — and your support right now will set the tone for the entire cycle. **=** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, the EMILYs List team = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email . We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe . Have a question? Box 96612 Washington, DC 20077 United States | ---|---

name: Trump Succession Poll

body:
_**[ALERT: Trump Name-Drops Two Potential 2028 Successors](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/1CrnyfHezCjgQIeG3AtUDjIfE2PvddNzPbtdkJVGnRHVCIFBSzVzCP0eZF10OjLpIvdZrpEL32LWN1Glh5wl2N7xD1DHMgIbhWt8qM8AhQsbKB6tbspBJRk4IQP4sSYFuPe-VZ3w4as6rpkmBWJFVnx2hYuueQ84IxCuq1Q-R-oO-3lQPvqC9HBbPNqt0BjXOuoS-myGLJf3pjhJEsiSk75GRl_0zbrPCsXWFHctRKyo1N7eT0EWb5_9rHGT6YLQlfu-PdDdm2J33aLHxGQKrGuUj440KPEbsmn0-vTMpEmJcVOqp7n8qnEr8h6qWeBH9IaA_8tNWhK3LkcMw6JlM6F_J1dBlJ6ipyubXZh0m9fT2gR-uhpZZvC4Z9xjaOURg8xxvanvbrQveRIGKfpRTG7n-WE8lTdNcTcBac2y1Gvz57kFDVjsrVxpYg5dgKzC_Fh67WnZK4MXzViKbB0KAPAoeM4x4IJUoFbZARKQxM2N928bu05SUU-f62Cu50oaWYs3p96XFvFYFAUcje_K69KaRoLIEFnz1h-H7I-OMEBzCWT8CZv6DzkQ2gkY65ORmhAAg_L9pQMnMzfVbBkdVtwBAEMbWPmQA72GoRkezUNVhKwqy3nr2PzBFhbUcIHHf0mpzdUkOR8zU9QLA-EKEOrNifvuTVJK7tYyFAevoegfTow0yMvNCu9WgEdVZT6ZGrCWjfNEKPyUy-P4GfHYemMZFtLr97_RAx8w5kezf-4QADZg3Z4BMyeb18y7N1kuQfSrbWaaF4uHm6KJ4jpouEdB-7xCgPbcAMezH7B-MaX1Z-AI2LKe5qRyHab7ZXtVbG9YN00b6Sr3vG_dQf8heONEEVBBJV8N26Ozc0o9tP1vkhiIfdlxZsiMWEKt4ZQPABY0neOa4MastD6L-Gwo3fBMOBSZ-iBlOojXSs09gTzw-bbe7EYfCFUMCEKWoI8VQTnXspCiug/ZwMVsfZUsgDMrLhl_3XdipBasPp7MDJT/12)**_

Peter,

President Trump revealed he thinks the Republican Party has **" a lot of good people"** but he named two people in particular as potential successors: **Vice President JD Vance** and **Secretary of State Marco Rubio.**

But YOUR voice matters most, Peter.

This is your chance to shape the future. _President Trump trusts YOU to make the right choice._

name: Sen. Jeff Bridges
subject: We now have a Republican opponent, and he’s a tough one
body:
He’s a serious opponent with a seriously conservative track record. (And a very serious mustache.)

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/aa37644c0877/get-more-smarter-on-colorados-budget-10369325?e=b48bb2b4f4)
---
[|
---](https://bridgesforcolorado.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ba078768558df9fe7d8559d49&id=6d9c48bcc7&e=b48bb2b4f4)
| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Hi there,
Former Senate President Kevin Grantham just jumped into the race for State Treasurer. He’s a serious opponent with a seriously conservative track record. (And a very serious mustache.)
**Here’s the thing: while Kevin sat in the big chair with the gavel, I chaired the committee with the spreadsheets.** As head of Colorado’s Joint Budget Committee—the bipartisan group that actually writes our state’s budget—I don’t just talk about fiscal responsibility, I live it every day. We balance the books to ensure that how we use our dollars reflects our Colorado’s values. As Treasurer, I’ll ensure that how we invest our dollars reflects those same values.
---
[|
---](https://bridgesforcolorado.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ba078768558df9fe7d8559d49&id=277156015b&e=b48bb2b4f4)
| | _GOTV Canvass launch in 2016. One of my hardest races!_
---
| | And when it comes to winning the toughest races in Colorado, I deliver:
* First Race: I won by 5% in a district Democrats won by fewer than 500 votes just two years earlier AND I set a fundraising record for the State House
* Re-election: Expanded my win margin from 5% to 12%
* Then: In one of the two most competitive Senate districts in the state, I won by 26%

With a significant Republican opponent, this race is real. If we want a Democratic candidate for Treasurer who can win—and put your Colorado dollars to work for housing, infrastructure, and an affordable future—we need your support starting right now.
This race won’t get headlines. Voters will only hear what we can afford to tell them. That’s why your support today makes all the difference.
---
| [CLICK TO DONATE](https://bridgesforcolorado.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ba078768558df9fe7d8559d49&id=4beaeb8555&e=b48bb2b4f4)
---
| | To join us in person come by on the [25th in Denver](https://bridgesforcolorado.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ba078768558df9fe7d8559d49&id=404a59327b&e=b48bb2b4f4) or on the [30th in Boulder](https://bridgesforcolorado.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ba078768558df9fe7d8559d49&id=e29634a6f2&e=b48bb2b4f4).
Talk soon,P.S. [Grantham really does have an epic mustache.](https://bridgesforcolorado.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ba078768558df9fe7d8559d49&id=4ad6056cc1&e=b48bb2b4f4) I’m considering growing one myself to compete. Rie strongly opposes the idea. [If I get 12 contributions from this link, I won’t do it.](https://bridgesforcolorado.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ba078768558df9fe7d8559d49&id=1f942ca041&e=b48bb2b4f4)
---
|
---
