name: Supervisor David Canepa
subject: Sept. 2025 e-Newsletter
body:
Take a hike for loneliness County recognizes Recovery Happens & Suicide Prevention Month San Bruno remembers on 15th anniversary | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/fbc98f80e247/sept-2025-e-newsletter?e=c0babbc643)
---
| | | |
---
|
---
| | | | |
#### e-newsletter (our 100th Edition!)

## Sept '25
---
|
* **Take a hike for loneliness**
* **County recognizes Recovery Happens & Suicide Prevention Month**
* **San Bruno remembers on 15th anniversary**

* **Passage of Senate Bill 63 puts Caltrain and SamTrans’ future in voters’ hands**

* **County rallies to support Proposition 50**

---
| | |
---
|
# “This is a stand against election rigging and a signal to the entire world that we here in the Golden State are ready to fight for democracy and fight against authoritarianism with every tool we have, including the ballot box.”
# **\- President David Canepa**
---
| | | | **2025 Sept e-newsletter** **Special 100 th Edition** **Thank you for subscribing to our monthly newsletters and for your invaluable feedback over the past 9 years. Here’s to 100 editions and to keeping you informed, inspired and connected to our office.** **County rallies to support Proposition 50** Dear friends, At its Sept. 9 meeting, the San Mateo County Board of Supervisors approved a resolution I sponsored, along with Supervisor Lisa Gauthier, supporting Proposition 50, the Election Rigging Response Act. This measure, on the 2026 ballot, would allow California voters to adopt new congressional district maps for elections between 2026 and 2030. Texas cannot silence California. Proposition 50 is a stand against election rigging and a declaration to the world that we in the Golden State will defend democracy and resist authoritarianism at the ballot box. If passed, new maps would be drawn by the Legislature in response to Texas’ mid-decade gerrymandering, which changed district boundaries to favor one party and threatens the balance of representation in Congress Special thanks to Sen. Josh Becker, Assemblymembers Marc Berman and Diane Papan, local elected leaders, and dozens of supporters who joined Supervisor Gauthier and me at the Sept. 8 rally at 500 County Center. **Passage of Senate Bill 63 puts Caltrain and SamTrans’ future in voters’ hands** The Legislature delivered a historic win for San Mateo County this past weekend by passing Senate Bill 63. With strong bipartisan support, SB 63 gives voters the chance in 2026 to approve a regional sales tax to sustain and improve public transit. As Legislation Committee Chair on the Metropolitan Transportation Commission, I’ve worked nearly two years to secure a fair deal for San Mateo County. Without new funding, Caltrain faces deep deficits that would force service cuts, strand riders, worsen traffic, and harm air quality—just when we most need greener options. Thanks to SB 63, the future looks brighter. A stable funding stream would keep Caltrain, SamTrans, BART, and other transit systems running and improving. I’m deeply grateful to bill authors Sen. Scott Wiener and Sen. Jesse Arreguin for their leadership in bringing this measure to voters, who deserve the final say.

**San Bruno remembers on 15th anniversary** San Bruno marked the 15th anniversary on Sept. 9 of the gas pipeline explosion and fire that killed eight and destroyed 38 homes in the Crestmoor neighborhood. KTVU reporters Jesse Gary and Betty Yu covered the remembrance of the nation’s worst public utility disaster. The story featured resident Rick Silverman, who recalled the night vividly, and Mayor Rico Medina, who spoke about progress since the blast and how a $70 million PG&E settlement funded a new community and aquatics center. “Because of that tragedy, the U.S., California, and communities across the nation changed how pipelines are installed and monitored,” I shared in the segment. The photo above, taken by my staff member Bill Silverfarb while working at the San Mateo Daily Journal, shows resident Fumie Tanaka being rescued by firefighters after fleeing her burning home and collapsing on Glenview Drive. It is a haunting image and a reminder of both tragedy and resilience. View the KTVU story here: [https://www.ktvu.com/news/san-bruno-continues-heal-15-years-after-deadly-pge-pipeline-explosion](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=307ace818f&e=c0babbc643 "https://www.ktvu.com/news/san-bruno-continues-heal-15-years-after-deadly-pge-pipeline-explosion"). **County recognizes Recovery Happens & Suicide Prevention Month** At the Sept. 9 Board of Supervisors meeting, I sponsored a joint proclamation recognizing Suicide Prevention Month and Recovery Happens Month. Both observances are rooted in hope, healing, and the power of community. In 2024, 69 county residents died by suicide, while more than 13,000 reached out to our Crisis Line, showing both urgent need and the importance of support. This year’s Suicide Prevention theme, “Support, Your Way,” reminds us that everyone’s path is unique, and prevention is a shared responsibility. Recovery Happens Month highlights that recovery is real. Every day, people overcome mental health and substance use challenges with care that is inclusive, peer-supported, and culturally responsive. I was especially moved by Victor Barfield’s story. After battling addiction for 30 years and losing his marriage and job, Victor sought help through a local nonprofit. Now, reunited with his family, he serves as a Recovery Coach with Voices of Recovery San Mateo County. Special thanks to Dr. Jei Africa, Director of Behavioral Health and Recovery Services, for leading the presentation. [](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=f0165e292f&e=c0babbc643) **Take a hike for loneliness** Let’s hike together and turn loneliness into connection! Join us at 9 a.m., Saturday, Oct. 4 at Sawyer Camp Trail in San Mateo for Take a Hike for Loneliness, a community event bringing neighbors and friends together. San Mateo County was the first in the nation to declare loneliness a public health crisis in January 2024. Loneliness and suicide are both public health challenges that demand bold action. Sometimes the simplest acts, sharing a meal or walking with a neighbor, make the biggest difference. So, bring friends, enjoy nature, and meet new people as we stroll the trail with beautiful view of the Crystal Springs Reservoir. RSVP using the QR code or contact Mike Richardson at (650) 363-4572 or email to [mrichardson@smcgov.org](mailto:mrichardson@smcgov.org "mailto:mrichardson@smcgov.org"). Hope to see you there!

**Interns wanted to join our team ** We are looking to add to our great group of interns we are currently working with. If you or someone you know may be interested in applying to my Internship Program, submitting this form is the first step: [https://forms.gle/hiKqtn7Rird5vXwB9](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=ec2155f994&e=c0babbc643 "https://forms.gle/hiKqtn7Rird5vXwB9?fbclid=IwAR3YFH0mH828rtAUru5EFOO9GsMCasQYe1N7AUrmwAwBf30JTtXOSeCzKjs"). You can also reach out to Mike Richardson on my staff directly with any questions at [mrichardson@smcgov.org](mailto:mrichardson@smcgov.org "mailto:mrichardson@smcgov.org"). In friendship,
**DAVID J. CANEPA**
President, San Mateo County Board of Supervisors

clean_body: Take a hike for loneliness County recognizes Recovery Happens & Suicide Prevention Month San Bruno remembers on 15th anniversary | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | e-newsletter (our 100th Edition!) Sept '25 | Take a hike for loneliness County recognizes Recovery Happens & Suicide Prevention Month San Bruno remembers on 15th anniversary Passage of Senate Bill 63 puts Caltrain and SamTrans’ future in voters’ hands County rallies to support Proposition 50 | | | | “This is a stand against election rigging and a signal to the entire world that we here in the Golden State are ready to fight for democracy and fight against authoritarianism with every tool we have, including the ballot box.” \- President David Canepa | | | | 2025 Sept e-newsletter Special 100 th Edition Thank you for subscribing to our monthly newsletters and for your invaluable feedback over the past 9 years. Here’s to 100 editions and to keeping you informed, inspired and connected to our office. County rallies to support Proposition 50 Dear friends, At its Sept. 9 meeting, the San Mateo County Board of Supervisors approved a resolution I sponsored, along with Supervisor Lisa Gauthier, supporting Proposition 50, the Election Rigging Response Act. This measure, on the 2026 ballot, would allow California voters to adopt new congressional district maps for elections between 2026 and 2030. Texas cannot silence California. Proposition 50 is a stand against election rigging and a declaration to the world that we in the Golden State will defend democracy and resist authoritarianism at the ballot box. If passed, new maps would be drawn by the Legislature in response to Texas’ mid-decade gerrymandering, which changed district boundaries to favor one party and threatens the balance of representation in Congress Special thanks to Sen. Josh Becker, Assemblymembers Marc Berman and Diane Papan, local elected leaders, and dozens of supporters who joined Supervisor Gauthier and me at the Sept. 8 rally at 500 County Center. Passage of Senate Bill 63 puts Caltrain and SamTrans’ future in voters’ hands The Legislature delivered a historic win for San Mateo County this past weekend by passing Senate Bill 63. With strong bipartisan support, SB 63 gives voters the chance in 2026 to approve a regional sales tax to sustain and improve public transit. As Legislation Committee Chair on the Metropolitan Transportation Commission, I’ve worked nearly two years to secure a fair deal for San Mateo County. Without new funding, Caltrain faces deep deficits that would force service cuts, strand riders, worsen traffic, and harm air quality—just when we most need greener options. Thanks to SB 63, the future looks brighter. A stable funding stream would keep Caltrain, SamTrans, BART, and other transit systems running and improving. I’m deeply grateful to bill authors Sen. Scott Wiener and Sen. Jesse Arreguin for their leadership in bringing this measure to voters, who deserve the final say. San Bruno remembers on 15th anniversary San Bruno marked the 15th anniversary on Sept. 9 of the gas pipeline explosion and fire that killed eight and destroyed 38 homes in the Crestmoor neighborhood. KTVU reporters Jesse Gary and Betty Yu covered the remembrance of the nation’s worst public utility disaster. The story featured resident Rick Silverman, who recalled the night vividly, and Mayor Rico Medina, who spoke about progress since the blast and how a $70 million PG&E settlement funded a new community and aquatics center. “Because of that tragedy, the U.S., California, and communities across the nation changed how pipelines are installed and monitored,” I shared in the segment. The photo above, taken by my staff member Bill Silverfarb while working at the San Mateo Daily Journal, shows resident Fumie Tanaka being rescued by firefighters after fleeing her burning home and collapsing on Glenview Drive. It is a haunting image and a reminder of both tragedy and resilience. View the KTVU story here: "". Now, reunited with his family, he serves as a Recovery Coach with Voices of Recovery San Mateo County. Special thanks to Dr. Jei Africa, Director of Behavioral Health and Recovery Services, for leading the presentation. clean_body: It all depends on you. | North Carolina voters have a choice ahead: Do we give Donald Trump another vote in the U.S. Senate for his extreme agenda, or do we elect a leader who will stand up for what is right? Peter, Roy Cooper is determined to defend our rights, uphold our democracy, and protect our future. He is ready to do everything possible to make this country better. Even so, our race for the U.S. Senate from North Carolina is rated a TOSS-UP — and the national GOP is ready to go to any lengths to defeat us. = | = Peter, this campaign has a message that will connect with voters... but only if they hear it. We need to run the kind of campaign that can win. That means aggressive, targeted voter outreach in every corner of NC. Even — especially — the places where it’s hardest to reach folks. But building a winning team isn’t easy, and it doesn’t come cheap. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Let’s do this, Team Cooper Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here. National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us. Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party. Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy. = = = mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Contributions or gifts to Cooper for North Carolina are not tax deductible. Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115415573/570240635/1435897075?refcode=email_091725_budget-fwd-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDZkZjNhNy0xMjk0LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jjNTXtLlX7NdLoo8jSo1_gHMwmfqsID-IniikiS6rRs=&emci=43d84da0-1294-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=cd6df3a7-1294-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=7280715) Friend, Senator John Hickenlooper just made an important announcement: **[John is voting NO on the MAGA budget that refuses to address Republicans’ disastrous cuts to health care or end Trump’s reckless tariffs. Please, read his message below, then sign your name next to John’s opposing funding for Trump’s extreme agenda →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115415574/570240636/495742200?refcode=email_091725_budget-fwd-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDZkZjNhNy0xMjk0LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jjNTXtLlX7NdLoo8jSo1_gHMwmfqsID-IniikiS6rRs=&emci=43d84da0-1294-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=cd6df3a7-1294-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=7280715)** | | [ADD YOUR NAME →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115415575/570240637/495742200?refcode=email_091725_budget-fwd-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDZkZjNhNy0xMjk0LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jjNTXtLlX7NdLoo8jSo1_gHMwmfqsID-IniikiS6rRs=&emci=43d84da0-1294-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=cd6df3a7-1294-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=7280715)

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
At the end of the month, the federal government will shut down if the Republicans don’t find seven Democratic senators to vote for their budget.
Let me be clear: **I won’t be one of those seven.**
**[I will not be a vote to rubber stamp more of the Republicans’ harmful policies. I’ll explain more, but if you’re with me in this fight to stand up for working families and stop the GOP’s radical agenda, I hope I can count on you to join me today in condemning the Republicans’ plan and demanding action on health care and tariffs.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115415576/570240638/495742200?refcode=email_091725_budget-fwd-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDZkZjNhNy0xMjk0LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jjNTXtLlX7NdLoo8jSo1_gHMwmfqsID-IniikiS6rRs=&emci=43d84da0-1294-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=cd6df3a7-1294-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=7280715)**
| [SIGN YOUR NAME →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115415577/570240639/495742200?refcode=email_091725_budget-fwd-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDZkZjNhNy0xMjk0LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jjNTXtLlX7NdLoo8jSo1_gHMwmfqsID-IniikiS6rRs=&emci=43d84da0-1294-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=cd6df3a7-1294-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=7280715)
---
From brewpub owner to Mayor of Denver to Governor of Colorado, my entire career has been about bringing people together and finding ways to actually help Coloradans.
But Donald Trump and National Republicans aren’t trying to work together. They’re trying to ram through their agenda – and it’s hurting too many people.
Right now, prices are increasing and families are struggling to get by. Instead of helping lower prices, Republicans passed their so-called “Big Beautiful Bill” that rips away health care from tens of thousands of Coloradans and forces premiums to skyrocket — all to give new tax breaks to the ultrawealthy.
When I was Governor, I expanded Medicaid to cover 400,000 more Coloradans. That’s what the Republicans are now taking away. I won’t agree to that. Ever.
Plus, Trump’s illegal tariffs are taxing working families thousands of dollars every year and making it near impossible for small businesses to survive. The courts have ruled that it is Congress’ authority to impose tariffs and these tariff-taxes are illegal. We need to stand up and take that power back from Trump.
If Republicans want to avoid a shutdown, they should restore the health care and nursing home care funding and support for rural hospitals that they voted to rip away, and take action to end the tariffs.
**If they won’t negotiate, I’ll vote against their government funding plan.**
This is not a moment that any of us can be silent. We need to make our voices heard loud and clear. **[So if you’re with me – if you agree we need to put Colorado’s families above billionaires and partisan politics – sign your name next to mine today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115415578/570240640/495742200?refcode=email_091725_budget-fwd-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDZkZjNhNy0xMjk0LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jjNTXtLlX7NdLoo8jSo1_gHMwmfqsID-IniikiS6rRs=&emci=43d84da0-1294-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=cd6df3a7-1294-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=7280715)**
| [ADD YOUR NAME: NO MORE SPENDING FOR THE MAGA AGENDA!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115415579/570240641/495742200?refcode=email_091725_budget-fwd-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDZkZjNhNy0xMjk0LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jjNTXtLlX7NdLoo8jSo1_gHMwmfqsID-IniikiS6rRs=&emci=43d84da0-1294-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=cd6df3a7-1294-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=7280715)

clean_body: | ~ | ~ Peter, Republicans across the country are trying to gerrymander the hell out of red states ahead of the midterms – and Governor Ron DeSantis is leading the charge in Florida. Why? Because they know that the GOP’s hold on the House is slipping, and they're doing everything they can to tip the scales in their favor. But here's the thing — we don't have to wait for them to redraw the congressional maps to keep growing our people-powered movement. So while Republicans like DeSantis are trying to rig the midterms, we’re out on the ground winning real support and bringing new young voters to the table. We’re working overtime because we believe people should choose their politicians, not the other way around. But this effort requires significant resources, and I'm not relying on corporate PACs to fund this fight. So I have to ask: ~ If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ~~ | ~~ | ~~ | ~~ | ~~ | ~ We have to keep fighting, Maxwell | ~ Maxwell Alejandro Frost is an organizer representing Florida's 10th Congressional District. name: Working Families Party
subject: We don’t have kings
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
Power doesn’t flow down from a throne. It flows up from the people. | | | Peter, Right now, the Trump administration is trying to stoke fear and resentment to justify crackdowns on free speech, mass abductions of working people, and even military takeovers of our cities. They want to divide working people based on our differences. They want to silence our voices and our votes. **They are acting like they have the absolute power to do whatever they want to whoever they want._But they don’t._** In a democracy, we don’t have kings. In a democracy, the people have the power. Now more than ever, we need to show them we won’t be silenced — and we won’t be made to fear the government we elect, or our own neighbors. **That’s why, on October 18th, working people will be coming out to stand up across the country to say with a common voice: in this country, there are No Kings.** **[Join the kickoff call this Thursday, September 18th from 8-9pm EDT to learn more about the vision, urgency, and strategy behind this national action:](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMbGj-ca0TYSsYMZBvIweYdLBfne8t4AZK_NOWvhFWBH-Dp5plgQcXLwf1E51kdEcc_y5HjTcmI75EFoJ1KFWyit0eiNKLBCeJe98e7QOfJudKswIokrhtwP5-Ey9fd7kuE-en3BuahXUr_dzDTIFi0REbwDEcaHYtxsrAsRh4wOZAmjau-LNL5luWNYvAy9pT2os851LogaNBTD1QJDp_pL23ohbzhVeG87q4dfN5NfhulPsbOJH7HXjS-czmAKw9Q/4jz/Um715VJkTXeWmonI0lazTw/h0/h001.MwXut420nl-p5YvAuAPwW0WlMZ-Ab3SKL-GcOnVgHQ4)** **[RSVP: No Kings Day of Action on 10/18](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMbIwXrUx9efdTq_vbf4FLD0CoPQ4ZVmccXOu-hOdjtLicfNvMkTGW_UyIewA3WU3tjP1O4IHgKY3fATgX7C6oOV2KusZmBIHNcQffYi-e7STnOFeX7QIyF3HBdgNC8YV4Vehgl0DjzmI_k_YbdyGt89rcQ282k8JMU2U_Rqkoot7uVqdzxp3zgdL4sRsoP_zefiO4VnmOWf36hYOxN2luB1sZCnTh43cCO_QUWSbPHq-WfM1YrnNnQZY15k-wIZxrYWPQ54JszslSOz_SURfuGw/4jz/Um715VJkTXeWmonI0lazTw/h3/h001.dZaN36hxsODTCrmXDjl02NS1YfVTrraQds2upGDstwA)** Power doesn’t flow down from a throne. It flows up from the people. **And the people have had enough.** The truth is the Trump regime is massively unpopular. Trump promised to lower costs, only to make prices rise further for working families from the grocery store to health insurance to tariffs to our energy bills and everything in between. That’s why they’re trying to crack down on free speech and dissent. It’s why they want to take away our votes. And that’s why it’s more important than ever that we show up to voice our opposition to all of it — peacefully, loudly, and in massive numbers. **[Join the No Kings kickoff call this Thursday, September 18th from 8-9pm EDT:](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMbGj-ca0TYSsYMZBvIweYdLBfne8t4AZK_NOWvhFWBH-Dp5plgQcXLwf1E51kdEcc_y5HjTcmI75EFoJ1KFWyit0VPVNcS9SuiWKbtrmN8EVY3uh8eD7GGw7_oK48gquwgC98Rxqn7T-WJHksjUv6_GkfaBOrypb8pNfBQHTkOpf9h7v8uJXTZM_UaOIMiSF4-R_NHzYAEtWwAcTs0GYvGGNoJ3230duzgudnCmqKhVkMfHcqAbE9KS5cDkGmIjeEg/4jz/Um715VJkTXeWmonI0lazTw/h4/h001.AkrETK4qRYdGdtaykyID2Ln6mTKxQ1ddLm8HvslyaAs)** While they peddle fear, we practice solidarity. While they try and consolidate their control, we build our power through conversations — door by door, block by block. clean_body: Power doesn’t flow down from a throne. It flows up from the people. | | | Peter, Right now, the Trump administration is trying to stoke fear and resentment to justify crackdowns on free speech, mass abductions of working people, and even military takeovers of our cities. They want to divide working people based on our differences. They want to silence our voices and our votes. They are acting like they have the absolute power to do whatever they want to whoever they want.But they don’t. In a democracy, we don’t have kings. In a democracy, the people have the power. Now more than ever, we need to show them we won’t be silenced — and we won’t be made to fear the government we elect, or our own neighbors. That’s why, on October 18th, working people will be coming out to stand up across the country to say with a common voice: in this country, there are No Kings. Power doesn’t flow down from a throne. It flows up from the people. And the people have had enough. The truth is the Trump regime is massively unpopular. Trump promised to lower costs, only to make prices rise further for working families from the grocery store to health insurance to tariffs to our energy bills and everything in between. That’s why they’re trying to crack down on free speech and dissent. It’s why they want to take away our votes. And that’s why it’s more important than ever that we show up to voice our opposition to all of it — peacefully, loudly, and in massive numbers. While they try to intimidate, we organize. While they peddle fear, we practice solidarity. While they try and consolidate their control, we build our power through conversations — door by door, block by block. In solidarity and resistance, Working Families Party Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Friend,
---
So many kind souls like you have asked how I’m doing, so I wanted to personally update you on my recovery.
---
I was hospitalized after a devastating car crash. We were struck by a vehicle going what felt like 70-80 miles per hour. Had I not been wearing a seatbelt, I would’ve been killed.
---
Right now, a back brace is holding my fractured spine together.**
---
But if I could survive being arrested in the most violent jail in America, I know I can survive **__ANYTHING!__**
---
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=758a2868b083430d9c11776e7e73d867&_e=zAX41UEsis4CUnuXH2dbKlkn-rFG2pCZnlKZl5lBRzUFpWPFdg7duJBKNci4fKZa5luMGRKB16Ini1neoCZZQXkDsprsKyTdfIkItVpljheTtmH1MtCRDLquIUcvWsfgCRzutA2TCpZQuaXbvV9ZSZlv47XGMYXcbZrWPkMr30-9QuP8kh2vhbkUDDZknve07FBlQ5RSQeyMdCWZ3t7k2P4_PeGSqQruYfJUSWHCJOf-4-dF6qoXDjH9YFv8RdmJD0a_hzR_WYk0-V-OmGmc5v2zVYkVCEMFPVMZ7tFWFf-_8dbh9-UYeqe2SOkRqcAQYqPLyMQ8JE4dlvFLLifdGizgzrXZGhnMcpry0D9cpsAEVhLkDMT-cHLTJKgHjv28qT_MBivZwqVXeusFRuPjQ9Z6DUk6TVU5bOqE_zWxmTepuO2Ben5Eab3wj-tRnbKt_J_uheXOE4E0w78O98mcJ70jbDj3_xUsq88abcCMTA7IHX0LYCGbZK-8NOtxyurs4bC67rb4JYMU_wlrit6qMd6fjugBdvmhuqFHkcVwbyEH0cvE9JL407oZgo9ncnokCwvTlbtKUU2Rsv4ivRx0YMjO1AScQmbXGgkbvKmxfLnF7HZEYM-0-1eR4E_1OKdnk3ZzsjotOlfNFOyDZLQIcg%3D%3D)
__
---
One thing especially helped take the pain away...
---
...**President Trump has announced that he will award me with the Presidential Medal of Freedom – _the highest civilian honor in America._**
---
**President Trump knows I’m in a dire situation right now. His pardon powers only apply to _federal_ cases, which means he _legally_ _cannot_ save me from the bogus _state-level_ charges brought against me by a radical Democrat Attorney General who is trying to imprison me for 20 YEARS.**
---
**Left with no pardon, no safety net, and no lifeline, my _ONLY_ chance at walking free is to secure a top-notch defense team.**
---
But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY**.
---
**And now, this car crash has set me back even more...**
---
And so, my last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like _YOU_.
---
That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust as I continue fighting for my _FREEDOM_ and my _JUSTICE_.
---
__Because when President Trump places the Medal of Freedom around my neck, I want history to always remember that I FOUGHT for my freedom and justice until the VERY END!__
---
[**So, if you can, please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to ensure I have the resources needed to retain a top-notch defense team in what is now the FINAL BATTLE for my freedom and justice.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=758a2868b083430d9c11776e7e73d867&_e=zAX41UEsis4CUnuXH2dbKlkn-rFG2pCZnlKZl5lBRzUFpWPFdg7duJBKNci4fKZa5luMGRKB16Ini1neoCZZQXkDsprsKyTdfIkItVpljheTtmH1MtCRDLquIUcvWsfgCRzutA2TCpZQuaXbvV9ZSZlv47XGMYXcbZrWPkMr30-9QuP8kh2vhbkUDDZknve07FBlQ5RSQeyMdCWZ3t7k2NSAWMeh_hqDX8QdX5qcf6BWxYKqdXSC_nnqou76_cdr6o7tEQTxBFEuWaTH9iLec0kZHseURrgYleYpjIRrdwowRa6XdcZ5nTMnHTiVYQxhfKLPSX9NJblyOmE4HjFfv6zQ5jAl4cGHk7Ktm2NnxaRADgX1mKPNdblyLDvh109HHP7qMyJ4DZKJPv9ju3IAMrnSN61t-TApwno9L91Feolk9zu3bkkopxoGbwZrhj_X8v2Yfo56qMuCzw-uu6Ww9K4AlFojvo9fOYwWT3pvvHayki6pZZCn9_G8DroO6CvpVh3qj_wAIDeWSKr4tIFYmYy9x8rjqloldA7QFsSefEH5ZarlUQtgPpH--wBlaHV6R5ndKm_jMSSK9MQ7qGw64aW8yb2c-hLICRX0EZVCSZZkhZc62ccEMjOGlm6V7pNw1WQ6yYH-1tytTG1a2fyFtw%3D%3D)

clean_body: Because you’ve been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me. | Friend, So many kind souls like you have asked how I’m doing, so I wanted to personally update you on my recovery. I was hospitalized after a devastating car crash. We were struck by a vehicle going what felt like 70-80 miles per hour. Had I not been wearing a seatbelt, I would’ve been killed. Right now, a back brace is holding my fractured spine together. But if I could survive being arrested in the most violent jail in America, I know I can survive ANYTHING! One thing especially helped take the pain away... ...President Trump has announced that he will award me with the Presidential Medal of Freedom – the highest civilian honor in America. President Trump knows I’m in a dire situation right now. His pardon powers only apply to federal cases, which means he legally cannot save me from the bogus state-level charges brought against me by a radical Democrat Attorney General who is trying to imprison me for 20 YEARS. Left with no pardon, no safety net, and no lifeline, my ONLY chance at walking free is to secure a top-notch defense team. But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of BANKRUPTCY. And now, this car crash has set me back even more...** And so, my last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like YOU. That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust as I continue fighting for my FREEDOM and my JUSTICE. Because when President Trump places the Medal of Freedom around my neck, I want history to always remember that I FOUGHT for my freedom and justice until the VERY END! Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

subject: Trump’s plan to abolish mail-in balloting:

Stand with us to defend fair and honest elections >>

| **In August, Trump falsely claimed that the U.S. is the only country that allows mail-in voting and called it a “corrupt” practice.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115415937/570242089/399364649?refcode=NDCAF_20250917_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWUxMTg0Ni0xNDk0LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Wlw_kM-kab83dK2b54fPOQQIhsn5z7jxLh9CnzGJnfw=&emci=140a5062-4c93-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=9ae11846-1494-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=48524772) | [ADD YOUR NAME TO DEFEND MAIL-IN VOTING »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115415939/570242091/399364649?refcode=NDCAF_20250917_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWUxMTg0Ni0xNDk0LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Wlw_kM-kab83dK2b54fPOQQIhsn5z7jxLh9CnzGJnfw=&emci=140a5062-4c93-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=9ae11846-1494-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=48524772)
---
He even quoted advice he said he received from Russian President Vladimir Putin, “It’s impossible to have mail-in voting and have honest elections.”

Now he’s threatening to unilaterally abolish mail-in balloting through an executive order ahead of the 2026 midterms.

New Dems are fighting back in Congress because we know how critical mail-in voting is to ensure everyone has their voice heard — _**it accounted for 30% of all votes cast during the 2024 general election.**_

**[But we need thousands of grassroots Democrats to stand with us against Trump’s voter suppression plan. Will you add your name to our “Defend Mail-In Voting” petition right now? »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115415941/570242093/399364649?refcode=NDCAF_20250917_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWUxMTg0Ni0xNDk0LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Wlw_kM-kab83dK2b54fPOQQIhsn5z7jxLh9CnzGJnfw=&emci=140a5062-4c93-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=9ae11846-1494-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=48524772)**

name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: All of us will miss Charlie. None of us will ever forget him.
body:
| | | [](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---
Patriot, Charlie Kirk didn’t just live a full life... He showed us what it meant to live boldly, love deeply, and lead with truth. With every ounce of his strength, he worked tirelessly to wake up a generation... To tell the truth... To save our country... And, above all, to point people back to God. And in the end — _Charlie gave it all._ No one can replace him. But all of us can carry forward with what he started. Patriot, we want to give you a glimpse into the legacy he left behind — _and the calling that now belongs to us._ **We made this tribute to honor the man who gave everything... And to remind the world that his mission will press on:**
---
[](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---
[**Watch Our Tribute to Charlie Here**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---
All of us will miss Charlie. _None of us will ever forget him._ For Charlie, \- The Turning Point USA Family
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: All of us will miss Charlie. None of us will ever forget him.
body:
| | | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Patriot, Charlie Kirk didn’t just live a full life... He showed us what it meant to live boldly, love deeply, and lead with truth. With every ounce of his strength, he worked tirelessly to wake up a generation... To tell the truth... To save our country... And, above all, to point people back to God. And in the end — _Charlie gave it all._ No one can replace him. But all of us can carry forward with what he started. Patriot, we want to give you a glimpse into the legacy he left behind — _and the calling that now belongs to us._ **We made this tribute to honor the man who gave everything... And to remind the world that his mission will press on:**
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
[**Watch Our Tribute to Charlie Here**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
All of us will miss Charlie. _None of us will ever forget him._ For Charlie, \- The Turning Point USA Family
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

name: Fair Fight Action
subject: Old, remixed tactics to exclude folks from the polls:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT ACTION
body:
Why we need the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act >> |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115416299/570243165/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20250917_T1_JimCrowPlaybook_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzhjOWEyNi0xNjk0LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7g7QKkHBanZgysaU_RE4Ab_y9RRU9QIf5JeeS0r1y3I=&emci=e1318320-1694-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=178c9a26-1694-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=1037277)

| | Which of these Jim Crow-era voter suppression tactics are still around in repackaged form today?
1. Poll taxes or paying fees in order to cast your ballot
2. Violence and intimidation at polls in the forms of mobs

If you chose either option, you’re correct — because both of these tactics live on in the strategies of anti-voter leaders. They have survived by being rebranded as technical, neutral, or bureaucratic. But make no mistake, these tactics target the same communities with the same goal: **disenfranchising Black, Latino, Native American, young, rural, and low-income voters. ** We should be making it easier for people to exercise their freedom to vote — not remixing old tactics to exclude folks from the polls. **That’s why we need the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act, which would restore voting rights protections that have been gutted by previous Supreme Court rulings. ** [**And as we fight to get Congress to pass this vital legislation, we need to make it clear that the American people are demanding action. Add your name today to show your support for the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act and fight back against voter suppression >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115416300/570243166/900773092?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20250917_T1_JimCrowPlaybook_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzhjOWEyNi0xNjk0LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7g7QKkHBanZgysaU_RE4Ab_y9RRU9QIf5JeeS0r1y3I=&emci=e1318320-1694-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=178c9a26-1694-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=1037277) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115416301/570243167/900773092?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20250917_T1_JimCrowPlaybook_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzhjOWEyNi0xNjk0LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7g7QKkHBanZgysaU_RE4Ab_y9RRU9QIf5JeeS0r1y3I=&emci=e1318320-1694-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=178c9a26-1694-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=1037277)

Here’s how Jim Crow-era voter suppression tactics have been modernized for today:
**Poll taxes → SAVE Act:** Poll taxes once made people pay to vote. Today, proposals like the SAVE Act would demand proof of citizenship with specific, often expensive government documents that tens of millions of eligible voters don’t have on hand. **Just like poll taxes, it’s a price tag on your right to vote, dressed up as paperwork.**
**Violence → Election “Security” or “Integrity”:** At the height of the Jim Crow era, Black people’s lives were at risk just for casting their ballots. Today, we’ve seen false claims that led to death threats against poll workers in Georgia, mobs surrounding Detroit’s vote count, and men armed with rifles outside election offices in Arizona. Far-right groups like True the Vote boast about recruiting former Navy SEALs to watch voting locations for “fraud.”
**Overtly discriminatory policies → Exact match laws:** A missing hyphen, apostrophe, or middle initial can get your registration tossed, and it can be applied with inequitable consequences. In 2018, then–Secretary of State Brian Kemp blocked 53,000 voter registration applications under Georgia’s exact match rule — nearly 70% belonged to Black voters.
The shameful legacy of Jim Crow is still around today. And that is exactly why our pro-voter movement is so important. Fair Fight Action pushes back against voter suppression in all its forms and right now, we need your help to show widespread support for the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act.

| | Peter,

I’ve spent years championing clean energy — not just as policy, but as an investment in our future: lowering costs, creating jobs, and protecting our climate.

But right now, **the House GOP is gutting renewable energy investments.** They’ve ripped away vital funding that powers projects in our communities and fuels progress for families. I wrote about it in my op-ed because **this isn’t just another partisan fight — _it’s our future on the line._**

**_[Add your name today to show the GOP you won’t stand for these backwards cuts.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115416430/570243644/-2123471092?source=EM_NBI_MT_20250917_PT_CleanEnergy_0_3MO_MikeThompson_NA_NA_Opedpt1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTBjMDc5OS0xNzk0LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8--Zx4WMSpagXN4WQcqXbWPG-BRf9wsx8M0H_Nib82Y=&emci=2b0c0799-1794-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=2e0c0799-1794-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=2678920)_**

body:
You’re paying $43 more on energy bills each month. Here’s why.

If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/502xl98alkm3J5MS-c04xA2?unsubscribedata=CFZcPS0xmymY4nfkzJwRzGVbR%2BlDajImM8Nridep%2B7nKlxma7a2O15tMxl61GwoZxsc646dXiB5QXqlHXID2ASFDORxk1Rq1FYfRH1pPYeIK%2Bze9%2FXd9UPZt902m8PPKqBne2e%2Bnt22pLAbLs6weCiH74nP7hnyAQFFkSgdzg%2FCkuF4v%2BCbgixrLHNnqrndZv6TXGP%2F%2BUFs6WoDjQW1Xrh8EVVO47R88R8tsJKQ49P0YdyOSie5UlnIX7nsfQWf93bZRXYQa4mfCRFG%2FAmYPBFJxi%2BTYOPjCiuXZcDirPHZ%2F5CTtHSpDN9o%2FtnQkjlpP6CMMQ2kzdT0p1z5vawkJIruWT04CMhoAOugWgDEvSx7DkFbxApwaWMETImjUmFXPG%2FDA31OYTfHrGsdcezBJp%2FELhpU3iIlDwx%2FBIb6BJO68dhEJTShGZ3V1K6BYz0l8)

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115416506/570243865/2021534627?source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_091725_PSC_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTZmN2QxYy0xODk0LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-hygz5weWlB6Cv4IoyDt7ThUmdOrwG1tweRYxlAIplk=)
---
If it feels like your power bill keeps going up — **that’s because it is.** Over the past five years, Georgia’s **all-Republican** Public Service Commission (PSC) has approved **six separate rate hikes**. Since the last election, those decisions have added **$43 a month** to the average power bill. These commissioners were supposed to look out for consumers. Instead, they’ve repeatedly **sided with powerful utility companies** — and Georgia families are paying the price. This November, we have a real chance to elect new leadership that will put Georgia ratepayers first. Every voter in Georgia can vote for **Peter Hubbard** and **Dr. Alicia Johnson** , two Democrats committed to **lowering costs** and **protecting consumers** — not corporate profits. **But here’s the challenge:** many voters still don’t know what the Public Service Commission does, or that this election even exists. We’re working to change that — **but we need your help.** We’re launching a final push to inform voters, drive turnout, and elect Democrats to the PSC **before early voting begins on October 14.** Your support will help us reach the voters who need to hear from us most. clean_body: You’re paying $43 more on energy bills each month. Here’s why. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = If it feels like your power bill keeps going up — that’s because it is. Over the past five years, Georgia’s all-Republican Public Service Commission (PSC) has approved six separate rate hikes. Since the last election, those decisions have added $43 a month to the average power bill. These commissioners were supposed to look out for consumers. Instead, they’ve repeatedly sided with powerful utility companies — and Georgia families are paying the price. This November, we have a real chance to elect new leadership that will put Georgia ratepayers first. Every voter in Georgia can vote for Peter Hubbard and Dr. Alicia Johnson , two Democrats committed to lowering costs and protecting consumers — not corporate profits. But here’s the challenge: many voters still don’t know what the Public Service Commission does, or that this election even exists. We’re working to change that — but we need your help. We’re launching a final push to inform voters, drive turnout, and elect Democrats to the PSC before early voting begins on October 14. name: Jon Ossoff for Senate
subject: Georgia’s Senate race is statistically tied
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

Hey Good afternoon, Peter!
[**If you can afford it, we’re humbly asking you to make a $5 contribution to Jon Ossoff’s reelection campaign here in Georgia.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-sep25.SYBMcx&refcode=em250917-1-full-a&t=1&akid=780%2E5691347%2EbxIXvu)
Sorry to be so direct, but Jon is the ONLY Democratic Senator running for reelection in a state Trump won. **He is without a doubt MAGA’s number one target.**
The latest polls show this race statistically tied. And experts at the _Cook Political Report_ have officially named this race a “Toss-Up.”
National Republicans see this race as their best opportunity to stop Democrats from retaking control of the Senate, and they’ve already spent millions of dollars on ads attacking Jon.
So we’re asking for your help to ensure we have the resources to respond to the onslaught of right-wing money flooding into Georgia and set the record straight.
**Because the truth is we either respond now or risk losing Georgia to a full-blown MAGA takeover.**
[**Please, chip in $5 to Jon Ossoff’s reelection campaign today. We wouldn’t ask if it was not so important.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-sep25.SYBMcx&refcode=em250917-1-full-a&t=2&akid=780%2E5691347%2EbxIXvu)

Republicans are rushing a spending bill to keep the government running. But I’m not giving them a free pass to hand massive tax breaks to billionaires, force rural hospitals to close, or kick millions off their health care. **And oh yeah, I'm not going to let them try to cover up the Epstein scandal either. subject: We could lose...

body:
There’s only one way we’ll win this election, and that is together.

**$3.**
That is the donation we are asking you to contribute to help Gavin Newsom pass the Election Rigging Response Act in California. Yes, $3.
$3 because all we want is a fair chance to take back the House in 2026 — but Republicans are rigging their maps in Texas, Missouri, and other states to rig the next election before a single vote is cast.
$3 because one man with a history of giving to extremist causes and candidates has already contributed $30 million to beat us. That means we are getting outraised and outspent. Not great.
$3 because unless we can catch up before ballots drop in 3 weeks, we could very easily lose this election.
Folks, we know that $3 may not seem like it can do much against what we’re up against, but as you read this lots and lots of people are chipping-in their $3.
Now they hope you’ll do the same. Because there’s only one way we’ll win this election, and that is together.
So what do you say?
[**Can Gavin Newsom and Democrats everywhere count on you to contribute $3 to help us pass the Election Rigging Response Act in California? We would not ask if it was not totally necessary for us to win.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/erra-em?refcode=em250917&refcode2=2559_4767699_F41oAV&akid=2559%2E4767699%2EF41oAV)

subject: Gerrymandering is coming to our home state.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
We must be prepared.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115417149/570245983/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_250917Home_TSB_90DO_7_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTk1MGUwYS0xYTk0LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MKQnsBAZ_7oiAl71w4z0VdlUr4fUFyBKX8HeF1QtpLs=) Peter –

Recently, Trump made it clear that he wanted Republicans across the nation to work to deliver him more seats in the US House of Representatives. It didn’t take long for them to get to work.

**FIRST:** The Texas GOP worked overtime to deliver him a fresh new map, giving the party five more seats.

**THEN:** The Missouri House passed a map that erases a Democratic seat.

**NOW:** The redistricting process is underway in Ohio, and Trump and his cronies will surely work to chip away at our Democratic seats.

We want to make one thing clear: representatives should be chosen by the People, not hand-picked by lawmakers seeking more power for themselves. Once again, Trump wants to change the rules of the game to install more MAGA politicians in the House. We must fight back.

[**We need to work together to gain control of the House and put a stop to Trump’s blatant power grabs. Democrats in Ohio’s legislature are trying to overcome these attacks by introducing their own map, showing that fair, representative districts are possible. However, Republicans in the state are making it clear their plan will be gerrymandered to maximize Republican seats. As Ohio Republican Party leader Tony Schroeder put it, to the GOP passing fair maps is **“as much a fantasy as the Wizard of Oz.”**

**That’s why we’re reaching out today, Peter. The new maps demanded by Trump will make it more difficult for Democrats to regain control of the House. It’s critical that we support Democrats nationwide, and we cannot do it alone.**

[**We will need all hands on deck to support Democrats running for the House in 2026. Will you rush a $5 or more donation today to help us prepare for this fight?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115417191/570246054/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_250917Home_TSB_90DO_7_NG_N_L2&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTk1MGUwYS0xYTk0LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MKQnsBAZ_7oiAl71w4z0VdlUr4fUFyBKX8HeF1QtpLs=)

Thank you,

Team Shontel Brown
Shontel Brown is proud to be elected as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District. She has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. As she enters her second full term in Congress, she will use that experience to continue the fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and to preserve and protect our democracy for generations to come. Will you join her and be the change we need?

It didn’t take long for them to get to work. FIRST: The Texas GOP worked overtime to deliver him a fresh new map, giving the party five more seats. THEN: The Missouri House passed a map that erases a Democratic seat. NOW: The redistricting process is underway in Ohio, and Trump and his cronies will surely work to chip away at our Democratic seats. We want to make one thing clear: representatives should be chosen by the People, not hand-picked by lawmakers seeking more power for themselves. Once again, Trump wants to change the rules of the game to install more MAGA politicians in the House. We must fight back. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = Democrats in Ohio’s legislature are trying to overcome these attacks by introducing their own map, showing that fair, representative districts are possible. However, Republicans in the state are making it clear their plan will be gerrymandered to maximize Republican seats. As Ohio Republican Party leader Tony Schroeder put it, to the GOP passing fair maps is “as much a fantasy as the Wizard of Oz.” That’s why we’re reaching out today, Peter. The new maps demanded by Trump will make it more difficult for Democrats to regain control of the House. It’s critical that we support Democrats nationwide, and we cannot do it alone. = Thank you, Team Shontel Brown Shontel Brown is proud to be elected as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District. She has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. As she enters her second full term in Congress, she will use that experience to continue the fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and to preserve and protect our democracy for generations to come. Will you join her and be the change we need? ******=****** Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress Shontel Brown for Congress 545 E Town Street Columbus, OH 43215 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Tim Walz
subject: This is why I’m running for reelection, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
I’m officially running for reelection as Governor of Minnesota.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250917_1_walz_em250916twlwd?refcode=em20250917-2663&amount=5&refcode2=2663_587540_c2K9Ny&akid=2663%2E587540%2Ec2K9Ny)
Peter, I wanted to reach out personally to share this news with you:
**I’m officially running for reelection as Governor of Minnesota, because our work to make our state the best place in America to live, work, and raise a family isn’t finished.**
**[If you’re with me, can I count on you to split a donation between my campaign and Leaders We Deserve today? Knowing I have your early support in this race would mean the world to me.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250917_1_walz_em250916twlwd?refcode=em20250917-2663&amount=5&refcode2=2663_587540_c2K9Ny&akid=2663%2E587540%2Ec2K9Ny)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250917_1_walz_em250916twlwd?amount=5&refcode=em20250917-2663&refcode2=2663_587540_c2K9Ny&akid=2663%2E587540%2Ec2K9Ny)**
I grew up in Butte, Nebraska – a town of 400 people. There were 24 kids in my high school class. Living in a small town, you learn early on what it means to look out for your neighbors and to serve others.
That call to service is what led me to enlist in the Army National Guard just two days after my 17th birthday. I was proud to wear the uniform of this country for the next 24 years.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250917_1_walz_em250916twlwd?refcode=em20250917-2663&amount=5&refcode2=2663_587540_c2K9Ny&akid=2663%2E587540%2Ec2K9Ny)
My drive to serve others eventually set me on a new path: teaching. My wife Gwen and I met while teaching high school. Kids carry their whole lives with them into the classroom and Gwen and I got to know our students and see the obstacles they faced. **It was my experience as a teacher and my passion for education that led me to run for governor.**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250917_1_walz_em250916twlwd?refcode=em20250917-2663&amount=5&refcode2=2663_587540_c2K9Ny&akid=2663%2E587540%2Ec2K9Ny)
Serving as Governor of Minnesota has been the honor of my life, and I couldn’t be prouder of the progress we’ve won. From providing universal free school meals for students, to protecting reproductive freedom, and cutting taxes for the middle class, we’ve secured tangible results that Minnesotans can actually feel.
The values that inspired me to serve our country in uniform, become an educator, and run for governor are the same ones I still carry with me each day as I work for the people of Minnesota. I still believe in helping our neighbors, protecting our freedoms, and investing in the future for our next generation. And I believe that, despite Donald Trump and MAGA’s attempts to tear us apart, we are still all in this together.
**Right now, we have an opportunity to continue delivering progress for Minnesotans – but only if we hold onto this Governor seat.** That’s why I’m asking you to have my back today, Peter.
**[Would you split a donation between my campaign and Leaders We Deserve? Thank you in advance for your support.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250917_1_walz_em250916twlwd?refcode=em20250917-2663&amount=5&refcode2=2663_587540_c2K9Ny&akid=2663%2E587540%2Ec2K9Ny)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250917_1_walz_em250916twlwd?amount=5&refcode=em20250917-2663&refcode2=2663_587540_c2K9Ny&akid=2663%2E587540%2Ec2K9Ny)**
I’ll be in touch soon,
Tim Walz
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250917-1&t=1&refcode2=2663_587540_c2K9Ny&akid=2663%2E587540%2Ec2K9Ny)**

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA’s collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation – not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read “Free The Uyghurs.” After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc._

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

clean_body: I’m in for a real fight. I need your help. | Peter, Meet Emily Higley, Elections Administrator at Ramsey County Elections Office, MN. After Charlie Kirk’s assassination, she posted: “lmao rest in piss charlie, you reap what you sow” and called him “literally a nazi.” This is the person in charge of overseeing elections in Minnesota’s second-largest county. Peter, THIS is what I’m up against in Minnesota. It’s not just Emily. There are THOUSANDS of Radical White Liberal Women just like her in Minnesota. This one just happens to hold all the power over an election. Seems unfair, doesn’t it? Whether it’s Elections Administrators, Uniparty Puppets, the Industrial Media Complex, or the Radical Left in Minnesota, it’s truly me vs the world in this race. If you’re okay with more sickening comments from Far Left Activists holding power in Minnesota and Washington, D.C., then close out this email. But if you’re sick and tired of this kind of abhorrent behavior from people who see Republicans as nothing more than “Nazis,” | If I – as a free-thinking Black Republican – am a “Nazi,” then Michael Jordan is a unicorn from Mars. It just doesn’t make sense. It’s not grounded in any kind of reality. If I don’t win this Senate race, either a RINO Uniparty Puppet or Radical Leftist Peggy Flannagan will. Either way, it’ll be an America LAST Senator. The People Are Coming! Thank you, Royce White Meet Royce White: Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards. After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA’s collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation – not just posturing through press statements, but through policy. Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read “Free The Uyghurs.” After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc. Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans. PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE P.O. name: GOTV PAC
subject: Why Virginia matters:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25]
Peter,
This November, Virginia voters will decide more than just who represents them in the House of Delegates. They’ll also decide the fate of three constitutional amendments: one to protect marriage equality, one to safeguard reproductive freedom, and one to restore voting rights to people who have served their time.
But before these amendments can ever reach voters statewide, they must be approved again by the Virginia House of Delegates, and with Democrats holding just a 51–49 majority, everything is on the line. If we lose the House this fall, those amendments, and the rights they would protect, could vanish.
That’s why GOTV PAC is all in. Right now, we’re:
* Targeting 12 of the most competitive delegate races in Virginia.
* Running phone and text banks to reach voters where they are.
* Paying for candidate programs that make sure Democrats have the resources to fight back against the flood of Republican money.
This is about more than Virginia. If we win here, we send a powerful signal heading into 2026 that voters are ready to defend rights and reject Trump’s extremist agenda. If we lose, the path to protecting fundamental freedoms gets much steeper.
Can you chip in $15, $25, or whatever you can today to fuel our work in Virginia’s most competitive districts? Every dollar helps us reach more voters, protect these rights, and build momentum for Democrats nationwide. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09172025]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=Email09172025] DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=Email09172025]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=Email09172025] DONATE $500 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?express_lane=true&amount=500&refcode=Email09172025]
Custom Donation [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09172025]
We can’t afford to let Republicans roll back the clock. Virginia is where we draw the line.
-GOTV PAC
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09152025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09152025&amount=25]
Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]

Our mission is to Flip the House by supporting targeted Congressional districts and down-ballot races within those districts. name: CADEM VOTA
subject: Our Voice, Our Power - Latinos for Prop 50
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP35/1/80994/images/Removal420.png]
Demócratas,
In just months, Donald Trump has attacked communities across California by slashing Medicaid that millions of families, especially Latinos, rely on, raising costs with tariffs, denying disaster aid to fire victims, and arresting thousands without warrants. Now he’s coming for our democracy with a scheme to rig next year’s elections. We have to stop him.
Proposition 50, the Election Rigging Response Act , is our best hope to stop Trump. If he and MAGA Republicans can steal unchecked power for two more years, they’ll have free reign to continue with their agenda of targeting Latinos and hurting our families. Will you help us fight back and get out the vote for Yes on Prop 50?
https://linktr.ee/cadem [https://linktr.ee/cadem]
TAKE ACTION WITH VOTA [https://linktr.ee/cadem]
Through our VOTA program , the California Democratic Party is leading the charge to engage Latino voters and meet them where they are. Alongside the CDP Chicano Latino Caucus, we’re hosting bilingual phonebanks in English and Spanish every Thursday and Sunday. And with partners across the state, there are daily phonebanks and canvasses happening through Election Day. But we can’t do it without you. Here’s how you can take action with VOTA :
* Make calls in English and Spanish [https://www.mobilize.us/cadems/event/833417] on Thursdays and Sundays.
* Join phonebanks 6 days a week [https://www.mobilize.us/cadems/event/833391] and talk directly with voters.
* Find a canvass near you [https://www.mobilize.us/cadems/map/?lat=36.7378&lon=-119.7871&tag_ids=27747&zoom=5.0] or host one in your neighborhood.
* Share information on social media in English or Spanish [https://app.sosha.ai/toolkit/stopelectionrigging-7a15] with ready-to-go graphics and captions. Make sure to tag @YesonCA50!
This Latino Heritage Month, we’re proud to launch a VOTA email series that will spotlight our efforts each week to mobilize Latino voters. Check your inbox for the latest updates on our organizing action to pass Prop 50 and get out the vote.
Trump and MAGA Republicans are counting on low turnout and silence from our community, but we know better. By organizing, calling, knocking doors, and turning out Latino voters, we can protect our democracy and each other.
Gracias,
VOTA Team

[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/cd296049-f014-4caf-9463-09c21dd5b3ce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Hey folks,
Back by popular demand! I brought my dad, **Bill Nellis** -- retired FBI agent and diehard Republican -- back on to talk about Charlie Kirk's murder. We don't agree on much, but we dug deep into the political violence shaking this country, and I think it's one of the most important conversations I've ever had on this show.
Here's what we got into:
* **[00:01:12]** My dad explains why he admires Charlie Kirk -- and I push back on what that says about the political moment we're living through.
* **[00:04:09]** We argue about the immediate partisan spin around the murder and whether the right is weaponizing tragedy for political gain.
* **[00:07:02]** A fierce back-and-forth on mental health, radicalization, and who's really to blame for the rise in political violence.
* **[00:17:04]** Shockingly, we agree: both parties are failing to keep guns out of the hands of dangerous people -- and it's costing lives.
* **[00:33:10]** My dad's tough love take on student loans, privilege, and what he _really_ thinks about who deserves to retire with dignity.

This conversation is essential. Not because we agree -- we don't -- but because we're willing to go there. We don't sugarcoat it. We don't shy away. And we don't let each other off the hook.
**[If you value honest, urgent political talk that cuts through the noise, become a paid subscriber today. Help me keep making space for conversations that matter-- the kind the political class is too scared to have.](https://substack.com/redirect/cd296049-f014-4caf-9463-09c21dd5b3ce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
With urgency,
--Mike

name: Tucker Carlson
subject: Charlie gave everything. We must too.
body:
Right now, Charlie would say, "Don't you dare quit"

| | | [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=1ea52c9abe6c45b3bfc0e82ef614f201&_e=UsgHVHjQSDOodeWTkgV5OHB-BmbAtqkGB9487d5wEnvsIg5qBM_MLv7dw_1AcbCmWytaYMa0HtULwOI7K92tSEchxzazAg0JZCLWKShJtnUzs-rZJA_OA5-w0dH3ZAGBla-PL97eHrLlsnqIOtw9D7nqoHsezxHS6Z2qEjY6yoCYTuMNz03RGq0n6Vo8Pfq05zhP08I5zhMqcHp6RlqCT6ghAjlhhUo7CrCKfXssRMjK_HbfsS9yoay2FtE5gar9mhz-BoyW1AFv2sf2lav80z2QvSeKnmJ5EpLPTn340UjmRFYS91a4kb-_eMHvat7T-SGwfG4NDBwLlRhpy58-URVXiUXpS-xTBhxbp3HYd1v75HLnOh7v5tErTTmxw_Oezi_FWTiwXXchTxHYXYVze488Zjz-o6WOl0eakWlHNapWjoacOk3Y27BJa4V32cJrioI4N4eWhgfU4unQdM_FEaGqqU403v0FUeHXPI_rZrXQxqzbsMKFo5PdiOpsBh7w-AO6Ws5mMm7859l1_ZF9pxavj5MnpU9FMAouy-U21hJvyGrRIUlRAArv5miWr1DM3kELmqgxHgf4E7mVDO3Oa4seHFMxRbnnUnYNEx0K2drbqCh5LMYYtaQp7IU4OzCffWWkLMH7G6QDbAO6GLMx1t31S7KG7ogEzSTsEP2MCXdNmqEwuADymUnNOXBb05RABParIkvn8r6gYYdSt04EtJ3X4MsEFp6P0nsZIlZAdkc%3D)
---
Peter,
---
I don't write emails like this often. But right now? After what happened to Charlie... _I can 't stay quiet._**Charlie Kirk was my friend.** Not just someone I admired, but someone I loved and respected deeply. Losing him was devastating.
---
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=1ea52c9abe6c45b3bfc0e82ef614f201&_e=UsgHVHjQSDOodeWTkgV5OHB-BmbAtqkGB9487d5wEnvsIg5qBM_MLv7dw_1AcbCmWytaYMa0HtULwOI7K92tSEchxzazAg0JZCLWKShJtnUzs-rZJA_OA5-w0dH3ZAGBla-PL97eHrLlsnqIOtw9D7nqoHsezxHS6Z2qEjY6yoCYTuMNz03RGq0n6Vo8Pfq05zhP08I5zhMqcHp6RlqCT6ghAjlhhUo7CrCKfXssRMjK_HbfsS9yoay2FtE5gar9BLDJdrPQxTpN0XxFiOV8EM-FysF5GDIR_3X6hto-Jtxsfwb7pEK603k_0-3LrBEMTvH1uQCPBtzfcBqHfnZV5vkXbJt9HsTUmAsizKinx1DZTEJK0_tZMCcGEKbv7RJS0oaBHru9db30PWET2PJdfB-fui0-GuW0qPsnn1VIzDM2fcym_M1DuosmyEcaUyNFU81ZcYPBXLg3fSr7Ooa5StyNFeHuzQP_Q29iV97NrmXRYlCrXkA0epPQwzMJu7pNXXffpgtA_aAQW6I02NVRf0c0FrSJaq-Y3NfIt02qmrw4aslTzf9EwgrlPSdqDB2KpIA7FC9gTDkrlwnFJoLRp0UygtoJaC7p9ZsOgY5KjzdiDr1xmyNEqlptvSNsLALvWgDVRibufjKZhUO1YNtJT4vKUtkS0xrZpk4GlDs1q02Bgr_MqHWuIZwQWbbHN0jpuKvR-tHDzI58RFFiaswomAQaaObQ7bdK3goW9bgROFg%3D)
---
In many ways, all of us share in this loss. Charlie fought every day of his life for each one of us... fighting to keep America as great, free, and prosperous. No one I know ever fought for that harder than Charlie.America won't ever be the same. **No one can ever replace him -- but we can make sure his legacy continues on. **_We owe him that._ Because if you knew Charlie, you would know exactly what he would say to us right now: _**"Don 't you dare quit."**_Charlie poured his heart into building a movement to save America. He believed in young people. He believed in ordinary Americans. And he believed that even in our darkest hours, America was the beacon of goodness, freedom, and truth.That's what the Turning Point movement was all about -- and Charlie gave everything he had to that fight.**And our task now is not only to protect what he built -- it's to grow it bigger, stronger, and bolder than anyone ever thought possible. ** More students. More churches. More families. More courage from everyday Americans to stand up and fight for what is right.Turning Point USA was Charlie's vehicle to save America. **He didn 't just start a movement... _he started a revival. _**And now, Peter, we must carry that forward. If you share the same sense of responsibility that I do to honor Charlie's work and press on with his vision...** _Then please join me in keeping his fight alive by making a gift to Turning Point USA today. _** **[Let’s make Turning Point USA the biggest thing that this nation has ever seen... bigger than Charlie ever thought possible. That’s how we honor him best.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=1ea52c9abe6c45b3bfc0e82ef614f201&_e=UsgHVHjQSDOodeWTkgV5OHB-BmbAtqkGB9487d5wEnvsIg5qBM_MLv7dw_1AcbCmWytaYMa0HtULwOI7K92tSEchxzazAg0JZCLWKShJtnUzs-rZJA_OA5-w0dH3ZAGBla-PL97eHrLlsnqIOtw9D7nqoHsezxHS6Z2qEjY6yoCYTuMNz03RGq0n6Vo8Pfq05zhP08I5zhMqcHp6RlqCT6ghAjlhhUo7CrCKfXssRMjK_HbfsS9yoay2FtE5gar9Wu77_jt9s-mOa6jKzahpCW7Ge1pBe6CMD15_vV4Q1bAixPpjRcr8_XJD8Ehx7wJADxKOmLcLfL7Qq2pdLgldcm6r53aU95ZhkGspPSW2osukg0gLO30jdZ7ZMr08kOyGBbO7jnIuSKRz4G8OugtQqwaIeazN_5Z5rJX-YoceG1lJf_kfZUO8krdmW40fFPWloEF1B5Grh62un_oFip1_kJSG4OGdXOd1mVcc2QmTHmnlmBeiIiEscMF9-Ai5molUo1QTRJvp80r8mdsh1RSr8a63ZSHccQ_tsApAMXRBR3owEtZC3Ux88v6q5CGpL576IkQotIjjgnSXcdQld3Spw2omhVVsyrcf9AIvjfnrF8t5gPlNqjL-d2DLxMakBcoeBtAW_LODr8wufJHIjZ2VmGPmltufJ3rvaji_faW0QDw555WRS7IK6zcrvjkE1ktoj8ZP4snCx9W5VJoxxgquMLwz0zjzkS7Ro5GaQJAvsCI%3D)**

**Support Turning Point USA**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=1ea52c9abe6c45b3bfc0e82ef614f201&_e=UsgHVHjQSDOodeWTkgV5OHB-BmbAtqkGB9487d5wEnvsIg5qBM_MLv7dw_1AcbCmWytaYMa0HtULwOI7K92tSEchxzazAg0JZCLWKShJtnUzs-rZJA_OA5-w0dH3ZAGBla-PL97eHrLlsnqIOtw9D7nqoHsezxHS6Z2qEjY6yoCYTuMNz03RGq0n6Vo8Pfq05zhP08I5zhMqcHp6RlqCT6ghAjlhhUo7CrCKfXssRMjK_HbfsS9yoay2FtE5gar9XuwSZq2Tq7zyfhNKDEQQy0h11xKDOq4hF0-C4521FdmRo39u3XB2sJgZmButhyL_xAFHIq5ycbybmSFLK2DNbXlYYDI9gthN_VqQqZsRpQIWdd2ATm6nAF5pYaGw35TlPS5-E4psABAfJ-3wQ7obgiC3-rjetZ-JE9FEbrHbt4K-YzLja5X9nauEhu1oMcXelEhJ4FSaBq5mOdYz6IS89nqicukvSiSwocLZRO6lfD951LNzkquTbJknte5xLXkLEMwco_WqYDgvMnU8qeAWpVEASsKerZ_nR5TtqX0dcLq5fWcIHSHnetCTLWD6mpuq0VsRTAUICB3QCt5s_QN-FiXxEUe8pQkO6YoQ6PGvjh8SgdaMo26ZHBASdJZJSkmwiZtE4AVOmwMMPW9YkW0bZdcpVeawfPtNxUOVZyAdJUfaLMn6XEBQxLuQkGZOw9dgYvq6hrmbSEb3WEqPlJMbwjIGBiE7a6vRUSELKDgm5mc%3D)

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: Restore trust in Congress.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
Here’s the situation: Members of Congress have access to sensitive, privileged information to be able to anticipate and legislate as part of their jobs.
Some use this sensitive information to make _huge_ profits from buying and trading individual stocks that they know will perform well. **Then this happens:**
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250917.iszCBW&refcode=em20250917-9774-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9774%2E2526796%2ELcidfJ)
Since before she was elected, **Alexandria has called for an end to this unethical practice**.
So last week — alongside a bipartisan coalition — Alexandria introduced the **Restore Trust in Congress Act** to ban Congressmembers and their dependents from doing just that.
We must do everything we can to restore the American people’s faith in our institutions. **That starts with making sure that no one can abuse their position in Congress to make huge profits from the stock market**.
[Despite the incoming Trump trifecta, Alexandria isn’t afraid to demand better from members of both parties. If you can, will you make a $5 contribution to power her fight to push Congress forward? ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250917.iszCBW&refcode=em20250917-9774-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9774%2E2526796%2ELcidfJ)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250917.iszCBW&refcode=em20250917-9774-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=9774%2E2526796%2ELcidfJ)**
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250917.iszCBW&refcode=em20250917-9774-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=9774%2E2526796%2ELcidfJ)
Alexandria knows that we must restore the American people’s faith in our institutions, and that starts by demanding better from members of both parties.
Whether or not you can contribute today, thank you for standing with us.
In solidarity,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250917?refcode=em20250917-9774-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=23&refcode2=9774_2526796_LcidfJ&akid=9774%2E2526796%2ELcidfJ)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250917-9774-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=24&akid=9774%2E2526796%2ELcidfJ)**

subject: Michiganders won't be fooled

body:
please read right away
