Null – JD Vance was here in Michigan today touting the administration's pro-billionaire MAGA agenda, but**Michiganders won't be fooled.**
**We know that the only thing we've seen from this administration is skyrocketing costs, rising unemployment, and repeated attacks on our health care. And we know that Donald Trump, JD Vance, and Mike Rogers' chaos agenda is hurting our state.**
I am ready to stand up to this administration in the Senate, lower costs for our families, strengthen our manufacturing economy, and protect the benefits Michiganders have earned over lifetimes of hard work – but I need your help to get there, null.
**_[Will you please chip in $5 or more now to help me raise $20,000 by midnight so we can push back against Trump, Vance, and Rogers' relentless lies and compete with the surge of cash funneling into Michigan from GOP megadonors? Together we can keep this seat blue and take back the Senate for Democrats.](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5961?t=3&akid=873%2E49239%2EREDXNN)_**
Thank you,

Haley
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5966?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=4&akid=873%2E49239%2EREDXNN) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5965?t=5&akid=873%2E49239%2EREDXNN)

Haley

name: Kelly Morrison
subject: Checking in on our community
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morrison for Congress
body:
https://kellyforcongress.org [https://kellyforcongress.org]
Hi Peter,
This summer has been incredibly difficult for our country, and especially Minnesota. From the assassination of Speaker Melissa Hortman and her husband Mark, to the heartbreaking school shooting at Annunciation School in Minneapolis, and most recently, the assasination of Republican activist Charlie Kirk at Utah Valley University. Peter, I hope you’re holding up, and that you’re finding ways to take care of yourself and those around you during these heartbreaking times.
Melissa has been on my mind everyday. I watched her lead during challenging times like this with compassion, resolve, and dignity. I keep the words of her children, Sophie and Colin, in mind: The best way to honor Melissa and Mark’s legacy is to do something, big or small, that makes our community just a little better for someone else. That is what I return to when the weight of this work feels overwhelming, and it’s how I will continue to honor my friend’s incredible legacy. I hope that this brings you comfort as well.
This is a watershed moment in our country, and now more than ever, we must strive to do our best to take care of each other. Peter, while the divisions in our country may at times seem insurmountable, we can continue to make our world a better place by leaning into being kind to each other . We have to work to find common ground and shut down the violent rhetoric that has become so common in our politics. Most Americans care about their neighbors regardless of their political beliefs, and are tired of being pitted against their fellow Americans.
Please continue to take care of yourselves and of each other, Peter, and remember to spread kindness when you can. 🩵
With gratitude, resolve, and love,
Kelly Morrison
https://www.facebook.com/KellyMorrisonForCongress [https://www.facebook.com/KellyMorrisonForCongress] https://twitter.com/Morrison4MN [https://twitter.com/Morrison4MN] https://instagram.com/kellymorrisonforcongress [https://instagram.com/kellymorrisonforcongress] kellyforcongress.org [kellyforcongress.org]

If you only want to receive our most important emails, click here to receive fewer emails. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/hHyPtKcXyUeK_xcY7BEsAQ2]
We’d hate to see you go, but if you want you can unsubscribe here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/4Dh5T9ni_kaWmPt-auzpZw2?unsubscribedata=a3gxaqMv7enwDscUpA7HoWpoeKxqsch67qchBx9SfnmD91VQg3%2Fmr3kybDf4bvYa6z5Oy7Uyj9YE6llEl8BH%2B%2FLJ8V2L%2F3QmPLlc1ONb6WF6K47o3ShFwcDGHE5AgKiIcHi4WLWmREcoVL2HewG8jltKDvNSgSUQ4EuGEeNgymtSrhO5VXkJzgW3cHSk3CjwHIuX82s%2FVhU5XvRYuIVpEH%2BWli7IgbGKVVKqdh%2BufNAWbGgC0OVC4nzwnYc9bVmvkjUX4ZJcLYMVzsvdlH8r81Yg8p5nwbKg1952UW6aPFcfqNbBWaXXMHKlEgEWt3CYL4Pv8MpIgYvSuXR7CA6HxhK9nlJ%2BYZpcUYcRc1mvgqvzqiQRltarZnDCEM0DLpmwf7s9yD8NHuSUV%2F4KxaPBYTwV82VNYVZhM%2FwlVgQ2DXYc2MC6FY31WXDi48DlqMsy] .

This is a watershed moment in our country, and now more than ever, we must strive to do our best to take care of each other. Peter, while the divisions in our country may at times seem insurmountable, we can continue to make our world a better place by leaning into being kind to each other . We have to work to find common ground and shut down the violent rhetoric that has become so common in our politics. Most Americans care about their neighbors regardless of their political beliefs, and are tired of being pitted against their fellow Americans. Please continue to take care of yourselves and of each other, Peter, and remember to spread kindness when you can. 🩵 With gratitude, resolve, and love, Kelly Morrison [] [] [] kellyforcongress.org [kellyforcongress.org] Email is the best way to keep our supporters up to date. If you only want to receive our most important emails, click here to receive fewer emails. [] We’d hate to see you go, but if you want you can unsubscribe here [] . Morrison for Congress PO Box 684 Wayzata, MN 55391 United States Paid for by Morrison for Congress

| | **_Meet Russell:_** Born and raised in Surfside Beach, SC, Congressman Russell Fry is the proud and homegrown Representative for South Carolina’s 7th Congressional District. Growing up in a cinder block home with no heating or air conditioning, Russell learned at an early age that hard work and perseverance pave the only true path to the American Dream. He watched his parents work day in and day out to make ends meet. And the values they instilled in him during his upbringing led Russell to self-fund both his undergraduate education at the University of South Carolina, and later his law studies at the Charleston School of Law. At Charleston, Russell served as the President of the Student Bar Association and even helped the school achieve its American Bar Association accreditation. He went on to practice law in the Grand Strand area for over a decade before entering the political arena to serve in the South Carolina House of Representatives for State House District 106 (Horry County). During his seven-year tenure in the SC House, Russell fought to safeguard Constitutional liberties, lower taxes, and put the best interests of South Carolina families above all else. He climbed the ranks to become Chief Majority Whip, and also chaired the House Opioid Prevention Study Committee. Under Russell’s leadership, 18 policy initiatives to combat the opioid crisis were signed into law. Since the first day he stepped foot in Washington, Russell has strived to shake up the corrupt status quo and deliver real change for the American people. He believes adamantly that so long as the American people stand united, we can keep the American Dream alive for every citizen of our great nation. Russell is a dedicated husband to his wife, Bronwen, and a loving father to his son, James. The family lives in Murrells Inlet with their chocolate lab, Jasper.

clean_body: So I say this to the ACLU: Keep the baseless attacks against me coming. | | | | | | Liberal hypocrisy truly knows no bounds, does it Peter? | | The left has spewed inflammatory rhetoric for YEARS while labeling Republicans as nazis, fascists, and aspiring dictators. Yet they have theaudacity to try and blame conservatives for the _outburst of political violence stemming from THEIR side of the aisle. So the far-left ACLU ’s recent allegations against me arefalling on deaf ears. And the ACLU has another thing coming if they think I’m ever backing down from my duties to the people of SC-07. | | | | | Peter, it’s an insult to the American people that liberals are downplaying their own side’s celebration of political bloodshed. But Americans have had enough of the lies, the gaslighting, and especially the violent outbursts. We can’t let the depraved socialists on the left defeat us in the fight for America’s future. | | | | | Thank you for standing up for the greatest nation mankind has ever known. For America, Russell Fry | | | | Conservative RepublicanAmerica First CongressmanSC-07 | | | | | | | | | Meet Russell: Born and raised in Surfside Beach, SC, Congressman Russell Fry is the proud and homegrown Representative for South Carolina’s 7th Congressional District. Growing up in a cinder block home with no heating or air conditioning, Russell learned at an early age that hard work and perseverance pave the only true path to the American Dream. He watched his parents work day in and day out to make ends meet. And the values they instilled in him during his upbringing led Russell to self-fund both his undergraduate education at the University of South Carolina, and later his law studies at the Charleston School of Law. At Charleston, Russell served as the President of the Student Bar Association and even helped the school achieve its American Bar Association accreditation. He went on to practice law in the Grand Strand area for over a decade before entering the political arena to serve in the South Carolina House of Representatives for State House District 106 (Horry County). During his seven-year tenure in the SC House, Russell fought to safeguard Constitutional liberties, lower taxes, and put the best interests of South Carolina families above all else. He climbed the ranks to become Chief Majority Whip, and also chaired the House Opioid Prevention Study Committee. Under Russell’s leadership, 18 policy initiatives to combat the opioid crisis were signed into law. Since the first day he stepped foot in Washington, Russell has strived to shake up the corrupt status quo and deliver real change for the American people. He believes adamantly that so long as the American people stand united, we can keep the American Dream alive for every citizen of our great nation. Russell is a dedicated husband to his wife, Bronwen, and a loving father to his son, James. The family lives in Murrells Inlet with their chocolate lab, Jasper. | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | | | | ⬇DONATE BY CHECK⬇ Russell Fry for Congress PO Box 14641 Surfside Beach, SC 29587 | | | | | | | |

name: Fetterman HQ
subject: do you support raising the retirement age?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51612?t=1&akid=10315%2E434096%2EmaiXVE)
| | |
---
Derek, Trump and extremist Republicans are running Social Security into the ground – and they’re doing it on purpose.
They’ve closed offices, cut staff, and slowed down checks. It’s all part of their scheme to privatize Social Security and let Wall Street gamble with your retirement. 😡
And now, tax cuts in Trump’s budget law are speeding us toward a crisis. Funds could run dry as soon as 2032.
But John is fighting every day to protect Social Security – the money YOU'VE earned – and make sure it’s there for you, your kids, and your grandkids.
[**So before Republicans come at us with another plot to chip away at this critical program and give their rich buddies another payday, we need to know what you think:**](http://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51668?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&code=jtk257-su-fl&t=2&akid=10315%2E434096%2EmaiXVE)
**Do you support raising the retirement age for
Social Security?**
| | | [YES](http://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51669?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&%3Bzip=18326&%3Bcode=jtk257-su-fl&t=3&akid=10315%2E434096%2EmaiXVE)

**Nevada continues to be _the top battleground state in the nation_ — where strong grassroots support makes all the difference.**
MAGA donors are planning to invest heavily into upcoming elections to hold onto power — trying to keep control of the Governor’s mansion and trying to flip our House seats red. Their agenda to give more tax breaks to the ultra-wealthy comes at the expense of hardworking families, with Trump and Congressional Republicans completely decimating our health care and food assistance programs.

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Republicans want our votes? Not so easy.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
If Republicans want our votes, they need to reverse health care cuts.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2645%2E4032634%2E23Cjje)
---
The government will run out of money on October 1 if Republicans don’t pass a budget. But none of us in good conscience can co-sign a government that just ripped away health care for moms giving birth, elderly loved ones who need wheelchairs, and babies who need check-ups — all to hand that money over to billionaire CEOs instead. The Republicans led by Donald Trump have created a full-blown health care crisis. Since they passed their “One Big Beautiful Bill” — which Trump is now scrambling to rebrand because Americans hate it so much — 15 million people now won’t have health care benefits. Nursing homes are closing. Community clinics are shuttering. Hospitals are filled to the brim with patients. And in under 30 days, millions and millions of people are going to get letters from their health insurer saying their premiums will go up — by a lot. **That’s why I’ve taken a stand to say: If Republicans want Democratic votes on our government budget, they need to reverse their giant health care cuts. This is worth fighting for — and I’m not backing down.** We want health care for the American people. If Republicans don’t, then they need to explain that, not just to Democrats, but to every single American. They need to explain why newborn babies should lose health care just so that Jeff Bezos can bankroll his third yacht. They need to explain why seniors should be tossed out of their nursing homes so that Trump can fund ICE rounding up citizens in unmarked vans. They need to explain why rural hospitals should close so that companies like Meta can get more tax handouts. This is a moment for Democrats to put up a fight. We should refuse to roll over while Donald Trump and the Republicans rip away health care from millions of people — many of them the most vulnerable among us. I’m going to keep up this fight with all I’ve got. Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth

---
| | | |
---

name: Democrats.org
subject: re: Virginia
body:
Please give us just a minute to explain:
---
Derek, There are only a few days until early voting begins in Virginia. The stakes couldn’t be higher: This is Democrats’ _only_ opportunity this year to flip a governor’s seat from red to blue and elect a Democratic trifecta. [**If that’s all you need to hear, you can use this link to split a contribution between the Virginia Democratic Party’s Coordinated Campaign and the DNC.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-vadcc-split?amount=20&refcode=em_20250917_4592_fr&refcode2=4592_22930333_iWL9HU&akid=4592%2E22930333%2EiWL9HU) Otherwise, we hope you’ll please give us just a minute to explain why the outcome of this election will impact _all_ of us: Winning the gubernatorial race in Virginia — and as many races as we can down the ballot — will set the tone for 2026. By showing up BIG in states like Virginia, we’ll send a powerful message that voters are ready for new leadership who puts their constituents’ needs first. That’s why we’re all in to win this fall. We’re working tirelessly to connect with as many voters as we can in the final, crucial stretch of this election, and to win over the undecided persuadable voters who will decide the outcome. This work is not easy. And it’s not possible without your support. With time running out before voters begin casting ballots, your support is especially important right now. [**That’s why today we’re asking you to split a $20 contribution between the DNC and the Virginia Democratic Party’s Coordinated Campaign. Your contribution today will help us reach Virginians before they head to the polls.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-vadcc-split?amount=20&refcode=em_20250917_4592_fr&refcode2=4592_22930333_iWL9HU&akid=4592%2E22930333%2EiWL9HU) _If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your split contribution between the Virginia Democratic Party’s Coordinated Campaign and the Democratic National Committee instantly:_ | | | **[Donate $20](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-vadcc-split?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=em_20250917_4592_fr&refcode2=4592_22930333_iWL9HU&akid=4592%2E22930333%2EiWL9HU)**
